papers.title: HyCOP: Hybrid Composition Operators for Interpretable Learning of PDEs
papers.summary: We introduce HyCOP, a modular framework that learns parametric PDE solution operators by composing simple modules (advection, diffusion, learned closures, boundary handling) in a query-conditioned way. Rather than learning a monolithic map, HyCOP learns a policy over short programs - which module to apply and for how long - conditioned on regime features and state statistics. Modules may be numerical sub-solvers or learned components, enabling hybrid surrogates evaluated at arbitrary query times without autoregressive rollout. Across diverse PDE benchmarks, HyCOP produces interpretable programs, delivers order-of-magnitude OOD improvements over monolithic neural operators, and supports modular transfer through dictionary updates (e.g., boundary swaps, residual enrichment). Our theory characterizes expressivity and gives an error decomposition that separates composition error from module error and doubles as a process-level diagnostic.

ai.tldr: HyCOP是一个模块化框架，通过学习组合简单模块（如平流、扩散、学习闭合和边界处理）来学习参数化偏微分方程解算子，支持查询条件化组合和混合代理，无需自回归滚动即可在任意查询时间评估。
ai.motivation: 现有神经算子通常学习单一映射，缺乏可解释性和模块化，难以处理分布外场景和模块化迁移。
ai.method: HyCOP学习一个策略，根据区域特征和状态统计选择应用哪个模块以及应用多长时间，模块可以是数值子求解器或学习组件，通过字典更新支持模块化迁移。
ai.result: 在多种偏微分方程基准上，HyCOP生成可解释程序，在分布外场景中比单一神经算子提升一个数量级，并支持边界交换和残差丰富等模块化迁移。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解偏微分方程解算子的学习过程，提供可解释的模块组合和高效的分布外泛化能力。

idea_spark.idea: 将HyCOP的模块化思想应用于强化学习中的策略组合，或用于可解释的机器人控制程序生成。
idea_spark.risk: 模块定义可能依赖领域知识，自动发现模块可能增加复杂性；组合策略的搜索空间可能随模块数量指数增长。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受编程语言中函数组合和条件分支的启发，将偏微分方程求解视为短程序执行，提升可解释性和泛化性。

en.tldr: HyCOP is a modular framework that learns parametric PDE solution operators by composing simple modules (advection, diffusion, learned closures, boundary handling) in a query-conditioned way, enabling interpretable programs and hybrid surrogates evaluated at arbitrary query times without autoregressive rollout.
en.motivation: Existing neural operators typically learn monolithic maps, lacking interpretability and modularity, and struggle with out-of-distribution scenarios and modular transfer.
en.method: HyCOP learns a policy over short programs—which module to apply and for how long—conditioned on regime features and state statistics, with modules being numerical sub-solvers or learned components, supporting modular transfer via dictionary updates.
en.result: Across diverse PDE benchmarks, HyCOP produces interpretable programs, delivers order-of-magnitude OOD improvements over monolithic neural operators, and supports modular transfer (e.g., boundary swaps, residual enrichment).
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand the learning process of PDE solution operators with interpretable module compositions and efficient out-of-distribution generalization.

idea_spark.idea: Apply HyCOP's modularity to policy composition in reinforcement learning or to interpretable robot control program generation.
idea_spark.risk: Module definitions may rely on domain knowledge; automatic module discovery could increase complexity; the search space for composition strategies may grow exponentially with the number of modules.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by function composition and conditional branching in programming languages, treating PDE solving as short program execution to enhance interpretability and generalization.

papers.title: Learning the Helmholtz equation operator with DeepONet for non-parametric 2D geometries
papers.summary: This paper deals with solving the 2D Helmholtz equation on non-parametric domains, leveraging a physics-informed neural operator network based on the DeepONet framework. We consider a 2D square domain with an inclusion of arbitrary boundary geometry at its center. This inclusion acts as a scatterer for an incoming harmonic wave. The aim is to learn the operator linking the geometry of the scatterer to the resulting scattered field. A signed distance function to the boundary of the inner inclusion, evaluated at several points in the domain, is used to encode its geometry. It serves as input for the branch part of the DeepONet architecture, while local information is used as input for the trunk part. This approach enables the encoding of arbitrary geometries, whether they are parameterized or not. The evaluation of the model on unseen geometries is compared with its finite element method (FEM) equivalent to test its generalization capabilities. The trained network weights implicitly embed the local physics and their interaction with the domain geometry. If the training space sufficiently covers the target evaluation space, the model can generalize accordingly. Furthermore, it can be refined to extend to another region of interest without retraining from scratch. This framework also avoids the need to remesh the domain for each geometry. The proposed approach delivers a computationally lighter surrogate model than FEM alternatives and avoids relying on FEM-generated training data.

ai.tldr: 提出基于DeepONet的物理信息神经算子，学习非参数二维几何上的亥姆霍兹方程算子，避免重网格化，计算量轻于有限元法。
ai.motivation: 传统有限元法求解含任意形状散射体的亥姆霍兹方程需频繁重网格，计算成本高。
ai.method: 用符号距离函数编码散射体几何作为分支网络输入，局部坐标作为主干网络输入，训练DeepONet学习几何到散射场的映射。
ai.result: 模型在未见几何上泛化良好，可微调扩展至新区域，无需从头训练，计算量显著低于有限元法。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种无需重网格、计算高效的亥姆霍兹方程求解替代方案，适用于任意二维几何散射问题。

idea_spark.idea: 将符号距离函数与DeepONet结合，实现非参数几何的算子学习，避免传统网格依赖。
idea_spark.risk: 训练空间需充分覆盖目标几何空间，否则泛化可能受限；符号距离函数采样点数量影响精度。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将几何编码与神经算子结合，用于更复杂的多物理场或高维几何问题。

idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将几何编码与神经算子结合，用于更复杂的多物理场或高维几何问题。

en.tldr: Proposes a physics-informed neural operator based on DeepONet to learn the Helmholtz equation operator on non-parametric 2D geometries, avoiding remeshing and being computationally lighter than FEM.
en.motivation: Traditional FEM requires frequent remeshing for solving the Helmholtz equation with arbitrary-shaped scatterers, leading to high computational cost.
en.method: Encodes scatterer geometry via signed distance function as branch input and local coordinates as trunk input, training DeepONet to map geometry to scattered field.
en.result: The model generalizes well to unseen geometries, can be fine-tuned to new regions without retraining from scratch, and is significantly lighter than FEM.
en.help_to_user: Provides a remeshing-free, computationally efficient surrogate for solving the Helmholtz equation on arbitrary 2D geometries.

idea_spark.idea: Combine signed distance function with DeepONet to enable operator learning for non-parametric geometries, bypassing traditional mesh dependency.
idea_spark.risk: The training space must sufficiently cover the target geometry space; otherwise, generalization may be limited. Sampling density of the signed distance function affects accuracy.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires combining geometric encoding with neural operators for more complex multiphysics or high-dimensional geometry problems.

papers.title: Beyond Continuity: Simulation-free Reconstruction of Discrete Branching Dynamics from Single-cell Snapshots
papers.summary: Inferring cellular trajectories from destructive snapshots is complicated by the challenges of stochasticity and non-conservative mass dynamics such as cell proliferation and apoptosis. Existing unbalanced Optimal Transport (OT) methods treat mass as a continuous fluid, performing inference at the population level. However, this macroscopic view often fails to capture the discrete, jump-like nature of birth-death events at single-cell resolution, which is essential for understanding lineage branching and fate decisions. We present Unbalanced Schrödinger Bridge (USB), a simulation-free framework for learning underlying dynamics that effectively integrates both stochastic and unbalanced effects which also models the discrete, jump-like birth-death dynamics at single-cell resolution. Theoretically, USB provides a tractable solution to the Branching Schrödinger Bridge (BSB) problem, offering a rigorous microscopic interpretation where individual cells undergo both Brownian motion and discrete birth-death jumps. Technically, the method implements an efficient solver by introducing a simulation-free training objective that effectively scales to high-dimensional omics data. Empirically, we demonstrate on both simulated and real-world datasets that USB not only achieves trajectory reconstruction performance better than or comparable to deterministic baselines but also uniquely enables realistic discrete simulation of birth-death dynamics at single-cell resolution.

ai.tldr: 提出无模拟的Unbalanced Schrödinger Bridge框架，从单细胞快照数据中重建离散分支动力学。
ai.motivation: 现有非平衡最优传输方法将细胞质量视为连续流体，无法捕捉单细胞分辨率的离散出生-死亡事件，影响谱系分支和命运决策的理解。
ai.method: USB框架通过引入分支Schrödinger桥问题的可解形式，结合布朗运动和离散出生-死亡跳跃，并设计无模拟训练目标以高效扩展到高维组学数据。
ai.result: 在模拟和真实数据集上，USB在轨迹重建性能上达到或优于确定性基线，并能唯一实现单细胞分辨率的离散出生-死亡动力学真实模拟。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户从单细胞快照数据中推断细胞谱系轨迹，并模拟离散的细胞增殖和凋亡过程。

idea_spark.idea: 将分支Schrödinger桥问题与无模拟优化结合，为单细胞动力学提供微观解释。
idea_spark.risk: 对大规模真实数据可能面临计算资源需求高、超参数敏感等挑战。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受非平衡最优传输和Schrödinger桥理论启发，将离散出生-死亡过程融入连续扩散框架。

idea_spark.inspiration: 受非平衡最优传输和Schrödinger桥理论启发，将离散出生-死亡过程融入连续扩散框架。

en.tldr: Proposes Unbalanced Schrödinger Bridge, a simulation-free framework to reconstruct discrete branching dynamics from single-cell snapshots.
en.motivation: Existing unbalanced optimal transport methods treat cell mass as continuous fluid, failing to capture discrete birth-death events at single-cell resolution, which is crucial for understanding lineage branching and fate decisions.
en.method: USB provides a tractable solution to the Branching Schrödinger Bridge problem, integrating Brownian motion and discrete birth-death jumps, with a simulation-free training objective that scales to high-dimensional omics data.
en.result: On simulated and real datasets, USB achieves trajectory reconstruction performance comparable to or better than deterministic baselines, and uniquely enables realistic discrete simulation of birth-death dynamics at single-cell resolution.
en.help_to_user: Helps users infer cellular lineage trajectories from single-cell snapshots and simulate discrete cell proliferation and apoptosis processes.

idea_spark.idea: Combining the Branching Schrödinger Bridge problem with simulation-free optimization provides a microscopic interpretation for single-cell dynamics.
idea_spark.risk: May face challenges such as high computational resource demands and hyperparameter sensitivity on large-scale real data.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by unbalanced optimal transport and Schrödinger bridge theory, incorporating discrete birth-death processes into a continuous diffusion framework.

papers.title: Conformalized Quantum DeepONet Ensembles for Scalable Operator Learning with Distribution-Free Uncertainty
papers.summary: Operator learning enables fast surrogate modeling of high-dimensional dynamical systems, but existing approaches face two fundamental limitations: quadratic inference complexity and unreliable uncertainty quantification in safety-critical settings. We propose Conformalized Quantum DeepONet Ensembles, a framework that addresses both challenges simultaneously. By leveraging Quantum Orthogonal Neural Networks (QOrthoNNs), we reduce operator inference complexity from O(n^2) to O(n), enabling scalable evaluation over fine discretizations. To provide rigorous uncertainty quantification, we combine ensemble-based epistemic modeling with adaptive conformal prediction, yielding distribution-free coverage guarantees. A key challenge in ensembling is that naive parallelism scales hardware resources linearly with the number of models. We resolve this by using Superposed Parameterized Quantum Circuits (SPQCs), which compress multiple ensemble members into a single circuit and enable simultaneous multi-model execution. Experiments on synthetic partial differential equations and real-world power system dynamics demonstrate that our approach achieves accurate predictions while maintaining calibrated uncertainty under realistic quantum noise. These results establish a practical pathway toward scalable, uncertainty-aware operator learning in quantum machine learning.

ai.tldr: 提出一种结合量子正交神经网络和自适应共形预测的框架，实现可扩展且无分布假设的不确定性量化算子学习。
ai.motivation: 现有算子学习方法推理复杂度高且不确定性量化不可靠，难以用于安全关键场景。
ai.method: 使用量子正交神经网络将推理复杂度从O(n²)降至O(n)；通过集成建模与自适应共形预测提供分布自由覆盖保证；利用叠加参数化量子电路将多个集成成员压缩至单个电路，实现并行执行。
ai.result: 在合成偏微分方程和真实电力系统动力学实验中，该方法在量子噪声下仍能保持准确预测和校准的不确定性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何结合量子计算与共形预测实现高效、可靠的不确定性量化算子学习。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将叠加参数化量子电路与更广泛的集成方法（如贝叶斯神经网络）结合，以进一步提升不确定性估计的鲁棒性。
idea_spark.risk: 当前方法依赖量子硬件，实际量子噪声可能影响性能；共形预测的覆盖保证在非交换设置下需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受量子计算并行性启发，利用量子叠加态实现高效集成，为经典机器学习中的集成压缩提供新思路。

idea_spark.inspiration: 受量子计算并行性启发，利用量子叠加态实现高效集成，为经典机器学习中的集成压缩提供新思路。

en.tldr: Proposes a framework combining Quantum Orthogonal Neural Networks and adaptive conformal prediction for scalable, distribution-free uncertainty quantification in operator learning.
en.motivation: Existing operator learning methods suffer from quadratic inference complexity and unreliable uncertainty quantification, limiting their use in safety-critical applications.
en.method: Uses Quantum Orthogonal Neural Networks to reduce inference complexity from O(n²) to O(n); combines ensemble-based epistemic modeling with adaptive conformal prediction for distribution-free coverage guarantees; employs Superposed Parameterized Quantum Circuits to compress multiple ensemble members into a single circuit for parallel execution.
en.result: Experiments on synthetic PDEs and real-world power system dynamics show accurate predictions and calibrated uncertainty under realistic quantum noise.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to combine quantum computing with conformal prediction for efficient and reliable uncertainty-aware operator learning.

idea_spark.idea: Explore combining Superposed Parameterized Quantum Circuits with broader ensemble methods (e.g., Bayesian neural networks) to further improve robustness of uncertainty estimates.
idea_spark.risk: The approach relies on quantum hardware; actual quantum noise may degrade performance; conformal prediction coverage guarantees need further validation in non-commutative settings.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by quantum parallelism, using quantum superposition for efficient ensembling offers a new perspective for ensemble compression in classical machine learning.

papers.title: An approach to encode divergence-free stress fields in neural approximations based on stress potentials
papers.summary: The purpose of the current work is the development of an approach to account for quasi-static mechanical equilibrium in empirical (i.e., data-based) models for the stress field employing neural approximations (NAs), which include neural networks (NNs) and neural operators (NOs), in particular Fourier NOs (FNOs). Rather than including such constraints from physics in the loss function as done in the (now standard) physics-informed approach, the current approach incorporates or "encodes" such constraints directly into the architecture of the NA. As a result, both NA training and output are physically constrained in the physics-encoded approach, in contrast to the physics-informed approach, in which only training is physically constrained. For the current constraint of divergence-free stress, a novel encoding approach based on a stress potential is proposed. As a "proof-of-concept" example application of the current approach, a physics-encoded FNO (PeFNO) is developed for a heterogeneous polycrystalline material consisting of isotropic elastic grains and subject to uniaxial extension. Stress field data for this purpose are obtained from the numerical solution of corresponding boundary-value problems for quasi-static mechanical equilibrium. For comparison with the PeFNO, this data is also employed to develop an analogous physics-guided FNO (PgFNO) and physics-informed FNO (PiFNO). As expected theoretically, and confirmed by this computational comparison, for comparable accuracy of the stress field itself as compared to the data, the stress field output by the trained and tested PeFNO is significantly more accurate in satisfying mechanical equilibrium than the output of either the PgFNO or the PiFNO.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于应力势的编码方法，将无散应力场约束直接嵌入神经近似架构，确保输出自动满足力学平衡。
ai.motivation: 传统物理信息方法仅通过损失函数约束训练，无法保证输出严格满足物理定律。
ai.method: 利用应力势函数构造网络输出层，使应力场自动满足无散条件，无需额外损失项。
ai.result: 在异质多晶材料拉伸算例中，物理编码FNO的应力平衡误差显著低于物理引导和物理信息方法。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种将物理约束直接嵌入神经网络架构的通用范式，适用于需要严格满足偏微分方程的应用。

idea_spark.idea: 将应力势作为网络隐变量，通过自动微分计算应力场，确保无散性。
idea_spark.risk: 应力势的选取可能依赖问题几何和边界条件，通用性需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受经典弹性力学中Airy应力函数启发，将解析约束转化为网络结构设计。

zh.result: 在异质多晶材料拉伸算例中，物理编码FNO的应力平衡误差显著低于物理引导和物理信息方法。
zh.help_to_user: 提供一种将物理约束直接嵌入神经网络架构的通用范式，适用于需要严格满足偏微分方程的应用。

idea_spark.idea: 将应力势作为网络隐变量，通过自动微分计算应力场，确保无散性。
idea_spark.risk: 应力势的选取可能依赖问题几何和边界条件，通用性需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受经典弹性力学中Airy应力函数启发，将解析约束转化为网络结构设计。

en.tldr: A stress-potential-based encoding approach embeds divergence-free stress constraints directly into neural architectures, ensuring outputs automatically satisfy mechanical equilibrium.
en.motivation: Physics-informed methods only constrain training via loss functions, failing to guarantee strict physical compliance in outputs.
en.method: Construct network output layers using stress potentials so that stress fields are inherently divergence-free without additional loss terms.
en.result: On a heterogeneous polycrystalline extension example, the physics-encoded FNO achieves significantly lower equilibrium errors than physics-guided and physics-informed counterparts.
en.help_to_user: Provides a general paradigm for embedding physical constraints directly into neural network architectures, applicable to problems requiring strict PDE satisfaction.

idea_spark.idea: Use stress potentials as latent variables and compute stress via automatic differentiation to enforce divergence-free condition.
idea_spark.risk: The choice of stress potential may depend on problem geometry and boundary conditions, requiring further validation of generality.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the Airy stress function in classical elasticity, translating analytical constraints into network design.

papers.title: RETO: A Rotary-Enhanced Transformer Operator for High-Fidelity Prediction of Automotive Aerodynamics
papers.summary: Rapid aerodynamic evaluation is crucial for modern vehicle design, yet existing neural operators struggle to capture intricate spatial correlations. We propose the rotary-enhanced transformer operator (RETO), a novel neural solver featuring a dual-stage spatial awareness mechanism: sinusoidal-cosine encodings for global referencing and rotary positional encodings (RoPE) for relative displacements. RoPE encodes spatial relations via unitary rotations, enforcing translation invariance and enhancing local gradient resolution. RETO is validated on ShapeNet and the high-fidelity DrivAerML benchmark. On ShapeNet, RETO achieves a relative $L_2$ error of 0.063, outperforming RegDGCNN at 0.125 and representing a 16\% improvement over the Transolver baseline, which yields an error of 0.075. These performance gains are further amplified on the DrivAerML dataset, where RETO achieves relative $L_2$ errors of 0.089 for surface pressure and 0.097 for velocity. In comparison, Transolver results in errors of 0.116 and 0.121 for the same metrics, indicating that RETO achieves precision enhancements of 23\% and 19\%, respectively. For comprehensive comparison, the surface pressure and velocity errors for AB-UBT are 0.102 and 0.124, while RegDGCNN yields 0.235 and 0.312, respectively. Information-theoretical analysis shows that the entropy peak of RETO at 0.35 is significantly lower than that of Transolver at 0.75 under $10^4$ resolution, indicating a focused attentional mechanism capable of preserving localized gradients against global diffusion.

ai.tldr: 提出一种旋转增强的Transformer算子（RETO），用于汽车空气动力学高保真预测，在ShapeNet和DrivAerML基准上显著优于现有方法。
ai.motivation: 现有神经算子难以捕捉汽车空气动力学中复杂的空间相关性，导致预测精度不足。
ai.method: 设计双阶段空间感知机制：正弦-余弦编码提供全局参考，旋转位置编码（RoPE）编码相对位移，通过幺正旋转强制平移不变性并增强局部梯度分辨率。
ai.result: 在ShapeNet上相对L2误差0.063，优于RegDGCNN（0.125）和Transolver（0.075）；在DrivAerML上表面压力误差0.089、速度误差0.097，比Transolver分别提升23%和19%。信息论分析显示RETO熵峰0.35，远低于Transolver的0.75，表明注意力更聚焦。
ai.help_to_user: 可用于汽车外形快速气动评估，提升设计迭代效率。

idea_spark.idea: 将旋转位置编码与全局正弦-余弦编码结合，在保持平移不变性的同时增强局部梯度分辨率。
idea_spark.risk: RoPE的幺正旋转假设可能不适用于非欧几里得或各向异性空间。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从相对位置编码的旋转表示出发，启发设计更通用的空间感知机制。

en.tldr: Proposes a rotary-enhanced transformer operator (RETO) for high-fidelity automotive aerodynamic prediction, significantly outperforming existing methods on ShapeNet and DrivAerML benchmarks.
en.motivation: Existing neural operators struggle to capture intricate spatial correlations in automotive aerodynamics, leading to insufficient prediction accuracy.
en.method: Designs a dual-stage spatial awareness mechanism: sinusoidal-cosine encodings for global referencing and rotary positional encodings (RoPE) for relative displacements, enforcing translation invariance via unitary rotations and enhancing local gradient resolution.
en.result: On ShapeNet, relative L2 error of 0.063, outperforming RegDGCNN (0.125) and Transolver (0.075); on DrivAerML, surface pressure error 0.089 and velocity error 0.097, achieving 23% and 19% improvements over Transolver. Information-theoretic analysis shows RETO entropy peak 0.35 vs Transolver's 0.75, indicating more focused attention.
en.help_to_user: Enables rapid aerodynamic evaluation for vehicle design, accelerating design iteration.

idea_spark.idea: Combines rotary positional encodings with global sinusoidal-cosine encodings to preserve translation invariance while enhancing local gradient resolution.
idea_spark.risk: The unitary rotation assumption of RoPE may not hold for non-Euclidean or anisotropic spaces.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by rotational representations of relative position encodings, suggesting more general spatial awareness mechanisms.

papers.title: Human-in-the-Loop Meta Bayesian Optimization for Fusion Energy and Scientific Applications
papers.summary: Inertial Confinement Fusion (ICF) holds transformative promise for sustainable, near-limitless clean energy, yet remains constrained by prohibitively high costs and limited experimental opportunities. This paper presents Human-in-the-Loop Meta Bayesian Optimization (HL-MBO), a framework that integrates expert knowledge with few-shot, uncertainty-aware machine learning to accelerate discovery in data-scarce, high-stakes scientific domains. HL-MBO introduces a meta-learned surrogate model with an expert-informed acquisition function to recommend candidate experiments. To foster trust and enable informed decisions, HL-MBO also provides interpretable explanations of its suggestions. We show HL-MBO outperforms current BO methods on ICF energy yield optimization, as well as benchmarks in molecular optimization and critical temperature maximization for superconducting materials.

ai.tldr: 提出人机协同元贝叶斯优化框架，结合专家知识与少样本机器学习，加速惯性约束聚变等数据稀缺科学领域的实验设计。
ai.motivation: 惯性约束聚变实验成本极高、机会有限，传统优化方法难以高效探索参数空间。
ai.method: 构建元学习代理模型，并设计专家知识驱动的采集函数，同时提供可解释性建议以增强信任。
ai.result: 在聚变能量产额优化、分子优化和超导材料临界温度最大化任务上均优于现有贝叶斯优化方法。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助科研人员在实验资源稀缺时，利用领域知识更高效地选择下一步实验方案。

idea_spark.idea: 将专家知识显式编码为采集函数的先验，并利用元学习实现跨任务知识迁移。
idea_spark.risk: 专家知识的主观性可能引入偏差，且元学习需要足够多的历史任务数据。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合可解释AI与主动学习，让专家不仅接受建议，还能理解建议背后的推理过程。

en.tldr: Proposes Human-in-the-Loop Meta Bayesian Optimization, integrating expert knowledge with few-shot uncertainty-aware ML to accelerate experiment design in data-scarce scientific domains like inertial confinement fusion.
en.motivation: ICF experiments are extremely costly and limited; traditional optimization struggles to efficiently explore the parameter space.
en.method: Builds a meta-learned surrogate model with an expert-informed acquisition function, and provides interpretable explanations to foster trust.
en.result: Outperforms current BO methods on ICF energy yield optimization, molecular optimization, and critical temperature maximization for superconductors.
en.help_to_user: Helps researchers leverage domain knowledge to select next experiments more efficiently under scarce experimental resources.

idea_spark.idea: Explicitly encode expert knowledge as a prior in the acquisition function and use meta-learning for cross-task knowledge transfer.
idea_spark.risk: Subjectivity of expert knowledge may introduce bias, and meta-learning requires sufficient historical task data.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combine explainable AI with active learning so that experts not only receive suggestions but also understand the reasoning behind them.

papers.title: Binomial flows: Denoising and flow matching for discrete ordinal data
papers.summary: Flow-based generative modeling in continuous spaces exploit Tweedie's formula to express the denoiser (learned in training) as a score function (used in sampling). In contrast, this relation has been largely missing in the discrete setting where common approaches focus on learning discrete scores and rates. In this work we close this gap for discrete non-negative ordinal data by introducing Binomial flows. Our framework provides a simple recipe for training a discrete diffusion model which simultaneously denoises, samples, and estimates exact likelihoods. We verify our methodology on synthetic examples and obtain competitive results on real-world data sets.

ai.tldr: 提出二项流框架，将连续空间中的Tweedie公式推广到离散序数数据，实现去噪、采样和似然估计的统一。
ai.motivation: 离散序数数据的生成建模中，缺乏类似连续空间中Tweedie公式的简洁关系，现有方法主要学习离散得分或速率。
ai.method: 引入二项流，为离散非负序数数据设计训练方案，同时学习去噪、采样和精确似然估计。
ai.result: 在合成数据上验证方法有效性，在真实数据集上取得有竞争力的结果。
ai.help_to_user: 提供处理离散序数数据的生成模型新工具，简化训练和采样流程。

idea_spark.idea: 将Tweedie公式推广到离散序数数据，实现去噪与得分函数的统一。
idea_spark.risk: 对非序数离散数据（如无序类别）可能不适用，需额外处理。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受连续空间流匹配和扩散模型的启发，探索离散序数数据的类似理论关系。

en.tldr: Proposes Binomial flows, extending Tweedie's formula to discrete ordinal data for unified denoising, sampling, and likelihood estimation.
en.motivation: Discrete ordinal generative modeling lacks a simple relation like Tweedie's formula in continuous spaces; existing methods learn discrete scores or rates.
en.method: Introduces Binomial flows, a training recipe for discrete non-negative ordinal data that simultaneously denoises, samples, and estimates exact likelihoods.
en.result: Validated on synthetic examples and achieves competitive results on real-world datasets.
en.help_to_user: Provides a new tool for generative modeling of discrete ordinal data, simplifying training and sampling.

idea_spark.idea: Generalizes Tweedie's formula to discrete ordinal data, unifying denoising and score functions.
idea_spark.risk: May not apply to non-ordinal discrete data (e.g., unordered categories) without additional handling.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by flow matching and diffusion models in continuous spaces, exploring analogous theoretical relations for discrete ordinal data.

papers.title: Soft Graph Diffusion Transformer for MIMO Detection
papers.summary: Learning-based MIMO detection has shown strong empirical performance, yet existing methods typically rely on fixed-depth architectures without explicitly modeling the progressive refinement of symbol estimates. In this paper, we revisit MIMO detection from a flow matching perspective and propose the Soft Graph Diffusion Transformer (SGDiT), which reformulates detection as a noise-level-conditioned denoising process that progressively transforms a Gaussian initialization toward the posterior conditioned on channel observations. An adaptive layer normalization (AdaLN)-conditioned soft graph transformer is employed to parameterize the denoising dynamics, enabling stage-aware information integration between observation and symbol domains. To better align with the discrete nature of symbol detection, we further adopt a cross-entropy-based training objective that directly models bit-wise posterior probabilities, providing a more suitable inductive bias than conventional regression-based formulations. Experimental results across various MIMO system configurations demonstrate that SGDiT achieves competitive bit error rate (BER) performance compared with representative baselines. Furthermore, the proposed model exhibits good generalization capability across different channel conditions. Overall, the SGDiT framework provides an effective and practical approach for neural MIMO detection.

ai.tldr: 提出软图扩散变换器（SGDiT），将MIMO检测重新表述为基于噪声水平的去噪过程，采用自适应层归一化条件软图变换器参数化去噪动态，并使用交叉熵训练目标直接建模比特后验概率，在多种MIMO配置下实现竞争性的误码率性能。
ai.motivation: 现有基于学习的MIMO检测方法通常依赖固定深度架构，未显式建模符号估计的渐进细化过程。
ai.method: 从流匹配视角出发，将检测视为噪声水平条件去噪过程，采用AdaLN条件软图变换器参数化去噪动态，并引入交叉熵训练目标直接建模比特后验概率。
ai.result: 在多种MIMO系统配置下，SGDiT相比代表性基线实现了有竞争力的误码率性能，并展现出良好的跨信道条件泛化能力。
ai.help_to_user: 为MIMO检测提供了一种基于扩散模型的新颖有效方法，可提升通信系统性能。

idea_spark.idea: 将流匹配与图变换器结合，通过噪声水平条件去噪实现渐进式符号估计，并采用交叉熵损失替代回归损失以更好匹配离散检测特性。
idea_spark.risk: 训练复杂度可能较高，且对信道模型假设的依赖性可能影响实际部署的鲁棒性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从流匹配视角重新审视检测问题，启发将连续扩散过程与离散检测任务结合的新思路。

idea_spark.risk: 训练复杂度可能较高，且对信道模型假设的依赖性可能影响实际部署的鲁棒性。

en.tldr: Proposes Soft Graph Diffusion Transformer (SGDiT), reformulating MIMO detection as a noise-level-conditioned denoising process, parameterized by an AdaLN-conditioned soft graph transformer, and using cross-entropy training to directly model bit-wise posteriors, achieving competitive BER across various MIMO configurations.
en.motivation: Existing learning-based MIMO detectors rely on fixed-depth architectures without explicitly modeling progressive refinement of symbol estimates.
en.method: From a flow matching perspective, detection is treated as a noise-level-conditioned denoising process; an AdaLN-conditioned soft graph transformer parameterizes the denoising dynamics, and a cross-entropy objective directly models bit-wise posterior probabilities.
en.result: SGDiT achieves competitive BER performance compared to representative baselines across various MIMO configurations and shows good generalization across different channel conditions.
en.help_to_user: Provides an effective diffusion-based approach for MIMO detection, potentially improving communication system performance.

idea_spark.idea: Combines flow matching with graph transformers for progressive symbol estimation via noise-level-conditioned denoising, and replaces regression loss with cross-entropy to better align with discrete detection.
idea_spark.risk: Training complexity may be high, and reliance on channel model assumptions could affect robustness in real deployment.
idea_spark.inspiration: Revisiting detection from a flow matching perspective inspires new ways to integrate continuous diffusion processes with discrete detection tasks.

papers.title: Free Energy Surface Sampling via Reduced Flow Matching
papers.summary: Sampling the free energy surface, namely, the distribution of collective variables (CVs), is a crucial problem in statistical physics, as it underpins a better understanding of chemical reactions and conformational transitions. Traditional methods for free energy surface sampling involve simulation in high-dimensional configuration space and projecting the resulting configurations onto the CV space. To reduce the computational costs of such sampling, we propose FES-FM, a reduced flow matching (FM) method for free energy sampling (FES). We train a dynamical transport map in the CV space, thereby enabling direct sampling of the free energy surface. For many-particle systems, we construct a prior distribution based on the Hessian at a local minimum of the potential, which ensures both rotation-translation invariance and physically meaningful configurations. We evaluate the proposed method across a variety of potential functions and collective variables. Comparative experiments demonstrate that our approach drastically reduces computational costs while delivering superior accuracy per unit sampling time.

ai.tldr: 提出FES-FM方法，通过降维流匹配在集体变量空间直接采样自由能面，大幅降低计算成本。
ai.motivation: 传统自由能面采样需在高维构型空间模拟并投影，计算成本高。
ai.method: 在集体变量空间训练动态传输映射，并基于势能局部极小点的Hessian构造先验分布，保证旋转平移不变性和物理合理性。
ai.result: 在多种势函数和集体变量上，该方法显著降低计算成本，单位采样时间精度更高。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户高效计算自由能面，加速化学反应和构象转变研究。

idea_spark.idea: 将流匹配与集体变量空间结合，利用Hessian先验提升采样物理性。
idea_spark.risk: 先验分布依赖局部极小点，可能不适用于多势阱或非凸势能面。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受流匹配生成模型启发，将其应用于统计物理的自由能采样问题。

en.tldr: Proposes FES-FM, a reduced flow matching method that directly samples the free energy surface in collective variable space, drastically reducing computational cost.
en.motivation: Traditional free energy surface sampling requires simulation in high-dimensional configuration space and projection, which is computationally expensive.
en.method: Trains a dynamical transport map in CV space and constructs a prior based on the Hessian at a local potential minimum, ensuring rotation-translation invariance and physically meaningful configurations.
en.result: On various potentials and CVs, the method drastically reduces computational cost while delivering superior accuracy per unit sampling time.
en.help_to_user: Helps users efficiently compute free energy surfaces, accelerating studies of chemical reactions and conformational transitions.

idea_spark.idea: Combines flow matching with collective variable space, using Hessian prior to enhance physical plausibility of sampling.
idea_spark.risk: Prior depends on a local minimum, which may be unsuitable for multi-well or non-convex energy surfaces.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by flow matching generative models, applied to free energy sampling in statistical physics.

papers.title: PILIR: Physics-Informed Local Implicit Representation
papers.summary: Physics-Informed Neural Networks have become a powerful mesh-free method for solving partial differential equations, but their performance is often limited by spectral bias. Specifically, in standard MLPs used in PINNs, the global parameter coupling causes the model to prioritize learning low-frequency components, resulting in slow convergence for high-frequency details. To overcome this limitation, we introduce the Physics-Informed Local Implicit Representation (PILIR). Our approach separates the global physical domain into a discrete latent feature space and a continuous generative decoder. By using a learnable grid to encode explicit spatial locality, PILIR can capture high-frequency details locally, preventing dilution by global patterns. A generative neural operator then synthesizes these local latent features into continuous physical fields, allowing accurate reconstruction of fine-scale structures. Experiments on a range of challenging PDEs show that PILIR effectively mitigates spectral bias, thereby boosting the convergence of high-frequency details and achieving superior accuracy compared to state-of-the-art methods.

ai.tldr: 提出物理信息局部隐式表示（PILIR），通过可学习网格编码空间局部性，缓解谱偏差，提升高频细节收敛速度与求解精度。
ai.motivation: 标准PINN中MLP的全局参数耦合导致谱偏差，模型优先学习低频分量，高频细节收敛缓慢。
ai.method: 将全局物理域分解为离散隐特征空间与连续生成解码器，利用可学习网格编码显式空间局部性，再通过生成神经算子合成连续物理场。
ai.result: 在多种挑战性PDE上有效缓解谱偏差，加速高频细节收敛，精度优于现有方法。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种缓解谱偏差的通用框架，适用于需要高精度捕捉局部高频特征的PDE求解任务。

idea_spark.idea: 将PILIR的局部编码思想与自适应网格细化结合，动态分配网格分辨率以聚焦复杂区域。
idea_spark.risk: 可学习网格的离散化可能引入额外超参数，且对非均匀域或高维问题的扩展性需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受计算机图形学中隐式神经表示启发，将空间局部性显式编码引入物理信息学习。

en.tldr: Proposes Physics-Informed Local Implicit Representation (PILIR), which uses a learnable grid to encode spatial locality, mitigating spectral bias and improving convergence of high-frequency details and accuracy.
en.motivation: Standard PINNs with MLPs suffer from spectral bias due to global parameter coupling, prioritizing low-frequency learning and slowing high-frequency convergence.
en.method: Decomposes the global physical domain into a discrete latent feature space and a continuous generative decoder, using a learnable grid to encode explicit spatial locality, then synthesizes continuous fields via a generative neural operator.
en.result: Effectively mitigates spectral bias on challenging PDEs, accelerates high-frequency detail convergence, and achieves superior accuracy over state-of-the-art methods.
en.help_to_user: Provides a general framework to alleviate spectral bias, suitable for PDE solving tasks requiring high-fidelity capture of local high-frequency features.

idea_spark.idea: Combine PILIR's local encoding with adaptive mesh refinement to dynamically allocate grid resolution for complex regions.
idea_spark.risk: Discretization via learnable grid may introduce extra hyperparameters, and scalability to non-uniform domains or high-dimensional problems needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by implicit neural representations in computer graphics, explicitly encoding spatial locality into physics-informed learning.

papers.title: Formation and Behavior of Dirac Singularities in the Parabolic-Elliptic Keller-Segel System in Dimensions $n\geq 3$
papers.summary: We consider nonnegative radially symmetric solutions of the parabolic-elliptic Keller-Segel system \begin{align*} \left\lbrace \begin{array}{r@{}l@{\quad}l} &u_t=Δu-\nabla \cdot \big(u\nabla v\big),\\ &0=Δv -μ+ u , \\ \end{array}\right. \end{align*} where $μ$ is the spatial average of $u$, under homogeneous Neumann boundary conditions in a ball in $\mathbb R^n$ for $n\geq 3$. In two dimensions, it is well established that solutions blowing up in finite time converge to a Dirac profile in the vague topology. In contrast, for $n\geq 3$, blow-up solutions with finite existence time do not appear to exhibit such concentration behavior. By generalizing to measure-valued solutions corresponding to accumulated densities of $u$, we extend the analysis beyond the blow-up time. Within this framework, we establish the existence of a minimal solution \[ u(t)=θ(t)δ_0 + ρ(\cdot,t) dx, \qquad t \geq 0, \] where $ρ$ is integrable and $θ$ is increasing and right-continuous. We further construct a class of initial data for which $θ(t_0)>0$ for some $t_0>0$, thereby establishing the formation of a Dirac mass at the origin. Unlike in the case $n=2$, the singular mass does not jump to a positive level instantaneously; instead, $θ$ becomes positive continuously. Moreover, $θ$ is strictly increasing on $[t_0,\infty)$, and the entire mass is asymptotically absorbed at the origin.

ai.tldr: 研究n≥3维抛物-椭圆Keller-Segel系统中Dirac奇点的形成与行为，发现与二维情况不同，奇点质量连续增长而非瞬时跳跃。
ai.motivation: 二维Keller-Segel系统有限时间爆破解会收敛到Dirac分布，但n≥3时爆破解不显示这种集中行为，需要推广到测度值解以分析爆破后行为。
ai.method: 将解推广为测度值解，对应u的累积密度，建立最小解形式u(t)=θ(t)δ₀+ρ(·,t)dx，并构造初始数据证明Dirac质量的形成。
ai.result: 存在最小解，其中θ递增右连续；存在初始数据使θ(t₀)>0，奇点质量连续增长而非瞬时跳跃；θ在[t₀,∞)严格递增，全部质量渐近被原点吸收。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解高维Keller-Segel系统中奇点形成的机制，与二维情况的差异。

idea_spark.idea: 探索其他非线性扩散-聚集系统中奇点质量连续增长的条件。
idea_spark.risk: 高维情况下奇点形成机制可能更复杂，需严格分析。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将测度值解框架应用于肿瘤生长或趋化模型中的奇点分析。

en.tldr: Studies the formation and behavior of Dirac singularities in the parabolic-elliptic Keller-Segel system for n≥3, finding that unlike in 2D, the singular mass grows continuously rather than jumping instantaneously.
en.motivation: In 2D, finite-time blow-up solutions converge to a Dirac profile, but for n≥3 blow-up solutions do not exhibit such concentration; measure-valued solutions are needed to analyze post-blow-up behavior.
en.method: Generalizes to measure-valued solutions corresponding to accumulated densities of u, establishes a minimal solution of the form u(t)=θ(t)δ₀+ρ(·,t)dx, and constructs initial data proving Dirac mass formation.
en.result: Existence of a minimal solution with θ increasing and right-continuous; there exist initial data such that θ(t₀)>0, with singular mass growing continuously; θ is strictly increasing on [t₀,∞) and all mass is asymptotically absorbed at the origin.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the mechanism of singularity formation in higher-dimensional Keller-Segel systems and its difference from the 2D case.

idea_spark.idea: Explore conditions for continuous growth of singular mass in other nonlinear diffusion-aggregation systems.
idea_spark.risk: Singularity formation mechanisms in higher dimensions may be more complex and require rigorous analysis.
idea_spark.inspiration: Apply the measure-valued solution framework to analyze singularities in tumor growth or chemotaxis models.

papers.title: A Comparative Study of QSPR Methods on a Unique Multitask PAMPA dataset
papers.summary: We present a unique, multitask dataset comprising 143 drug and drug candidate molecules, each evaluated on in vitro, parallel artificial-membrane permeability assays (PAMPA) using six different model membranes. Using this resource, we systematically assess the effectiveness of various molecular descriptors and regression models in predicting passive membrane permeability. The studied models range from simple linear regression to a modern pre-trained transformer architecture. Particular attention is given to the trade-off between predictive performance and model interpretability, highlighting the challenges introduced by machine learning approaches. To our knowledge, this is the most comprehensive study on simultaneous modeling of multiple organ-specific PAMPA membranes to date, offering novel insights into membrane-specific permeability profiles.   We found that expert-designed physico-chemical property descriptors are more fitting for a limited sample size permeabilty study than deep learning based representations.

ai.tldr: 本研究构建了一个包含143种药物分子的多任务PAMPA数据集，系统比较了从线性回归到预训练Transformer的多种QSPR方法，发现专家设计的理化性质描述符在小样本渗透性研究中优于深度学习表示。
ai.motivation: 现有被动膜渗透性预测研究缺乏多膜、多任务比较，且深度学习模型的可解释性不足。
ai.method: 收集143种药物候选分子在六种不同模型膜上的PAMPA数据，评估多种分子描述符和回归模型（包括线性回归和预训练Transformer）的性能。
ai.result: 专家设计的理化性质描述符在有限样本量下表现更优，深度学习表示在可解释性上存在挑战。
ai.help_to_user: 为药物研发中膜渗透性预测提供方法选择依据，强调小样本场景下传统描述符的实用性。

idea_spark.idea: 结合专家描述符与轻量级机器学习模型，开发可解释的渗透性预测工具。
idea_spark.risk: 数据集规模小可能导致模型泛化性不足，需验证在更大分子库上的表现。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴多任务学习思想，利用不同膜之间的相关性提升预测精度。

en.tldr: This study presents a unique multitask PAMPA dataset of 143 drug molecules, systematically comparing QSPR methods from linear regression to pre-trained transformers, finding expert-designed descriptors more suitable for small-sample permeability studies.
en.motivation: Existing passive membrane permeability predictions lack multi-membrane, multi-task comparisons, and deep learning models suffer from interpretability issues.
en.method: Collected PAMPA data for 143 drug candidates on six model membranes, evaluated various molecular descriptors and regression models including linear regression and pre-trained transformers.
en.result: Expert-designed physicochemical descriptors outperformed deep learning representations in limited sample size settings, highlighting interpretability challenges.
en.help_to_user: Provides guidance on method selection for membrane permeability prediction in drug discovery, emphasizing the utility of traditional descriptors in small-sample scenarios.

idea_spark.idea: Combine expert descriptors with lightweight machine learning models to develop interpretable permeability prediction tools.
idea_spark.risk: Small dataset size may limit model generalization; validation on larger molecular libraries is needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leverage multi-task learning to exploit correlations among different membranes for improved prediction accuracy.

papers.title: Learning-Based Stackelberg Equilibrium Seeking with Application to Demand-Side Energy Management
papers.summary: Demand-side management (DSM) enables distribution system operators (DSOs) to steer electricity consumption through dynamic price signals or incentive mechanisms, thereby leveraging end-users' flexibility potential for delivering grid services. The resulting hierarchical interaction between the DSO and the end-users can be formulated as a Stackelberg game, where the operator dynamically sets the prices and the end-users optimally respond to them. Efficiently designing these price signals is challenging, as the users' response models are unknown or difficult to estimate. In this paper, we propose a learning-based zeroth-order algorithm for incentive design, in which the iterative update of the incentive signals is efficiently assisted by a data-driven online estimation of the users' responses. The proposed method is then proven to converge to an equilibrium tariff while allowing the DSO to estimate the decision-making problems at the user level. Moreover, the method preserves users' privacy, as the update rule of the DSO is solely based on observations of communicated end-user actions. Numerical simulations employing real-world data illustrate the efficient convergence of our learning-based proposed method, while significantly reducing the number of required interactions between the DSO and the end-users with respect to the state-of-the-art approach.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于学习的零阶算法，用于需求侧能源管理中的Stackelberg博弈均衡求解，无需用户响应模型先验知识。
ai.motivation: 配电网运营商需设计动态电价以引导用户用电，但用户响应模型未知或难以估计，传统方法交互次数多且隐私风险高。
ai.method: 采用零阶优化框架，通过数据驱动的在线估计迭代更新激励信号，仅依赖观测到的用户动作而非模型参数。
ai.result: 理论证明算法收敛至均衡电价，数值实验显示相比现有方法显著减少运营商与用户间的交互次数。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何在用户模型未知且保护隐私的条件下，通过在线学习实现电网需求侧管理的均衡定价。

idea_spark.idea: 将用户响应建模为黑箱函数，利用历史交互数据在线学习梯度信息，避免显式模型假设。
idea_spark.risk: 在线估计可能受噪声或非平稳用户行为影响，需进一步验证鲁棒性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受无模型强化学习启发，将激励设计视为序贯决策问题，通过观测反馈优化策略。

en.tldr: Proposes a learning-based zeroth-order algorithm for Stackelberg equilibrium seeking in demand-side energy management without requiring user response models.
en.motivation: Distribution system operators need to design dynamic prices to steer electricity consumption, but user response models are unknown or hard to estimate, leading to high interaction costs and privacy risks.
en.method: Uses a zeroth-order optimization framework with data-driven online estimation to iteratively update incentive signals, relying only on observed user actions rather than model parameters.
en.result: Theoretically proven to converge to equilibrium tariffs; numerical simulations show significantly fewer required interactions compared to state-of-the-art methods.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand how to achieve equilibrium pricing in demand-side management via online learning while preserving user privacy and without prior model knowledge.

idea_spark.idea: Model user responses as black-box functions and learn gradient information online from historical interaction data, avoiding explicit model assumptions.
idea_spark.risk: Online estimation may be affected by noise or non-stationary user behavior; robustness needs further validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by model-free reinforcement learning, treating incentive design as a sequential decision problem optimized via observed feedback.

papers.title: Asymptotic profiles for the Cauchy problem of semilinear beam equation with two variable coefficients in the subcritical case
papers.summary: In this paper, we consider the Cauchy problem for the semilinear beam equation in the subcritical case. We prove an asymptotic stability result of self-similar solutions of the associated parabolic problem. The proof of our results are based in the use of fine energy estimates in weighted spaces rewritten in the parabolic self-similar variables.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了次临界情形下半线性梁方程柯西问题的渐近行为，证明了相关抛物问题的自相似解的渐近稳定性。
ai.motivation: 理解半线性梁方程在次临界情形下的长时间渐近行为，特别是其解与抛物型自相似解的关系。
ai.method: 利用加权空间中的精细能量估计，并引入抛物自相似变量进行重写。
ai.result: 证明了次临界情形下半线性梁方程柯西问题的解渐近收敛到对应抛物问题的自相似解。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了半线性梁方程渐近分析的一种有效方法，可推广到其他色散或双曲型方程。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将类似方法用于临界或超临界情形，或推广到具有不同非线性项或高阶色散项的方程。
idea_spark.risk: 临界情形下可能遇到尺度不变性破坏或能量估计失效，需要更精细的调和分析工具。
idea_spark.inspiration: 抛物自相似变量方法为处理色散方程长时间行为提供了新视角，可结合数值模拟验证渐近形态。

en.tldr: This paper studies the asymptotic behavior of the Cauchy problem for the semilinear beam equation in the subcritical case, proving asymptotic stability of self-similar solutions of the associated parabolic problem.
en.motivation: To understand the long-time asymptotic behavior of the semilinear beam equation in the subcritical regime, particularly its relation to parabolic self-similar solutions.
en.method: Fine energy estimates in weighted spaces rewritten in parabolic self-similar variables.
en.result: The solution of the Cauchy problem for the semilinear beam equation converges asymptotically to the self-similar solution of the associated parabolic problem in the subcritical case.
en.help_to_user: Provides an effective method for asymptotic analysis of semilinear beam equations, transferable to other dispersive or hyperbolic equations.

idea_spark.idea: Extend the method to critical or supercritical cases, or to equations with different nonlinearities or higher-order dispersion.
idea_spark.risk: Critical cases may involve breakdown of scaling invariance or failure of energy estimates, requiring more refined harmonic analysis tools.
idea_spark.inspiration: The parabolic self-similar variable approach offers a new perspective for studying long-time behavior of dispersive equations, and could be combined with numerical simulations to verify asymptotic profiles.

papers.title: Local Asymptotic Patterns for Viscous Approximations of Conservation Laws
papers.summary: Solutions to hyperbolic conservation laws can be approximated in many different ways: by vanishing viscosity, relaxations, discrete or semi-discrete numerical schemes, approximation with a nonlocal flux, etc$\ldots$ For some of these methods, general ${\bf L}^1$ convergence results are available. Aim of this paper is to understand the local behavior of these approximations, in a neighborhood of point where the hyperbolic solution has a singularity. Specifically: a point along a shock, or where two shocks interact, or where a new shock is formed.   Given a sequence of $ε$-approximate solutions, a general expectation is that, by a suitable local rescaling of coordinates, as $ε\to 0$ a well defined limit is obtained. This corresponds to a specific ``eternal solution" (globally defined both in space and in time) to the approximating equation. Precise results this direction are here given, in the case of vanishing viscosity.

ai.tldr: 研究双曲守恒律的粘性近似在奇点附近的局部渐近行为，通过坐标重标度得到全局定义的“永恒解”。
ai.motivation: 理解不同近似方法（如消失粘性、松弛、数值格式）在解出现奇点（激波、激波相互作用、新激波形成）时的局部行为。
ai.method: 对ε-近似解序列进行局部坐标重标度，分析ε→0时的极限，得到近似方程的空间和时间全局解（永恒解）。
ai.result: 在消失粘性情形下，给出了局部渐近模式存在的精确结果，即重标度后收敛到特定的永恒解。
ai.help_to_user: 为分析守恒律近似方法的局部收敛性提供了理论框架，可用于验证数值格式在奇点附近的精度。

idea_spark.idea: 将重标度极限与数值格式的局部截断误差分析结合，设计更精确的激波捕捉方案。
idea_spark.risk: 不同近似方法的永恒解可能不唯一，需要额外的稳定性条件。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从消失粘性的精确结果出发，探索其他近似方法（如离散格式）的类似渐近模式。

en.tldr: Studies local asymptotic patterns of viscous approximations near singularities of hyperbolic conservation laws, obtaining globally defined eternal solutions via rescaling.
en.motivation: To understand the local behavior of various approximation methods (vanishing viscosity, relaxation, numerical schemes) near singularities such as shocks, shock interactions, and new shock formation.
en.method: Applies local coordinate rescaling to sequences of ε-approximate solutions and analyzes the limit as ε→0, yielding space-time global solutions (eternal solutions) of the approximating equation.
en.result: For vanishing viscosity, precise results are given on the existence of local asymptotic patterns, converging to specific eternal solutions after rescaling.
en.help_to_user: Provides a theoretical framework for analyzing local convergence of approximation methods for conservation laws, useful for verifying accuracy of numerical schemes near singularities.

idea_spark.idea: Combine rescaling limits with local truncation error analysis of numerical schemes to design more accurate shock-capturing methods.
idea_spark.risk: Eternal solutions may not be unique for different approximations, requiring additional stability conditions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Starting from the exact results for vanishing viscosity, explore analogous asymptotic patterns for other approximations like discrete schemes.

papers.title: The speed of convergence in greedy Galois games
papers.summary: In 2013 Cooper and Dutle invented a dueling scenario where Alice and Bob shoot at each other until one is hit. Each shot is successful with some fixed probability $p$, $0 < p < 1$. The shooting order is given by a greedy algorithm, where at each step a shot is assigned to the player whose current probability of success is smaller.   Cooper and Dutle observed that as $p \rightarrow 0$, the resulting sequence of shots (by Alice or Bob) converges to the infinite Thue-Morse sequence t, but left the speed of convergence as an open problem. In this note we determine the speed of this convergence.

ai.tldr: 确定了贪婪伽罗瓦博弈中射击序列收敛到无限Thue-Morse序列的速度。
ai.motivation: Cooper和Dutle观察到当概率p趋近于0时，射击序列收敛到Thue-Morse序列，但收敛速度未知。
ai.method: 通过分析贪婪算法下射击顺序的生成过程，推导收敛速度的精确表达式。
ai.result: 给出了收敛速度的明确结果。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解贪婪博弈中序列收敛的速率特性。

idea_spark.idea: 研究不同概率分布下贪婪博弈的收敛行为。
idea_spark.risk: 结果可能依赖于特定概率模型，泛化需谨慎。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将Thue-Morse序列的收敛性质应用于算法设计或密码学。

papers.title: On the Distribution of Unweighted Minimum Knapsack Instances with Large SOS Rank
papers.summary: We analyze the sum-of-squares rank of unweighted instances of the Minimum Knapsack (MK) problem, i.e., minimization of $\sum_{i=1}^n x_i$ for 0/1 variables under the constraint $\sum_{i=1}^n x_i \geq q$, with $q \in \mathbb{R}$. Such instances have long served as a testbed for understanding the limitations of lift-and-project methods in Boolean optimization. For example, both the Lovász-Schrijver and Sherali-Adams hierarchies require (maximal) rank $n$ to solve them, already when $q=1/2$ is constant. The SOS hierarchy requires only \emph{sublinear} rank $O(\sqrt{n})$ to solve unweighted MK when $q=1/2$. On the other hand, when $q$ is allowed to vary with~$n$, the SOS rank of the problem may become linear. Interestingly, this is known to happen both when $q$ is large, and when $q$ is very small ($0<q \leq 2^{-n}$). This raises the question of whether we should think of hard instances of unweighted MK as being typical for the SOS hierarchy, or as a consequence of very specific choices of the threshold parameter $q$.   In this paper, we address this question by showing new upper and lower bounds on the SOS rank of unweighted MK in the whole regime of the parameter $q$. For $n-q \leq O(1)$, we show that the SOS rank is constant. In contrast, when $q \leq O(1)$, a linear rank is needed if $q$ is exponentially close to an integer. As our main positive result, we show that linear rank is very rare for $q \leq O(1)$. This can be expressed in the language of smoothed analysis: after perturbing $q$ by a Gaussian with mean $0$ and variance $σ^2$, the expected SOS rank of MK is $O(\sqrt{n} \log (n/σ))$.

ai.tldr: 本文分析了无权重最小背包问题实例的平方和秩，发现线性秩在参数q较小时非常罕见，并给出了平滑分析下的期望秩上界。
ai.motivation: 理解平方和层次结构在处理无权重最小背包问题时的典型困难程度，以及参数q的选择对问题难度的影响。
ai.method: 通过理论分析，给出了参数q在不同范围内平方和秩的上下界，并利用高斯扰动进行平滑分析。
ai.result: 当n-q为常数时，平方和秩为常数；当q为常数且指数接近整数时，秩为线性；但线性秩在q为常数时非常罕见，平滑后期望秩为O(√n log(n/σ))。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助研究人员了解平方和层次结构在布尔优化中的局限性，以及如何通过参数扰动避免最坏情况实例。

idea_spark.idea: 利用随机扰动参数来规避优化问题中的病态实例，从而获得更稳定的算法性能保证。
idea_spark.risk: 平滑分析假设扰动分布已知，实际应用中可能难以精确控制。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从参数微小变化导致问题难度剧降的现象，启发设计更鲁棒的优化算法。

en.tldr: This paper analyzes the sum-of-squares rank of unweighted Minimum Knapsack instances, showing that linear rank is very rare for small q and providing smoothed analysis bounds.
en.motivation: To understand the typical hardness of unweighted Minimum Knapsack for the SOS hierarchy and the role of the threshold parameter q.
en.method: Theoretical analysis establishing upper and lower bounds on SOS rank for various q regimes, combined with Gaussian perturbation for smoothed analysis.
en.result: Constant rank when n-q is constant; linear rank when q is constant and exponentially close to an integer; but linear rank is rare, with expected smoothed rank O(√n log(n/σ)).
en.help_to_user: Helps researchers understand limitations of SOS hierarchy in Boolean optimization and how to avoid worst-case instances via parameter perturbation.

idea_spark.idea: Use random parameter perturbations to circumvent pathological instances and achieve more stable algorithm performance.
idea_spark.risk: Smoothed analysis assumes known perturbation distribution, which may be hard to control in practice.
idea_spark.inspiration: The phenomenon that small parameter changes drastically reduce difficulty inspires design of more robust optimization algorithms.

papers.title: Intermittency induced by long memory under stochastic regime switching
papers.summary: We study a fundamental instability mechanism in nonlinear, nonlocal dynamical systems arising from the interaction of long-range memory and stochastic regime switching. The dynamics are governed by network-coupled, operator-valued Volterra evolutions with completely monotone memory kernels whose excitation operators and kernel parameters are modulated by an ergodic finite-state continuous-time Markov chain. We formalize a sharp separation between annealed stability (in expectation) and quenched behaviour (along typical sample paths). On the annealed side, we identify an averaged memory gain that yields uniform moment bounds and a memory-adapted Lyapunov functional implying mean-square control under an averaged subcriticality condition. On the quenched side, we show that rare but persistent excursions into supercritical regimes are amplified by memory, producing intermittent macroscopic bursts with heavy-tailed statistics and a deterministic almost sure growth exponent obtained via a subadditive ergodic argument. This establishes an annealed--quenched dichotomy specific to non-Markovian switching systems, where stability in expectation can coexist with pathwise growth and metastable burst phases. We further derive a micro--macro correspondence by proving that a population of regime-modulated self-exciting point processes converges, both annealed and quenched, to the random-coefficient Volterra limit, transferring the burst mechanism from microscopic branching dynamics to macroscopic long-memory flows. Numerical experiments illustrate how burst localization depends on graph geometry and on noncommuting excitation operators.

ai.tldr: 研究长程记忆与随机机制切换共同引发的间歇性失稳现象。
ai.motivation: 揭示非马尔可夫切换系统中期望稳定与路径增长共存的机制。
ai.method: 分析网络耦合的算子值Volterra演化，利用完全单调记忆核与马尔可夫链调制，分别从退火和淬火角度建立稳定性判据。
ai.result: 发现退火稳定下期望有界，而淬火路径因罕见超临界区域被记忆放大，产生重尾间歇爆发和几乎必然增长指数。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解长记忆随机切换系统中稳定与爆发的共存条件及其微观-宏观对应。

idea_spark.idea: 利用记忆核的完全单调性构造Lyapunov泛函，结合子可加遍历定理推导爆发指数。
idea_spark.risk: 理论依赖于完全单调核假设，实际系统可能不严格满足。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将微观分支过程收敛到宏观Volterra极限，为多尺度间歇现象提供统一框架。

en.tldr: We study intermittency induced by long-range memory and stochastic regime switching in nonlinear nonlocal dynamical systems.
en.motivation: To reveal the coexistence of stability in expectation and pathwise growth in non-Markovian switching systems.
en.method: We analyze network-coupled operator-valued Volterra evolutions with completely monotone memory kernels modulated by a Markov chain, establishing annealed and quenched stability criteria.
en.result: Annealed stability yields uniform moment bounds, while quenched paths exhibit heavy-tailed intermittent bursts with an almost sure growth exponent via subadditive ergodic theory.
en.help_to_user: This helps understand the coexistence of stability and bursts in long-memory switching systems and their micro-macro correspondence.

idea_spark.idea: Construct a memory-adapted Lyapunov functional using complete monotonicity and derive burst exponents via subadditive ergodic arguments.
idea_spark.risk: The theory relies on completely monotone kernels, which may not hold in all real systems.
idea_spark.inspiration: Convergence of microscopic branching processes to macroscopic Volterra limits provides a unified framework for multiscale intermittency.

papers.title: Persistence in perturbed contact models in continuum
papers.summary: Can a local disaster lead to extinction? We answer this question in this work. In the paper \cite{PZ-PPI} we considered contact processes on locally compact metric spaces with state dependent birth and death rates and formulated sufficient conditions on the rates that ensure the existence of invariant measures. One of the crucial conditions in \cite{PZ-PPI} was the critical regime condition, which meant the existence of a balance between birth and death rates in average. In the present work, we reject the criticality condition and suppose that the balance condition is violated. This implies that the evolution of the correlation functions of the contact model under consideration is determined by a nonlocal convolution type operator perturbed by a (negative) potential. We show that local peaks in mortality do not typically lead to extinction. We prove that a family of invariant measures exists even without the criticality condition and these measures can be described using the Feynman-Kac formula.

ai.tldr: 本文研究连续空间上受扰接触模型的持久性，证明即使出生-死亡平衡条件被破坏，局部死亡率峰值通常不会导致灭绝，并利用Feynman-Kac公式构造了不变测度族。
ai.motivation: 回答局部灾难是否会导致种群灭绝这一基本问题，并放宽先前工作中关键的临界平衡条件。
ai.method: 放弃临界平衡条件，将相关函数演化转化为由负势能扰动的非局部卷积型算子，并借助Feynman-Kac公式分析不变测度的存在性。
ai.result: 即使出生-死亡平衡被破坏，仍存在一族不变测度，局部死亡率峰值不会导致灭绝。
ai.help_to_user: 为连续空间上接触过程的持久性提供了理论保证，可用于生态学、流行病学等领域的种群存续分析。

idea_spark.idea: 利用Feynman-Kac公式构造不变测度，为分析非平衡系统提供新工具。
idea_spark.risk: 理论结果依赖于特定算子结构，实际应用时需验证模型假设是否满足。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从平衡条件放宽到非平衡情形，启发我们探索其他临界条件被破坏时的系统行为。

en.tldr: This paper studies persistence in perturbed contact models on continuum, showing that local peaks in mortality do not typically lead to extinction even when the birth-death balance condition is violated, and constructs a family of invariant measures via the Feynman-Kac formula.
en.motivation: To answer whether a local disaster can cause extinction, and to relax the critical regime condition required in previous work.
en.method: Reject the criticality condition, reduce the evolution of correlation functions to a nonlocal convolution operator perturbed by a negative potential, and analyze invariant measures using the Feynman-Kac formula.
en.result: A family of invariant measures exists even without the criticality condition; local mortality peaks do not cause extinction.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical guarantees for persistence of contact processes on continuum, applicable to population survival analysis in ecology and epidemiology.

idea_spark.idea: Use the Feynman-Kac formula to construct invariant measures, offering a new tool for analyzing non-equilibrium systems.
idea_spark.risk: The theoretical result relies on specific operator structures; practical applications must verify model assumptions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Relaxing the criticality condition to non-equilibrium scenarios inspires exploration of system behavior when other critical conditions are violated.

keywords_raw: state dependent birth and death rates

papers.title: Negative spectrum of non-local operators with periodic potential
papers.summary: The paper deals with spectral analysis of non-local operators arising in population dynamics models. We consider negative periodic perturbations of non-local operators of the convolution type. Such operators describe evolutions of the first correlation function in the stochastic birth and death dynamcis in the presence of suppression forces that increase mortality. We consider the case when the birth kernel can be non-symmetric and spatially heterogeneous. It has been proven that any negative periodic perturbation of the equilibrium dynamics generator shifts the spectrum to the left half-plane and, consequently, such a perturbation of mortality leads to the population extinction in any dimension.

ai.tldr: 本文研究具有周期势的非局部算子的负谱，证明负周期扰动导致种群灭绝。
ai.motivation: 理解种群动力学中非局部算子的谱性质，特别是死亡率增加对种群生存的影响。
ai.method: 对卷积型非局部算子施加负周期扰动，分析其谱的移位。
ai.result: 任何负周期扰动都将谱移至左半平面，导致种群在任何维度下灭绝。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解非局部算子在种群灭绝模型中的谱行为。

idea_spark.idea: 考虑非对称核和空间异质性对谱的影响。

zh.tldr: 本文研究具有周期势的非局部算子的负谱，证明负周期扰动导致种群灭绝。
zh.motivation: 理解种群动力学中非局部算子的谱性质，特别是死亡率增加对种群生存的影响。
zh.method: 对卷积型非局部算子施加负周期扰动，分析其谱的移位。
zh.result: 任何负周期扰动都将谱移至左半平面，导致种群在任何维度下灭绝。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解非局部算子在种群灭绝模型中的谱行为。

idea_spark.idea: 考虑非对称核和空间异质性对谱的影响。
idea_spark.risk: 模型假设可能过于简化实际生态过程。

en.tldr: This paper studies the negative spectrum of non-local operators with periodic potential, proving that negative periodic perturbations lead to population extinction.
en.motivation: To understand the spectral properties of non-local operators in population dynamics, especially the effect of increased mortality on population survival.
en.method: Apply negative periodic perturbations to convolution-type non-local operators and analyze the shift of their spectrum.
en.result: Any negative periodic perturbation shifts the spectrum to the left half-plane, causing population extinction in any dimension.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand the spectral behavior of non-local operators in population extinction models.

idea_spark.idea: Consider the influence of non-symmetric kernels and spatial heterogeneity on the spectrum.
idea_spark.risk: Model assumptions may oversimplify real ecological processes.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combine spectral theory with stochastic population dynamics to explore extinction thresholds.

papers.title: Position: agentic AI orchestration should be Bayes-consistent
papers.summary: LLMs excel at predictive tasks and complex reasoning tasks, but many high-value deployments rely on decisions under uncertainty, for example, which tool to call, which expert to consult, or how many resources to invest. While the usefulness and feasibility of Bayesian approaches remain unclear for LLM inference, this position paper argues that the control layer of an agentic AI system (that orchestrates LLMs and tools) is a clear case where Bayesian principles should shine. Bayesian decision theory provides a framework for agentic systems that can help to maintain beliefs over task-relevant latent quantities, to update these beliefs from observed agentic and human-AI interactions, and to choose actions. Making LLMs themselves explicitly Bayesian belief-updating engines remains computationally intensive and conceptually nontrivial as a general modeling target. In contrast, this paper argues that coherent decision-making requires Bayesian principles at the orchestration level of the agentic system, not necessarily the LLM agent parameters. This paper articulates practical properties for Bayesian control that fit modern agentic AI systems and human-AI collaboration, and provides concrete examples and design patterns to illustrate how calibrated beliefs and utility-aware policies can improve agentic AI orchestration.

ai.tldr: 本文主张在智能体AI系统的控制层（而非LLM参数层）应用贝叶斯决策理论，以实现一致性的决策。
ai.motivation: LLM在预测和推理任务上表现出色，但在需要不确定性下决策的高价值应用（如工具调用、专家咨询）中缺乏贝叶斯一致性。
ai.method: 提出在智能体编排层使用贝叶斯原则：维护任务相关潜在量的信念、从交互中更新信念、选择行动，并给出具体设计模式。
ai.result: 论证了贝叶斯控制层可提升智能体AI编排的校准性和效用感知能力，而无需使LLM本身成为贝叶斯更新引擎。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何将贝叶斯方法实际应用于智能体系统的决策层，而非复杂地改造LLM。

idea_spark.idea: 设计一个轻量级贝叶斯控制器，仅维护任务信念并指导LLM调用，避免对LLM内部进行贝叶斯化。
idea_spark.risk: 信念更新可能依赖不准确的先验或观测，导致次优决策；计算开销需权衡。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将贝叶斯决策理论从统计建模扩展到AI系统架构的编排层。

en.tldr: This position paper argues that Bayesian decision theory should be applied at the control layer of agentic AI systems (not LLM parameters) for coherent decision-making under uncertainty.
en.motivation: LLMs excel at prediction and reasoning but lack Bayesian consistency in high-stakes decisions under uncertainty, such as tool calling or expert consultation.
en.method: Proposes Bayesian principles at the orchestration level: maintain beliefs over task-relevant latent quantities, update beliefs from interactions, and choose actions, with concrete design patterns.
en.result: Demonstrates that a Bayesian control layer can improve calibration and utility-awareness in agentic AI orchestration without requiring LLMs to be Bayesian inference engines.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand how to practically apply Bayesian methods to the decision layer of agentic systems, rather than complexly modifying LLMs.

idea_spark.idea: Design a lightweight Bayesian controller that only maintains task beliefs and guides LLM calls, avoiding Bayesianization of LLM internals.
idea_spark.risk: Belief updates may rely on inaccurate priors or observations, leading to suboptimal decisions; computational overhead needs balancing.
idea_spark.inspiration: Extend Bayesian decision theory from statistical modeling to the orchestration layer of AI system architectures.

papers.title: Beyond Visual Fidelity: Benchmarking Super-Resolution Models for Large-Scale Remote Sensing Imagery via Downstream Task Integration
papers.summary: Super-resolution (SR) techniques have made major advances in reconstructing high-resolution images from low-resolution inputs. The increased resolution provides visual enhancement and utility for monitoring tasks. In particular, SR has been increasingly developed for satellite-based Earth observation, with applications in urban planning, agriculture, ecology, and disaster response. However, existing SR studies and benchmarks typically use fidelity metrics such as PSNR or SSIM, whereas the true utility of super-resolved images lies in supporting downstream tasks such as land cover classification, biomass estimation, and change detection. To bridge this gap, we introduce GeoSR-Bench, a downstream task-integrated SR benchmark dataset to evaluate SR models beyond fidelity metrics. GeoSR-Bench comprises spatially co-located, temporally aligned, and quality-controlled image pairs from about 36,000 locations across diverse land covers, spanning resolutions from 500m to 0.6m. To the best of our knowledge, GeoSR-Bench is the first SR benchmark that directly connects improved image resolution from SR models with downstream Earth monitoring tasks, including land cover segmentation, infrastructure mapping, and biophysical variable estimation. Using GeoSR-Bench, we benchmark GAN, transformer, neural operator, and diffusion-based SR models on perceptual quality and downstream task performance. We conduct experiments with 270 settings, covering 2 cross-platform SR tasks, 9 SR models, 3 downstream task models, and 5 downstream tasks for each SR task. The results show that improvements in traditional SR metrics often do not correlate with gains in task performance, and the correlations can be negative, indicating that these metrics provide limited guidance for selecting superior models for downstream tasks. This reveals the need to integrate downstream tasks into SR model development and evaluation.

ai.tldr: 提出GeoSR-Bench基准数据集，将超分辨率模型评估从传统保真度指标扩展到下游任务性能。
ai.motivation: 现有超分辨率研究仅用PSNR/SSIM等保真度指标评估，但实际应用价值在于支持土地覆盖分类、生物量估算等下游任务。
ai.method: 构建包含约36000个位置、分辨率从500m到0.6m的时空对齐图像对，集成土地覆盖分割、基础设施映射、生物物理变量估算等下游任务。
ai.result: 传统超分辨率指标与下游任务性能相关性弱甚至负相关，表明需将下游任务纳入模型开发与评估。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解超分辨率模型在遥感应用中的真实效用，指导模型选择与评估。

idea_spark.idea: 构建多任务联合优化框架，使超分辨率模型直接针对下游任务性能进行训练。
idea_spark.risk: 下游任务多样性可能导致模型过拟合特定任务，需平衡通用性与专用性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从应用需求出发设计评估指标，避免技术指标与实际效用脱节。

en.tldr: Proposes GeoSR-Bench, a benchmark dataset that extends super-resolution model evaluation from traditional fidelity metrics to downstream task performance.
en.motivation: Existing SR studies evaluate only with fidelity metrics like PSNR/SSIM, but real utility lies in supporting downstream tasks such as land cover classification and biomass estimation.
en.method: Constructs spatially co-located, temporally aligned image pairs from ~36,000 locations across resolutions 500m to 0.6m, integrating downstream tasks including land cover segmentation, infrastructure mapping, and biophysical variable estimation.
en.result: Traditional SR metrics show weak or negative correlation with downstream task performance, highlighting the need to integrate downstream tasks into model development and evaluation.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand the true utility of SR models in remote sensing applications and guides model selection and evaluation.

idea_spark.idea: Build a multi-task joint optimization framework that trains SR models directly for downstream task performance.
idea_spark.risk: Diversity of downstream tasks may cause overfitting to specific tasks; balance between generality and specificity is needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: Design evaluation metrics from application needs to avoid disconnect between technical metrics and real-world utility.

papers.title: Flow matching for Sentinel-2 super-resolution: implementation, application, and implications
papers.summary: Developing robust techniques for super-resolution of satellite imagery involves navigating commonly observed trade-offs between spectral fidelity and perceptual quality. In this work, we introduce a flow matching model for 4x super-resolution of 10-m Sentinel-2 visible and near-infrared bands over the conterminous United States (CONUS) using a dataset of 120,851 10-m Sentinel-2 and 2.5-m resampled NAIP imagery pairs acquired on the same day. Our results showed that the flow matching model outperformed diffusion and Real-ESRGAN models in pixel-wise accuracy in a single sampling step using the Euler method. When evaluated with a second-order Midpoint solver, our model generated perceptually realistic super-resolved imagery in only 20 sampling steps, effectively navigating the perception-distortion trade-off at inference time without retraining. We used this model to produce a super-resolved 2.5-m 4-band CONUS imagery product derived from 2025 10-m Sentinel-2 annual composites, consisting of over 1.58 trillion pixels. We further evaluated the use of super-resolved data on a land cover classification task using semantic segmentation models. Finally, we generated a yearly 2.5-m land cover product for the Chesapeake Bay watershed for 2020-2025. An accuracy assessment against 25,000 ground truth points revealed an overall accuracy of 89.11% for the annual land cover product. We conclude that flow matching is an effective generative modeling approach for super-resolution of Sentinel-2 imagery compared to diffusion and Generative Adversarial Network-based methods, and has strong implications for expanding access to high-resolution imagery for geospatial applications that demand fine spatial detail.

ai.tldr: 提出流匹配模型实现Sentinel-2影像4倍超分辨率，在感知质量与光谱保真度间取得平衡，并生成覆盖美国本土的2.5米分辨率产品。
ai.motivation: 卫星影像超分辨率面临光谱保真度与感知质量之间的权衡，现有扩散模型和GAN方法难以兼顾。
ai.method: 使用流匹配模型，基于12万对同日Sentinel-2与NAIP影像训练，采用欧拉法单步采样或中点求解器20步采样。
ai.result: 流匹配在像素精度上优于扩散和Real-ESRGAN模型，生成的2.5米产品用于土地覆盖分类，切萨皮克湾流域年度产品总体精度达89.11%。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种高效、可调的超分辨率方法，无需重新训练即可在推理时平衡感知与失真，适用于地理空间应用。

idea_spark.idea: 将流匹配与多时相融合结合，利用时间序列信息进一步提升超分辨率结果的时空一致性。
idea_spark.risk: 模型依赖高质量配对数据，在数据稀缺区域可能泛化不足；计算资源需求较高。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受扩散模型在图像生成中的成功启发，流匹配通过更简单的采样路径实现高效生成，为遥感超分辨率开辟新方向。

en.tldr: Proposes a flow matching model for 4x super-resolution of Sentinel-2 imagery, balancing perceptual quality and spectral fidelity, and generates a 2.5-m product over CONUS.
en.motivation: Satellite image super-resolution faces a trade-off between spectral fidelity and perceptual quality; existing diffusion and GAN methods struggle to balance both.
en.method: A flow matching model trained on 120,851 paired Sentinel-2 and NAIP images, using Euler method for single-step sampling or Midpoint solver for 20-step sampling.
en.result: Flow matching outperforms diffusion and Real-ESRGAN in pixel accuracy; the 2.5-m product enables land cover classification with 89.11% overall accuracy in the Chesapeake Bay watershed.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient, tunable super-resolution method that navigates the perception-distortion trade-off at inference without retraining, suitable for geospatial applications.

idea_spark.idea: Combine flow matching with multi-temporal fusion to leverage time series information for improved spatiotemporal consistency in super-resolution.
idea_spark.risk: Model relies on high-quality paired data, may generalize poorly in data-scarce regions; computational demands are high.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the success of diffusion models in image generation, flow matching achieves efficient generation via simpler sampling paths, opening new directions for remote sensing super-resolution.

papers.title: Fast and Exact: Asymptotically Linear KL-Optimal Frequency Normalization
papers.summary: Range coders and ANS replace empirical probabilities with integer frequencies summing to a fixed $M$; the resulting per-symbol code-length redundancy is exactly the KL divergence of the empirical distribution from the quantized one. Existing normalizers (Giesen, Bloom, Collet) are heuristic or only partially marginal-optimal. We give three provably KL-optimal algorithms: a bottom-up archetype, a bidirectional exchange repair of Bloom's heap correction, and a top-down window method that runs in $\mathcal{O}(r)$, asymptotically optimal in $r$, where $r$ is the number of positive-count symbols.

ai.tldr: 提出三种KL最优的频率归一化算法，其中一种达到O(r)渐近最优。
ai.motivation: 现有归一化方法（如Giesen、Bloom、Collet）是启发式的或仅部分边际最优，缺乏KL散度意义上的最优保证。
ai.method: 设计了三种算法：自底向上原型、双向交换修复Bloom堆校正、以及O(r)渐近最优的顶向下窗口方法。
ai.result: 三种算法均被证明是KL最优的，且顶向下窗口方法在符号数r上达到渐近线性复杂度。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何用整数频率实现KL最优的熵编码归一化，提升压缩效率。

idea_spark.idea: 将KL散度作为归一化目标，设计线性时间算法替代启发式方法。
idea_spark.risk: 算法复杂度虽优，但实际实现中常数因子可能影响性能。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从信息论角度重新审视频率归一化问题，启发更优的压缩方案。

zh.tldr: 提出三种KL最优的频率归一化算法，其中一种达到O(r)渐近最优。
zh.motivation: 现有归一化方法（如Giesen、Bloom、Collet）是启发式的或仅部分边际最优，缺乏KL散度意义上的最优保证。

zh.result: 三种算法均被证明是KL最优的，且顶向下窗口方法在符号数r上达到渐近线性复杂度。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何用整数频率实现KL最优的熵编码归一化，提升压缩效率。
