idea_spark.risk: 算法复杂度虽优，但实际实现中常数因子可能影响性能。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从信息论角度重新审视频率归一化问题，启发更优的压缩方案。

en.tldr: Three provably KL-optimal frequency normalization algorithms are proposed, one achieving asymptotically linear O(r) runtime.
en.motivation: Existing normalizers (Giesen, Bloom, Collet) are heuristic or only partially marginal-optimal, lacking KL-divergence optimality guarantees.
en.method: Three algorithms are designed: a bottom-up archetype, a bidirectional exchange repair of Bloom's heap correction, and a top-down window method running in O(r).
en.result: All three algorithms are proven KL-optimal, and the top-down window method achieves asymptotically linear complexity in the number of positive-count symbols r.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to achieve KL-optimal frequency normalization with integer frequencies for improved compression efficiency.

idea_spark.idea: Use KL divergence as the normalization objective and design linear-time algorithms to replace heuristic methods.
idea_spark.risk: Although asymptotically optimal, constant factors in implementation may affect practical performance.
idea_spark.inspiration: Revisiting frequency normalization from an information-theoretic perspective inspires better compression schemes.

papers.title: A Unified Regularity Condition for Optimal Control: Bridging LICQ, MFCQ, and Subdifferentials
papers.summary: This paper presents a unified derivation of transversality conditions in optimal control problems using exact penalty functions. The key regularity condition is that the origin is uniformly separated from the subdifferential of the penalty function in a neighborhood of the admissible set. This condition, hereafter referred to as the Unified Separation Condition (USC), generalizes the classical Mangasarian-Fromovitz condition for inequalities and linear independence of gradients for equalities; in the smooth case, these classical conditions are equivalent to USC, as shown via Gordan's theorem. The USC remains applicable even when constraint functions are nondifferentiable, where classical constraint qualifications are not defined. Assuming exactness, we derive transversality conditions for all major cases: fixed and free terminal time, equality and inequality constraints, moving manifolds, and free left endpoint. Remarkably, this approach yields these classical results in a concise and transparent manner, avoiding the need for constructing cones of endpoint variations or applying separation theorems. The theoretical results are complemented by a numerical implementation applied to the time-optimal control of a harmonic oscillator. The numerical implementation converges to the exact solution obtained via Pontryagin's maximum principle combined with transversality conditions, confirming the consistency and practical applicability of the proposed methodology.

ai.tldr: 本文提出一种统一的正则性条件（USC），通过精确罚函数统一推导最优控制中的横截条件，推广了经典LICQ和MFCQ，并适用于非光滑约束。
ai.motivation: 经典约束规范（如LICQ、MFCQ）在非光滑情形下无法定义，且推导横截条件需构造端点变分锥或应用分离定理，过程繁琐。
ai.method: 利用精确罚函数，定义USC条件（原点与罚函数次微分在可行集邻域内一致分离），并通过Gordan定理证明光滑情形下USC等价于经典条件。
ai.result: 统一推导了固定/自由终端时间、等式/不等式约束、移动流形及自由左端点等所有主要情形的横截条件，数值实验验证了方法在谐振子时间最优控制中的有效性。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种简洁、统一的框架来理解和推导最优控制中的横截条件，尤其适用于非光滑约束问题。

idea_spark.idea: 将USC与深度学习中的惩罚方法结合，用于处理非光滑约束下的神经网络训练。
idea_spark.risk: USC的验证可能依赖于问题的具体结构，对于高维或复杂约束可能计算成本较高。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受精确罚函数在约束优化中统一处理等式和不等式约束的启发，将其应用于最优控制的正则性分析。

zh.tldr: 本文提出一种统一的正则性条件（USC），通过精确罚函数统一推导最优控制中的横截条件，推广了经典LICQ和MFCQ，并适用于非光滑约束。
zh.motivation: 经典约束规范（如LICQ、MFCQ）在非光滑情形下无法定义，且推导横截条件需构造端点变分锥或应用分离定理，过程繁琐。
zh.method: 利用精确罚函数，定义USC条件（原点与罚函数次微分在可行集邻域内一致分离），并通过Gordan定理证明光滑情形下USC等价于经典条件。
zh.result: 统一推导了固定/自由终端时间、等式/不等式约束、移动流形及自由左端点等所有主要情形的横截条件，数值实验验证了方法在谐振子时间最优控制中的有效性。
zh.help_to_user: 提供了一种简洁、统一的框架来理解和推导最优控制中的横截条件，尤其适用于非光滑约束问题。

idea_spark.idea: 将USC与深度学习中的惩罚方法结合，用于处理非光滑约束下的神经网络训练。
idea_spark.risk: USC的验证可能依赖于问题的具体结构，对于高维或复杂约束可能计算成本较高。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受精确罚函数在约束优化中统一处理等式和不等式约束的启发，将其应用于最优控制的正则性分析。

en.tldr: This paper proposes a unified regularity condition (USC) via exact penalty functions to derive transversality conditions in optimal control, generalizing classical LICQ and MFCQ and applicable to nonsmooth constraints.
en.motivation: Classical constraint qualifications (e.g., LICQ, MFCQ) are undefined for nonsmooth problems, and deriving transversality conditions often requires constructing cones of endpoint variations or applying separation theorems, which is cumbersome.
en.method: Using exact penalty functions, the USC is defined as the uniform separation of the origin from the subdifferential of the penalty function in a neighborhood of the admissible set. Gordan's theorem shows equivalence to classical conditions in the smooth case.
en.result: Transversality conditions are derived for all major cases: fixed/free terminal time, equality/inequality constraints, moving manifolds, and free left endpoint. Numerical experiments on time-optimal control of a harmonic oscillator confirm consistency with Pontryagin's maximum principle.
en.help_to_user: Provides a concise and unified framework for understanding and deriving transversality conditions in optimal control, especially useful for nonsmooth constraints.

idea_spark.idea: Combine USC with penalty methods in deep learning to handle neural network training under nonsmooth constraints.
idea_spark.risk: Verifying USC may depend on problem structure and could be computationally expensive for high-dimensional or complex constraints.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by how exact penalty functions unify equality and inequality constraints in constrained optimization, applied to regularity analysis in optimal control.

papers.title: Network Digital Untwinning: Towards Backward Optimization of Digital Twins
papers.summary: Network digital twins (NDTs) are transforming network management by offering precise virtual replicas of physical network systems. However, their reliance on diverse and sensitive data introduces significant challenges related to data management, regulatory compliance, and user privacy. In scenarios where selective data removal is necessary, such as device deactivation, network reconfiguration, or regulatory compliance, traditional approaches often fall short of preserving the integrity of the twin model. To address this gap, we introduce a network digital untwinning framework that enables the targeted removal of deprecated NDT contributions while maintaining model integrity. Our approach comprises two complementary components: Single Request Untwinning (\algO) and Parallel Request Untwinning (\algM) mechanisms. \algO leverages connectivity metrics based on geographical proximity, data distribution, and network-level attributes to identify and remove the target NDT along with its propagating influence. This is achieved through an optimally selected rollback checkpoint augmented with injected Gaussian noise, followed by a precise remapping phase. \algM extends this mechanism to efficiently handle multiple removal requests by clustering NDTs with similar attributes and performing a coordinated rollback and untwinning schedule. We provide theoretical guarantees on model indistinguishability from scratch-built twins, and validate the framework through extensive experiments on real-world traffic data, demonstrating its effectiveness and operational efficiency.

ai.tldr: 提出网络数字解孪框架，实现选择性移除已废弃的数字孪生贡献，同时保持模型完整性。
ai.motivation: 网络数字孪生依赖多样敏感数据，面临数据管理、合规和隐私挑战，现有方法在选择性移除数据时难以保持孪生模型完整性。
ai.method: 包含单请求解孪和并行请求解孪两种机制，前者基于地理邻近性、数据分布和网络属性选择最优回滚检查点并注入高斯噪声后重映射，后者通过聚类相似孪生体协调回滚和解孪调度。
ai.result: 理论保证模型与从头构建的孪生不可区分，真实流量数据实验验证了有效性和操作效率。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何在网络数字孪生中安全、高效地移除特定数据贡献，同时保持模型质量。

idea_spark.idea: 结合差分隐私与回滚机制，在移除数据时提供更强的隐私保护。
idea_spark.risk: 回滚点选择可能引入性能退化，高斯噪声注入需平衡隐私与模型精度。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从数据库的撤销操作和版本控制中获得灵感，将“删除”视为一种可逆操作。

en.tldr: Proposes a network digital untwinning framework to selectively remove deprecated digital twin contributions while preserving model integrity.
en.motivation: Network digital twins rely on diverse sensitive data, posing challenges in data management, compliance, and privacy; existing methods fail to maintain twin model integrity during selective data removal.
en.method: Includes Single Request Untwinning and Parallel Request Untwinning mechanisms. The former selects an optimal rollback checkpoint based on proximity, data distribution, and network attributes, injects Gaussian noise, and remaps; the latter clusters similar twins for coordinated rollback and untwinning.
en.result: Theoretical guarantees of model indistinguishability from scratch-built twins; experiments on real traffic data demonstrate effectiveness and operational efficiency.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand how to safely and efficiently remove specific data contributions in network digital twins while maintaining model quality.

idea_spark.idea: Combine differential privacy with rollback mechanisms to provide stronger privacy protection during data removal.
idea_spark.risk: Rollback point selection may introduce performance degradation; Gaussian noise injection needs to balance privacy and model accuracy.
idea_spark.inspiration: Draws inspiration from database undo operations and version control, treating 'deletion' as a reversible operation.

papers.title: Bayesian Optimization in Linear Time
papers.summary: Bayesian optimization is a sequential method for minimizing objective functions that are expensive to evaluate and about which few assumptions can be made. By using all gathered data to train a Gaussian process model for the function and adaptively employing a mixture of global exploration and local exploitation, this method has been used for optimization in many fields including machine learning, automotive engineering and reinforcement learning. However, the standard method suffers from two problems: 1) with cubic computational complexity in the training-set size it eventually becomes computationally infeasible to train the model, and 2) globally modeling the objective function is not necessarily optimal given the local nature of minimization. Using flexible and recursive binary partitioning of the search space, we adapt both the modeling and acquisitive aspects of standard Bayesian optimization to work harmoniously with the partitioning scheme, thereby ameliorating both standard shortcomings. We compare our method against a commonly used Bayesian optimization library on seven challenging test functions, ranging in dimensionality from $6$ to $124$, and show that our method achieves superior optimization performance in all tests. In addition our method has linear computational complexity.

ai.tldr: 提出一种线性时间复杂度的贝叶斯优化方法，通过递归二分划分搜索空间，同时改进建模和采集策略。
ai.motivation: 标准贝叶斯优化计算复杂度为三次方，且全局建模对局部最小化并非最优。
ai.method: 采用灵活递归的二分划分搜索空间，使高斯过程建模和采集函数与划分方案协调工作。
ai.result: 在7个测试函数（维度6-124）上优于常用库，且计算复杂度为线性。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种高效的高维贝叶斯优化方案，适合计算资源有限的场景。

idea_spark.idea: 结合局部建模与自适应空间划分，降低全局模型开销。
idea_spark.risk: 划分策略可能引入边界效应，需验证对非凸函数的鲁棒性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用树结构实现线性复杂度，启发其他昂贵黑箱优化问题的加速方法。

en.tldr: Proposes a Bayesian optimization method with linear time complexity by recursively partitioning the search space, improving both modeling and acquisition.
en.motivation: Standard Bayesian optimization has cubic complexity and global modeling is suboptimal for local minimization.
en.method: Uses flexible recursive binary partitioning of the search space to harmonize Gaussian process modeling and acquisition with the partition scheme.
en.result: Outperforms a common library on 7 test functions (6-124 dimensions) with linear computational complexity.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient high-dimensional Bayesian optimization approach suitable for resource-constrained settings.

idea_spark.idea: Combine local modeling with adaptive space partitioning to reduce global model overhead.
idea_spark.risk: Partitioning may introduce boundary effects; robustness on non-convex functions needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Tree-structured linear complexity inspires acceleration methods for other expensive black-box optimization problems.

papers.title: Multi-frame Restoration for High-rate Lissajous Confocal Laser Endomicroscopy
papers.summary: Lissajous confocal laser endomicroscopy (CLE) is a promising solution for high speed in vivo optical biopsy for handheld scenarios. However, Lissajous scanning traces a resonant trajectory and samples only the visited pixels per frame; at high frame rates, many pixels remain unvisited, creating structured holes. In this work, we introduce the first benchmark for high-rate Lissajous CLE, consisting of low-quality video clips paired with high-quality reference images. The reference images are wide-FOV mosaics obtained by stitching stabilized, slow-scan frames of the same tissue, enabling temporally aligned supervision. Using this dataset, we propose MIRA, a lightweight recurrent framework for Lissajous CLE restoration that iteratively aggregates temporal context through feature reuse and displacement alignment. Our experiments demonstrate that MIRA outperforms both lightweight and high-complexity baselines in restoration quality while maintaining a favorable computational efficiency suitable for clinical deployment.

ai.tldr: 提出首个高帧率Lissajous共焦激光内窥镜基准数据集和轻量级递归恢复框架MIRA，通过特征复用和位移对齐有效填补结构空洞，在恢复质量和计算效率上均优于现有方法。
ai.motivation: 高帧率Lissajous扫描会产生大量未访问像素形成的结构空洞，现有方法无法有效恢复，且缺乏标准基准。
ai.method: 构建低质视频与高质参考图像配对数据集，参考图像由慢扫描帧拼接而成；提出MIRA递归网络，通过特征复用和位移对齐迭代聚合时间上下文。
ai.result: MIRA在恢复质量上超越轻量级和高复杂度基线，同时保持适合临床部署的计算效率。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解高帧率Lissajous内窥镜图像恢复的挑战和一种高效解决方案。

idea_spark.idea: 利用慢扫描拼接的高质量参考图像作为监督信号，可推广到其他欠采样成像模式。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖高质量参考图像获取，可能限制在无慢扫描模式的场景应用。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从时间上下文聚合角度解决结构化缺失数据，启发其他稀疏采样成像的恢复方法。

idea_spark.risk: 依赖高质量参考图像获取，可能限制在无慢扫描模式的场景应用。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从时间上下文聚合角度解决结构化缺失数据，启发其他稀疏采样成像的恢复方法。

en.tldr: Proposes the first benchmark dataset for high-rate Lissajous confocal laser endomicroscopy and a lightweight recurrent framework MIRA that iteratively aggregates temporal context via feature reuse and displacement alignment, outperforming baselines in restoration quality with favorable computational efficiency.
en.motivation: High-rate Lissajous scanning creates structured holes from unvisited pixels; existing methods lack standard benchmarks and effective restoration.
en.method: Constructs paired low-quality video and high-quality reference images (from slow-scan mosaics); proposes MIRA recurrent network with feature reuse and displacement alignment for temporal aggregation.
en.result: MIRA surpasses both lightweight and high-complexity baselines in restoration quality while maintaining computational efficiency suitable for clinical deployment.
en.help_to_user: Understands the challenge and an efficient solution for high-rate Lissajous endomicroscopy restoration.

idea_spark.idea: Using slow-scan mosaics as supervision can generalize to other undersampled imaging modalities.
idea_spark.risk: Dependence on high-quality reference images may limit application in scenarios without slow-scan capability.
idea_spark.inspiration: Addressing structured missing data via temporal context aggregation inspires restoration methods for other sparse sampling imaging.

papers.title: Existence of dipoles of Klein-Gordon-Zakharov system
papers.summary: In this paper, we study the long time behavior of solutions of Klein-Gordon-Zakharov system. We show that there exists a solution with special characteristics, which we shall refer to as a dipole solution, that is, there exists a solution $\vec{u}$ such that   $$\left\|\vec{u}(t)-\sum_{k=1}^{2}\vec{R}_{k}\right\|_{X}   \to 0 \, \, \text{as}\, \, t\to \infty,$$   where $\vec{R}_{k}$ represents a solitary wave for each $k$, with a translation $z_k$ with respect to its position, satisfying that $$|z_1(t)-z_2(t)| \sim 2\log(t)\, \, \text{as} \, \, t\to \infty.$$   Our approach will initially focus on the spectral analysis of the Hamiltonian operator associated with our system. Subsequently, we aim to establish a coercivity estimate that will allow us to derive conditions ensuring the existence of our solution. It is important to note that, in this problem, our objective is to obtain approximate solutions by solving a final data problem. These approximate solutions will then be used, through uniform estimates and compactness results, to derive the desired conclusions via density arguments.

ai.tldr: 本文证明了Klein-Gordon-Zakharov系统存在偶极子解，即两个孤立波在时间趋于无穷时以对数速度分离。
ai.motivation: 研究Klein-Gordon-Zakharov系统解的长时间行为，特别是寻找具有特殊结构的偶极子解。
ai.method: 首先对系统的Hamilton算子进行谱分析，然后建立强制估计，通过求解终值问题获得近似解，再利用一致估计和紧致性结果通过密度论证得到结论。
ai.result: 存在解使得两个孤立波的位置差在时间趋于无穷时渐近于2log(t)。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解非线性波动系统中孤立波相互作用的长时间渐近行为。

idea_spark.idea: 利用终值问题构造近似解，再通过密度论证证明精确解的存在性。
idea_spark.risk: 终值问题的适定性可能依赖于系统特殊结构，通用性有限。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将多孤立波相互作用问题转化为终值问题，可能为其他多孤子动力学问题提供新思路。

idea_spark.inspiration: 将多孤立波相互作用问题转化为终值问题，可能为其他多孤子动力学问题提供新思路。

en.tldr: This paper proves the existence of dipole solutions for the Klein-Gordon-Zakharov system, where two solitary waves separate at a logarithmic rate as time goes to infinity.
en.motivation: To study the long-time behavior of solutions to the Klein-Gordon-Zakharov system, especially to find solutions with special dipole structure.
en.method: Spectral analysis of the Hamiltonian operator, coercivity estimates, solving a final data problem to obtain approximate solutions, and then using uniform estimates and compactness arguments via density to prove existence.
en.result: There exists a solution such that the distance between the two solitary waves asymptotically behaves like 2log(t) as t → ∞.
en.help_to_user: Provides insight into the asymptotic interaction of solitary waves in nonlinear wave systems.

idea_spark.idea: Construct approximate solutions via a final data problem and then prove exact existence through density arguments.
idea_spark.risk: Well-posedness of the final data problem may rely on specific system structure, limiting generality.
idea_spark.inspiration: Reformulating multi-soliton interaction as a final data problem may offer new approaches for other multi-soliton dynamics.

papers.title: Efficient Mutation Testing of Quantum Machine Learning Models
papers.summary: Quantum machine learning integrates the strengths of quantum computing and machine learning, enabling models to learn complex features using fewer parameters than their classical counterparts. Due to the increasing complexity of quantum machine learning models, it is necessary to verify that the implementation of these models satisfy the design specification and be free of bugs and faults. Mutation testing is a promising avenue to identify faulty quantum circuits that do not meet design specifications or contain defects by intentionally inserting faults into the quantum circuit. It is necessary to define mutation operations to inject faults into quantum circuits to ensure that a test suite is robust enough to evaluate an implementation against its design specification. In this paper, we extend mutation testing to quantum machine learning applications, primarily quantum neural network models. Specifically, this paper makes two important contributions. We define new mutation operations for efficient fault insertion compared to state-of-the-art approaches. We also present a directed mutation generation technique to reduce redundant mutant circuits. Extensive experimental evaluation demonstrates that our approach generates a more diverse and representative set of mutants, effectively addressing faults that traditional techniques fail to expose.

ai.tldr: 本文扩展了变异测试到量子机器学习模型，提出了新的变异操作和定向变异生成技术，以高效检测量子电路中的故障。
ai.motivation: 量子机器学习模型日益复杂，需要验证其实现是否符合设计规范且无缺陷。
ai.method: 定义了新的变异操作以高效注入故障，并提出了定向变异生成技术以减少冗余变异电路。
ai.result: 实验表明，该方法能生成更多样化和代表性的变异体，有效暴露传统技术无法发现的故障。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过变异测试验证量子机器学习模型的正确性。

idea_spark.idea: 可探索将定向变异生成与量子电路优化结合，进一步提升测试效率。
idea_spark.risk: 变异操作可能引入过多无效变异，导致测试成本增加。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受量子神经网络结构启发，可设计针对特定量子门的变异操作以覆盖更多故障模式。

idea_spark.inspiration: 受量子神经网络结构启发，可设计针对特定量子门的变异操作以覆盖更多故障模式。

en.tldr: This paper extends mutation testing to quantum machine learning models, proposing new mutation operations and directed mutation generation to efficiently detect faults in quantum circuits.
en.motivation: Quantum machine learning models are increasingly complex, necessitating verification that their implementations meet design specifications and are free of bugs.
en.method: New mutation operations are defined for efficient fault injection, and a directed mutation generation technique is introduced to reduce redundant mutant circuits.
en.result: Experiments show the approach generates more diverse and representative mutants, effectively exposing faults that traditional techniques miss.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to apply mutation testing to verify the correctness of quantum machine learning models.

idea_spark.idea: Explore combining directed mutation generation with quantum circuit optimization to further improve testing efficiency.
idea_spark.risk: Mutation operations may introduce many ineffective mutants, increasing testing cost.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by quantum neural network structures, design mutation operations targeting specific quantum gates to cover more fault patterns.

papers.title: Once-excited random walks on general trees
papers.summary: We study once-excited random walks on general trees, modeled by placing a single "cookie" at each vertex. Each cookie acts as a metaphorical reward that is consumed upon the first visit to the vertex where the cookie is placed. On that initial visit, the walk is in an excited state and behaves like a biased random walk. Once the cookie is consumed, the process reverts to a symmetric random walk on all subsequent visits. We consider a random environment in which the bias parameters are independent random variables. We prove that the process exhibits a sharp phase transition between transience and recurrence on general trees with polynomial growth, where the critical threshold is determined by the branching-ruin number of the tree.

ai.tldr: 研究一般树上的单次激发随机游走，每个顶点放置一块“饼干”，首次访问时游走偏向，之后恢复对称，并证明在多项式增长树上存在由分支-毁灭数决定的尖锐相变。
ai.motivation: 理解激发随机游走在一般树结构上的行为，特别是其常返性与瞬变性之间的相变条件。
ai.method: 在一般树上定义单次激发随机游走模型，将偏置参数视为独立随机变量，利用分支-毁灭数分析相变阈值。
ai.result: 证明了在多项式增长的一般树上，过程存在从常返到瞬变的尖锐相变，临界阈值由树的分支-毁灭数决定。
ai.help_to_user: 为随机游走理论提供新的相变结果，可用于网络搜索、群体行为建模等场景。

idea_spark.idea: 考虑将饼干数量或激发次数推广为多次激发，研究其对相变阈值的影响。
idea_spark.risk: 多次激发模型可能引入更复杂的依赖关系，分析难度显著增加。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将“饼干”视为资源，启发资源消耗型随机过程的相变研究。

en.tldr: We study once-excited random walks on general trees with a single cookie per vertex, where the walk is biased on the first visit and symmetric thereafter, and prove a sharp phase transition between transience and recurrence on polynomially growing trees, with the critical threshold given by the branching-ruin number.
en.motivation: To understand the behavior of excited random walks on general tree structures, especially the phase transition between recurrence and transience.
en.method: Define once-excited random walks on general trees with independent random bias parameters, and analyze the phase transition using the branching-ruin number.
en.result: Prove a sharp phase transition from recurrence to transience on polynomially growing trees, with the critical threshold determined by the tree's branching-ruin number.
en.help_to_user: Provides new phase transition results for random walk theory, applicable to network search and collective behavior modeling.

idea_spark.idea: Consider generalizing to multiple cookies or multiple excitations and study their effect on the phase transition threshold.
idea_spark.risk: Multiple-excitation models may introduce complex dependencies, significantly increasing analysis difficulty.
idea_spark.inspiration: Viewing cookies as resources inspires research on phase transitions in resource-consuming random processes.

papers.title: Existence and uniqueness of weak solutions to quasilinear PDEs with critical data
papers.summary: We establish existence and uniqueness of global, bounded weak solutions to quasilinear PDEs with bounded, uniformly continuous initial data and investigate their properties. Moreover, we establish existence of bounded weak solutions when the initial data is merely bounded.

ai.tldr: 建立了具有临界数据的拟线性偏微分方程全局有界弱解的存在唯一性，并研究了其性质。
ai.motivation: 拟线性偏微分方程在物理和数学中广泛出现，但临界数据情形下的弱解理论尚不完整。
ai.method: 利用泛函分析和偏微分方程理论，对初始数据施加有界一致连续或有界条件，通过逼近和紧性论证证明解的存在唯一性。
ai.result: 证明了当初始数据有界一致连续时，存在唯一的全局有界弱解；当初始数据仅有界时，仍存在有界弱解。
ai.help_to_user: 为处理临界数据的拟线性方程提供了严格的弱解存在唯一性基础，可用于后续数值模拟或物理建模。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将方法应用于具有临界数据的非线性扩散方程或守恒律系统。
idea_spark.risk: 临界数据可能导致解的正则性不足，需要更精细的估计。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从有界一致连续到仅有界初始数据的推广思路，可启发其他临界问题中弱解理论的构建。

en.tldr: Establishes existence and uniqueness of global bounded weak solutions to quasilinear PDEs with critical data and investigates their properties.
en.motivation: Quasilinear PDEs appear widely in physics and mathematics, but the weak solution theory for critical data remains incomplete.
en.method: Using functional analysis and PDE theory, imposing bounded uniformly continuous or merely bounded initial data, and proving existence and uniqueness via approximation and compactness arguments.
en.result: Proves existence and uniqueness of global bounded weak solutions when initial data is bounded uniformly continuous; existence of bounded weak solutions when initial data is merely bounded.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous weak solution existence and uniqueness foundation for quasilinear equations with critical data, useful for subsequent numerical simulations or physical modeling.

idea_spark.idea: Try to apply the method to nonlinear diffusion equations or conservation law systems with critical data.
idea_spark.risk: Critical data may lead to insufficient regularity of solutions, requiring more refined estimates.
idea_spark.inspiration: The generalization from bounded uniformly continuous to merely bounded initial data can inspire weak solution theory construction in other critical problems.

papers.title: Electric Grid Topology and Admittance Estimation using Phasor Measurements
papers.summary: Recent advances in precise phasor measurement units are enabling new approaches to estimate distribution and transmission grid parameters in real-time. In this paper, we investigate voltage and current phasor measurement requirements to estimate the electric grid topology and admittance parameters. We show necessary and sufficient conditions for the number of independent operating points (measurements) required to determine the topology and admittance of a completely unknown electric grid. With prior topology information, we also show that there is a minimum number of measurements required to uniquely determine the admittance matrix and corresponding grid topology. In the presence of noisy phasor measurements, we show that the admittance matrix can be estimated using a structured total least squares approach. By means of numerical simulations on the IEEE 13-node distribution feeder, the IEEE 14-node transmission network, and the IEEE 123-node distribution feeder, we demonstrate our approach is suitable for applications in radial and mesh grid topologies in the presence of measurement noise.

ai.tldr: 本文研究利用相量测量单元估计电网拓扑和导纳参数，给出了所需独立测量点数的充要条件，并提出了基于结构化总体最小二乘的噪声鲁棒估计方法。
ai.motivation: 精确的相量测量单元使实时估计配电网和输电网参数成为可能，但现有工作对所需测量条件缺乏系统分析。
ai.method: 推导了完全未知电网拓扑和导纳可辨识所需的独立运行点数的充要条件；在已知拓扑时给出唯一确定导纳矩阵的最小测量数；针对噪声测量，采用结构化总体最小二乘进行估计。
ai.result: 在IEEE 13节点、14节点和123节点测试系统上的数值仿真表明，该方法适用于辐射状和网状拓扑，且对测量噪声具有鲁棒性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解在给定相量测量配置下能否唯一估计电网拓扑和导纳，以及如何利用结构化总体最小二乘处理测量噪声。

idea_spark.idea: 结合稀疏性先验（如电网拓扑通常稀疏）改进结构化总体最小二乘，可能减少所需测量点数并提高噪声鲁棒性。
idea_spark.risk: 实际电网中可能存在动态变化（如开关操作），静态假设可能限制方法在实时场景中的适用性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用相量测量的时间序列相关性，设计在线递推估计算法，实现拓扑和导纳的实时跟踪。

idea_spark.idea: 结合稀疏性先验（如电网拓扑通常稀疏）改进结构化总体最小二乘，可能减少所需测量点数并提高噪声鲁棒性。

en.tldr: This paper investigates the use of phasor measurement units to estimate electric grid topology and admittance parameters, providing necessary and sufficient conditions on the number of independent operating points required, and proposing a structured total least squares approach for noisy measurements.
en.motivation: Precise phasor measurement units enable real-time estimation of distribution and transmission grid parameters, but existing work lacks systematic analysis of the measurement requirements.
en.method: Derives necessary and sufficient conditions on the number of independent operating points for identifiability of a completely unknown grid; gives the minimum number of measurements to uniquely determine the admittance matrix given prior topology; uses structured total least squares for noisy measurements.
en.result: Numerical simulations on IEEE 13-node, 14-node, and 123-node test systems demonstrate the approach works for radial and mesh topologies and is robust to measurement noise.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand whether a given phasor measurement configuration can uniquely determine grid topology and admittance, and how to handle measurement noise via structured total least squares.

idea_spark.idea: Incorporating sparsity priors (e.g., grid topology is typically sparse) into structured total least squares may reduce the required number of measurements and improve noise robustness.
idea_spark.risk: Real grids may have dynamic changes (e.g., switching operations), and the static assumption may limit applicability in real-time scenarios.
idea_spark.inspiration: Exploit temporal correlations in phasor measurements to design online recursive estimation algorithms for real-time tracking of topology and admittance.

keywords_raw: ieee distribution and transmission test feeders

papers.title: Scale-Aware Adversarial Analysis: A Diagnostic for Generative AI in Multiscale Complex Systems
papers.summary: Complex physical systems, from supersonic turbulence to the macroscopic structure of the universe, are governed by continuous multiscale dynamics. While modern machine learning architectures excel at mapping the high-dimensional observables of these systems, it remains unclear whether they internalize the governing physical laws or merely interpolate discrete statistical correlations. Standard Explainable AI (XAI) architectures, particularly perturbation-based and gradient-saliency methods, rely on pixel-wise perturbations, which generate unphysical artifacts and push inputs off the valid empirical distribution. To resolve this, we introduce a diagnostic framework driven by Constrained Diffusion Decomposition (CDD), a diffusion-based multiscale data decomposition algorithm that enables physically constrained data generation and model evaluation via scale-aware modifications. Applying this framework to a Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Model (DDPM), we execute deterministic interventions directly within the continuous, CDD-based scale space. We demonstrate that under moderate physical perturbations, the unconstrained generative model exhibits localized structural freezing and non-linear instability rather than continuous PDE-like responses. The network fails to maintain cross-scale continuity, causing the generative trajectory to diverge when pushed into unseen physical states. By synthesizing a continuum of physically coherent states, this scale-informed methodology establishes a controlled test ground to evaluate algorithmic vulnerabilities, providing the rigorous physical constraints necessary for future architectures to respect the multiscale causality of the natural universe.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于约束扩散分解的尺度感知对抗分析框架，用于诊断生成式AI在多尺度复杂系统中的物理一致性。
ai.motivation: 现有可解释AI方法在多尺度物理系统中产生非物理伪影，无法评估模型是否内化物理规律。
ai.method: 利用约束扩散分解（CDD）生成物理约束的尺度空间扰动，对去噪扩散概率模型（DDPM）进行确定性干预。
ai.result: 未约束的生成模型在物理扰动下出现局部结构冻结和非线性不稳定，无法保持跨尺度连续性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解生成模型在物理系统中的脆弱性，并提供诊断工具。

idea_spark.idea: 将CDD与对抗训练结合，强制模型学习跨尺度物理因果性。
idea_spark.risk: CDD计算成本高，可能限制大规模应用。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受物理中尺度分离和扰动理论的启发，将连续尺度空间作为测试场。

en.tldr: Proposes a scale-aware adversarial analysis framework based on Constrained Diffusion Decomposition to diagnose physical consistency of generative AI in multiscale complex systems.
en.motivation: Existing XAI methods produce unphysical artifacts in multiscale physical systems and fail to assess whether models internalize physical laws.
en.method: Uses Constrained Diffusion Decomposition (CDD) to generate physically constrained scale-space perturbations and applies deterministic interventions to a Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Model (DDPM).
en.result: Unconstrained generative models exhibit localized structural freezing and nonlinear instability under physical perturbations, failing to maintain cross-scale continuity.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand vulnerabilities of generative models in physical systems and provides a diagnostic tool.

idea_spark.idea: Combine CDD with adversarial training to force models to learn cross-scale physical causality.
idea_spark.risk: High computational cost of CDD may limit large-scale application.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by scale separation and perturbation theory in physics, using continuous scale space as a testbed.

papers.title: Compactness of weighted Sobolev trace operators and non-linear Steklov problems
papers.summary: We prove the compactness of weighted Sobolev trace operators in outward cuspidal domains by using composition operators on Sobolev spaces. This result allows us to formulate the non-linear Steklov problem in outward cuspidal domains in a correct functional setting and to establish the existence of its non-trivial solution.

ai.tldr: 证明了加权Sobolev迹算子在向外尖点域上的紧性，并据此建立了非线性Steklov问题的正确函数框架及非平凡解的存在性。
ai.motivation: 向外尖点域上的非线性Steklov问题缺乏合适的函数分析基础，需要先解决加权Sobolev迹算子的紧性问题。
ai.method: 利用Sobolev空间上的复合算子技巧，证明加权Sobolev迹算子在向外尖点域上的紧性。
ai.result: 加权Sobolev迹算子在向外尖点域上是紧的，从而非线性Steklov问题在该域上具有非平凡解。
ai.help_to_user: 为处理不规则边界（如尖点）上的偏微分方程边值问题提供了紧性工具和存在性结果。

idea_spark.idea: 将加权Sobolev空间中的紧性结果与非线性Steklov问题结合，可能衍生出新的变分方法。
idea_spark.risk: 复合算子构造依赖于域的具体几何，推广到更一般域时可能失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用复合算子建立迹算子紧性，启发在其他奇异域上研究类似边值问题。

en.tldr: Proves compactness of weighted Sobolev trace operators in outward cuspidal domains via composition operators, enabling a correct functional setting and existence of nontrivial solutions for nonlinear Steklov problems.
en.motivation: Nonlinear Steklov problems in outward cuspidal domains lack a proper functional analytic foundation, requiring compactness of weighted Sobolev trace operators first.
en.method: Uses composition operators on Sobolev spaces to prove compactness of weighted Sobolev trace operators in outward cuspidal domains.
en.result: Weighted Sobolev trace operators are compact in outward cuspidal domains, leading to existence of nontrivial solutions for nonlinear Steklov problems.
en.help_to_user: Provides compactness tools and existence results for boundary value problems on irregular domains like cusps.

idea_spark.idea: Combining compactness results in weighted Sobolev spaces with nonlinear Steklov problems may yield new variational methods.
idea_spark.risk: Construction of composition operators depends heavily on domain geometry, potentially failing for more general domains.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using composition operators to establish trace operator compactness inspires similar studies for boundary value problems on other singular domains.

papers.title: Gagliardo-Nirenberg type inequalities with a BMO term and fractional Laplacians
papers.summary: An improvement of a {\em Global (strong) Gagliardo-Nienberg inequality with a BMO term} is established by replacing local derivatives by {\em and fractional Laplacians.} Local versions are also given.

ai.tldr: 通过引入分数阶拉普拉斯算子，改进了带BMO项的全局强Gagliardo-Nirenberg不等式，并给出了局部版本。
ai.motivation: 改进现有的带BMO项的Gagliardo-Nirenberg不等式，使其适用于分数阶导数情形。
ai.method: 将局部导数替换为分数阶拉普拉斯算子，并分别建立全局和局部不等式。
ai.result: 得到了改进的全局强不等式和相应的局部版本。

en.tldr: Improved the global strong Gagliardo-Nirenberg inequality with a BMO term by replacing local derivatives with fractional Laplacians, and provided local versions.
en.motivation: To improve the existing Gagliardo-Nirenberg inequality with a BMO term to accommodate fractional derivatives.
en.method: Replaced local derivatives with fractional Laplacians and established both global and local inequalities.
en.result: Obtained an improved global strong inequality and corresponding local versions.
en.help_to_user: Provides new inequality tools for fractional PDEs and harmonic analysis.

idea_spark.idea: Explore inequality forms of fractional Laplacians in more general function spaces.
idea_spark.risk: Nonlocality of fractional operators may complicate proofs.
idea_spark.inspiration: Generalizing classical inequalities to fractional settings may open new analytical avenues.

papers.title: Quenched Amplification and Tail Shaping in Networked Systems with Memory and Regime Switching
papers.summary: Networked systems operating under intermittent adverse conditions and long memory can remain stable on average while exhibiting rare but extreme trajectory-level excursions. We study linear regime-switching network dynamics with Volterra-type memory, formulated through a finite-dimensional lifted ordinary differential equation embedding. Despite finite-horizon annealed boundedness, we show that quenched amplification emerges generically from the interaction of regime persistence, memory accumulation, and non-normal lifted operator geometry. A lower bound on burst-size distributions reveals power-law tails whose exponent is determined by the ratio between unfavorable dwell-time rates and an operator-defined instantaneous growth parameter. This parameter is computable online via the Euclidean logarithmic norm of the lifted operator, yielding a practical early-warning indicator. Building on this structure, we introduce a dynamic data-driven intervention strategy that enforces contraction on demand along rare amplification channels, thereby shaping or truncating tail risk without altering exogenous regime statistics or typical system behavior. The results provide a geometrically grounded and operationally actionable framework for understanding and mitigating extreme events in memory-driven regime-switching systems.

ai.tldr: 研究了具有记忆和状态切换的网络系统中罕见的极端轨迹放大现象，提出了基于几何的预警和干预方法。
ai.motivation: 网络系统在间歇不利条件和长记忆下可能表现出罕见但极端的轨迹级偏离，现有理论缺乏对此类淬火放大的几何解释和实用干预手段。
ai.method: 通过有限维提升常微分方程嵌入线性状态切换网络动力学，利用欧几里得对数范数计算瞬时增长参数，并设计动态数据驱动的收缩干预策略。
ai.result: 证明了淬火放大普遍存在，突发规模分布呈幂律尾部，指数由不利驻留时间率与瞬时增长参数之比决定；干预策略能有效塑造或截断尾部风险。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解记忆驱动状态切换系统中极端事件的产生机制，并提供可在线计算的预警指标和干预方案。

idea_spark.idea: 将非正规算子几何与状态切换记忆结合，为极端事件预警提供新视角。
idea_spark.risk: 干预策略可能对系统典型行为产生未预见的副作用，需在实际部署前进行鲁棒性测试。

en.tldr: Studies rare extreme trajectory excursions in networked systems with memory and regime switching, proposing a geometry-based early-warning indicator and intervention strategy.
en.motivation: Networked systems under intermittent adverse conditions and long memory can exhibit rare but extreme trajectory-level deviations, lacking geometric explanation and practical intervention.
en.method: Embeds linear regime-switching network dynamics via a finite-dimensional lifted ODE, computes instantaneous growth parameter using Euclidean logarithmic norm, and designs a dynamic data-driven contraction intervention.
en.result: Proves quenched amplification generically emerges, burst-size distributions follow power-law tails with exponent determined by dwell-time rate and growth parameter; intervention shapes or truncates tail risk.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand extreme event generation in memory-driven regime-switching systems and provides online computable early-warning and intervention tools.

idea_spark.idea: Combining non-normal operator geometry with regime-switching memory offers a new perspective for extreme event early warning.
idea_spark.risk: Intervention may have unforeseen side effects on typical system behavior, requiring robustness tests before deployment.
idea_spark.inspiration: Revisiting extreme events from a dynamical system geometry perspective inspires design of more general risk control methods.

papers.title: Gradient blowup of smooth vacuum solutions to 1D compressible Euler equations
papers.summary: We consider the isentropic compressible Euler equations in the half-line which govern the motion of gaseous fluids in contact with stationary vacuum boundary. We construct a large class of solutions that are initially smooth and square-integrable, and which, in finite time, transition to $C^{1-μ}$ regularity for $μ\in [1/2,1)$ near the boundary, leading to the gradient blowup at the boundary. It is based on stability analysis of self-similar waiting time solutions \cite{JLN2025} recently constructed by the authors.

ai.tldr: 研究了一维可压缩欧拉方程在真空边界附近的光滑解在有限时间内梯度爆破的现象。
ai.motivation: 理解气体与真空接触时解的正则性丧失机制。
ai.method: 基于自相似等待时间解的稳定性分析。
ai.result: 构造了一类初始光滑且平方可积的解，在有限时间后边界附近正则性降至C^{1-μ}，梯度在边界爆破。
ai.help_to_user: 为可压缩流体真空边界奇点形成提供严格数学框架。

idea_spark.inspiration: 将真空边界视为自由边界问题，结合自相似性分析奇点形成。

en.tldr: We study gradient blowup of smooth vacuum solutions to 1D compressible Euler equations in finite time.
en.motivation: To understand the mechanism of regularity loss near vacuum boundaries in gas dynamics.
en.method: Stability analysis of self-similar waiting time solutions.
en.result: Constructed a large class of initially smooth, square-integrable solutions that transition to C^{1-μ} regularity near the boundary, with gradient blowup at the boundary.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous mathematical framework for singularity formation at vacuum boundaries in compressible fluids.

idea_spark.idea: Use self-similar solutions to construct initial data and prove the universality of gradient blowup via stability analysis.
idea_spark.risk: Existence and stability of self-similar solutions depend on specific boundary conditions; generalization requires caution.
idea_spark.inspiration: Treat the vacuum boundary as a free boundary problem and analyze singularity formation via self-similarity.

papers.title: Controlling the Swarm: Sparse Actuation and Collision Avoidance under Stochastic Delay
papers.summary: Classical flocking models demonstrate how local interactions generate emergent order, but real-world multi-agent deployments are bound by severe constraints: limited actuator availability, heterogeneous communication latencies, and environmental noise. In this talk, we present a unified finite-N framework that tackles the interplay of these exact mechanisms. We study a delayed stochastic leader-follower particle system featuring topological communication, singular repulsion, and bounded sparse leader actuation.   A central challenge in such systems is mathematical well-posedness, as discontinuous communication laws and singular repulsions clash with standard strong Ito frameworks. We resolve this by introducing an augmented Lyapunov functional that simultaneously enforces a strict collision barrier and closes a uniform Gronwall estimate. Building on this rigorous foundation, we formulate a free-terminal-time, chance-constrained optimal control problem. We show that temporally sparse, bang-off-bang leader actuation not only drastically reduces control effort compared to continuous baselines, but also reveals non-monotone sensitivities to leader density. Ultimately, we demonstrate that in delayed stochastic swarms, adding more direct actuation is not strictly optimal -- highlighting a highly non-trivial resource allocation paradox in cooperative control.

ai.tldr: 提出一个统一的有限N框架，研究在随机延迟、稀疏驱动和碰撞避免约束下的多智能体集群控制，发现增加直接驱动并非严格最优的资源分配悖论。
ai.motivation: 现实多智能体部署受限于执行器有限、通信延迟异质和环境噪声，现有模型未同时处理这些机制。
ai.method: 构建延迟随机领导者-跟随者粒子系统，引入增广Lyapunov泛函同时保证碰撞屏障和Gronwall估计，并建立自由终端时间机会约束最优控制问题。
ai.result: 时间稀疏的bang-off-bang领导者驱动相比连续基线大幅降低控制代价，且领导者密度存在非单调敏感性；增加直接驱动并非严格最优。
ai.help_to_user: 为设计延迟、稀疏驱动环境下的集群控制策略提供理论依据和优化方法。

idea_spark.idea: 利用稀疏驱动和延迟效应，设计资源分配策略以规避非单调敏感性和悖论。

idea_spark.inspiration: 资源分配悖论启发在通信受限集群中采用间歇性控制而非持续驱动。

en.tldr: A unified finite-N framework for multi-agent swarms under stochastic delay, sparse actuation, and collision avoidance, revealing a resource allocation paradox where more direct actuation is not strictly optimal.
en.motivation: Real-world multi-agent deployments face limited actuators, heterogeneous communication latencies, and environmental noise, but existing models do not address these mechanisms simultaneously.
en.method: A delayed stochastic leader-follower particle system with topological communication and singular repulsion is studied; an augmented Lyapunov functional enforces a collision barrier and a uniform Gronwall estimate, leading to a free-terminal-time chance-constrained optimal control problem.
en.result: Temporally sparse bang-off-bang leader actuation drastically reduces control effort compared to continuous baselines, with non-monotone sensitivity to leader density; adding more direct actuation is not strictly optimal.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical foundations and optimization methods for swarm control under delay and sparse actuation constraints.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage sparse actuation and delay effects to design resource allocation strategies that avoid non-monotone sensitivities and paradoxes.
idea_spark.risk: Theoretical assumptions (e.g., topological communication, singular repulsion) may be difficult to realize precisely in hardware.
idea_spark.inspiration: The resource allocation paradox inspires intermittent control rather than continuous actuation in communication-limited swarms.

papers.title: Posterior Augmented Flow Matching
papers.summary: Flow matching (FM) trains a time-dependent vector field that transports samples from a simple prior to a complex data distribution. However, for high-dimensional images, each training sample supervises only a single trajectory and intermediate point, yielding an extremely sparse and high-variance training signal. This under-constrained supervision can cause flow collapse, where the learned dynamics memorize specific source-target pairings, mapping diverse inputs to overly similar outputs, failing to generalize. We introduce Posterior-Augmented Flow Matching (PAFM), a theoretically grounded generalization of FM that replaces single-target supervision with an expectation over an approximate posterior of valid target completions for a given intermediate state and condition. PAFM factorizes this intractable posterior into (i) the likelihood of the intermediate under a hypothesized endpoint and (ii) the prior probability of that endpoint under the condition, and uses an importance sampling scheme to construct a mixture over multiple candidate targets. We prove that PAFM yields an unbiased estimator of the original FM objective while substantially reducing gradient variance during training by aggregating information from many plausible continuation trajectories per intermediate. Finally, we show that PAFM improves over FM by up to 3.4 FID50K across different model scales (SiT-B/2 and SiT-XL/2), different architectures (SiT and MMDiT), and in both class and text conditioned benchmarks (ImageNet and CC12M), with a negligible increase in the compute overhead. Code: https://github.com/gstoica27/PAFM.git.

ai.tldr: 提出后验增强流匹配（PAFM），通过后验期望替代单目标监督，降低梯度方差，缓解流坍塌，提升图像生成质量。
ai.motivation: 标准流匹配训练信号稀疏、方差大，易导致流坍塌，模型记忆特定配对而泛化差。
ai.method: 将单目标监督替换为对中间状态有效目标完成的后验期望，通过重要性采样构造多候选目标混合，实现无偏估计并降低方差。
ai.result: 在ImageNet和CC12M上，PAFM相比FM在FID50K上提升最多3.4，适用于不同模型规模和架构，计算开销增加可忽略。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种改进流匹配训练的理论框架，可直接应用于现有图像生成模型，提升性能而不显著增加成本。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将后验增强与自适应采样策略结合，动态调整候选目标数量以平衡方差与计算。
idea_spark.risk: 重要性采样可能引入偏差，需保证后验近似质量；多候选目标可能增加内存开销。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从变分推断和重要性采样中获得灵感，将单点监督扩展为分布监督，类似期望最大化思想。

en.tldr: Proposes Posterior-Augmented Flow Matching (PAFM), which replaces single-target supervision with an expectation over a posterior of valid target completions, reducing gradient variance and mitigating flow collapse, improving image generation quality.
en.motivation: Standard flow matching suffers from sparse, high-variance training signals, leading to flow collapse where the model memorizes specific pairings and fails to generalize.
en.method: Replaces single-target supervision with an expectation over an approximate posterior of valid target completions for a given intermediate state, using importance sampling to construct a mixture over multiple candidate targets, yielding an unbiased estimator with reduced variance.
en.result: On ImageNet and CC12M, PAFM improves FID50K by up to 3.4 over FM across different model scales and architectures, with negligible compute overhead.
en.help_to_user: Provides a theoretically grounded improvement to flow matching training that can be directly applied to existing image generation models, boosting performance without significant cost.

idea_spark.idea: Explore combining posterior augmentation with adaptive sampling strategies to dynamically balance variance and computation by adjusting the number of candidate targets.
idea_spark.risk: Importance sampling may introduce bias if the posterior approximation is poor; multiple candidate targets could increase memory overhead.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by variational inference and importance sampling, extending pointwise supervision to distributional supervision, akin to expectation-maximization.

papers.title: Effective multi-equidistribution for translates of unipotent flows and Central limit theorems in inhomogeneous Diophantine approximation
papers.summary: In this paper, we prove a central limit theorem for inhomogeneous Diophantine approximation with a fixed shift, provided the shift is non-Liouville. This generalizes earlier work of Dolgopyat, Fayad, and Vinogradov~\cite{DFV}. This is achieved by translating the problem to one involving flows on homogeneous spaces. In this latter setting, we establish an effective multi-equidistribution result for diagonal translates of unipotent flows. This result is obtained by combining a recent result of Kim~\cite{Kim2024} with the height function construction of Shi~\cite{Shi20}. The central limit theorem is then deduced using the method of Björklund and Gorodnik~\cite{BG}.

ai.tldr: 本文证明了在非Liouville移位下非齐次丢番图逼近的中心极限定理，推广了Dolgopyat等人先前的工作。
ai.motivation: 将非齐次丢番图逼近问题转化为齐性空间上的流问题，从而利用动力系统方法获得更一般的统计性质。
ai.method: 结合Kim的最新结果与Shi的高度函数构造，建立对角平移单幂流的有效多重等分布，再通过Björklund和Gorodnik的方法推导中心极限定理。
ai.result: 对于固定的非Liouville移位，证明了非齐次丢番图逼近的中心极限定理。
ai.help_to_user: 为理解非齐次丢番图逼近的统计行为提供了严格的数学框架，并展示了动力系统方法在数论中的应用。

idea_spark.idea: 利用高度函数构造与近期等分布结果结合，是处理移位逼近问题的有效策略。
idea_spark.risk: 对移位非Liouville条件的依赖可能限制结果的适用范围。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将数论问题转化为动力系统问题，并借助精细的等分布结果获得统计极限，这一思路可启发其他逼近问题的研究。

zh.result: 对于固定的非Liouville移位，证明了非齐次丢番图逼近的中心极限定理。
zh.help_to_user: 为理解非齐次丢番图逼近的统计行为提供了严格的数学框架，并展示了动力系统方法在数论中的应用。

idea_spark.idea: 利用高度函数构造与近期等分布结果结合，是处理移位逼近问题的有效策略。
idea_spark.risk: 对移位非Liouville条件的依赖可能限制结果的适用范围。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将数论问题转化为动力系统问题，并借助精细的等分布结果获得统计极限，这一思路可启发其他逼近问题的研究。

en.tldr: This paper proves a central limit theorem for inhomogeneous Diophantine approximation with a fixed non-Liouville shift, generalizing earlier work by Dolgopyat, Fayad, and Vinogradov.
en.motivation: Translate the inhomogeneous Diophantine approximation problem into a flow problem on homogeneous spaces to obtain more general statistical properties using dynamical systems methods.
en.method: Combine a recent result of Kim with the height function construction of Shi to establish effective multi-equidistribution for diagonal translates of unipotent flows, then deduce the central limit theorem via the method of Björklund and Gorodnik.
en.result: Proved a central limit theorem for inhomogeneous Diophantine approximation with a fixed non-Liouville shift.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous mathematical framework for understanding the statistical behavior of inhomogeneous Diophantine approximation and demonstrates the application of dynamical systems methods in number theory.

idea_spark.idea: Combining height function constructions with recent equidistribution results is an effective strategy for handling shift approximation problems.
idea_spark.risk: The dependence on the non-Liouville condition for the shift may limit the applicability of the results.
idea_spark.inspiration: Translating number theory problems into dynamical systems problems and leveraging refined equidistribution results to obtain statistical limits can inspire research on other approximation problems.

papers.title: Royen's proof of the Gaussian correlation inequality as a supersymmetric dimensional reduction
papers.summary: We revisit Royen's proof of the Gaussian correlation inequality from a supersymmetric point of view. Many key elements in Royen's proof of this inequality have natural geometric interpretations in terms of supersymmetric dimensional reduction from $\mathbb{R}^{3|2}$ to $\mathbb{R}^{1|0}$. In particular, the auxiliary multivariate Gamma distributions appearing in Royen's Laplace-transform argument arise naturally as the body of a supersymmetric radial variable on $\mathbb{R}^{3|2}$. The generalization to the half-integer multivariate Gamma case also follows naturally as a dimensional reduction from $\mathbb{R}^{k+2|2}$ to $\mathbb{R}^{k|0}$. This provides an example in which the supersymmetric localization method is applied to prove correlation inequalities with continuous parameters.

ai.tldr: 从超对称视角重新审视Royen对高斯相关不等式的证明，揭示其几何本质是超对称维度约化。
ai.motivation: 为Royen的证明提供更自然的几何解释，并展示超对称方法在连续参数相关不等式中的应用。
ai.method: 将Royen证明中的关键元素（如辅助多元Gamma分布）解释为超对称径向变量的体分量，并通过从R^{3|2}到R^{1|0}的维度约化来推导。
ai.result: 成功将Royen证明重新表述为超对称维度约化过程，并推广到半整数多元Gamma情形（从R^{k+2|2}到R^{k|0}）。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解高斯相关不等式的深层几何结构，并展示超对称方法在概率不等式证明中的潜力。

idea_spark.idea: 利用超对称局部化方法，将高维积分问题约化为低维体积分，从而简化证明。
idea_spark.risk: 超对称框架可能对非物理背景的数学家不友好，且推广到其他不等式时需验证局部化条件。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将物理中的超对称技术（如维度约化、局部化）系统性地应用于概率论和组合学中的不等式证明。

en.tldr: Revisits Royen's proof of the Gaussian correlation inequality from a supersymmetric perspective, revealing its geometric essence as supersymmetric dimensional reduction.
en.motivation: To provide a more natural geometric interpretation of Royen's proof and demonstrate the application of supersymmetric methods to correlation inequalities with continuous parameters.
en.method: Interprets key elements of Royen's proof (e.g., auxiliary multivariate Gamma distributions) as the body of a supersymmetric radial variable, derived via dimensional reduction from R^{3|2} to R^{1|0}.
en.result: Successfully reformulates Royen's proof as a supersymmetric dimensional reduction process and extends it to the half-integer multivariate Gamma case (from R^{k+2|2} to R^{k|0}).
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the deep geometric structure of the Gaussian correlation inequality and showcases the potential of supersymmetric methods in proving probability inequalities.

idea_spark.idea: Use supersymmetric localization to reduce high-dimensional integrals to low-dimensional body integrals, simplifying proofs.
idea_spark.risk: The supersymmetric framework may be inaccessible to mathematicians without a physics background, and generalization to other inequalities requires verifying localization conditions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Systematically apply supersymmetric techniques from physics (e.g., dimensional reduction, localization) to prove inequalities in probability and combinatorics.

papers.title: Prediction of Alzheimer's Disease Risk Factors from Retinal Images via Deep Learning: Development and Validation of Biologically Relevant Morphological Associations in the UK Biobank
papers.summary: The systemic, metabolic, lifestyle factors have established associations with Alzheimer's Disease (AD) through epidemiologic and AD-specific biomarker studies. Whether colored fundus photography (CFP) contains retinal structural signatures corresponding to these AD-related risk domains remains unclear. To determine whether deep learning (DL) models can predict 12 AD-related risk factors from CFP and to characterize the retinal structures underlying these predictions, thereby assessing whether CFP reflects pathways to AD vulnerability. Using UK Biobank CFPs, DL models were trained using 62,876 images from 44,501 unique participants to predict 12 factors linked to AD incidence: 6 categorical (sex, smoking, sleeplessness, economic status, alcohol use, depression) and 6 continuous (age, age at completing education, BMI, systolic, diastolic blood pressure, HbA1c). Model performance, model saliency, and saliency-derived scores (CAM-Score) were evaluated and compared to retinal morphometry. The scores were also compared between incident-AD cases (average 8.55 years before onset) and matched controls. Performance of DL ranged from AUROC= 0.5654-0.9480 for categorical and R2=-0.0291-0.7620 for continuous factors, outperforming most of the morphometry-machine learning models. Saliency-based score consistently highlighted biologically meaningful regions, particularly the optic nerve head and retinal vasculature. It also aligned with present morphometric variations. Several saliency-based scores differed significantly between incident AD and matched controls, suggesting potential overlap between retinal correlates of risk factors and preclinical AD-associated changes. CFP encodes retinal signatures linked to AD risk factors. Although not diagnostic, DL-derived retinal representations may uncover biologically meaningful risk-related structural changes mirroring the potential AD vulnerability.

ai.tldr: 利用深度学习从视网膜图像预测阿尔茨海默病风险因素，并揭示相关的视网膜结构特征。
ai.motivation: 探索彩色眼底照片是否包含与阿尔茨海默病风险因素相关的视网膜结构特征，从而评估视网膜成像反映阿尔茨海默病易感性的潜力。
ai.method: 基于英国生物银行数据，训练深度学习模型从彩色眼底照片预测12个阿尔茨海默病相关风险因素，并通过显著性分析和CAM-Score评估模型关注的视网膜区域。
ai.result: 模型在分类和连续变量上表现良好，显著性区域集中在视神经头和视网膜血管，且部分显著性得分在阿尔茨海默病前期病例与对照间存在显著差异。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种非侵入性、基于视网膜图像的阿尔茨海默病风险筛查方法，有助于早期识别高危人群。

idea_spark.idea: 结合纵向视网膜图像和认知评估数据，构建多模态阿尔茨海默病进展预测模型。
idea_spark.risk: 模型依赖大规模高质量眼底图像数据，且显著性解释可能受图像质量影响。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用深度学习解释性技术揭示视网膜结构变化与全身健康风险的关联，启发新型生物标志物发现。

en.tldr: Deep learning predicts Alzheimer's disease risk factors from retinal images and identifies biologically relevant structural associations.
en.motivation: To determine whether colored fundus photography contains retinal structural signatures corresponding to AD-related risk factors, assessing if retinal imaging reflects pathways to AD vulnerability.
en.method: Deep learning models were trained on UK Biobank fundus images to predict 12 AD risk factors; saliency analysis and CAM-Score characterized the retinal regions underlying predictions.
en.result: Models achieved moderate to high performance; saliency highlighted optic nerve head and retinal vasculature, and scores differed between pre-AD cases and controls.
en.help_to_user: Offers a non-invasive retinal imaging approach for AD risk screening, potentially aiding early identification of high-risk individuals.

idea_spark.idea: Combine longitudinal retinal imaging with cognitive assessments to build a multimodal AD progression prediction model.
idea_spark.risk: Model relies on large-scale high-quality fundus images; saliency interpretation may be affected by image quality.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leveraging deep learning interpretability to link retinal structural changes with systemic health risks inspires novel biomarker discovery.

papers.title: Almost global large deviations principle for the KdV equation
papers.summary: We study extreme wave formation for the Korteweg-de Vries equation on the torus with random initial data of average size $ε$. We establish a large deviations principle for the supremum of the solution over arbitrarily long polynomial timescales $t \leq ε^{-n}$ for any fixed natural number $n$. This identifies the leading-order asymptotics of the probability of observing unusually large amplitudes. In this integrable setting, the dynamics evolves on invariant tori where Fourier moduli are almost conserved, ruling out mechanisms for extreme wave formation based on resonant energy exchange. As a result, large amplitudes can only arise through coherent structures or dispersive focusing, which corresponds to the quasi-synchronization of many phases. We show that the latter is dominant in the weakly nonlinear regime. Our approach combines a Birkhoff normal form analysis with probabilistic arguments, exploiting the stability of the integrable dynamics to control the probability of phase quasi-synchronization over long timescales.

ai.tldr: 研究了环面上Korteweg-de Vries方程在随机初始数据下极端波形成的几乎全局大偏差原理，确定了长时间尺度上观测到异常大振幅的概率渐近行为。
ai.motivation: 理解可积系统中极端波形成的机制，特别是弱非线性条件下相位准同步的主导作用。
ai.method: 结合Birkhoff正规形分析与概率论证，利用可积动力学的稳定性控制长时间尺度上相位准同步的概率。
ai.result: 建立了任意多项式时间尺度t ≤ ε^{-n}上解的上确界的大偏差原理，表明极端振幅主要源于色散聚焦而非共振能量交换。
ai.help_to_user: 为可积偏微分方程中极端事件的概率分析提供了严格的数学框架，可用于预测罕见大振幅波的发生概率。

idea_spark.idea: 利用相位准同步的统计特性设计控制或抑制极端波形成的策略。
idea_spark.risk: 方法依赖于可积结构，对于非可积系统可能需要更复杂的分析工具。
idea_spark.inspiration: 可探索在流体动力学、光学等实际系统中通过相位调控实现极端事件抑制的可能性。

en.tldr: We establish an almost global large deviations principle for the KdV equation on the torus with random initial data, identifying the leading-order asymptotics of the probability of extreme wave formation over long polynomial timescales.
en.motivation: To understand the mechanisms of extreme wave formation in integrable systems, particularly the dominant role of dispersive focusing (phase quasi-synchronization) in the weakly nonlinear regime.
en.method: Combining Birkhoff normal form analysis with probabilistic arguments, exploiting the stability of integrable dynamics to control the probability of phase quasi-synchronization over long timescales.
en.result: A large deviations principle for the supremum of the solution over timescales t ≤ ε^{-n} for any fixed n, showing that large amplitudes arise from dispersive focusing rather than resonant energy exchange.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous mathematical framework for analyzing the probability of extreme events in integrable PDEs, useful for predicting rare large-amplitude waves.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage statistical properties of phase quasi-synchronization to design strategies for controlling or suppressing extreme wave formation.
idea_spark.risk: The method relies on integrable structure; non-integrable systems may require more sophisticated analytical tools.
idea_spark.inspiration: Explore the possibility of suppressing extreme events in real-world systems (e.g., fluid dynamics, optics) via phase manipulation.

papers.title: Spectral Duality and Reset-Neutral Distributions in Random Walks with Multi-Site Geometric Resetting
papers.summary: We study the gambler's ruin problem for a biased random walk on $\{0,1,\dots,a\}$ under multi-site geometric resetting: at each time step, the walker is reset with probability $γ\in(0,1)$ to a random position drawn from a distribution $π$ over $m$ interior sites.   Using renewal theory, we derive an exact closed-form expression for the ruin probability $q_z(γ)$, showing that the effect of $π$ is fully encoded in a single scalar quantity, the \emph{coupling constant} $C(π,γ)=\bar{u}_π/\bar{s}_π$. A spectral analysis via Doob symmetrization reveals the structure of this coupling.   Our main result is a general criterion -- valid for any absorbed Markov chain admitting a spectral decomposition -- for the existence of a \emph{reset-neutral} distribution $π^*$ such that $C(π^*,γ)$ is independent of $γ$.   This occurs under a spectral duality condition: there exists an involution $σ$ on the reset sites and $ν$-independent weights $κ(z)$ such that $B_ν(z) = κ(z)\,A_ν(σ(z))$ for all spectral modes $ν$.   When this condition holds, the invariant value is $C^* = q_{a/2}^{(0)}$, the classical ruin probability from the midpoint, independent of the choice of symmetric reset sites or resetting rate. For the biased random walk, the condition reduces to the geometric symmetry $z_i + z_i' = a$. This result holds for any $a$, any number of reset sites $m$, and any bias $p\in(0,1)$.   Both analytical and Monte Carlo simulations confirm the theory with high precision, including tests of spectrally neutral sites. Numerical results also reveal a phase-like structure in the space of reset distributions, with $π^*$ acting as a separatrix between monotone regimes.

ai.tldr: 研究有偏随机游走在多点几何重置下的赌徒破产问题，发现重置分布的影响完全由一个标量耦合常数决定，并给出重置中性分布存在的谱对偶条件。
ai.motivation: 理解多点几何重置对随机游走破产概率的影响，并寻找使破产概率与重置率无关的特殊重置分布。
ai.method: 利用更新理论推导破产概率的精确闭式表达式，通过Doob对称化进行谱分析，提出谱对偶条件并验证其充分性。
ai.result: 谱对偶条件等价于重置站点间的几何对称性，此时重置中性分布存在且破产概率恒等于经典中点破产概率。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种分析带重置随机过程的新框架，可用于优化重置策略或设计鲁棒的重置机制。

idea_spark.idea: 将谱对偶思想应用于网络搜索或推荐系统中的重置策略设计，使系统性能对重置概率不敏感。
idea_spark.risk: 实际系统中重置分布可能无法精确实现谱对偶条件，需要近似方法。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从随机游走破产问题出发，联想到金融风险控制中重置策略的鲁棒性设计。

en.tldr: We study the gambler's ruin problem for a biased random walk under multi-site geometric resetting, showing that the effect of the reset distribution is fully captured by a scalar coupling constant, and derive a spectral duality condition for the existence of a reset-neutral distribution that makes the ruin probability independent of the resetting rate.
en.motivation: To understand how multi-site geometric resetting affects the ruin probability of a biased random walk, and to find special reset distributions that render the ruin probability independent of the resetting rate.
en.method: Renewal theory yields an exact closed-form expression for the ruin probability; Doob symmetrization enables spectral analysis, leading to a spectral duality condition that characterizes reset-neutral distributions.
en.result: The spectral duality condition reduces to geometric symmetry of reset sites; when it holds, the reset-neutral distribution exists and the ruin probability equals the classical midpoint ruin probability.
en.help_to_user: Provides a new framework for analyzing reset processes, useful for optimizing reset strategies or designing robust reset mechanisms.

idea_spark.idea: Apply the spectral duality idea to reset strategies in network search or recommendation systems, making system performance insensitive to reset probability.
idea_spark.risk: In practice, the reset distribution may not exactly satisfy the spectral duality condition, requiring approximation methods.
idea_spark.inspiration: From the random walk ruin problem, we draw inspiration for robust reset strategy design in financial risk control.

papers.title: Unstable free boundary problems in optimal control theory: existence and regularity
papers.summary: We establish the first general regularity result for constrained optimal control problems arising naturally in mathematical physics and mathematical biology. Namely, we prove that for a large class of problems of the form ``maximise $\int ψ(Θ_m)-c\int m$ where $-ΔΘ_m=mΘ_m+B(x,Θ_m)$, under the constraint $0\leq m\leq 1$ a.e.", the solution $m^*$ is bang-bang, in the sense that $m^*=χ_{E^*}$, and that $\partial E^*$ is smooth up to a $(d-2)$-dimensional subset. Moreover, we prove that the solutions to the volume constrained problem ``maximise $\int ψ(Θ_m)$ where $-ΔΘ_m=mΘ_m+B(x,Θ_m)$, under the constraint $0\leq m\leq 1$ a.e and $\int m=m_0$" are bang-bang in the sense that $m^*=χ_{E^*}$ and that, in the two-dimensional case, $\partial E^*$ is a finite union of smooth curves. This is done via reduction to an unstable free boundary problem, the regularity analysis of which was pioneered by Monneau \& Weiss and Chanillo, Kenig \& To. In our case, the free boundary is not minimising, and the laplacian of the state function is sign-changing, which creates significant difficulties, in particular regarding the non-degeneracy of blow-ups. This requires a new approach blending tools from optimal control theory, free boundary and measure theory to establish the regularity of the free boundary.

ai.tldr: 本文针对数学物理和数学生物学中一类受约束的最优控制问题，首次建立了通解的正则性结果，证明解是bang-bang的且自由边界除低维子集外光滑。
ai.motivation: 现有理论对不稳定自由边界问题的正则性研究不足，特别是状态函数拉普拉斯算子变号时，需要新方法。
ai.method: 将问题转化为不稳定自由边界问题，融合最优控制、自由边界理论和测度论工具，分析爆破的非退化性。
ai.result: 证明解为特征函数形式，自由边界在d-2维子集外光滑；二维体积约束情形下自由边界为有限条光滑曲线。
ai.help_to_user: 为处理类似约束最优控制问题提供了正则性分析框架和关键技术。

idea_spark.idea: 利用测度论和爆破分析处理状态函数拉普拉斯变号带来的非退化困难。
idea_spark.risk: 方法依赖特定PDE结构，推广至更一般非线性项可能需额外假设。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将最优控制问题转化为自由边界问题，并借鉴Monneau & Weiss等人的正则性理论。

en.tldr: This paper establishes the first general regularity result for constrained optimal control problems in mathematical physics and biology, proving that solutions are bang-bang and the free boundary is smooth except for a low-dimensional set.
en.motivation: Existing theory lacks regularity results for unstable free boundary problems, especially when the Laplacian of the state function changes sign, requiring new methods.
en.method: The problem is reduced to an unstable free boundary problem, blending tools from optimal control, free boundary theory, and measure theory to analyze the non-degeneracy of blow-ups.
en.result: The solution is shown to be a characteristic function, with the free boundary smooth outside a (d-2)-dimensional set; in the 2D volume-constrained case, the free boundary is a finite union of smooth curves.
en.help_to_user: Provides a regularity analysis framework and key techniques for similar constrained optimal control problems.

idea_spark.idea: Use measure theory and blow-up analysis to handle non-degeneracy difficulties caused by sign-changing Laplacian of the state function.
idea_spark.risk: The method relies on specific PDE structure; generalization to more general nonlinearities may require additional assumptions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Transform optimal control problems into free boundary problems and leverage regularity theory pioneered by Monneau & Weiss and Chanillo, Kenig & To.

papers.title: PEACE: Cross-modal Enhanced Pediatric-Adult ECG Alignment for Robust Pediatric Diagnosis
papers.summary: Automated pediatric electrocardiogram (ECG) diagnosis remains challenging because models trained predominantly on adult data suffer from substantial cross-population mismatch, while pediatric labels are often scarce. We present PEACE (Pediatric-Adult ECG Alignment via Cross-modal Enhancement), a structured cross-modal alignment framework for adult-to-pediatric ECG transfer. PEACE integrates tri-axial clinical semantic decomposition, label-query feature extraction, and curriculum-gated optimization to align transferable adult ECG representations with pediatric diagnostic targets. Since ZZU-pECG provides no paired clinical reports, we generate label-conditioned semantic descriptors using Gemini with concise clinical prompts and use them only as auxiliary training supervision; inference remains ECG-only. On ZZU-pECG, PEACE achieves 59.39%, 79.03%, and 90.89% AUC under zero-shot, 50-shot, and full fine-tuning settings, respectively, and reaches 96.65% AUC on the shared PTB-XL label space. These results suggest that structured clinical semantic supervision can improve low-resource adult-to-pediatric ECG transfer, while prospective clinical validation and more explicit age-aware modeling remain necessary before real-world deployment.

ai.tldr: 提出PEACE框架，通过跨模态临床语义对齐，将成人心电图知识迁移到儿科诊断，缓解儿科标签稀缺问题。
ai.motivation: 儿科心电图自动诊断面临成人模型跨群体不匹配和儿科标签稀缺的双重挑战。
ai.method: 集成三轴临床语义分解、标签查询特征提取和课程门控优化，利用大语言模型生成标签条件语义描述作为辅助监督。
ai.result: 在ZZU-pECG上零样本AUC达59.39%，50样本79.03%，全微调90.89%；在PTB-XL共享标签空间达96.65%。
ai.help_to_user: 为儿科心电图诊断提供低资源迁移方案，减少对大量儿科标注数据的依赖。

idea_spark.idea: 结合年龄感知建模和临床报告生成，进一步提升迁移效果。
idea_spark.risk: 临床语义描述依赖大语言模型，可能引入噪声或偏差；需前瞻性验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用大语言模型生成结构化语义监督，可缓解多模态数据缺失问题。

en.tldr: PEACE uses cross-modal clinical semantic alignment to transfer adult ECG knowledge to pediatric diagnosis, addressing label scarcity.
en.motivation: Automated pediatric ECG diagnosis suffers from cross-population mismatch and scarce pediatric labels.
en.method: Integrates tri-axial clinical semantic decomposition, label-query feature extraction, and curriculum-gated optimization, using LLM-generated label-conditioned semantic descriptors as auxiliary supervision.
en.result: Achieves 59.39% AUC zero-shot, 79.03% with 50 shots, 90.89% full fine-tuning on ZZU-pECG; 96.65% AUC on PTB-XL shared label space.
en.help_to_user: Provides a low-resource transfer solution for pediatric ECG diagnosis, reducing reliance on large pediatric datasets.

idea_spark.risk: LLM-generated semantic descriptors may introduce noise or bias; prospective validation is needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using LLMs to generate structured semantic supervision can mitigate missing multimodal data.

papers.title: Sion's minimax theorem and the proximal point algorithm in Hadamard spaces
papers.summary: We obtain Sion's minimax theorem in Hadamard spaces and   discuss its applications. Among other things, we study   several fundamental properties of resolvents of   saddle functions in Hadamard spaces. An application to   the proximal point algorithm for minimax problems   in Hadamard spaces are also included.

ai.tldr: 在Hadamard空间中建立了Sion的极小极大定理，并讨论了其在鞍点函数预解式和极小极大问题近端点算法中的应用。
ai.motivation: 将经典的极小极大定理推广到非正曲率的Hadamard空间，为处理非线性优化问题提供理论工具。
ai.method: 利用Hadamard空间的几何性质，证明Sion定理的成立，并分析鞍点函数预解式的基本性质。
ai.result: 获得了Sion定理在Hadamard空间中的版本，并展示了其在近端点算法中的应用。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解Hadamard空间中的优化理论，特别是极小极大问题的算法基础。

idea_spark.idea: 将Sion定理与近端点算法结合，可能启发设计新的分布式或非光滑优化算法。
idea_spark.risk: Hadamard空间的假设较强，实际应用中可能难以满足；算法收敛性需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从几何角度重新审视经典优化定理，为处理复杂约束问题提供新思路。

idea_spark.inspiration: 从几何角度重新审视经典优化定理，为处理复杂约束问题提供新思路。

en.tldr: Establishes Sion's minimax theorem in Hadamard spaces and discusses its applications, including resolvent properties of saddle functions and the proximal point algorithm for minimax problems.
en.motivation: To extend the classical minimax theorem to Hadamard spaces with non-positive curvature, providing theoretical tools for nonlinear optimization.
en.method: Leverages geometric properties of Hadamard spaces to prove Sion's theorem and analyze fundamental properties of resolvents of saddle functions.
en.result: Obtains a version of Sion's theorem in Hadamard spaces and demonstrates its application to the proximal point algorithm.
en.help_to_user: Aids understanding of optimization theory in Hadamard spaces, especially algorithmic foundations for minimax problems.

idea_spark.idea: Combining Sion's theorem with proximal point algorithms may inspire new distributed or non-smooth optimization methods.
idea_spark.risk: The Hadamard space assumption is strong and may be hard to satisfy in practice; convergence of algorithms needs further validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Revisiting classical optimization theorems from a geometric perspective offers new insights for handling complex constraints.

papers.title: AdaMeZO: Adam-style Zeroth-Order Optimizer for LLM Fine-tuning Without Maintaining the Moments
papers.summary: Fine-tuning LLMs is necessary for various dedicated downstream tasks, but classic backpropagation-based fine-tuning methods require substantial GPU memory. To this end, a recent work, MeZO, which relies solely on forward passes to fine-tune LLMs, significantly reduces GPU requirements at the cost of slower convergence due to its indifference to loss landscapes. Standard solutions, such as Adam, explore loss landscapes by estimating the first- and second-order moments and storing them in memory to guide the model's movement through dimensions with lower curvature and vice versa. However, directly applying Adam negates MeZO's advantage as it will triple the memory requirement. In light of this, we propose AdaMeZO, a zeroth-order optimizer that leverages Adam-style first- and second-moment estimates without maintaining them in memory. We present a theoretical analysis of AdaMeZO, corroborated by extensive experiments demonstrating AdaMeZO's performance, showing that AdaMeZO can outperform MeZO while requiring up to $70\%$ fewer forward passes. Trajectory visualizations affirm AdaMeZO's ability to adapt to diverse loss landscapes.

ai.tldr: 提出AdaMeZO，一种无需在内存中维护一阶和二阶矩估计的Adam式零阶优化器，用于LLM微调，在保持MeZO低内存优势的同时加速收敛。
ai.motivation: MeZO虽降低GPU内存需求，但收敛慢；直接应用Adam会三倍增加内存，抵消MeZO优势。
ai.method: 设计零阶优化器AdaMeZO，通过前向传播估计Adam风格的一阶和二阶矩，但不存储这些矩，从而避免额外内存开销。
ai.result: AdaMeZO在多项任务上优于MeZO，且前向传播次数最多减少70%。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户在有限GPU内存下更高效地微调LLM，尤其适合资源受限场景。

idea_spark.idea: 能否将类似的无存储矩估计方法应用于其他自适应优化器（如RMSProp）？
idea_spark.risk: 矩估计的近似可能在某些损失景观下导致不稳定收敛。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从Adam与MeZO的互补特性出发，探索内存与收敛速度的帕累托前沿。

en.tldr: Proposes AdaMeZO, an Adam-style zeroth-order optimizer that does not maintain first- and second-moment estimates in memory, enabling faster convergence for LLM fine-tuning while preserving MeZO's low memory footprint.
en.motivation: MeZO reduces GPU memory but converges slowly; directly applying Adam triples memory, negating MeZO's advantage.
en.method: Designs AdaMeZO, a zeroth-order optimizer that estimates Adam-style moments via forward passes without storing them, thus avoiding extra memory overhead.
en.result: AdaMeZO outperforms MeZO on multiple tasks, requiring up to 70% fewer forward passes.
en.help_to_user: Helps users fine-tune LLMs more efficiently under limited GPU memory, especially in resource-constrained settings.

idea_spark.idea: Could similar memory-free moment estimation be applied to other adaptive optimizers like RMSProp?
idea_spark.risk: Moment approximation may lead to unstable convergence on certain loss landscapes.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leveraging complementary strengths of Adam and MeZO to explore the Pareto frontier of memory and convergence speed.

papers.title: Weisfeiler Lehman Test on Combinatorial Complexes: Generalized Expressive Power of Topological Neural Networks
papers.summary: Combinatorial complexes have unified set-based (e.g., graphs, hypergraphs) and part-whole (e.g., simplicial, cellular complexes) structures into a common topological framework. Existing topological neural networks and Weisfeiler-Lehman variants remain fragmented, lacking a unified theoretical foundation for topological deep learning. In this work, we introduce the Combinatorial Complex Weisfeiler-Lehman (CCWL) test, an axiomatic-style extension of the WL test to combinatorial complexes. CCWL formalizes topological message passing through four types of neighborhood relation and provides a unified perspective on the expressive power of higher-order variants. We further prove that upper and lower neighborhoods are sufficient among the four adjacent WL tests to reach the expressivity of the full CCWL framework across topological structures of combinatorial complexes. Building on this framework, we also propose the Combinatorial Complex Isomorphism Network (CCIN) and evaluate it on synthetic and real-world benchmarks. Experimental results indicate CCIN outperforms baseline methods and offers a generalized expressive framework for topological deep learning.

ai.tldr: 提出组合复形上的Weisfeiler-Lehman测试，统一拓扑神经网络的表达能力理论。
ai.motivation: 现有拓扑神经网络和WL变体缺乏统一理论基础，表达能力分析碎片化。
ai.method: 定义CCWL测试，形式化四种邻域关系的拓扑消息传递，并证明上下邻域足以达到完整表达能力。
ai.result: 提出CCIN网络，在合成和真实基准上优于基线方法。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解拓扑神经网络表达能力的一般框架。

idea_spark.idea: 利用上下邻域简化消息传递设计，同时保持高表达能力。
idea_spark.risk: 实际应用中上下邻域可能无法覆盖所有拓扑结构，需验证泛化性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从公理化角度统一不同拓扑结构的WL测试，启发更通用的图学习理论。
