en.tldr: Proposes the Combinatorial Complex Weisfeiler-Lehman (CCWL) test, unifying the expressive power theory of topological neural networks.
en.motivation: Existing topological neural networks and WL variants lack a unified theoretical foundation, leading to fragmented expressivity analysis.
en.method: Defines CCWL test with four types of neighborhood relations for topological message passing, and proves that upper and lower neighborhoods suffice for full expressivity.
en.result: Proposes CCIN network, outperforming baselines on synthetic and real-world benchmarks.
en.help_to_user: Provides a generalized framework for understanding expressive power of topological neural networks.

idea_spark.idea: Simplify message passing design using only upper and lower neighborhoods while maintaining high expressivity.
idea_spark.risk: Upper/lower neighborhoods may not cover all topological structures in practice; generalization needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Axiomatic unification of WL tests across topological structures inspires more general graph learning theories.

papers.title: Sizes of witnesses in Covtree
papers.summary: Given a set $Γ$ of $k$ unlabelled posets, each of size $n$, we say that a poset $Q$ is a \emph{witness} to $Γ$ if $Γ$ is the set of downsets of size $n$ of $Q$. We say that $Q$ is a \emph{minimal witness} if it does not contain a proper downset that is itself a witness to $Γ$. Motivated by the causal set approach to quantum gravity, we study the upper bound on the size of minimal witnesses as a function of $n$ and $k$. We show that there is no linear upper bound of the form $n+k+c$ for any constant $c$. We introduce the \emph{exchange graph of downsets} as a new tool to study this scenario, and use it to show that all minimal witnesses $Q$ satisfy the bound $|Q|\leq nk-n$, and that when $k=3$ there is at least one minimal witness $Q$ that satisfies the bound $|Q|\leq \frac{3}{2}(n+1)$.

ai.tldr: 研究Covtree中最小见证偏序集的大小上界，证明不存在线性上界，并给出新的上界。
ai.motivation: 受量子引力中因果集方法的启发，探索见证偏序集的大小界限。
ai.method: 引入下集交换图作为新工具，分析最小见证偏序集的大小。
ai.result: 所有最小见证偏序集Q满足|Q|≤nk-n；当k=3时，存在最小见证偏序集满足|Q|≤(3/2)(n+1)。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解偏序集在因果集理论中的组合性质。

idea_spark.idea: 利用图论工具研究偏序集的最小见证，可能发现新的组合不变量。
idea_spark.risk: 下集交换图可能过于复杂，难以处理更大k值的情况。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将因果集问题转化为图论问题，启发其他物理组合问题的求解。

en.tldr: Studies upper bounds on the size of minimal witness posets in Covtree, shows no linear bound exists, and provides new bounds.
en.motivation: Motivated by the causal set approach to quantum gravity, explores size bounds of witness posets.
en.method: Introduces the exchange graph of downsets as a new tool to analyze minimal witness poset sizes.
en.result: All minimal witnesses Q satisfy |Q|≤nk-n; for k=3, there exists a minimal witness with |Q|≤(3/2)(n+1).
en.help_to_user: Helps understand combinatorial properties of posets in causal set theory.

idea_spark.idea: Using graph theory to study minimal witnesses of posets may reveal new combinatorial invariants.
idea_spark.risk: The exchange graph may become too complex for larger k values.
idea_spark.inspiration: Translating causal set problems into graph theory inspires solutions for other physical combinatorial problems.

papers.title: Characterizing the Expressivity of Local Attention in Transformers
papers.summary: The transformer is the most popular neural architecture for language modeling. The cornerstone of the transformer is its global attention mechanism, which lets the model aggregate information from all preceding tokens before generating the next token. One common variant of attention is called local attention, which restricts each token to aggregating information from a bounded window of predecessors, reducing the quadratic cost of global attention to linear. Although this restriction is usually motivated by efficiency, it has also been found to improve model quality, a phenomenon that has so far lacked a satisfactory explanation. We provide a formal account of this phenomenon in terms of recognizer expressivity. It has been shown that fixed-precision transformers with global attention correspond to a fragment of linear temporal logic containing a single past operator. We additionally prove that adding local attention introduces a second temporal operator, strictly enlarging the class of recognizable regular languages. Moreover, global and local attention are expressively complementary: neither subsumes the other, and combining them yields the richest fragment. Experiments on formal language recognition and natural language modeling corroborate the theory, showing that hybrid global--local transformers outperform their global-only counterparts.

ai.tldr: 本文从识别器表达性的角度，形式化解释了局部注意力机制为何能提升Transformer模型质量。
ai.motivation: 局部注意力虽因效率而常用，但实际中常提升模型质量，缺乏理论解释。
ai.method: 通过线性时序逻辑片段刻画全局与局部注意力的表达能力，并证明局部注意力引入第二个时序算子，严格扩大可识别正则语言类。
ai.result: 全局与局部注意力表达性互补，两者结合的表达性最强；实验验证混合模型优于纯全局模型。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解局部注意力在Transformer中的理论优势，指导模型设计时合理混合全局与局部注意力。

idea_spark.idea: 探索在Transformer中引入更多时序算子（如未来算子）以进一步扩大表达性。
idea_spark.risk: 增加算子可能带来计算开销或过拟合风险，需平衡表达性与效率。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受线性时序逻辑启发，可将注意力机制视为逻辑算子的实现，从而系统设计更强大的注意力模式。

en.tldr: This paper provides a formal account of why local attention improves transformer quality from the perspective of recognizer expressivity.

en.help_to_user: Helps understand the theoretical advantage of local attention in transformers, guiding the design of hybrid attention models.

idea_spark.idea: Explore introducing more temporal operators (e.g., future operators) into transformers to further expand expressivity.
idea_spark.risk: Adding operators may increase computational cost or overfitting risk, requiring a balance between expressivity and efficiency.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by linear temporal logic, attention mechanisms can be viewed as implementations of logical operators, enabling systematic design of more powerful attention patterns.

papers.title: Modeling Stock Returns and Volatility Using Bivariate Gamma Generalized Laplace Law
papers.summary: We consider a generalization of the variance-gamma (generalized asymmetric Laplace) distribution, defined as a normal mean - variance mixture with a gamma mixing distribution. While this model is typically studied in the univariate setting, we assume that the gamma mixing variable is observed alongside the primary variable, resulting in a bivariate framework. In this setting, maximum likelihood estimation becomes significantly simpler than in the standard univariate case, reducing to a form of classical linear regression. We derive explicit expressions for the resulting estimators. For certain parameter configurations, the estimators exhibit nonstandard convergence rates, exceeding the usual square-root rate. Finally, we illustrate the applicability of this model in financial contexts by analyzing stock index returns and associated volatility for several major indices.

ai.tldr: 提出一种双变量伽马广义拉普拉斯分布，通过引入可观测的伽马混合变量简化极大似然估计，并应用于股票收益与波动率联合建模。
ai.motivation: 标准方差伽马分布的单变量极大似然估计复杂，通过将混合变量视为可观测，构建双变量框架以简化估计。
ai.method: 定义正态均值-方差混合分布，混合分布为伽马分布，且混合变量与主变量同时观测；推导出类似经典线性回归的显式极大似然估计量。
ai.result: 得到显式估计量，某些参数配置下收敛速度超过常规平方根速率。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种更易估计的金融收益-波动联合分布模型，便于实际数据分析。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将其他隐变量（如跳跃强度）视为可观测，构建类似的双变量金融模型。
idea_spark.risk: 混合变量在实际中可能并非直接可观测，需依赖代理变量或近似。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用可观测的波动率代理变量（如已实现波动率）作为混合变量，改进收益分布拟合。

en.tldr: Proposes a bivariate gamma generalized Laplace distribution that simplifies maximum likelihood estimation by treating the gamma mixing variable as observable, applied to joint modeling of stock returns and volatility.
en.motivation: Standard univariate variance-gamma MLE is complex; constructing a bivariate framework with observable mixing variable simplifies estimation.
en.method: Defines a normal mean-variance mixture with gamma mixing distribution where the mixing variable is observed alongside the primary variable; derives explicit MLE akin to classical linear regression.
en.result: Explicit estimators are obtained, with nonstandard convergence rates exceeding the usual square-root rate for certain parameter configurations.
en.help_to_user: Provides an easier-to-estimate joint distribution for financial returns and volatility, facilitating practical data analysis.

idea_spark.idea: Explore treating other latent variables (e.g., jump intensity) as observable to construct similar bivariate financial models.
idea_spark.risk: The mixing variable may not be directly observable in practice, requiring proxy variables or approximations.
idea_spark.inspiration: Use observable volatility proxies (e.g., realized volatility) as the mixing variable to improve return distribution fitting.

papers.title: From Images2Mesh: A 3D Surface Reconstruction Pipeline for Non-Cooperative Space Objects
papers.summary: On-orbit inspection imagery is crucial as it enables characterization of non-cooperative resident space objects, providing the geometry and structural condition essential for active debris removal and on-orbit servicing mission planning. However, most existing neural implicit surface reconstruction methods have been confined to synthetic or hardware-in-the-loop data with known camera poses and controlled illumination. In this work, we present a pipeline for neural implicit surface reconstruction of non-cooperative space objects from monocular inspection imagery. We demonstrate it on publicly released ISS inspection footage from the STS-119 mission and publicly released on-orbit inspection footage of an H-IIA rocket upper stage. We find that segmentation-based background removal is essential for successful camera pose estimation from real on-orbit footage, where background variation between frames caused direct processing to fail entirely. We further incorporate photometric correction of per-frame exposure variations and analyze its behavior across datasets, finding that performance in shadowed regions varies with the illumination characteristics of the input footage.

ai.tldr: 提出一种从单目在轨影像重建非合作空间物体三维表面的神经隐式管道，在真实ISS和H-IIA火箭影像上验证，发现分割背景去除和光度校正对成功重建至关重要。
ai.motivation: 现有方法多依赖已知相机位姿和受控光照的合成数据，无法直接用于真实在轨非合作目标影像。
ai.method: 采用分割去除背景变化，结合光度校正补偿帧间曝光差异，再通过神经隐式表面重建得到三维网格。
ai.result: 在STS-119和H-IIA火箭真实影像上成功重建，背景去除是位姿估计的关键，光度校正影响阴影区域性能。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一套可直接用于真实在轨影像的非合作目标三维重建流程，包含关键预处理步骤。

idea_spark.idea: 结合时序光度一致性约束进一步优化阴影区域的表面细节。
idea_spark.risk: 真实在轨影像光照极端变化可能超出光度校正能力。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从航天影像处理中借鉴的鲁棒预处理思路可启发地面复杂环境下的三维重建。

idea_spark.idea: 结合时序光度一致性约束进一步优化阴影区域的表面细节。
idea_spark.risk: 真实在轨影像光照极端变化可能超出光度校正能力。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从航天影像处理中借鉴的鲁棒预处理思路可启发地面复杂环境下的三维重建。

en.tldr: A neural implicit surface reconstruction pipeline for non-cooperative space objects from monocular on-orbit imagery, validated on real ISS and H-IIA rocket footage, showing segmentation-based background removal and photometric correction are essential.
en.motivation: Existing methods rely on synthetic data with known camera poses and controlled illumination, failing on real on-orbit footage of non-cooperative targets.
en.method: Segmentation removes background variation, photometric correction compensates per-frame exposure differences, then neural implicit surface reconstruction produces 3D meshes.
en.result: Successful reconstruction on real STS-119 and H-IIA rocket footage; background removal is critical for pose estimation, and photometric correction affects shadow region performance.
en.help_to_user: Provides a ready-to-use pipeline for 3D reconstruction of non-cooperative space objects from real on-orbit imagery, including key preprocessing steps.

idea_spark.idea: Incorporate temporal photometric consistency constraints to refine surface details in shadowed regions.
idea_spark.risk: Extreme illumination variations in real on-orbit footage may exceed the capability of photometric correction.
idea_spark.inspiration: Robust preprocessing from aerospace imagery can inspire 3D reconstruction in complex ground environments.

papers.title: Graph theoretic derivation of mutual linearity for transient probabilities and hitting time distributions in Markov networks
papers.summary: For irreducible, time-homogeneous Markov networks, mutual linearity has recently been established for both occupation probabilities and network currents in the stationary regime as well as in the non-stationary regime in Laplace space. The derivation of this property for the stationary distribution utilized the Markov-chain tree theorem, which also allows for an explicit combinatorial expression of the response ratios under variation of a single transition rate. The extension of this result was proven at the trajectory level by employing the Doob-Meyer decomposition. By employing the all-minors matrix-tree theorem, we show that this property also follows from a graph theoretic formulation and derive explicit combinatorial expressions for the non-stationary response ratios. The stationary result follows as the long-time limit and we also show that the small-time asymptotics are entirely determined by minimal path distances in the underlying graph. Finally we use the graph theoretic approach to prove that mutual linearity also extends to hitting time densities.

ai.tldr: 本文通过图论方法证明了不可约时间齐次马尔可夫网络中暂态概率和击中时间分布的互线性性质，并给出了非稳态响应比的显式组合表达式。
ai.motivation: 已有研究在稳态和拉普拉斯空间非稳态下建立了马尔可夫网络的互线性，但缺乏统一的图论推导和显式组合表达式。
ai.method: 利用全子式矩阵树定理，从图论角度推导互线性，并分析长时间极限和小时间渐近行为。
ai.result: 证明了互线性也适用于击中时间密度，给出了非稳态响应比的显式组合表达式，并指出小时间渐近由最短路径距离决定。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解马尔可夫网络中概率和时间的线性响应机制，为网络动力学分析提供图论工具。

idea_spark.idea: 将互线性概念扩展到具有吸收态或周期性的马尔可夫网络。
idea_spark.risk: 图论方法可能在高维网络中计算复杂度过高。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用最短路径距离预测小时间行为，可启发快速近似算法。

zh.tldr: 本文通过图论方法证明了不可约时间齐次马尔可夫网络中暂态概率和击中时间分布的互线性性质，并给出了非稳态响应比的显式组合表达式。

zh.result: 证明了互线性也适用于击中时间密度，给出了非稳态响应比的显式组合表达式，并指出小时间渐近由最短路径距离决定。

idea_spark.idea: 将互线性概念扩展到具有吸收态或周期性的马尔可夫网络。
idea_spark.risk: 图论方法可能在高维网络中计算复杂度过高。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用最短路径距离预测小时间行为，可启发快速近似算法。

en.tldr: This paper proves mutual linearity for transient probabilities and hitting time distributions in irreducible time-homogeneous Markov networks using graph theory, providing explicit combinatorial expressions for non-stationary response ratios.
en.motivation: Previous work established mutual linearity in stationary and Laplace-space non-stationary regimes, but lacked a unified graph-theoretic derivation and explicit combinatorial formulas.
en.method: The all-minors matrix-tree theorem is employed to derive mutual linearity from a graph-theoretic perspective, analyzing long-time limits and small-time asymptotics.
en.result: Mutual linearity is extended to hitting time densities, explicit combinatorial expressions for non-stationary response ratios are given, and small-time asymptotics are shown to be determined by minimal path distances.
en.help_to_user: Provides insight into linear response mechanisms of probabilities and times in Markov networks, offering graph-theoretic tools for network dynamics analysis.

idea_spark.idea: Extend mutual linearity to Markov networks with absorbing states or periodicity.
idea_spark.risk: Graph-theoretic methods may suffer from high computational complexity in large networks.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using minimal path distances to predict small-time behavior can inspire fast approximation algorithms.

papers.title: EGREFINE: An Execution-Grounded Optimization Framework for Text-to-SQL Schema Refinement
papers.summary: Text-to-SQL enables non-expert users to query databases in natural language, yet real-world schemas often suffer from ambiguous, abbreviated, or inconsistent naming conventions that degrade model accuracy. Existing approaches treat schemas as fixed and address errors downstream. In this paper, we frame schema refinement as a constrained optimization problem: find a renaming function that maximizes downstream Text-to-SQL execution accuracy while preserving query equivalence through database views. We analyze the computational hardness of this problem, which motivates a column-wise greedy decomposition, and instantiate it as EGRefine: a four-phase pipeline that screens ambiguous columns, generates context-aware candidate names, verifies them through execution-grounded feedback, and materializes the result as non-destructive SQL views. The pipeline carries two structural properties: column-local non-degradation, ensured by the conservative selection rule in the verification phase, and database-level query equivalence, ensured by the view-based materialization phase. Together they make the resulting refinement safe by construction at the column level, with cross-column and prompt-level interactions handled empirically rather than analytically. Across controlled schema-degradation, real-world, and enterprise benchmarks, EGRefine recovers accuracy lost to schema naming noise where applicable and correctly abstains where the underlying task exceeds current Text-to-SQL capabilities, with refined schemas transferring across model families to enable refine-once, serve-many-models deployment. Code and data are publicly available at https://github.com/ai-jiaqian/EGRefine.

ai.tldr: 提出EGRefine框架，通过执行反馈优化数据库模式命名，提升Text-to-SQL准确率，并保证查询等价性。
ai.motivation: 真实数据库模式常含歧义、缩写或不一致的命名，导致Text-to-SQL模型准确率下降。现有方法将模式视为固定，仅在后续环节纠错。
ai.method: 将模式重命名建模为约束优化问题，采用列式贪心分解，四阶段流水线：筛选歧义列、生成上下文候选名、执行验证、通过视图非破坏性物化。
ai.result: 在多种基准上恢复因命名噪声损失的准确率，并在任务超出模型能力时正确弃权；精炼后的模式可跨模型族复用。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户自动优化数据库模式命名，无需手动修改即可提升自然语言查询的准确性。

idea_spark.idea: 将模式重命名视为约束优化问题，利用数据库视图保证查询等价性，实现安全且可迁移的改进。
idea_spark.risk: 列式贪心可能忽略跨列交互，复杂场景下优化效果有限；视图可能引入性能开销。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受约束优化和程序合成启发，将模式改进与下游任务执行紧密耦合。

zh.result: 在多种基准上恢复因命名噪声损失的准确率，并在任务超出模型能力时正确弃权；精炼后的模式可跨模型族复用。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户自动优化数据库模式命名，无需手动修改即可提升自然语言查询的准确性。

idea_spark.idea: 将模式重命名视为约束优化问题，利用数据库视图保证查询等价性，实现安全且可迁移的改进。
idea_spark.risk: 列式贪心可能忽略跨列交互，复杂场景下优化效果有限；视图可能引入性能开销。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受约束优化和程序合成启发，将模式改进与下游任务执行紧密耦合。

en.tldr: EGRefine is an execution-grounded framework that optimizes database schema naming via column-wise greedy decomposition and non-destructive views, improving Text-to-SQL accuracy while preserving query equivalence.
en.motivation: Real-world schemas often have ambiguous, abbreviated, or inconsistent names that degrade Text-to-SQL accuracy. Existing methods treat schemas as fixed and only correct errors downstream.
en.method: Formulates schema renaming as a constrained optimization problem, solved by a column-wise greedy decomposition in a four-phase pipeline: screening ambiguous columns, generating context-aware candidates, verifying via execution feedback, and materializing as non-destructive SQL views.
en.result: Recovers accuracy lost to naming noise across controlled, real-world, and enterprise benchmarks; correctly abstains when tasks exceed model capabilities; refined schemas transfer across model families.
en.help_to_user: Automatically refines database schema names to improve natural language query accuracy without manual schema changes.

idea_spark.idea: Treat schema renaming as a constrained optimization problem, using database views to guarantee query equivalence, enabling safe and transferable improvements.
idea_spark.risk: Column-wise greedy may miss cross-column interactions, limiting effectiveness in complex scenarios; views may introduce performance overhead.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by constrained optimization and program synthesis, tightly coupling schema improvement with downstream task execution.

papers.title: From Backward Spreading to Forward Replay: Revisiting Target Construction in LLM Parameter Editing
papers.summary: LLM parameter editing methods commonly rely on computing an ideal target hidden-state at a target layer (referred as anchor point) and distributing the target vector to multiple preceding layers (commonly known as backward spreading) for cooperative editing. Although widely used for a long time, its underlying basis have not been systematically investigated. In this paper, we first conduct a systematic study of its foundations, which helps clarify its capability boundaries, practical considerations, and potential failure modes. Then, we propose a simple and elegant alternative that replaces backward spreading with forward-propagation. Instead of optimizing the target at the last editing layer, we optimize the anchor point at the first editing layer, and then propagate it forward to obtain accurate and mutually compatible target hidden-states for all subsequent editing layers. This approach achieves the same computational complexity as existing methods while producing more accurate layer-wise targets. Our method is simple, without interfering with either the computation of the initial target hidden state or any other components of the subsequent editing pipeline, and thus constituting a benefit for a wide range of LLM parameter editing methods.

en.tldr: This paper systematically investigates the foundations of target hidden-state construction in LLM parameter editing and proposes a simple forward-propagation alternative that yields more accurate layer-wise targets with the same computational cost.
en.motivation: Existing LLM parameter editing methods commonly use backward spreading for target construction, but its theoretical basis and limitations have not been systematically studied.
en.method: Optimize the anchor point at the first editing layer instead of the last, then propagate it forward to obtain accurate and compatible target hidden-states for all subsequent editing layers.
en.result: The method achieves more accurate layer-wise targets than backward spreading under the same computational complexity, without interfering with other editing components.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand the mechanism of target construction in LLM parameter editing and provides a simple yet effective improvement.

idea_spark.idea: Explore combining anchor optimization with dynamic layer selection, or using forward propagation for multi-task editing.
idea_spark.risk: Forward propagation may introduce cumulative errors in certain architectures; robustness needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the symmetry between backward and forward propagation, rethinking the direction of information flow in the editing pipeline.

papers.title: Activated random walk exhibits self-organized criticality
papers.summary: To explain the ubiquity of power laws and fractals in nature, Bak, Tang, and Wiesenfeld formulated simple conditions for a system to self-organize into a critical state. Dickman, Muñoz, Vespignani, and Zapperi postulated that the self-organized critical state matches the critical state in corresponding fixed-energy models undergoing traditional phase transitions. Although the theory has been applied broadly over the past five decades, no mathematical model has been proven to exhibit the conjectured behavior. Indeed, the originally proposed abelian sandpile model displays nonuniversal behavior stemming from its slow mixing. Marking the first result of its kind, we prove that the 1-d activated random walk model mixes quickly into a stationary state with power-law avalanches and limiting critical density that equals the critical value for the fixed-energy version.

ai.tldr: 证明了1维激活随机游走模型快速混合到具有幂律雪崩的稳态，且临界密度与固定能量模型一致。
ai.motivation: 过去五十年中，自组织临界性理论虽被广泛应用，但从未有数学模型被严格证明具有所推测的行为。
ai.method: 对一维激活随机游走模型进行数学分析，证明其快速混合、幂律雪崩以及临界密度等于固定能量版本的临界值。
ai.result: 首次严格证明该模型表现出自组织临界性，且与固定能量模型的临界点一致。
ai.help_to_user: 为自组织临界性理论提供了第一个严格的数学证明，有助于理解自然界中幂律和分形的普遍性。

idea_spark.idea: 探索其他非平衡系统（如流行病传播、神经网络）是否也能通过类似方法证明自组织临界性。
idea_spark.risk: 高维模型或更复杂相互作用可能导致混合时间过长或临界行为消失。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从沙堆模型的非普适性出发，寻找快速混合的替代模型，最终成功证明自组织临界性。

zh.tldr: 证明了1维激活随机游走模型快速混合到具有幂律雪崩的稳态，且临界密度与固定能量模型一致。
zh.motivation: 过去五十年中，自组织临界性理论虽被广泛应用，但从未有数学模型被严格证明具有所推测的行为。

zh.help_to_user: 为自组织临界性理论提供了第一个严格的数学证明，有助于理解自然界中幂律和分形的普遍性。

en.tldr: Proved that the 1-d activated random walk model mixes quickly into a stationary state with power-law avalanches and critical density matching the fixed-energy version.
en.motivation: Despite decades of application, no mathematical model had been proven to exhibit the conjectured self-organized critical behavior.
en.method: Mathematical analysis of the 1-d activated random walk model, proving fast mixing, power-law avalanches, and critical density equal to that of the fixed-energy model.
en.result: First rigorous proof that a model exhibits self-organized criticality with critical point matching the fixed-energy counterpart.
en.help_to_user: Provides the first rigorous mathematical foundation for self-organized criticality, explaining the ubiquity of power laws and fractals in nature.

idea_spark.idea: Explore whether other non-equilibrium systems (e.g., epidemic spreading, neural networks) can be proven to exhibit self-organized criticality via similar methods.
idea_spark.risk: Higher-dimensional or more complex interactions may lead to slow mixing or loss of critical behavior.
idea_spark.inspiration: Starting from the non-universality of the sandpile model, the authors sought a fast-mixing alternative and succeeded in proving self-organized criticality.

papers.title: When More Reformulations Hurt: Avoiding Drift using Ranker Feedback
papers.summary: Modern retrieval pipelines increasingly rely on query reformulation and neural reranking to improve effectiveness, but this comes at a significant computational cost and introduces a fundamental tradeoff between recall and query drift. Generating many reformulated queries can substantially increase recall, yet naively merging or exhaustively reranking their results is prohibitively expensive. In this work, we argue that the core challenge is not reformulation generation itself, but the adaptive selection of reformulations and their retrieved documents under a strict inference budget. We propose ReformIR, a budget-aware retrieval framework that treats query reformulations as first-class features and performs online relevance estimation using a strong reranker as a teacher. Given multiple reformulated queries, ReformIR constructs a large candidate pool and learns a lightweight surrogate model that estimates document utility from reformulation-specific retrieval signals. Under a fixed reranking budget, the surrogate adaptively prioritizes both reformulations and documents, selectively querying a teacher reranker anchored to the original query. This process increases recall while actively suppressing drift through online feature selection over reformulations. We conduct extensive experiments on the MSMARCO passage corpora and TREC Deep Learning benchmarks (DL19-DL22). Our results show that ReformIR consistently outperforms existing reformulation strategies, particularly as the number of reformulations increases, where prior methods suffer from severe quality degradation due to drift. Our findings also suggest a shift in retrieval system design, rather than using large language models as rerankers, their capacity is more effectively leveraged in the reformulation stage with feedback-driven optimization.

ai.tldr: 提出ReformIR框架，通过预算感知的在线相关估计和重排序器反馈，在多个查询改写下避免漂移并提升召回。
ai.motivation: 现代检索流水线依赖查询改写和神经重排序提升效果，但计算成本高，且改写数量增加时召回与漂移之间存在根本权衡。
ai.method: 将查询改写作为一等特征，用强重排序器作为教师进行在线相关估计；学习轻量替代模型从改写特定检索信号估计文档效用，在固定重排序预算下自适应优先选择改写和文档，并基于原始查询锚定选择性查询教师重排序器。
ai.result: 在MSMARCO和TREC DL基准上，ReformIR一致优于现有改写策略，尤其在改写数量增加时，先前方法因漂移导致质量严重下降。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何在不增加计算预算的情况下，通过反馈驱动的改写选择来提升检索系统的鲁棒性和效率。

idea_spark.idea: 利用重排序器作为教师，在线学习轻量替代模型，动态选择最有用的改写和文档，避免穷举重排序。
idea_spark.risk: 替代模型可能过拟合特定改写模式，在未见改写上泛化不足；教师重排序器的质量直接影响估计准确性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将改写生成与重排序解耦，用反馈驱动优化改写选择，启发设计更高效的检索系统架构。

idea_spark.risk: 替代模型可能过拟合特定改写模式，在未见改写上泛化不足；教师重排序器的质量直接影响估计准确性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将改写生成与重排序解耦，用反馈驱动优化改写选择，启发设计更高效的检索系统架构。

en.tldr: Proposes ReformIR, a budget-aware retrieval framework that uses online relevance estimation with a strong reranker as teacher to avoid drift and improve recall under multiple query reformulations.
en.motivation: Modern retrieval pipelines rely on query reformulation and neural reranking for effectiveness, but incur high computational cost and a fundamental tradeoff between recall and drift as the number of reformulations increases.
en.method: Treats query reformulations as first-class features, performs online relevance estimation using a strong reranker as teacher, learns a lightweight surrogate model to estimate document utility from reformulation-specific retrieval signals, and adaptively prioritizes reformulations and documents under a fixed reranking budget while selectively querying a teacher reranker anchored to the original query.
en.result: On MSMARCO and TREC DL benchmarks, ReformIR consistently outperforms existing reformulation strategies, especially as the number of reformulations increases, where prior methods suffer severe quality degradation due to drift.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to improve retrieval system robustness and efficiency without increasing computational budget through feedback-driven reformulation selection.

idea_spark.idea: Use a reranker as teacher to learn a lightweight surrogate model online, dynamically selecting the most useful reformulations and documents to avoid exhaustive reranking.
idea_spark.risk: The surrogate model may overfit to specific reformulation patterns and generalize poorly to unseen ones; the quality of the teacher reranker directly affects estimation accuracy.
idea_spark.inspiration: Decoupling reformulation generation from reranking and using feedback-driven optimization for reformulation selection inspires more efficient retrieval system architectures.

papers.title: Elimination Templates in Macaulay2
papers.summary: We introduce the package \texttt{EliminationTemplates} for the Macaulay2 computer algebra system, which provides tools for constructing automatic solvers for families of zero-dimensional radical ideals depending on algebraically independent parameters. This article provides a self-contained description of how elimination templates are constructed for such families and their specialization properties. Additionally, we describe the main functionality and datatypes provided by our package, and illustrate its usage on several examples, including applications from computer vision from which elimination templates originated.

ai.tldr: 介绍Macaulay2的EliminationTemplates包，用于构建零维根理想族的自动求解器。
ai.motivation: 为计算机视觉等领域的参数化多项式系统提供自动求解工具。
ai.method: 通过消除模板构造和特化性质实现。
ai.result: 提供了包的功能、数据类型和多个示例。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户快速构建和求解参数化多项式系统。

idea_spark.risk: 模板构造可能对高维或非零维系统效率不高。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从计算机视觉中的几何问题求解获得启发。

en.tldr: Introduces the EliminationTemplates package for Macaulay2, providing tools for constructing automatic solvers for families of zero-dimensional radical ideals.
en.motivation: To provide automatic solving tools for parametric polynomial systems arising in computer vision and other fields.
en.method: Through elimination template construction and specialization properties.
en.result: Describes the package's functionality, data types, and several examples.
en.help_to_user: Helps users quickly construct and solve parametric polynomial systems.

idea_spark.idea: Combine elimination templates with machine learning to automatically learn optimal template structures.
idea_spark.risk: Template construction may be inefficient for high-dimensional or non-zero-dimensional systems.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by geometric problem solving in computer vision.

papers.title: Artificial-Noise Aided Design for Movable-Antenna Enabled Physical-Layer Service Integration
papers.summary: This paper pioneers a novel scheme for artificial-noise (AN)-aided movable-antenna (MA)-enabled physical-layer service integration (PLSI) to harmonize the simultaneous delivery of multicast and confidential messages. By jointly exploiting the spatial reconfiguration capability of MAs and the interference shaping capability of AN, we aim to enhance secrecy performance while guaranteeing multicast reliability. The joint design of MA positions and transmit variables results in a highly coupled and non-convex optimization problem. To address this, we first provide key insights into the role of spatial degrees of freedom in AN design. We then characterize the AN direction under a structured transmission design and derive a closed-form expression for the AN-to-confidential power allocation ratio, which significantly simplifies the overall design. To solve the resulting problem, we further develop a low-complexity block coordinate ascent (BCA)-based scheme that alternates between transmit design and MA position optimization. Numerical results demonstrate that the proposed scheme achieves significant secrecy performance gains with low computational complexity and fast convergence, highlighting its effectiveness for MA-enabled PLSI systems.

ai.tldr: 本文提出一种人工噪声辅助的可移动天线物理层服务集成方案，通过联合优化天线位置和发射变量，在保证多播可靠性的同时提升保密性能。
ai.motivation: 现有物理层服务集成方案难以同时高效支持多播和保密消息传输，可移动天线和人工噪声的联合设计有望利用空间自由度解决这一矛盾。
ai.method: 首先分析人工噪声设计中空间自由度的作用，推导出结构化传输下噪声方向及功率分配比的闭式表达式，然后提出低复杂度的块坐标上升算法交替优化发射设计和天线位置。
ai.result: 数值结果表明所提方案在低计算复杂度和快速收敛下实现了显著的保密性能增益。
ai.help_to_user: 该研究为可移动天线在物理层安全通信中的应用提供了理论指导和高效优化方法。

idea_spark.idea: 考虑将可移动天线与智能反射面结合，进一步利用环境散射增强人工噪声的干扰成形能力。
idea_spark.risk: 可移动天线的机械调整可能引入时延和能耗，实际部署中需权衡性能与实时性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从空间自由度角度重新审视人工噪声设计，启发我们利用物理可重构器件突破传统固定天线阵列的性能瓶颈。

en.tldr: This paper proposes an artificial-noise-aided movable-antenna physical-layer service integration scheme that jointly optimizes antenna positions and transmit variables to enhance secrecy while ensuring multicast reliability.
en.motivation: Existing physical-layer service integration schemes struggle to simultaneously support multicast and confidential messages; the joint design of movable antennas and artificial noise can exploit spatial degrees of freedom to address this challenge.
en.method: First, insights into the role of spatial degrees of freedom in AN design are provided. A closed-form expression for the AN-to-confidential power allocation ratio under a structured transmission design is derived. Then, a low-complexity block coordinate ascent algorithm is developed to alternately optimize transmit design and antenna positions.
en.result: Numerical results show that the proposed scheme achieves significant secrecy performance gains with low computational complexity and fast convergence.
en.help_to_user: This research provides theoretical guidance and efficient optimization methods for applying movable antennas in physical-layer security communications.

idea_spark.idea: Consider combining movable antennas with intelligent reflecting surfaces to further enhance the interference shaping capability of artificial noise via environmental scattering.
idea_spark.risk: Mechanical adjustment of movable antennas may introduce latency and energy consumption, requiring a trade-off between performance and real-time operation in practical deployment.
idea_spark.inspiration: Revisiting artificial noise design from the perspective of spatial degrees of freedom inspires the use of physically reconfigurable devices to break the performance bottleneck of traditional fixed-antenna arrays.

papers.title: Robin nullity and asymptotic geometry of the critical hyperbolic catenoid
papers.summary: For each parameter $a>1$, the critical hyperbolic catenoid $Σ_a$ is a rotationally symmetric, free boundary minimal annulus in a geodesic ball $B^3(r(a))\subset\mathbb{H}^3$. The Morse index of $Σ_a$ is at least $4$ by Medvedev [7], who conjectures equality. In this paper we identify a new geometric and spectral phenomenon for the family $\{Σ_a\}_{a>1}$, which we call "parameter-criticality", and study its consequences for the Robin spectrum. Specifically, we prove two main results:   (I) Parameter-criticality (Theorem 1.5). The boundary radius $r(a)$ is non-monotone on $(1,\infty)$: it satisfies $r'(1^+)<0$ and $r(a)=\frac{3}{2}\log a+d_\infty+o(1)$ as $a\to\infty$ with $d_\infty=\log[Γ(1/4)/Γ(3/4)]-\frac{1}{2}\log(2π)$ (Theorem 1.4). Hence there exists a parameter-critical value $a^\sharp\in(1,\infty)$ with $r'(a^\sharp)=0$.   (II) Robin nullity jump (Theorem 1.6). At every such $a^\sharp$, the Robin nullity of $Σ_{a^\sharp}$ satisfies $\text{nul}(L_{Σ_{a^\sharp}})\geq 3$, with an additional kernel element in mode $k=0$ generated by the parametric variation field $j_a=\langle\partial_aΦ_a,ν\rangle_L|_{a=a^\sharp}$, which we show is non-vanishing at the catenoid neck via the closed-form $j_a(0)=1/(2\sqrt{a^2-1})$.   The argument requires the limit $r_0:=\lim_{a\to 1^+}r(a)$ characterized as the unique positive solution of the transcendental equation $\tanh(r_0)\,\tanh(2r_0/\sqrt{3})=\sqrt{3}/2$ (Theorem 1.3), giving a clean parametrization of the degeneration $Σ_a\toΣ_1$. The Robin nullity of $Σ_a$ in mode $|k|=1$ is shown to equal $2$ (Proposition 1.1); this extends to the hyperbolic setting the mode-by-mode Fourier decomposition technique of Devyver [2] for the Euclidean critical catenoid, and is used in the proof of (II) to identify the extra kernel as a mode-$k=0$ phenomenon.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了临界双曲悬链面族Σ_a的Robin零度与渐近几何，发现参数临界性导致Robin零度跳跃。
ai.motivation: Medvedev猜想临界双曲悬链面的Morse指标为4，本文旨在验证该猜想并揭示新的几何谱现象。
ai.method: 通过分析边界半径r(a)的非单调性，利用参数变分场和Fourier分解技术。
ai.result: 证明了参数临界值a^♯处Robin零度≥3，且额外核元素由参数变分场生成。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解自由边界极小曲面在双曲空间中的谱性质及参数依赖性。

idea_spark.idea: 利用边界半径的极值点构造新的核函数，可能用于研究Morse指标。
idea_spark.risk: 参数临界值的唯一性尚未证明，可能影响结论的普适性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从欧氏临界悬链面的Fourier分解技术扩展到双曲空间，启发类似问题的处理。

en.tldr: This paper studies the Robin nullity and asymptotic geometry of the critical hyperbolic catenoid family Σ_a, discovering parameter-criticality leading to a Robin nullity jump.
en.motivation: Medvedev conjectured that the Morse index of the critical hyperbolic catenoid is 4; this paper aims to verify the conjecture and reveal new geometric-spectral phenomena.
en.method: By analyzing the non-monotonicity of the boundary radius r(a), using parametric variation fields and Fourier decomposition techniques.
en.result: It is proved that at the parameter-critical value a^♯, the Robin nullity is at least 3, with an extra kernel element generated by the parametric variation field.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the spectral properties and parameter dependence of free boundary minimal surfaces in hyperbolic space.

idea_spark.idea: Using extremal points of boundary radius to construct new kernel functions, potentially for studying Morse indices.
idea_spark.risk: Uniqueness of the critical parameter value is not proven, which may affect generality.
idea_spark.inspiration: Extending Fourier decomposition techniques from Euclidean critical catenoid to hyperbolic setting inspires similar approaches for other problems.

papers.title: FitED: A User-Centric, Extensible Software Environment for Robust Peak-Profile and General Functional Data Fitting
papers.summary: Reliable parameter extraction from experimental data is central to quantitative analysis in spectroscopy, diffraction, photoluminescence, chromatography, microscopy, and time-resolved measurements. We present FitED, a Python-based desktop application for interactive and automated nonlinear fitting of one-dimensional scientific data. FitED combines an accessible graphical workflow with a numerical backend capable of fitting both conventional peak profiles and arbitrary user-defined analytical functions. The software supports Gaussian, Lorentzian, Pseudo-Voigt, and exact area-normalized Voigt profiles, together with custom functions such as exponential decays, stretched exponentials, saturation curves, and spectroscopy-specific response functions. It integrates robust text-file import, region-of-interest selection, background modeling, parameter bounds, weighting strategies, automated pre-fit search, iterative peak refinement, residual visualization, session persistence, and structured export of fitted curves, components, reports, and metadata. By combining mathematical transparency with practical usability, FitED aims to make nonlinear fitting more reproducible and accessible while preserving the parameter-level control required by experienced experimental researchers.

ai.tldr: FitED 是一个基于 Python 的桌面应用，用于一维科学数据的交互式和自动化非线性拟合，支持多种峰形和自定义函数。
ai.motivation: 实验数据中可靠参数提取是定量分析的核心，现有工具在易用性和灵活性上存在不足。
ai.method: 结合图形化工作流与数值后端，支持高斯、洛伦兹、伪 Voigt 和精确面积归一化 Voigt 峰形，以及指数衰减、拉伸指数、饱和曲线等自定义函数。
ai.result: 实现了鲁棒的文本文件导入、感兴趣区域选择、背景建模、参数边界、加权策略、自动预拟合搜索、迭代峰精化、残差可视化、会话持久化以及结构化导出。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户以可重复的方式完成非线性拟合，同时保留有经验研究者所需的参数级控制。

idea_spark.idea: 开发一个基于 FitED 的在线协作平台，支持多用户同时编辑拟合参数并实时共享结果。
idea_spark.risk: 在线化可能引入数据安全和延迟问题，需权衡实时协作与本地计算性能。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从 FitED 对用户自定义函数的支持中，联想到构建一个社区驱动的函数市场，用户可上传和共享拟合模型。

en.tldr: FitED is a Python-based desktop application for interactive and automated nonlinear fitting of 1D scientific data, supporting multiple peak profiles and custom functions.
en.motivation: Reliable parameter extraction from experimental data is central to quantitative analysis, and existing tools lack ease of use and flexibility.
en.method: Combines a graphical workflow with a numerical backend, supporting Gaussian, Lorentzian, Pseudo-Voigt, and exact area-normalized Voigt profiles, as well as custom functions like exponential decays, stretched exponentials, and saturation curves.
en.result: Implements robust text-file import, region-of-interest selection, background modeling, parameter bounds, weighting strategies, automated pre-fit search, iterative peak refinement, residual visualization, session persistence, and structured export.
en.help_to_user: Helps users perform reproducible nonlinear fitting while preserving the parameter-level control required by experienced researchers.

idea_spark.idea: Develop an online collaborative platform based on FitED that allows multiple users to edit fitting parameters simultaneously and share results in real time.
idea_spark.risk: Online deployment may introduce data security and latency issues, requiring a trade-off between real-time collaboration and local computation performance.
idea_spark.inspiration: From FitED's support for user-defined functions, envision building a community-driven function marketplace where users can upload and share fitting models.

papers.title: More on Classical Stability of Hopf-like Solitons of the Toroidal-Twisted type
papers.summary: The Faddeev-Hopf model [1] supporting Hopfions was shown to emerge in the low-energy limit of four-dimensional scalar quantum electrodynamics (QED) with two charged scalar fields [2, 3]. Faddeev and Noemi conjectured that the Hopfions and Hopf-like solitons -- vortons -- can be based on a twisted toroidal structure inherent to QED [4-6]. This conjecture was discussed in detail in [2] in the approximation of negligibly small extrinsic curvature. Qualitative and semi-quantitative arguments were used to demonstrate the validity of the Faddeev-Noemi hypothesis. Here we further enhance the proof by applying a numerical analysis which confirms that large-size Hopf-like solitons exist as local energy minima in the full QED theory (in the Faddeev-Skyrme model they become topological solitons representing the global minima in the given topological sector).

ai.tldr: 通过数值分析证实了在标量量子电动力学中，大尺寸类霍普夫孤子（环面扭曲型）作为局部能量极小值存在，支持了Faddeev-Noemi猜想。
ai.motivation: 验证Faddeev-Noemi关于QED中环面扭曲型类霍普夫孤子稳定性的猜想，此前仅基于定性或半定量论证。
ai.method: 在完整QED理论中进行数值分析，寻找大尺寸类霍普夫孤子的局部能量极小值。
ai.result: 数值结果确认了这类孤子作为局部能量极小值存在，在Faddeev-Skyrme模型中它们成为拓扑孤子并代表全局极小值。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了关于QED中拓扑孤子稳定性的严格数值证据，有助于理解非微扰场论现象。

idea_spark.idea: 探索在更高维或非阿贝尔规范理论中是否存在类似的环面扭曲型孤子，并分析其稳定性条件。
idea_spark.risk: 数值分析可能依赖于特定参数选择，结果对模型细节敏感，需谨慎推广。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将QED中的孤子稳定性问题与超导涡旋或宇宙弦的动力学类比，可能揭示新的物理机制。

en.tldr: Numerical analysis confirms that large-size Hopf-like solitons of the toroidal-twisted type exist as local energy minima in scalar quantum electrodynamics, supporting the Faddeev-Noemi conjecture.
en.motivation: To verify the Faddeev-Noemi conjecture on the stability of toroidal-twisted Hopf-like solitons in QED, previously supported only by qualitative or semi-quantitative arguments.
en.method: Numerical analysis in the full QED theory to search for local energy minima of large-size Hopf-like solitons.
en.result: Numerical results confirm that these solitons exist as local energy minima; in the Faddeev-Skyrme model they become topological solitons representing global minima.
en.help_to_user: Provides rigorous numerical evidence for the stability of topological solitons in QED, aiding understanding of non-perturbative field theory phenomena.

idea_spark.idea: Explore whether analogous toroidal-twisted solitons exist in higher-dimensional or non-Abelian gauge theories and analyze their stability conditions.
idea_spark.risk: Numerical results may depend on specific parameter choices and be sensitive to model details, requiring caution in generalization.
idea_spark.inspiration: Analogies between QED soliton stability and superconducting vortices or cosmic strings could reveal new physical mechanisms.

papers.title: Distributed Observer Design for Discrete-Time LTI Systems via Jordan Canonical Form
papers.summary: This paper addresses the problem of distributed state estimation for discrete-time linear time-invariant systems. Building on the framework proposed in Gao & Yang (2025), we exploit the Jordan canonical form of the system matrix to develop two distributed estimation schemes that ensure asymptotic convergence of local estimates to the true system state. In both approaches, each node reconstructs the components of the state that are locally detectable for it via a Luenberger observer, while employing a consensus-based mechanism to estimate the components that are not directly detectable.   The first scheme relies on local observers whose dimension matches that of the original state vector; however, its applicability requires the satisfaction of a large set of inequalities. The second scheme, in contrast, can be implemented under less restrictive conditions, but results in observers of increased (augmented) order. For both methods, we derive necessary and sufficient conditions - expressed in terms of the eigenvalues of the system matrix and certain submatrices of the communication network Laplacian - that guarantee the existence of a distributed observer achieving asymptotically accurate estimation. Compared to Gao & Yang (2025), the proposed approaches offer greater flexibility in the selection of coupling gains and impose less stringent solvability conditions.

ai.tldr: 利用Jordan标准形设计两种分布式观测器，实现离散时间LTI系统的渐近状态估计。
ai.motivation: 现有分布式估计方法存在耦合增益选择受限、可解条件苛刻等问题。
ai.method: 基于系统矩阵的Jordan标准形，结合Luenberger观测器与一致性机制，提出两种分布式估计方案。
ai.result: 两种方案均能保证局部估计渐近收敛到真实状态，且比现有方法更灵活、条件更宽松。
ai.help_to_user: 为离散LTI系统提供更易实现的分布式状态估计方案。

idea_spark.idea: 将状态分量按可观测性分解，对不可观测部分采用一致性估计，降低对全局通信的依赖。
idea_spark.risk: 高阶观测器可能带来计算负担，且需验证通信拓扑与系统矩阵的特征值条件。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用代数结构（如Jordan块）简化分布式估计的耦合条件，启发其他控制问题中的结构分解方法。

en.tldr: Exploiting the Jordan canonical form to design two distributed observers for asymptotic state estimation of discrete-time LTI systems.
en.motivation: Existing distributed estimation methods suffer from limited flexibility in coupling gain selection and stringent solvability conditions.
en.method: Based on the Jordan canonical form of the system matrix, two distributed estimation schemes are developed using Luenberger observers and consensus mechanisms.
en.result: Both schemes ensure asymptotic convergence of local estimates to the true state, offering greater flexibility and milder conditions than prior work.
en.help_to_user: Provides more practical distributed state estimation solutions for discrete-time LTI systems.

idea_spark.idea: Decompose state components by observability, estimate unobservable parts via consensus, reducing reliance on global communication.
idea_spark.risk: Higher-order observers may increase computational load, and eigenvalue conditions on the Laplacian must be verified.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leveraging algebraic structures (e.g., Jordan blocks) to simplify coupling conditions in distributed estimation, inspiring structural decomposition in other control problems.

papers.title: Optimization-based One-side Boundary Control of LWR Traffic Models
papers.summary: In this paper, we study the feasibility of a class of optimization-based boundary control of one-dimensional macroscopic traffic flow models, where stability and invariance are achieved by a single boundary control. We define the sets of controllers to stabilize the system to a desired state via Lyapunov functionals, and to ensure forward invariance of a desired subset via boundary control barrier functionals. The control input is then selected from the intersection of those sets via a convex optimization problem. We determine sufficient conditions to ensure the existence of an optimal boundary control problem achieving both stability and invariance for a generic traffic flux function. Simulation results showcase the behavior of the proposed optimization-based controller applied to conservation laws with several traffic flow functions.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了一类基于优化的单边边界控制方法，用于一维宏观交通流模型，通过凸优化选择控制输入同时实现稳定性和不变性。
ai.motivation: 现有边界控制方法难以同时保证交通流系统的稳定性和状态不变性，需要一种可计算的优化框架来统一处理这两个目标。
ai.method: 利用Lyapunov泛函定义稳定控制器集合，利用边界控制障碍泛函定义不变性控制器集合，通过凸优化从交集选取控制输入。
ai.result: 给出了保证最优边界控制问题存在性的充分条件，并在多种交通流函数下验证了控制器的有效性。
ai.help_to_user: 为交通流边界控制提供了一种可求解的优化设计方法，可应用于智能交通系统中的匝道控制或信号灯控制。

idea_spark.idea: 将Lyapunov和障碍函数结合到单一凸优化中，可推广到多边界或网络化交通系统。
idea_spark.risk: 充分条件可能过于保守，实际应用中需验证非线性交通流函数的可解性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受机器人控制中控制障碍函数思想的启发，将其引入宏观交通流边界控制。

idea_spark.inspiration: 受机器人控制中控制障碍函数思想的启发，将其引入宏观交通流边界控制。

en.tldr: This paper studies an optimization-based one-side boundary control for one-dimensional macroscopic traffic flow models, achieving both stability and invariance via convex optimization.
en.motivation: Existing boundary control methods struggle to simultaneously ensure stability and state invariance for traffic flow systems, motivating a computable optimization framework.
en.method: Define sets of controllers for stability via Lyapunov functionals and for forward invariance via boundary control barrier functionals, then select control input from their intersection via convex optimization.
en.result: Sufficient conditions for existence of an optimal boundary control problem are derived, and simulations demonstrate effectiveness across multiple traffic flux functions.
en.help_to_user: Provides a tractable optimization-based design for traffic boundary control, applicable to ramp metering or signal control in intelligent transportation systems.

idea_spark.idea: Combining Lyapunov and barrier functions into a single convex optimization can be extended to multi-boundary or networked traffic systems.
idea_spark.risk: Sufficient conditions may be conservative; practical solvability for nonlinear traffic flux functions needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by control barrier functions in robotics, this work introduces them into macroscopic traffic boundary control.

papers.title: Fixed-Time Convergence of Time-Varying Neurodynamic Systems for Mixed Variational Inequalities
papers.summary: This paper proposes novel fixed-time (FXT) convergent neurodynamic approaches for solving mixed variational inequality problems (MVIs). A class of first-order proximal neurodynamic models (PNMs), including time-varying proximal neurodynamic models (TVPNMs), is developed to guarantee FXT convergence to the solution of MVIs from arbitrary initial conditions. Rigorous convergence and stability analyses are established under the assumptions of strong pseudomonotonicity and Lipschitz continuity, using Lyapunov stability theory. The proposed methods exhibit FXT convergence from any initial point, with convergence speed significantly enhanced through the strategic design of time-varying coefficients. Explicit upper bounds on the settling time are derived for the time-varying neurodynamic models. In addition, the robustness of the proposed approaches against bounded noise disturbances is analyzed. The applicability of the proposed framework is further demonstrated for composite optimization problems and minimax optimization problems. Also, numerical examples are presented to demonstrate the effectiveness and convergence behavior of the proposed methods.

ai.tldr: 提出了一类固定时间收敛的时变神经动力学模型，用于求解混合变分不等式问题。
ai.motivation: 现有神经动力学方法求解混合变分不等式时收敛速度慢，且缺乏固定时间收敛保证。
ai.method: 设计了时变近端神经动力学模型，利用Lyapunov稳定性理论在强伪单调和Lipschitz连续假设下证明固定时间收敛，并通过时变系数加速收敛。
ai.result: 模型从任意初始点固定时间收敛到解，推导了收敛时间上界，并分析了有界噪声下的鲁棒性。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种快速、鲁棒的数值求解框架，适用于复合优化和极小极大优化问题。

en.tldr: This paper proposes novel fixed-time convergent neurodynamic approaches for solving mixed variational inequality problems.
en.motivation: Existing neurodynamic methods for mixed variational inequalities suffer from slow convergence and lack fixed-time guarantees.
en.method: Time-varying proximal neurodynamic models are developed, with rigorous fixed-time convergence analysis via Lyapunov stability under strong pseudomonotonicity and Lipschitz continuity, accelerated by time-varying coefficients.
en.result: The models achieve fixed-time convergence from any initial point, with explicit settling time bounds and robustness against bounded noise.
en.help_to_user: Provides a fast and robust numerical framework applicable to composite and minimax optimization problems.

idea_spark.idea: Combine the time-varying coefficient strategy with projection operators to design more efficient distributed or stochastic optimization algorithms.
idea_spark.risk: The strong pseudomonotonicity assumption may not hold in practice; verification or relaxation of assumptions is needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by fixed-time control theory, the explicit settling time bound is leveraged for neurodynamic system design.

papers.title: Smooth and stable Euler implosions
papers.summary: We construct a new class of self-similar implosion profiles for the multi-dimensional compressible Euler equations. These profiles are smooth, genuinely non-isentropic, radially/spherically symmetric, and have explicit (closed-form) similarity exponents. We prove that the exact Euler solution corresponding to the ground state implosion profile is stable to radially symmetric perturbations, as a solution to the full nonlinear compressible Euler equations, modulo a one-dimensional compatibility condition on the initial data. For perturbations of the Euler solution corresponding to the ground state implosion profile of a monatomic or diatomic gas, that do not obey any symmetry assumptions, we provide a complete characterization of the set of initial data that yield nonlinear stability.

ai.tldr: 构造了多维可压缩欧拉方程的一类新的自相似内爆剖面，证明其非线性稳定性。
ai.motivation: 研究多维可压缩欧拉方程中光滑且稳定的自相似内爆解。
ai.method: 构造显式相似指数的新剖面，并通过非线性分析证明径向对称扰动下的稳定性，以及非对称扰动下初始数据的完全刻画。
ai.result: 得到了光滑、非等熵、径向/球对称的自相似内爆剖面，并证明了基态内爆剖面对径向对称扰动的稳定性，以及对单原子或双原子气体非对称扰动的稳定性条件。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解可压缩流体中内爆过程的数学结构和稳定性条件。

idea_spark.idea: 将显式相似指数与非线性稳定性结合，可能用于设计可控内爆或聚变相关模拟。
idea_spark.risk: 高维非对称扰动下的稳定性条件可能难以数值验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将自相似解与实验内爆数据对比，或探索非径向对称的推广。

en.tldr: Construct a new class of self-similar implosion profiles for the multi-dimensional compressible Euler equations and prove their nonlinear stability.
en.motivation: To study smooth and stable self-similar implosion solutions in multi-dimensional compressible Euler equations.
en.method: Construct profiles with explicit similarity exponents and prove stability under radially symmetric perturbations via nonlinear analysis, with complete characterization of initial data for non-symmetric perturbations of monatomic or diatomic gases.
en.result: Obtained smooth, non-isentropic, radially/spherically symmetric self-similar implosion profiles, and proved stability of the ground state profile under radially symmetric perturbations, as well as stability conditions for non-symmetric perturbations of monatomic or diatomic gases.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the mathematical structure and stability conditions of implosion processes in compressible fluids.

idea_spark.idea: Combining explicit similarity exponents with nonlinear stability may enable design of controlled implosions or fusion-related simulations.
idea_spark.risk: Stability conditions for high-dimensional non-symmetric perturbations may be difficult to verify numerically.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires comparison of self-similar solutions with experimental implosion data, or exploration of non-radially symmetric generalizations.

papers.title: Introduction to Exact Penalization for Mathematical Programming with Equilibrium Constraints
papers.summary: We present a focused introduction to exact penalty methods for nonlinear programs and mathematical programs with equilibrium constraints (MPECs), emphasizing their connection to modern error bound theory. The goal is twofold. First, we explain how classical optimality conditions can be interpreted through exact penalization, and why such results typically rely on constraint regularity conditions that can be understood as error bounds on perturbations of feasible sets. We then highlight how recent developments based on subanalytic geometry and Lojasiewicz-type inequalities extend this framework beyond classical regularity assumptions, enabling exact penalization under broader analytic conditions.   Second, we demonstrate how this theory can be applied in practice to MPECs by reformulating them via KKT systems and constructing exact penalty functions based on residual mappings. Particular attention is given to fractional-order penalties arising from Lojasiewicz error bounds, as well as to improved formulations for special problem classes where sharper exponents can be obtained. These developments provide both theoretical insight and practical guidance for analyzing and solving challenging constrained optimization problems.

ai.tldr: 本文介绍了非线性规划和带均衡约束的数学规划（MPEC）的精确罚方法，强调其与现代误差界理论的联系，并展示了如何通过KKT系统重构和Lojasiewicz型不等式实现更广泛的精确罚化。
ai.motivation: 经典精确罚方法依赖于约束正则性条件，限制了其应用范围。本文旨在通过误差界理论和Lojasiewicz不等式，将精确罚化推广到更一般的分析条件下。
ai.method: 利用子解析几何和Lojasiewicz型不等式，将约束正则性条件解释为可行集扰动的误差界；通过KKT系统重构MPEC，并基于残差映射构造精确罚函数，特别关注分数阶罚项。
ai.result: 建立了在更宽松分析条件下的精确罚化框架，为特殊问题类提供了改进的罚函数形式（如更优的指数），并给出了理论洞察和实用指导。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解精确罚方法在复杂约束优化问题（如MPEC）中的理论基础和实际应用，特别是如何利用误差界和Lojasiewicz不等式处理非正则约束。

idea_spark.idea: 将分数阶罚项与机器学习中的稀疏优化或正则化方法结合，探索在非凸非光滑问题中的精确罚化效果。
idea_spark.risk: 分数阶罚项可能导致数值不稳定或收敛缓慢，需谨慎选择指数和求解算法。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受Lojasiewicz不等式在优化中应用的启发，可进一步研究其他几何或代数工具（如半代数几何）在约束优化罚函数设计中的潜力。

en.tldr: This paper introduces exact penalty methods for nonlinear programs and MPECs, emphasizing their connection to modern error bound theory, and demonstrates how KKT reformulations and Lojasiewicz-type inequalities enable exact penalization under broader conditions.
en.motivation: Classical exact penalty methods rely on constraint regularity conditions, limiting their applicability. This work aims to extend exact penalization to more general analytic settings via error bound theory and Lojasiewicz inequalities.
en.method: Leverages subanalytic geometry and Lojasiewicz-type inequalities to interpret constraint regularity as error bounds on perturbed feasible sets; reformulates MPECs via KKT systems and constructs exact penalty functions based on residual mappings, with emphasis on fractional-order penalties.
en.result: Establishes an exact penalization framework under relaxed analytic conditions, provides improved penalty forms (e.g., sharper exponents) for special problem classes, and offers both theoretical insights and practical guidance.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand the theoretical foundations and practical applications of exact penalty methods for challenging constrained optimization problems like MPECs, especially in handling non-regular constraints via error bounds and Lojasiewicz inequalities.

idea_spark.idea: Combine fractional-order penalties with sparse optimization or regularization techniques in machine learning to explore exact penalization in nonconvex nonsmooth problems.
idea_spark.risk: Fractional-order penalties may cause numerical instability or slow convergence; careful selection of exponents and solution algorithms is required.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the use of Lojasiewicz inequalities in optimization, further explore the potential of other geometric or algebraic tools (e.g., semialgebraic geometry) in designing penalty functions for constrained optimization.

papers.title: Unpaired Image Deraining Using Reward-Guided Self-Reinforcement Strategy
papers.summary: Unsupervised deraining has attracted attention for its ability to learn the real-world distribution of rain without paired supervision. However, the lack of strong constraints makes it difficult for the network to converge, especially with the complex diversity of rain degradation. A key motivation is that high-quality deraining results occasionally emerge during training, which can be leveraged to guide the optimization process. To overcome these challenges, we introduce RGSUD (Reward-Guided Self-Reinforcement Unsupervised Image Deraining), comprising two key stages: reward recycling and self-reinforcement (SR) training. For the former stage, we propose an Image Quality Assessment (IQA)-based dynamic reward recycling mechanism that selects optimal derained outputs during training and continuously collects high-quality deraining images. In latter stage, we incorporate these rewards into the model's optimization process, constraining the optimization space and improving alignment between derained outputs and clean images. By leveraging IQA-based self-reinforced loss and dynamically updated rewards, we enhance the quality of synthesized pseudo-paired data and stabilize the optimization. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves SOTA performance across multiple datasets, including paired synthetic, paired real, and unpaired real images, outperforming existing unsupervised deraining approaches in both subjective and objective IQA metrics. Additionally, we show that the self-reinforcement strategy is adaptable to other unsupervised deraining methods and our deraining framework demonstrates strong generalization across existing supervised deraining networks.

ai.tldr: 提出一种无监督图像去雨方法RGSUD，通过奖励引导的自强化策略，利用训练中偶然出现的高质量去雨结果来优化模型，在多个数据集上达到最优性能。
ai.motivation: 无监督去雨因缺乏强约束导致网络难以收敛，而训练中偶尔出现的高质量去雨结果可被利用来引导优化。
ai.method: 包含奖励回收和自强化训练两阶段：前者基于图像质量评估动态选择并收集高质量去雨图像作为奖励；后者将这些奖励融入模型优化，约束优化空间并提升去雨输出与干净图像的对齐。
ai.result: 在配对合成、配对真实和未配对真实图像数据集上均达到最先进性能，主观和客观IQA指标均优于现有无监督去雨方法。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种无需配对数据即可有效去雨的方案，适用于真实场景中难以获取配对数据的情况。

idea_spark.idea: 将训练中偶然出现的高质量输出作为动态奖励，通过自强化损失持续优化模型，避免依赖固定先验。
idea_spark.risk: 奖励回收依赖IQA模型质量，若IQA不准确可能引入噪声；自强化训练可能过拟合到特定奖励分布。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用训练过程中的中间结果作为反馈信号，类似强化学习中的奖励塑造，可启发其他低层视觉任务的无监督学习。

en.tldr: Proposes RGSUD, an unsupervised image deraining method using reward-guided self-reinforcement, leveraging occasional high-quality derained outputs during training to guide optimization, achieving SOTA on multiple datasets.
en.motivation: Unsupervised deraining suffers from poor convergence due to lack of strong constraints; high-quality deraining results occasionally emerge during training and can be leveraged to guide optimization.
en.method: Two stages: reward recycling (dynamic IQA-based selection and collection of high-quality derained images as rewards) and self-reinforcement training (incorporating rewards into optimization to constrain the space and improve alignment with clean images).
en.result: Achieves SOTA performance on paired synthetic, paired real, and unpaired real datasets, outperforming existing unsupervised methods in both subjective and objective IQA metrics.
en.help_to_user: Provides an effective deraining solution without requiring paired data, suitable for real-world scenarios where paired data is hard to obtain.

idea_spark.idea: Use occasional high-quality outputs during training as dynamic rewards, with self-reinforcement loss to continuously improve the model without fixed priors.
idea_spark.risk: Reward recycling depends on IQA model quality; inaccurate IQA may introduce noise. Self-reinforcement may overfit to specific reward distribution.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leveraging intermediate training outputs as feedback signals, akin to reward shaping in reinforcement learning, could inspire unsupervised learning for other low-level vision tasks.

papers.title: Classical limit of the Pauli-Fierz dynamics
papers.summary: We study the Schrödinger evolution generated by the Pauli-Fierz Hamiltonian, a model for nonrelativistic quantum electrodynamics, in the classical limit $\hbar \rightarrow 0$. In this regime, we rigorously derive the Newton-Maxwell equations of classical electrodynamics as effective dynamics approximating the time evolution. Our result complements prior work by an alternative derivation that provides explicit estimates on the rate of convergence, justifying the validity of the approximation for a special class of initial data.

ai.tldr: 在经典极限下，严格推导了Pauli-Fierz哈密顿量生成的薛定谔演化逼近牛顿-麦克斯韦方程，并给出了收敛速率估计。
ai.motivation: 验证量子电动力学在经典极限下退化为经典电动力学的有效性。
ai.method: 对Pauli-Fierz模型取经典极限，通过显式估计收敛速率来证明逼近。
ai.result: 对于一类特殊初值，薛定谔演化以可控误差逼近牛顿-麦克斯韦方程。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了量子到经典过渡的严格数学框架，有助于理解量子电动力学的经典对应。

idea_spark.idea: 利用显式误差界设计量子模拟中经典近似的适用条件。
idea_spark.risk: 结果仅对特殊初值成立，一般初值可能需要更复杂的分析。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发在量子光学或凝聚态系统中寻找类似的经典极限验证。

en.tldr: In the classical limit, we rigorously derive that the Schrödinger evolution generated by the Pauli-Fierz Hamiltonian approximates the Newton-Maxwell equations, with explicit convergence rate estimates.
en.motivation: To justify the validity of the classical electrodynamics approximation from quantum electrodynamics.
en.method: Take the classical limit of the Pauli-Fierz model and prove convergence via explicit error bounds.
en.result: For a special class of initial data, the quantum evolution converges to the Newton-Maxwell equations with controlled error.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous mathematical framework for the quantum-to-classical transition, aiding understanding of the classical correspondence of quantum electrodynamics.

idea_spark.idea: Use explicit error bounds to design conditions for classical approximations in quantum simulations.
idea_spark.risk: The result holds only for special initial data; general initial data may require more complex analysis.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires searching for similar classical limit verifications in quantum optics or condensed matter systems.

papers.title: Beyond Structure: Revolutionising Materials Discovery via AI-Driven Synthesis Protocol-Property Relationships
papers.summary: The current structure-centric paradigm in artificial intelligence (AI)-driven materials discovery, despite delivering thousands of candidate structures, is stalling at a critical barrier: the synthesizability gap. We argue that closing this gap demands a pivot to a synthesis-first paradigm in which executable synthesis protocols, not just atomic configurations, are treated as primary design variables. We outline a roadmap built on three pillars: (i) representing synthesis procedures as machine-readable protocols, (ii) deploying generative and inverse-design models to propose actionable reaction pathways and recipes, and (iii) integrating closed-loop optimisation to refine protocols against experimental realities and sustainability constraints. Framed in terms of the causal backbone P->X->y from protocol P to structure X and properties y, this perspective sets out methodological building blocks, standards needs and self-driving laboratory (SDL) integration strategies to accelerate reproducible, data-first materials discovery.

ai.tldr: 本文提出从结构中心范式转向合成优先范式，通过将可执行的合成协议作为主要设计变量，结合生成模型、逆设计和闭环优化，以弥合材料发现中的可合成性差距。
ai.motivation: 当前AI驱动的材料发现虽能生成大量候选结构，但面临可合成性差距这一关键瓶颈，需要从结构中心转向合成优先。
ai.method: 提出三大支柱：将合成程序表示为机器可读协议；部署生成和逆设计模型提出可执行的反应路径和配方；集成闭环优化以根据实验现实和可持续性约束改进协议。
ai.result: 构建了从协议P到结构X再到性质y的因果框架P->X->y，并提出了方法学构建块、标准需求和自驱动实验室集成策略。

en.tldr: This paper proposes a shift from a structure-centric to a synthesis-first paradigm in AI-driven materials discovery, treating executable synthesis protocols as primary design variables, and outlines a roadmap combining generative models, inverse design, and closed-loop optimization to bridge the synthesizability gap.
en.motivation: Current AI-driven materials discovery generates thousands of candidate structures but faces a critical synthesizability gap, necessitating a pivot from structure-centric to synthesis-first approaches.
en.method: Three pillars: representing synthesis procedures as machine-readable protocols; deploying generative and inverse-design models to propose actionable reaction pathways; integrating closed-loop optimization to refine protocols against experimental realities and sustainability constraints.
en.result: Establishes a causal backbone P->X->y from protocol to structure to properties, along with methodological building blocks, standards needs, and self-driving laboratory integration strategies.
en.help_to_user: Helps researchers understand how AI and automated experimentation can accelerate reproducible, data-driven materials discovery.

idea_spark.idea: Develop an end-to-end AI system that takes target properties as input and outputs executable synthesis protocols, with closed-loop validation and optimization via self-driving laboratories.
idea_spark.risk: Standardization of machine-readable protocols and cross-laboratory compatibility may hinder practical deployment; generative models may propose infeasible reaction pathways.
idea_spark.inspiration: Treating synthesis protocols as design variables, analogous to molecular structures, could open a new paradigm for materials discovery.

papers.title: An Adaptive Variable Neighborhood Search for a Family of Set Covering Routing Problems with an Application in Disaster Relief Operations
papers.summary: This paper studies a variant of the Set Covering Routing Problem (SCRP) motivated by post-disaster humanitarian logistics. We consider a hybrid distribution concept in which the majority of transportation is performed by helicopters, while ground transport is limited to the last mile, addressing severe accessibility constraints in disaster-affected regions. The resulting problem integrates landing site location, routing, and covering decisions, incorporating features of the Multi-Vehicle Covering Tour Problem (m-CTP) and the Vehicle Routing with Demand Allocation Problem (VRDAP) in a facility-capacitated, multi-depot setting. Due to the computational complexity of the problem, we develop an Adaptive Variable Neighborhood Search (AVNS) that combines established routing operators with novel mechanisms for covering decisions. The performance of the proposed approach is evaluated on benchmark instances for the related m-CTP and VRDAP problems, demonstrating competitive solution quality compared to problem-specific state-of-the-art approaches. Furthermore, we apply our AVNS to a real-world case study based on the 2024 flash floods in Afghanistan. The results highlight the practical relevance of the proposed framework and provide managerial insights into effective distribution strategies for disaster response operations.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了一种面向灾后人道主义物流的集合覆盖路径问题变体，提出混合直升机与地面运输的配送模式，并开发了自适应变邻域搜索算法，在阿富汗2024年山洪案例中验证了实用性。
ai.motivation: 灾后区域交通严重受限，传统纯地面运输效率低，需要结合直升机与最后一公里地面配送的混合方案，同时优化着陆点选址、路径和覆盖决策。
ai.method: 将问题建模为带设施容量和多车场的集合覆盖路径问题，融合多车辆覆盖旅行问题和需求分配车辆路径问题的特征，并设计自适应变邻域搜索算法，集成路径算子与覆盖决策新机制。
ai.result: 在基准实例上达到与专用方法相当的竞争力，并在阿富汗2024年山洪案例中展示了实际应用价值，提供了管理启示。
ai.help_to_user: 如果您从事灾害应急物流或路径优化研究，本文的混合配送模型和自适应变邻域搜索算法可直接参考或扩展。

idea_spark.idea: 将自适应变邻域搜索中的覆盖算子与动态灾害信息（如道路中断实时更新）结合，构建在线重规划框架。
idea_spark.risk: 算法对问题规模敏感，大规模实例可能需并行化或启发式加速；实际应用中直升机调度成本与天气约束需额外建模。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受阿富汗案例启发，可进一步研究多层级配送中心选址与无人机-车辆协同的灾后物流网络。

en.tldr: This paper studies a variant of the Set Covering Routing Problem for post-disaster humanitarian logistics, proposing a hybrid helicopter-ground distribution model and an Adaptive Variable Neighborhood Search algorithm, validated on the 2024 Afghanistan flash floods case study.
en.motivation: Severe accessibility constraints in disaster-affected regions make pure ground transport inefficient, necessitating a hybrid distribution concept combining helicopters for long-haul and ground vehicles for last-mile delivery, while integrating landing site location, routing, and covering decisions.
en.method: The problem is formulated as a facility-capacitated, multi-depot set covering routing problem, incorporating features of the Multi-Vehicle Covering Tour Problem and the Vehicle Routing with Demand Allocation Problem. An Adaptive Variable Neighborhood Search is developed, combining established routing operators with novel covering decision mechanisms.
en.result: The AVNS achieves competitive solution quality on benchmark instances for related problems and demonstrates practical relevance in a real-world case study of the 2024 Afghanistan flash floods, offering managerial insights for disaster response distribution strategies.
en.help_to_user: If you work on disaster relief logistics or routing optimization, the hybrid distribution model and AVNS algorithm presented here can be directly adapted or extended.

idea_spark.idea: Integrate the covering operators of AVNS with dynamic disaster information (e.g., real-time road closures) to build an online re-planning framework.
idea_spark.risk: The algorithm may be sensitive to problem scale; large instances may require parallelization or heuristic acceleration. Real-world helicopter scheduling costs and weather constraints need additional modeling.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the Afghanistan case, further research could explore multi-echelon depot location and drone-vehicle coordination for post-disaster logistics networks.

papers.title: Approximations and Learning for Decentralized Stochastic Control and Near Optimal Finite Window Policies
papers.summary: Decentralized stochastic control problems are difficult to study due to information structure dependent subtleties, which prevent many classical methods in stochastic control from being applicable. In this paper we consider such problems with general standard Borel spaces under two related information structures. (a) the one-step delayed information sharing pattern (OSDISP) where agents share their information with one-step delay, and (b) the $K$-step periodic information sharing pattern (KSPISP), where information is shared periodically. It is known that OSDISP and KSPISP problems admit a centralized reduction where the agents view the problem from the perspective of a centralized controller that uses the common information to prescribe function valued actions (local policies) which map each agent's private information to an optimal action in the original problem. We provide rigorous approximation results and performance bounds for the KSPISP and OSDISP problems, which results from replacing the full common information by a finite sliding window of information and we establish near optimality of such policies. The latter depends on a predictor stability condition in expected total variation. As a further contribution, we show that under the information structures provided, corresponding Q-learning algorithms (in quantized or finite memory forms) converge asymptotically to near optimal solutions. While restrictive and hypothetical conditions have been presented in the literature, our contributions are thus to provide, to our knowledge, the first explicit conditions and rigorous approximation and learning results for such decentralized problems with general spaces.

ai.tldr: 本文针对去中心化随机控制问题，在两种信息结构下提出了基于有限滑动窗口的近似策略，并证明了其近最优性，同时给出了Q-learning算法的收敛性结果。
ai.motivation: 去中心化随机控制问题因信息结构复杂，经典方法难以适用，现有文献缺乏严格的近似与学习保证。
ai.method: 利用中心化归约思想，将全公共信息替换为有限滑动窗口信息，并引入预测器稳定性条件（期望全变差）来保证近最优性；在量化或有限记忆形式下设计Q-learning算法。
ai.result: 给出了KSPISP和OSDISP问题的严格近似误差界与性能界，证明了有限窗口策略的近最优性；在一般空间上首次建立了去中心化问题的显式条件与Q-learning收敛性。
ai.help_to_user: 为去中心化随机控制提供了可操作的近似框架和学习算法，有助于设计通信受限下的多智能体系统。

idea_spark.idea: 将去中心化控制中的公共信息压缩为有限记忆，结合Q-learning实现近最优策略学习。
idea_spark.risk: 预测器稳定性条件在实际中可能难以验证；量化或有限记忆的精度损失可能影响性能。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受中心化归约和有限记忆控制的启发，将信息结构约束转化为可处理的近似问题。

en.tldr: This paper proposes near-optimal finite window policies for decentralized stochastic control under two information structures, with rigorous approximation bounds and Q-learning convergence guarantees.
en.motivation: Decentralized stochastic control is challenging due to information structure subtleties; existing work lacks rigorous approximation and learning results for general spaces.
en.method: Leveraging centralized reduction, replace full common information with a finite sliding window; introduce a predictor stability condition in expected total variation to ensure near optimality; design Q-learning algorithms in quantized or finite-memory forms.
en.result: Provide rigorous approximation bounds and performance guarantees for KSPISP and OSDISP problems; establish near optimality of finite window policies; present first explicit conditions and convergence results for Q-learning in such decentralized settings with general spaces.
en.help_to_user: Offers practical approximation and learning methods for decentralized control, useful for multi-agent systems with communication constraints.

idea_spark.idea: Compress common information into finite memory in decentralized control and combine with Q-learning to learn near-optimal policies.
idea_spark.risk: Predictor stability condition may be hard to verify in practice; quantization or finite memory may degrade performance.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by centralized reduction and finite-memory control, turning information structure constraints into tractable approximations.

papers.title: First-Order Optimality Conditions for Mathematical Programming with Equilibrium Constraints
papers.summary: We present a systematic introduction to first-order optimality conditions for mathematical programs with equilibrium constraints (MPECs), emphasizing the limitations of classical nonlinear programming techniques. The goal is twofold. First, we explain why a direct application of standard optimality conditions -- based on reformulating MPECs via KKT systems or differentiable exact penalty functions -- is often inadequate, as such approaches typically require strong and restrictive assumptions, including nondegeneracy and smoothness conditions.   Second, we develop a first-principles framework for analyzing MPECs by focusing on the geometric structure of the feasible region. In particular, we study stationarity concepts and provide a detailed characterization of the tangent cone at feasible points, which leads to appropriate constraint qualifications tailored to MPECs. These results form the foundation for rigorous first-order analysis and clarify the relationship between the original MPEC formulation and its KKT-based representation, offering practical guidance for handling these inherently challenging optimization problems.

ai.tldr: 系统介绍了数学规划与均衡约束问题的一阶最优性条件，指出了经典非线性规划方法的局限性，并基于可行域的几何结构建立了分析框架。
ai.motivation: 经典非线性规划技术直接应用于MPEC时往往需要很强的假设条件，如非退化性和光滑性，因此需要更合适的理论工具。
ai.method: 从可行域的几何结构出发，研究切锥和适用于MPEC的约束规格，从而推导出恰当的一阶最优性条件。
ai.result: 给出了MPEC的平稳性概念和切锥的详细刻画，阐明了原始MPEC与其KKT表示之间的关系。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解MPEC问题的理论难点，并提供实用的最优性条件分析指导。

idea_spark.idea: 将几何结构分析用于设计更高效的MPEC求解算法，例如基于切锥的可行方向法。
idea_spark.risk: 几何结构分析可能过于理论化，实际算法实现时仍需处理非光滑性和退化情形。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从可行域几何入手，或许能启发新的约束规格或平稳性概念，用于更广泛的优化问题。
