en.tldr: A systematic introduction to first-order optimality conditions for MPECs, highlighting limitations of classical nonlinear programming and developing a geometric framework based on the feasible region's structure.
en.motivation: Direct application of standard optimality conditions to MPECs often requires strong assumptions like nondegeneracy and smoothness, necessitating a more tailored theoretical approach.
en.method: Focus on the geometric structure of the feasible region, studying the tangent cone and constraint qualifications specific to MPECs to derive appropriate first-order conditions.
en.result: Characterization of stationarity concepts and the tangent cone, clarifying the relationship between the original MPEC and its KKT-based representation.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical insights into the challenges of MPECs and practical guidance for analyzing optimality conditions.

idea_spark.idea: Use the geometric structure to design more efficient MPEC algorithms, such as feasible direction methods based on the tangent cone.
idea_spark.risk: The geometric approach may be too theoretical, and practical algorithm implementation still needs to handle nonsmoothness and degeneracy.
idea_spark.inspiration: Starting from the geometry of the feasible region may inspire new constraint qualifications or stationarity concepts for broader optimization problems.

papers.title: PhysiGen: Integrating Collision-Aware Physical Constraints for High-Fidelity Human-Human Interaction Generation
papers.summary: Despite substantial progress in text-driven 3D human motion synthesis, generating realistic multi-person interaction sequences remains challenging. Notably, body inter-penetration is a pervasive issue from both data acquisition to the generated results, which significantly undermines the realism and usability. Previous generative models either ignored this issue or introduced computationally expensive mesh-level loss functions to alleviate inter-body collisions. In this paper, we propose a general-purpose and computationally efficient optimization strategy named PhysiGen to explicitly integrate collision-aware physical constraints for human-human interaction generation. Specifically, we simplify the high-resolution human body mesh into geometric primitives to greatly reduce the cost of inter-person collision detection. Moreover, we identify the collision regions as the guidance of the optimization directions. PhysiGen is plug-and-play and can be readily integrated into existing human interaction generation models. Extensive cross-dataset and cross-model experiments show that our method can effectively reduce interpenetration and significantly improve visual coherence and physical plausibility compared to the state-of-the-art methods.

ai.tldr: 提出PhysiGen，一种通用且计算高效的优化策略，通过碰撞感知物理约束显式减少人体交互生成中的身体穿透问题。
ai.motivation: 现有文本驱动的3D人体运动合成在多人交互中普遍存在身体穿透问题，严重影响真实感和可用性，而先前方法要么忽略该问题，要么引入昂贵的网格级损失函数。
ai.method: 将高分辨率人体网格简化为几何基元以降低碰撞检测成本，并识别碰撞区域作为优化方向指导，PhysiGen即插即用可集成到现有模型。
ai.result: 跨数据集和跨模型实验表明，该方法能有效减少穿透，显著提升视觉连贯性和物理合理性，优于现有方法。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户生成更真实、物理合理的多人交互3D动画，减少人工修正成本。

idea_spark.idea: 将碰撞感知约束与扩散模型结合，实现端到端的物理合理交互生成。
idea_spark.risk: 几何基元简化可能丢失细节碰撞信息，在复杂姿态下效果有限。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从机器人运动规划中的碰撞避免技术获得启发，将其引入生成式模型。

idea_spark.inspiration: 从机器人运动规划中的碰撞避免技术获得启发，将其引入生成式模型。

en.tldr: Proposes PhysiGen, a general-purpose and computationally efficient optimization strategy that explicitly integrates collision-aware physical constraints to reduce body inter-penetration in human-human interaction generation.
en.motivation: Body inter-penetration is a pervasive issue in text-driven 3D human motion synthesis for multi-person interactions, severely undermining realism and usability; prior methods either ignore it or use expensive mesh-level losses.
en.method: Simplifies high-resolution human body meshes into geometric primitives to reduce collision detection cost, identifies collision regions to guide optimization, and is plug-and-play for existing models.
en.result: Cross-dataset and cross-model experiments show effective reduction of inter-penetration and significant improvement in visual coherence and physical plausibility over state-of-the-art methods.
en.help_to_user: Helps users generate more realistic and physically plausible multi-person interaction 3D animations, reducing manual correction effort.

idea_spark.idea: Integrate collision-aware constraints with diffusion models for end-to-end physically plausible interaction generation.
idea_spark.risk: Geometric primitive simplification may miss fine-grained collision details, limiting effectiveness in complex poses.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by collision avoidance techniques in robot motion planning, adapted for generative models.

papers.title: Primitive sets and von Mangoldt chains: Erdős Problem #1196 and beyond
papers.summary: A set of integers is primitive if no number in the set divides another. We introduce a new method for bounding Erdős sums of primitive sets, suggested from output of GPT-5.4 Pro, based on Markov chains with von Mangoldt weights. The method leads to a host of applications, yet seems to have been overlooked by the prior literature since Erdős's seminal 1935 paper.   As applications, we prove two 1966 conjectures of Erdős-Sárközy-Szemerédi, on primitive sets of large numbers (#1196) and on divisibility chains (#1217). The method also provides a short proof of the Erdős Primitive Set Conjecture (#164), as well as the related claim that 2 is an ''Erdős-strong'' prime. Moreover, the method resolves a revised form of the Banks-Martin conjecture, which has long been viewed as a unifying `master theorem' for the area.

ai.tldr: 本文引入一种基于von Mangoldt权重的马尔可夫链新方法，用于有界原始集的Erdős和，并解决了多个长期未决的猜想。
ai.motivation: 原始集是数论中一个基本概念，其Erdős和的上界估计长期存在多个未解决的猜想，包括Erdős问题#1196、#1217以及Erdős原始集猜想等。
ai.method: 受GPT-5.4 Pro输出启发，提出一种基于von Mangoldt权重的马尔可夫链方法，用于有界原始集的Erdős和。
ai.result: 证明了Erdős-Sárközy-Szemerédi的两个1966年猜想（#1196和#1217）、Erdős原始集猜想（#164）、2是“Erdős-强”素数，以及Banks-Martin猜想的一个修正形式。
ai.help_to_user: 该方法为原始集相关问题的研究提供了统一框架，可推广到其他涉及整除性的组合数论问题。

idea_spark.idea: 利用大语言模型（如GPT-5.4 Pro）的输出作为启发，发现传统文献中可能被忽略的数学方法。
idea_spark.risk: 方法依赖于特定权重和链结构，可能不适用于所有类型的原始集问题；且GPT输出的启发性质可能缺乏严格数学证明。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将机器学习模型（如GPT）的“直觉”作为数学发现的辅助工具，可能开辟新的研究路径。

en.tldr: This paper introduces a new method based on Markov chains with von Mangoldt weights to bound Erdős sums of primitive sets, resolving several long-standing conjectures.
en.motivation: Primitive sets are a fundamental concept in number theory, and bounding their Erdős sums has been an open problem with multiple conjectures, including Erdős problem #1196, #1217, and the Erdős Primitive Set Conjecture.
en.method: Inspired by output from GPT-5.4 Pro, the authors propose a Markov chain method with von Mangoldt weights to bound Erdős sums of primitive sets.
en.result: The method proves two 1966 conjectures of Erdős-Sárközy-Szemerédi (#1196 and #1217), the Erdős Primitive Set Conjecture (#164), that 2 is an 'Erdős-strong' prime, and a revised form of the Banks-Martin conjecture.
en.help_to_user: This method provides a unified framework for problems related to primitive sets and can be extended to other combinatorial number theory problems involving divisibility.

idea_spark.idea: Using outputs from large language models (e.g., GPT-5.4 Pro) as inspiration to uncover mathematical methods overlooked in traditional literature.
idea_spark.risk: The method relies on specific weights and chain structures, which may not apply to all types of primitive set problems; the GPT-inspired nature may lack rigorous mathematical proof.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leveraging machine learning models (like GPT) as an auxiliary tool for mathematical discovery could open new research avenues.

papers.title: A Line-search-free Method for Adaptive Decentralized Optimization
papers.summary: We study decentralized optimization over networks where agents cooperatively minimize a smooth (strongly) convex sum of local losses while communicating only with immediate neighbors. Prevailing decentralized methods require either centralized knowledge of global problem and network parameters for stepsize tuning--hence impractical, or costly per-iteration line-searches that demand access to local function values. We propose line-search-free, fully decentralized algorithms in which each agent adapts its stepsize using only past local iterates and gradients--with no extra function evaluations and no global tuning. The key technical ingredient is a new Lyapunov function, from which a natural adaptive stepsize rule emerges: at each iteration, each agent selects the largest stepsize that guarantees descent, based solely on a local curvature estimate built from successive gradients. The proposed algorithms enjoy strong theoretical guarantees: sublinear convergence rates for merely convex objectives and linear rates under strong convexity. Numerical experiments on standard benchmarks show consistent improvements over the state of the art, both adaptive and non-adaptive.

ai.tldr: 提出一种无需线搜索的自适应去中心化优化方法，每个智能体仅利用局部历史梯度和迭代点自适应调整步长，无需全局调参。
ai.motivation: 现有去中心化方法要么需要全局问题与网络参数的先验知识（不实用），要么每步执行代价高昂的线搜索，限制了实际应用。
ai.method: 设计新的Lyapunov函数，从中自然导出自适应步长规则：每个智能体基于局部曲率估计（由连续梯度计算）选取保证下降的最大步长。
ai.result: 在光滑（强）凸目标下获得次线性/线性收敛率，数值实验一致优于现有自适应与非自适应方法。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种无需全局信息、无需线搜索的实用去中心化优化算法，降低调参成本。

idea_spark.idea: 能否将局部曲率估计与通信压缩结合，进一步降低通信开销？
idea_spark.risk: 曲率估计在非凸或异质数据下可能不稳定，需验证鲁棒性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从控制理论中的Lyapunov稳定性分析获得启发，将优化算法设计转化为能量函数下降问题。

en.motivation: Existing decentralized methods require either centralized knowledge of global problem parameters (impractical) or costly per-iteration line-searches, hindering real-world deployment.
en.method: A new Lyapunov function is introduced, from which a natural adaptive stepsize rule emerges: each agent selects the largest stepsize guaranteeing descent based on a local curvature estimate built from successive gradients.
en.result: Sublinear convergence for convex objectives and linear rates under strong convexity; numerical experiments show consistent improvements over state-of-the-art adaptive and non-adaptive methods.
en.help_to_user: Provides a practical decentralized optimization algorithm that requires no global tuning and no line-searches, reducing hyperparameter burden.

idea_spark.idea: Could local curvature estimation be combined with communication compression to further reduce communication overhead?
idea_spark.risk: Curvature estimates may be unstable under non-convex or heterogeneous data; robustness needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by Lyapunov stability analysis in control theory, framing optimization algorithm design as an energy descent problem.

papers.title: Strong-disorder expansion of the root-averaged density of states for the Anderson model on the Bethe lattice
papers.summary: We study the root-averaged density of states for the Anderson model on the Bethe lattice in the strong-disorder regime. Here the density of states means the root-averaged spectral measure, not a finite-volume eigenvalue counting limit. We assume that the single-site distribution has compact support and has a locally analytic density on an interval $I^\sharp$ containing a given interval $I$. Combining the random-walk expansion on the tree with a complex-analytic argument for the single-site Stieltjes transforms, we prove that the scaled averaged diagonal resolvent has a holomorphic continuation to a complex neighborhood of $I$ for all sufficiently large $λ$. By the Stieltjes inversion formula, the root-averaged density of states measure is absolutely continuous on the scaled energy window $λI$, and its density is real analytic and has a finite-order strong-disorder expansion there. In the scaled form $E=λξ$, the leading coefficient is the local density of the single-site distribution. All odd coefficients vanish, and the higher coefficients are finite sums determined by occupation profiles of short closed walks on the tree. For the uniform single-site distribution, we compute the first nonzero correction term explicitly.

ai.tldr: 研究了贝特晶格上安德森模型在强无序区域中的根平均态密度，证明了其绝对连续性和实解析性，并给出了强无序展开。
ai.motivation: 理解强无序下安德森模型根平均态密度的解析性质与展开形式。
ai.method: 结合树上的随机游走展开和单站点Stieltjes变换的复分析论证。
ai.result: 根平均态密度在缩放能量窗口上绝对连续且实解析，具有有限阶强无序展开，奇次项消失，偶次项由树上短闭路径的占据轮廓决定。
ai.help_to_user: 为强无序安德森模型提供了严格的解析结果和显式展开系数计算方法。

idea_spark.idea: 利用短闭路径的占据轮廓计算高阶展开系数，可能为数值模拟提供解析基准。
idea_spark.risk: 展开收敛性依赖于单站点分布的局部解析性，对非解析分布可能失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将态密度的解析展开与图论中的闭路径计数联系起来，启发其他无序系统的高阶微扰计算。

en.tldr: We study the root-averaged density of states for the Anderson model on the Bethe lattice in the strong-disorder regime, proving absolute continuity and real analyticity, and deriving a finite-order strong-disorder expansion.
en.motivation: To understand the analytic properties and expansion form of the root-averaged density of states under strong disorder.
en.method: Combining random-walk expansion on the tree with a complex-analytic argument for single-site Stieltjes transforms.
en.result: The root-averaged density of states is absolutely continuous and real analytic on the scaled energy window, with a finite-order strong-disorder expansion where odd coefficients vanish and even coefficients are determined by occupation profiles of short closed walks on the tree.
en.help_to_user: Provides rigorous analytic results and explicit coefficient calculation for the strong-disorder Anderson model.

idea_spark.idea: Using occupation profiles of short closed walks to compute higher-order expansion coefficients may provide analytic benchmarks for numerical simulations.
idea_spark.risk: Convergence of the expansion relies on local analyticity of the single-site distribution, which may fail for non-analytic distributions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Linking analytic expansion of density of states to graph-theoretic closed walk counting inspires higher-order perturbative calculations in other disordered systems.

papers.title: Nonlocal Approximation Principle for Entropy Solutions of Scalar Conservation Laws
papers.summary: We establish a general nonlocal approximation principle for the entropy solutions of scalar conservation laws on $\mathbb{R}$. More precisely, we show that the entropy solution to a nonnegative initial datum can be obtained as a weak-star limit of a corresponding scalar nonlocal conservation law. The flux function of the nonlocal conservation law depends on suitable spatial averages of the density. The proof is based on a reformulation on the Hamilton--Jacobi level: working with the primitives, we identify the limit via the stability properties of viscosity solutions; we then recover the entropy solution using the classical relation between Hamilton--Jacobi equations and scalar conservation laws. We further show that the approximation extends, after a suitable shift, to sign-changing initial data, and we prove a quantitative convergence estimate for convex fluxes in terms of the first moments of the nonlocal kernels. This result makes it possible to define entropy solutions for general fluxes using their nonlocal approximations, which satisfy the requirement for a finite speed of mass propagation, a key feature of hyperbolic conservation laws.

ai.tldr: 建立了标量守恒律熵解的非局部逼近原理，证明熵解可表示为非局部守恒律的弱星极限。
ai.motivation: 为一般通量的熵解提供一种基于非局部逼近的定义方法，同时保持双曲守恒律的有限质量传播速度。
ai.method: 在Hamilton–Jacobi层面利用原函数和粘性解的稳定性，再通过经典关系恢复熵解。
ai.result: 对非负初值得到了弱星极限收敛性，对变号初值通过适当平移也成立，并对凸通量给出了定量收敛估计。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何用非局部模型逼近局部守恒律的熵解，为数值方法和理论分析提供新工具。

idea_spark.idea: 利用非局部核的矩来控制收敛速度，从而设计更高效的数值格式。

idea_spark.inspiration: 将Hamilton–Jacobi方法与粘性解稳定性结合，为非线性PDE的逼近提供新视角。

en.tldr: Establishes a nonlocal approximation principle for entropy solutions of scalar conservation laws, showing they arise as weak-star limits of nonlocal conservation laws.
en.motivation: To define entropy solutions for general fluxes via nonlocal approximations that preserve finite speed of mass propagation.
en.method: Reformulation on the Hamilton–Jacobi level using primitives and stability of viscosity solutions, then recovering entropy solutions via the classical relation.
en.result: Weak-star convergence for nonnegative initial data, extension to sign-changing data after a shift, and quantitative convergence estimate for convex fluxes in terms of first moments of nonlocal kernels.
en.help_to_user: Provides a theoretical framework to approximate local conservation laws by nonlocal ones, useful for numerical schemes and theoretical analysis.

idea_spark.idea: Use moments of the nonlocal kernel to control convergence rates, enabling efficient numerical methods.
idea_spark.risk: Nonlocal models may introduce unphysical diffusion; kernel choice must be careful.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining Hamilton–Jacobi methods with viscosity solution stability offers a new perspective for approximating nonlinear PDEs.

papers.title: The Keplerian Traveling Salesperson Problem
papers.summary: We address a fundamental challenge in space mission design and space logistics: planning interplanetary trajectories for missions that must rendezvous with multiple bodies. Such mission occur, for instance, in active debris removal, in-orbit servicing, or asteroid belt exploration. We model these problems as a variant of the Traveling salesperson problem (TSP), which we term the Keplerian TSP (KTSP). Unlike the well-studied TSP, the KTSP accounts for the motion of orbital targets, leading to time-dependent and asymmetric transfer costs that capture key real-world effects in astrodynamics.   We provide a rigorous formalization of the KTSP and release a benchmark suite to support its study. Central to our approach is a time-unfolding technique that reformulates the continuous problem as a discrete optimization task in a time-expanded network. This representation makes the benchmark accessible to researchers in discrete optimization even without prior knowledge of celestial mechanics. We also develop an alternative encoding as an integer linear program using Interval-based Dynamic Discretization Discovery to handle the time-dependent nature of transfers. We leverage state-of-the-art ILP solvers to solve the KTSP instances, accompanied by a detailed computational study that highlights their strengths and limitations. We complement these exact methods with an initial solution heuristic, an improvement heuristic, and preprocessing routines that preserve optimality.

ai.tldr: 提出开普勒旅行商问题（KTSP），将轨道目标运动纳入TSP模型，用于多目标交会任务规划。
ai.motivation: 太空任务（如碎片清除、在轨服务）需与多个运动天体交会，传统TSP忽略目标运动，无法准确建模。
ai.method: 通过时间展开技术将连续问题离散化为时间扩展网络，并采用基于区间动态离散发现的整数线性规划求解。
ai.result: 发布基准测试集，计算实验表明ILP求解器在中小规模实例上有效，但存在扩展性限制；启发式与预处理可提升效率。
ai.help_to_user: 为航天任务设计提供可求解的离散优化模型，降低轨道力学门槛，便于运筹学研究者参与。

idea_spark.idea: 结合强化学习或图神经网络学习转移成本近似，加速大规模KTSP求解。
idea_spark.risk: 轨道动力学高精度近似可能增加模型复杂度，且启发式解的质量缺乏理论保证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将天体运动视为动态时间窗约束，类似带时间窗的VRP，可引入分支定价等精确算法。

en.tldr: Proposes the Keplerian Traveling Salesperson Problem (KTSP), incorporating orbital target motion into TSP for multi-rendezvous mission planning.
en.motivation: Space missions (e.g., debris removal, on-orbit servicing) require rendezvous with multiple moving bodies; classical TSP ignores target motion and cannot model this accurately.
en.method: Discretizes the continuous problem into a time-expanded network via time-unfolding, and solves using integer linear programming with interval-based dynamic discretization discovery.
en.result: Releases a benchmark suite; computational experiments show ILP solvers are effective on small-to-medium instances but face scalability issues; heuristics and preprocessing improve efficiency.
en.help_to_user: Provides a solvable discrete optimization model for space mission design, lowering the barrier for operations researchers without celestial mechanics expertise.

idea_spark.idea: Combine reinforcement learning or graph neural networks to approximate transfer costs, accelerating large-scale KTSP solving.
idea_spark.risk: High-fidelity approximation of orbital dynamics may increase model complexity, and heuristic solution quality lacks theoretical guarantees.
idea_spark.inspiration: Treat celestial motion as dynamic time-window constraints, similar to VRPTW, enabling exact algorithms like branch-and-price.

papers.title: Time-series Meets Complex Motion Modeling: Robust and Computational-effective Motion Predictor for Multi-object Tracking
papers.summary: Multi-object tracking (MOT) is critical in numerous real-world applications, including surveillance, autonomous driving, and robotics. Accurately predicting object motion is fundamental to MOT, but current methods struggle with the complexities of real-world, non-linear motion (e.g., sudden stops, sharp turns). While recent research has gravitated towards increasingly complex and computationally expensive generative models to tackle this problem, their practical utility is often constrained. This paper challenges that paradigm, arguing that such complexity is not only unnecessary but can be outperformed by a more efficient, purpose-built approach. We introduce the Temporal Convolutional Motion Predictor (TCMP), a novel framework for MOT that leverages a modified Temporal Convolutional Network (TCN) featuring dilated convolutions and a regression head. This design allows for effective motion prediction across arbitrary temporal context lengths. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance, specifically improves upon the previous best method in several key metrics: HOTA (a measure of overall tracking accuracy) increases from 62.3% to 63.4%, IDF1 (a measure of identity preservation) rises from 63.0% to 65.0%, and AssA (a measure of association accuracy) improves from 47.2% to 49.1%. Significantly, TCMP achieves this performance while being highly efficient; it has only 0.014 times the parameters and requires only 0.05 times the computational cost (FLOPs) compared to the SOTA method. while is only 0.014 times the size (in terms of parameters) and requires only 0.05 times the computational cost (in terms of FLOPs). These findings highlight the robustness of our method to advance MOT systems by ensuring adaptability, accuracy, and efficiency in complex tracking environments.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于时序卷积网络的高效运动预测器TCMP，在多项指标上超越现有方法，且参数量和计算成本极低。
ai.motivation: 现有MOT方法依赖复杂生成模型处理非线性运动，计算成本高且实用性受限。
ai.method: 设计改进的时序卷积网络，采用膨胀卷积和回归头，支持任意时序上下文长度的运动预测。
ai.result: HOTA 63.4%、IDF1 65.0%、AssA 49.1%，参数量仅为SOTA的1.4%，FLOPs仅为5%。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种轻量、鲁棒的运动预测方案，适用于资源受限的实时多目标跟踪场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将膨胀卷积与轻量回归头结合，在保持低计算量的同时捕获多尺度时序特征。
idea_spark.risk: 对极短或极不规则的运动模式可能泛化不足，需验证在更多真实场景中的鲁棒性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 挑战“越复杂越好”的惯性思维，用简洁结构实现更优性能，启发其他领域重新审视模型复杂度与效果的关系。

en.tldr: Proposes TCMP, a temporal convolutional motion predictor that achieves state-of-the-art multi-object tracking with drastically fewer parameters and FLOPs.
en.motivation: Existing MOT methods rely on complex generative models for non-linear motion, incurring high computational cost and limited practicality.
en.method: A modified Temporal Convolutional Network with dilated convolutions and a regression head for motion prediction over arbitrary temporal contexts.
en.result: HOTA 63.4%, IDF1 65.0%, AssA 49.1%, with only 1.4% parameters and 5% FLOPs of the SOTA method.
en.help_to_user: Offers a lightweight, robust motion predictor suitable for real-time multi-object tracking in resource-constrained environments.

idea_spark.idea: Combine dilated convolutions with a lightweight regression head to capture multi-scale temporal features while maintaining low computational cost.
idea_spark.risk: May generalize poorly to extremely short or irregular motion patterns; robustness in diverse real-world scenarios needs further validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Challenges the 'more complex is better' mindset, showing that a simple architecture can outperform heavy models, inspiring re-evaluation of complexity in other domains.

papers.title: Learning Coarse-to-Fine Osteoarthritis Representations under Noisy Hierarchical Labels
papers.summary: Knee osteoarthritis (OA) assessment involves a natural but often underused label hierarchy: a coarse binary OA decision and a fine-grained Kellgren--Lawrence (KL) severity grade. Existing deep learning studies commonly treat these targets as separate classification problems, either reducing OA assessment to disease presence or directly optimizing noisy ordinal KL labels. In this work, we ask whether this clinical hierarchy can serve as a representation-level supervisory prior. Rather than introducing a complex architecture, we use a deliberately simple dual-head model with a shared encoder and two task-specific heads as a probe of hierarchical supervision. We compare single-OA, single-KL, and dual-head training across multiple 3D backbones under the same test protocol. Beyond standard classification metrics, we perform paired statistical comparisons, analyze latent severity-axis geometry, and examine saliency overlap with cartilage regions. The results show that dual-head supervision produces backbone-dependent gains, with clear improvements in KL-related metrics for selected backbones. More importantly, the gains are accompanied by a more ordered coarse-to-fine latent organization and, for responsive backbones, stronger anatomical alignment of saliency with cartilage. These findings suggest that even simple hierarchical dual-head supervision can reshape disease representations under noisy coarse/fine labels, providing a useful inductive bias for OA diagnosis and severity grading.

ai.tldr: 提出一种简单的双头模型，利用粗二分类和细粒度KL分级的层级标签监督，改善膝骨关节炎表征。
ai.motivation: 现有方法将OA粗诊断和KL分级分开处理，未充分利用临床层级结构。
ai.method: 共享编码器加两个任务头的双头模型，在多个3D骨干网络上比较单任务与双头训练。
ai.result: 双头监督在部分骨干上提升KL指标，并带来更有序的潜在空间和更好的软骨区域显著性对齐。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种简单有效的层级监督策略，可用于提升OA诊断和严重度分级的深度学习模型性能。

idea_spark.idea: 探索更复杂的层级损失函数或注意力机制，以进一步利用粗到细的标签结构。
idea_spark.risk: 双头监督效果依赖骨干网络，可能增加训练复杂度且并非对所有模型有益。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用临床先验的层级关系作为表示学习的归纳偏置，而非仅作为分类目标。

en.tldr: A simple dual-head model leverages coarse binary OA and fine-grained KL grade hierarchy to improve knee osteoarthritis representations.
en.motivation: Existing methods treat OA diagnosis and KL grading separately, underusing the clinical label hierarchy.
en.method: A shared encoder with two task-specific heads, comparing single-task and dual-head training across multiple 3D backbones.
en.result: Dual-head supervision improves KL metrics for some backbones, with more ordered latent space and better saliency alignment with cartilage.
en.help_to_user: Provides a simple yet effective hierarchical supervision strategy to enhance deep learning models for OA diagnosis and severity grading.

idea_spark.idea: Explore more sophisticated hierarchical loss functions or attention mechanisms to further exploit coarse-to-fine label structures.
idea_spark.risk: Dual-head supervision's benefits depend on the backbone, potentially increasing training complexity without universal gains.
idea_spark.inspiration: Use clinical prior hierarchy as an inductive bias for representation learning, not just as classification targets.

papers.title: On the Entropy in Last-Mile Logistics
papers.summary: Last-mile logistics (LML) is characterized by high fragmentation, yet existing research treats this as an exogenous constraint rather than a quantifiable and optimizable system property. This paper introduces a framework for measuring LML complexity using structural entropy, derived from Boltzmann's statistical mechanics. Unlike traditional KPIs such as distance or cost, structural entropy quantifies the cardinality of the configuration space, providing a diagnostic of inherent system disorder. We establish a formal duality with Shannon entropy, linking absolute complexity burden to distributional balance. We apply our entropy framework to 6,112 Amazon last-mile routes across five U.S. cities. Current operations exhibit persistently high normalized entropy, indicating near-maximal fragmentation. A stable non-linear scaling relationship between entropy and route distance validates the metric as a predictive indicator of operational difficulty. To evaluate spatial consolidation, we develop a system-wide entropy measure accounting for all movements by both carriers and customers. We establish a theoretical conservation principle: under idealized conditions, spatial consolidation merely redistributes entropy from carrier to customer. Both idealizing conditions are violated in practice, thereby increasing total system entropy. Our system-wide measure reveals that spatial consolidation reduces carrier entropy by up to 40% under aggressive adoption but increases total system entropy by activating customer collection trips, though trip chaining can diminish this effect. Temporal consolidation, by contrast, genuinely reduces entropy by decreasing delivery events without creating new movements. By formalizing fragmentation as a measurable structural property, this research provides a new lens for network design, consolidation policy, and evaluation last-mile system performance.

ai.tldr: 本文提出用结构熵量化最后一公里物流的碎片化，基于玻尔兹曼统计力学，并在亚马逊实际路线数据上验证了其作为操作难度预测指标的有效性。
ai.motivation: 现有研究将最后一公里物流的碎片化视为外生约束，而非可量化、可优化的系统属性，缺乏衡量系统无序度的统一指标。
ai.method: 借鉴玻尔兹曼统计力学定义结构熵，建立与香农熵的对偶关系；基于6112条亚马逊美国城市路线计算归一化熵，分析熵与距离的非线性标度律；构建系统级熵度量，评估空间和时间整合对熵的再分配效应。
ai.result: 当前操作熵接近最大值，碎片化严重；空间整合可将承运人熵降低40%，但会因激活客户取货行程增加系统总熵（行程链可缓解）；时间整合则真正降低熵。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助物流网络设计者将碎片化作为可测量属性，指导整合策略选择（空间 vs 时间），并预测操作难度。

idea_spark.idea: 将熵度量与强化学习结合，动态优化最后一公里配送的整合策略，平衡承运人与客户成本。
idea_spark.risk: 熵度量依赖理想化假设（如均匀分布），实际中违反假设可能导致预测偏差；数据需求高，需完整路线和客户行为数据。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从物理学熵概念出发，将系统无序度形式化，启发其他领域用类似方法量化复杂性。

idea_spark.idea: 将熵度量与强化学习结合，动态优化最后一公里配送的整合策略，平衡承运人与客户成本。
idea_spark.risk: 熵度量依赖理想化假设（如均匀分布），实际中违反假设可能导致预测偏差；数据需求高，需完整路线和客户行为数据。

en.tldr: This paper introduces structural entropy to quantify fragmentation in last-mile logistics, grounded in Boltzmann statistical mechanics, and validates its predictive power on Amazon route data.
en.motivation: Existing research treats fragmentation as an exogenous constraint rather than a quantifiable system property, lacking a unified metric for inherent disorder.
en.method: Defines structural entropy via Boltzmann statistical mechanics, establishes duality with Shannon entropy; computes normalized entropy on 6,112 Amazon routes across five U.S. cities; develops system-wide entropy to evaluate spatial and temporal consolidation effects.
en.result: Current operations exhibit near-maximal fragmentation; spatial consolidation reduces carrier entropy by up to 40% but increases total system entropy due to customer trips (mitigated by trip chaining); temporal consolidation genuinely reduces entropy.
en.help_to_user: Helps network designers treat fragmentation as a measurable property, guides consolidation strategy selection, and predicts operational difficulty.

idea_spark.idea: Combine entropy metrics with reinforcement learning to dynamically optimize consolidation strategies in last-mile delivery, balancing carrier and customer costs.
idea_spark.risk: Entropy metrics rely on idealized assumptions (e.g., uniform distribution); violations may cause prediction bias; requires comprehensive route and customer behavior data.
idea_spark.inspiration: Formalizing system disorder via entropy from physics inspires similar quantification of complexity in other domains.

papers.title: Generalized Fourier Transforms for Momentum-Space Construction on Riemannian Manifolds
papers.summary: We extend Fourier analysis to curved spaces by defining a Generalized Fourier Transform (GFT) on any Riemannian manifold $Σ$ via spectral decomposition. Under minimal requirements that the transform is an isometric isomorphism and has a kernel diagonalizing the Laplace-Beltrami operator, we prove that the GFT satisfies a generalized Parseval-Plancherel theorem. To resolve the spectral degeneracy that obscures "momentum space" in such settings, we require the degenerate sector to be resolved by a local, symmetry-adapted maximal Abelian commuting set (a fiberwise MASA), constructed from geometric differential operators, most notably from Killing data when such symmetries are available. We provide a constructive algorithm for generating these commuting operators and show that the resulting momentum label spaces $\mathcal{F}$ (discrete, continuous, or mixed) reflect geometric symmetry constraints. We introduce a dual classification: (i) by MASA completeness and Stackel separability, and (ii) by the topology of $\mathcal{F}$. Finally, we distinguish unitary changes induced by true isometries (which preserve the GFT structure) from changes of coordinate-adapted degeneracy resolution/separation schemes, which may induce inequivalent $k$-space labelings (e.g. Cartesian vs spherical constructions in $\mathbb{R}^{3}$) while remaining unitarily equivalent on $\mathcal{L}^{2}\left[Σ\right]$. This symmetry-adapted harmonic analysis is intended as a foundation for curved-space mode decompositions; dynamical applications are developed in the subsequent work.

ai.tldr: 在任意黎曼流形上通过谱分解定义广义傅里叶变换，并利用最大阿贝尔交换集解决动量空间的简并问题。
ai.motivation: 将傅里叶分析推广到弯曲空间，为弯曲空间中的模式分解提供数学基础。
ai.method: 基于拉普拉斯-贝尔特拉米算子的谱分解构造广义傅里叶变换，并引入纤维化最大阿贝尔交换集来解析谱简并。
ai.result: 证明了广义帕塞瓦尔-普朗歇尔定理，给出了动量标签空间的分类，并区分了等距变换与坐标适应简并解析方案。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解弯曲空间中的傅里叶分析及其在物理和几何中的应用。

idea_spark.idea: 利用 Killing 数据构造交换算子集，可能启发新的数值算法。
idea_spark.risk: 构造的交换算子集可能不唯一，导致不同的动量空间标记。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将对称性引入谱分解，为高维或复杂几何中的模式分解提供新思路。

zh.motivation: 将傅里叶分析推广到弯曲空间，为弯曲空间中的模式分解提供数学基础。

idea_spark.inspiration: 将对称性引入谱分解，为高维或复杂几何中的模式分解提供新思路。

en.tldr: We extend Fourier analysis to curved spaces by defining a Generalized Fourier Transform on any Riemannian manifold via spectral decomposition, resolving spectral degeneracy with a maximal Abelian commuting set.
en.motivation: To provide a foundation for mode decompositions in curved spaces, generalizing classical Fourier analysis.
en.method: Construct the GFT using the Laplace-Beltrami operator's eigenfunctions, and resolve degeneracy via a fiberwise maximal Abelian commuting set built from geometric differential operators.
en.result: Prove a generalized Parseval-Plancherel theorem, classify momentum label spaces, and distinguish isometric from coordinate-adapted degeneracy resolutions.
en.help_to_user: This work aids understanding of Fourier analysis on curved manifolds and its applications in physics and geometry.

idea_spark.idea: Using Killing data to construct commuting operators may inspire new numerical algorithms.
idea_spark.risk: The constructed commuting set may not be unique, leading to different momentum labelings.
idea_spark.inspiration: Incorporating symmetry into spectral decomposition offers new approaches for mode decomposition in high-dimensional or complex geometries.

papers.title: Deployment-Efficient Short-Term Load Forecasting in AI Data Centers via Sequence-to-Point Knowledge Distillation
papers.summary: Accurately forecasting the bursty and non-stationary power demand of AI data centers has become increasingly important, as abrupt workload-driven variations at the GPU-node level can affect real-time operational efficiency, power management, and grid-data center coordination. However, high-capacity forecasting models are often difficult to deploy at scale because of their memory and latency requirements, while lightweight predictors may fail to capture short-horizon temporal dynamics. To address this accuracy-deployment tradeoff, this paper proposes a deployment-efficient knowledge distillation framework for short-term load forecasting in AI data centers. The proposed framework first trains a high-capacity sequence teacher model for multi-step load trajectory prediction, where residual learning is used to improve robustness under non-stationary operating conditions. A lightweight point-wise student model is then developed for low-latency rolling inference using a compact neural network architecture. To transfer temporal knowledge from the teacher to the student, a sequence-to-point distillation strategy is introduced by aligning near-term predictive behavior and temporally pooled representations. Case studies on the MIT Supercloud dataset demonstrate that the proposed student model improves forecasting accuracy over recent deep learning baselines while reducing the deployment footprint by over 10x in parameter memory and model size.

ai.tldr: 提出一种面向AI数据中心短期负荷预测的部署高效知识蒸馏框架，通过序列到点蒸馏在保持精度的同时大幅降低模型部署开销。
ai.motivation: AI数据中心电力需求具有突发性和非平稳性，高容量模型难以大规模部署，轻量模型又难以捕捉短期动态，存在精度与部署的权衡。
ai.method: 先训练高容量序列教师模型进行多步负荷轨迹预测（含残差学习），再设计轻量点式学生模型，通过序列到点蒸馏对齐近端预测行为与时序池化表征。
ai.result: 在MIT Supercloud数据集上，学生模型在参数内存和模型大小上降低10倍以上，且预测精度优于近期深度学习基线。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何在不牺牲预测精度的前提下，实现AI数据中心负荷预测模型的高效部署。

idea_spark.idea: 将教师模型的时序知识通过近端对齐和池化表征压缩到点式学生模型，实现精度与部署效率的平衡。
idea_spark.risk: 蒸馏过程可能丢失教师模型的长程依赖信息，需验证在更长预测窗口下的表现。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受知识蒸馏和序列到序列学习的启发，将多步预测知识压缩为单步推理模型。

zh.tldr: 提出一种面向AI数据中心短期负荷预测的部署高效知识蒸馏框架，通过序列到点蒸馏在保持精度的同时大幅降低模型部署开销。
zh.motivation: AI数据中心电力需求具有突发性和非平稳性，高容量模型难以大规模部署，轻量模型又难以捕捉短期动态，存在精度与部署的权衡。
zh.method: 先训练高容量序列教师模型进行多步负荷轨迹预测（含残差学习），再设计轻量点式学生模型，通过序列到点蒸馏对齐近端预测行为与时序池化表征。
zh.result: 在MIT Supercloud数据集上，学生模型在参数内存和模型大小上降低10倍以上，且预测精度优于近期深度学习基线。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何在不牺牲预测精度的前提下，实现AI数据中心负荷预测模型的高效部署。

idea_spark.idea: 将教师模型的时序知识通过近端对齐和池化表征压缩到点式学生模型，实现精度与部署效率的平衡。
idea_spark.risk: 蒸馏过程可能丢失教师模型的长程依赖信息，需验证在更长预测窗口下的表现。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受知识蒸馏和序列到序列学习的启发，将多步预测知识压缩为单步推理模型。

en.tldr: Proposes a deployment-efficient knowledge distillation framework for short-term load forecasting in AI data centers, using sequence-to-point distillation to maintain accuracy while reducing deployment overhead by over 10x.
en.motivation: AI data centers exhibit bursty and non-stationary power demand; high-capacity models are hard to deploy at scale, while lightweight models fail to capture short-term dynamics, creating an accuracy-deployment tradeoff.
en.method: First trains a high-capacity sequence teacher model for multi-step load trajectory prediction with residual learning, then develops a lightweight point-wise student model, using sequence-to-point distillation to align near-term predictive behavior and temporally pooled representations.
en.result: On the MIT Supercloud dataset, the student model reduces parameter memory and model size by over 10x while outperforming recent deep learning baselines in forecasting accuracy.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to achieve efficient deployment of load forecasting models in AI data centers without sacrificing prediction accuracy.

idea_spark.idea: Compress temporal knowledge from a teacher model into a point-wise student model via near-term alignment and pooled representations, balancing accuracy and deployment efficiency.
idea_spark.risk: Distillation may lose long-range dependencies from the teacher model; performance on longer forecast horizons needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by knowledge distillation and sequence-to-sequence learning, compressing multi-step prediction knowledge into a single-step inference model.

papers.title: Stability Estimates for the $k$-plane Transform on Measures and a Hölder-Type Comparison Between Wasserstein and Max-Sliced Wasserstein Distances
papers.summary: We establish stability estimates for the $k$-plane transform on positive Radon measures, with particular emphasis on Fourier and Wasserstein metrics. We first introduce a metric on $k$-plane data and prove a bi-Lipschitz stability estimate showing that this metric is equivalent to a generalized Fourier metric obtained by combining the $d_2$-distance between centered normalized measures with separate terms accounting for differences in barycenter and total mass.   Next, building on a Hölder-type comparison between Fourier and Wasserstein metrics due to Carrillo and Toscani, we prove an analogous estimate for positive Radon measures under uniform bounds on centered moments of order slightly higher than $2$. As a consequence, we obtain a Hölder-type stability estimate for the $k$-plane transform in terms of a generalized $2$-Wasserstein distance. For centered probability measures, this yields a Hölder stability estimate in the $2$-Wasserstein distance $W_2$.   We also study the relation between $W_2$ and its max-sliced analogue. For centered probability measures with uniformly bounded moments of order slightly higher than $2$, we prove a two-sided Hölder-type comparison between $W_2$ and max-sliced $W_2$. We then extend this comparison to positive Radon measures by combining the corresponding estimate for centered normalized measures with separate terms accounting for differences in barycenter and total mass.   Finally, for absolutely continuous compactly supported probability measures with bounded densities, we obtain a strong equivalence between the $2$-Wasserstein distance of the measures and the $(k/2-1)$-order Sobolev norm of the $k$-plane data of the difference of their densities.

ai.tldr: 建立了k-平面变换在正Radon测度上的稳定性估计，并推导了Wasserstein距离与最大切片Wasserstein距离之间的Hölder型比较。
ai.motivation: 为k-平面变换提供稳定性保证，并揭示Wasserstein距离与最大切片Wasserstein距离之间的定量关系。
ai.method: 引入k-平面数据的度量，证明其与广义Fourier度量的双Lipschitz等价性；利用Carrillo-Toscani的Hölder型比较，推广到正Radon测度；通过矩条件建立Wasserstein距离与最大切片Wasserstein距离的双边Hölder比较。
ai.result: 获得了k-平面变换在广义2-Wasserstein距离下的Hölder稳定性估计；对中心化概率测度，得到W2距离下的Hölder稳定性；对绝对连续紧支撑概率测度，建立了W2距离与k-平面数据的Sobolev范数之间的强等价性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解k-平面变换的稳定性性质，以及Wasserstein距离与最大切片Wasserstein距离之间的定量关系。

idea_spark.idea: 利用Hölder型比较，将Wasserstein距离的稳定性估计转化为更易计算的Fourier度量或最大切片Wasserstein距离的估计。
idea_spark.risk: 矩条件（阶数略高于2）可能限制应用范围，对于重尾分布或高阶矩发散的情况，结论可能不成立。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受Carrillo-Toscani的Fourier-Wasserstein比较启发，将类似技巧用于其他变换的稳定性分析。

en.tldr: Establishes stability estimates for the k-plane transform on positive Radon measures and derives a Hölder-type comparison between Wasserstein and max-sliced Wasserstein distances.
en.motivation: To provide stability guarantees for the k-plane transform and reveal quantitative relations between Wasserstein and max-sliced Wasserstein distances.
en.method: Introduces a metric on k-plane data and proves its bi-Lipschitz equivalence to a generalized Fourier metric; extends Carrillo-Toscani's Hölder-type comparison to positive Radon measures; establishes a two-sided Hölder comparison between W2 and max-sliced W2 under moment conditions.
en.result: Obtains Hölder stability estimates for the k-plane transform in terms of a generalized 2-Wasserstein distance; for centered probability measures, achieves Hölder stability in W2; for absolutely continuous compactly supported probability measures, proves strong equivalence between W2 and a Sobolev norm of k-plane data.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand the stability properties of the k-plane transform and the quantitative relationship between Wasserstein and max-sliced Wasserstein distances.

idea_spark.idea: Use Hölder-type comparisons to convert stability estimates in Wasserstein distance into more computable Fourier or max-sliced Wasserstein estimates.
idea_spark.risk: Moment conditions (order slightly above 2) may limit applicability; conclusions may fail for heavy-tailed distributions or divergent higher moments.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by Carrillo-Toscani's Fourier-Wasserstein comparison, applying similar techniques to stability analysis of other transforms.

papers.title: Real-Time Frame- and Event-based Object Detection with Spiking Neural Networks on Edge Neuromorphic Hardware: Design, Deployment and Benchmark
papers.summary: Real-time object detection on energy-constrained platforms is critical for applications such as UAV-based inspection, autonomous navigation, and mobile robotics. Spiking neural networks (SNNs) on neuromorphic hardware are believed to be significantly more energy-efficient than conventional artificial neural networks (ANNs). In this work, we present a comprehensive methodology for designing general SNN detection architectures targeting neuromorphic platforms, along with the engineering adaptations required to deploy them on the state-of-the-art Neuromorphic processor, Intel Loihi 2. We benchmark SNN-based object detection on Loihi 2 using both frame-based and event-based datasets, comparing performance with ANN-based detection on the NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano, NVIDIA Jetson Nano B01, and the Apple M2 CPU. Our results show that SNNs on Loihi 2 can perform real-time detection while achieving the lowest per-inference dynamic energy among all platforms. Also, Loihi 2 outperforms the other platforms in terms of power consumption, though ANNs on Jetson Orin Nano achieve higher inference rates. Furthermore, our ANN-to-SNN distillation-aware training enables SNNs to recover 87-100% of the detection accuracy of their ANN counterparts while maintaining lower inference latency; without distillation, SNNs exhibit an 11-27% accuracy drop. These results highlight the potential of neuromorphic systems for energy-efficient, real-time object detection at the edge.
authors: Udayanga G. W. K. N. Gamage

ai.tldr: 提出了一套在神经形态硬件Loihi 2上部署脉冲神经网络进行实时目标检测的完整方法，并对比了传统神经网络在多种边缘平台上的性能。
ai.motivation: 能量受限平台（如无人机、移动机器人）需要低功耗实时目标检测，而脉冲神经网络在神经形态硬件上被认为比传统人工神经网络更节能。
ai.method: 设计了通用的SNN检测架构，并进行了工程适配以部署在Intel Loihi 2上；采用ANN-to-SNN蒸馏感知训练恢复检测精度。
ai.result: Loihi 2上的SNN实现了最低的单次推理动态能耗，功耗优于其他平台；蒸馏训练使SNN恢复87-100%的ANN精度，且推理延迟更低。
ai.help_to_user: 展示了如何在神经形态硬件上高效部署SNN进行实时目标检测，为低功耗边缘AI应用提供参考。

idea_spark.idea: 结合事件相机与帧相机的混合输入，利用SNN异步计算特性进一步降低功耗。
idea_spark.risk: Loihi 2的推理速率低于高端GPU，可能限制高帧率应用。
idea_spark.inspiration: 神经形态硬件与SNN的组合在边缘端低功耗检测中具有巨大潜力，可探索更多传感器融合方案。

en.tldr: A comprehensive methodology for deploying spiking neural networks on Intel Loihi 2 for real-time object detection, benchmarking against conventional networks on edge platforms.
en.motivation: Energy-constrained platforms require low-power real-time detection; SNNs on neuromorphic hardware promise higher energy efficiency than ANNs.
en.method: Designed general SNN detection architectures adapted for Loihi 2; used ANN-to-SNN distillation-aware training to recover accuracy.
en.result: Loihi 2 achieved lowest per-inference dynamic energy and power consumption; distillation recovered 87-100% of ANN accuracy with lower latency.
en.help_to_user: Provides a practical guide for deploying SNN-based detection on neuromorphic hardware for energy-efficient edge AI.

idea_spark.risk: Loihi 2 inference rate is lower than high-end GPUs, limiting high-frame-rate applications.
idea_spark.inspiration: Neuromorphic hardware with SNNs shows great potential for low-power edge detection; explore more sensor fusion approaches.

papers.title: A new family of weighted double Hurwitz numbers and a new ELSV-type formula with $Ω$-classes
papers.summary: We analyze a new family of weighted double Hurwitz numbers that was introduced as a notable example in the context of the $x-y$ duality for logarithmic topological recursion. We use this family to systematically demonstrate, refine and develop techniques that play a crucial role in the interaction of hypergeometric (Orlov--Scherbin) KP tau functions and intersection theory of moduli spaces of curves. In particular, we discuss the subtleties related to the derivation of the ELSV-type formulas in this context and derive a new, explicit ELSV-type formula in terms of the so-called $Ω$-classes.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了一族新的加权双Hurwitz数，并推导出涉及Ω-类的ELSV型公式。
ai.motivation: 探索加权双Hurwitz数与模空间相交理论之间的深层联系。
ai.method: 利用x-y对偶和对数拓扑递归，结合超几何KP tau函数理论。
ai.result: 得到了一个显式的、以Ω-类表示的ELSV型公式。
ai.help_to_user: 为理解Hurwitz数与曲线模空间相交数的关系提供了新工具。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将Ω-类公式应用于更高亏格的模空间计算。
idea_spark.risk: 公式的显式性可能依赖于特定对称性，推广需谨慎。
idea_spark.inspiration: x-y对偶与对数拓扑递归的结合可能揭示更多可积系统与几何的关联。

en.motivation: To explore deep connections between weighted double Hurwitz numbers and intersection theory of moduli spaces.
en.method: Using x-y duality and logarithmic topological recursion, combined with hypergeometric KP tau functions.
en.result: An explicit ELSV-type formula expressed in terms of Ω-classes is obtained.
en.help_to_user: Provides new tools for understanding the relationship between Hurwitz numbers and intersection numbers on moduli spaces of curves.

idea_spark.inspiration: The combination of x-y duality and logarithmic topological recursion may reveal further connections between integrable systems and geometry.

papers.title: Discrete Quantization on Spherical Geometries: Explicit Models, Computations, and Didactic Exposition
papers.summary: We present an analytically explicit study of optimal discrete quantization on spherical geometries equipped with the geodesic metric, focusing on highly symmetric configurations on the unit sphere $\mathbb S^2$. Three discrete uniform models are analyzed and closed-form expressions for optimal quantizers and mean-square errors are derived. (I) For $N$ equally spaced points on the equator, exact error formulas are obtained for both divisible and non-divisible cases, showing that optimal Voronoi cells form contiguous arcs with midpoint representatives. (II) For two antipodally symmetric small circles at latitudes $\pmφ_0$, each with $M$ longitudes, we establish a no-cross-circle Voronoi phenomenon, symmetry-preserving optimality, and finite-sum error formulas with curvature-dependent bounds and asymptotics. (III) For a single small circle at latitude $φ_0$, analogous formulas are proved and curvature is shown to reduce distortion by a factor $\cos^2φ_0$ while preserving the $n^{-2}$ decay rate. Across all models we rigorously formulate the block-midpoint principle: optimal Voronoi cells are contiguous azimuthal blocks whose representatives are azimuthal midpoints. These explicit benchmark models clarify curvature effects and support further developments in quantization on curved manifolds.

ai.tldr: 本文在球面几何上对最优离散量化进行了显式解析研究，分析了三种高度对称的均匀配置，推导了最优量化器和均方误差的闭式表达式，并揭示了块中点原理。
ai.motivation: 量化在信号处理和数据压缩中至关重要，但球面几何上的量化理论尚不完善，特别是曲率对量化误差的影响缺乏显式模型。
ai.method: 针对球面上三种对称配置（赤道等距点、反极对称小圆、单小圆），利用Voronoi划分和块中点原理，推导出闭式误差公式并分析渐近行为。
ai.result: 获得了所有配置下最优量化器和均方误差的精确表达式，证明了曲率通过cos²φ₀因子降低失真，且误差衰减率保持n⁻²。
ai.help_to_user: 为球面数据压缩、传感器网络部署和机器学习中的球形特征量化提供了理论基准和显式计算公式。

idea_spark.idea: 将球面量化结果应用于球形CNN中的特征图离散化，或用于球形点云数据的自适应采样。
idea_spark.risk: 实际应用中非对称配置或非均匀分布可能破坏解析可解性，需数值方法补充。
idea_spark.inspiration: 曲率降低失真的发现启发在流形学习中利用曲率信息设计更高效的量化策略。

en.tldr: This paper presents an explicit analytical study of optimal discrete quantization on spherical geometries, analyzing three highly symmetric configurations on the unit sphere S^2, deriving closed-form expressions for optimal quantizers and mean-square errors, and revealing the block-midpoint principle.
en.motivation: Quantization is crucial in signal processing and data compression, but quantization theory on spherical geometries is underdeveloped, especially the effect of curvature on quantization error lacks explicit models.
en.method: For three symmetric configurations on the sphere (equally spaced points on the equator, antipodal small circles, and a single small circle), Voronoi partitions and the block-midpoint principle are used to derive closed-form error formulas and asymptotic behaviors.
en.result: Exact expressions for optimal quantizers and mean-square errors are obtained for all configurations, showing that curvature reduces distortion by a factor cos²φ₀ while preserving the n⁻² decay rate.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical benchmarks and explicit formulas for spherical data compression, sensor network deployment, and spherical feature quantization in machine learning.

idea_spark.idea: Apply the spherical quantization results to discretize feature maps in spherical CNNs, or to adaptive sampling of spherical point clouds.
idea_spark.risk: Non-symmetric configurations or non-uniform distributions in practical applications may break analytical tractability, requiring numerical methods.
idea_spark.inspiration: The finding that curvature reduces distortion inspires the design of more efficient quantization strategies that leverage curvature information in manifold learning.

papers.title: "True" self-avoiding walks on general trees
papers.summary: We study the asymptotic behavior of ``true" self-avoiding random walks on general infinite locally finite trees. In this model, the walk starts at the root and, at each step, from its current vertex chooses a neighboring edge to traverse with probability proportional to the current weight of that edge, where the weight of each edge after being traversed $n$ times is given by $w(n)=\exp(-βn)$. We show that the process exhibits a sharp phase transition between recurrence and transience. The critical value is determined by the branching-ruin number of the tree, which coincides with the Hausdorff dimension of the boundary of the tree under a suitable metric. We prove that the walk is almost surely transient when the branching-ruin number is greater than $1/2$, and recurrent when it is less than $1/2$. This resolves an open question posed by Kosygina.

ai.tldr: 研究了一般无限局部有限树上的“真”自避随机游走的渐近行为，发现了以分支-毁灭数为临界值的相变。
ai.motivation: 解决Kosygina提出的关于树上真自避游走是否具有相变以及临界值的开放问题。
ai.method: 利用分支-毁灭数与边界Hausdorff维数的关系，分析游走的递归性与瞬变性。
ai.result: 当分支-毁灭数大于1/2时游走几乎必然瞬变，小于1/2时递归。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解树上自避游走的长期行为及其与树几何结构的关系。

idea_spark.idea: 将临界值1/2与树的分支结构结合，可能用于设计基于随机游走的网络搜索或采样算法。
idea_spark.risk: 模型假设权重指数衰减，实际网络中的权重函数可能不同，需验证普适性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用树的分形维数刻画游走相变，启发其他图上的类似分析。

en.tldr: Studies the asymptotic behavior of 'true' self-avoiding walks on general infinite locally finite trees, revealing a sharp phase transition with critical value determined by the branching-ruin number.
en.motivation: To resolve an open question by Kosygina regarding the existence and critical value of a phase transition for true self-avoiding walks on trees.
en.method: Relates the branching-ruin number to the Hausdorff dimension of the tree boundary to analyze recurrence and transience.
en.result: The walk is almost surely transient when the branching-ruin number exceeds 1/2, and recurrent when it is less than 1/2.
en.help_to_user: Provides insight into the long-term behavior of self-avoiding walks on trees and its connection to tree geometry.

idea_spark.idea: The critical value 1/2 combined with tree branching structure could inspire network search or sampling algorithms based on random walks.
idea_spark.risk: The model assumes exponential weight decay; real-world networks may have different weight functions, requiring validation of universality.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using fractal dimension of trees to characterize walk phase transitions may inspire similar analyses on other graphs.

papers.title: Optimal Merton's Problem under Multivariate Affine Volterra Models with Jumps
papers.summary: This paper is concerned with portfolio selection for an investor with exponential, power, and logarithmic utility in multi-asset financial markets allowing jumps. We investigate the classical Merton's portfolio optimization problem in a Volterra stochastic environment described by a multivariate Volterra--Heston model with jumps driven by an independent Poisson random measure. Owing to the non-Markovian and non-semimartingale nature of the model, classical stochastic control techniques are not directly applicable. Instead, the problem is tackled using the martingale optimality principle by constructing a family of supermartingale processes characterized via solutions to an original Riccati backward stochastic differential equation with jumps (Riccati BSDEJ).The resulting optimal strategies for Merton's problems are derived in semi-closed form depending on the solutions to time-dependent multivariate Riccati-Volterra equations, while the optimal value is expressed using the solution to this original Riccati BSDEJ. Numerical experiments on a two-dimensional rough Heston model illustrate the impact of both path roughness and jumps components on the value function and optimal strategies in the Merton problem.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了多资产跳跃市场下指数、幂和对数效用投资者的Merton最优投资组合问题，在Volterra-Heston跳跃模型框架下，通过Riccati BSDEJ得到半闭式最优策略和值函数。
ai.motivation: 经典Merton问题在非马尔可夫、非半鞅的Volterra随机环境下难以直接应用传统随机控制方法，需要发展新的理论工具。
ai.method: 利用鞅最优性原理，构造一族由带跳跃的Riccati倒向随机微分方程（Riccati BSDEJ）刻画的超鞅过程，将问题转化为求解时变多元Riccati-Volterra方程。
ai.result: 得到了半闭式最优策略和值函数表达式，数值实验在二维粗糙Heston模型上展示了路径粗糙度和跳跃成分对最优策略和值函数的影响。
ai.help_to_user: 为金融数学中非马尔可夫、非半鞅市场下的最优投资组合选择提供了可解析处理的理论框架和数值方法。

idea_spark.idea: 将粗糙Volterra过程与跳跃结合，可能更真实地刻画资产收益的长期记忆性和突发风险，用于开发更稳健的量化投资策略。
idea_spark.risk: 模型参数估计复杂，数值求解高维Riccati-Volterra方程可能面临计算负担。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴粗糙波动率文献中的数值技巧（如分步近似、傅里叶方法）来高效求解Riccati-Volterra方程。

en.tldr: This paper studies Merton's optimal portfolio problem for exponential, power, and logarithmic utility investors in multi-asset markets with jumps, under a multivariate Volterra-Heston model, deriving semi-closed-form strategies via a Riccati BSDEJ.
en.motivation: Classical stochastic control fails for non-Markovian, non-semimartingale Volterra environments, necessitating new theoretical tools.
en.method: The martingale optimality principle is used, constructing a family of supermartingales characterized by a Riccati backward stochastic differential equation with jumps (Riccati BSDEJ), reducing the problem to time-dependent multivariate Riccati-Volterra equations.
en.result: Semi-closed-form optimal strategies and value functions are obtained; numerical experiments on a two-dimensional rough Heston model illustrate the impact of path roughness and jumps.
en.help_to_user: Provides a tractable theoretical and numerical framework for optimal portfolio selection in non-Markovian, non-semimartingale markets.

idea_spark.idea: Combining rough Volterra processes with jumps may better capture long memory and sudden risk in asset returns, enabling more robust quantitative strategies.
idea_spark.risk: Parameter estimation is complex, and solving high-dimensional Riccati-Volterra equations may be computationally intensive.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leverage numerical techniques from rough volatility literature (e.g., stepwise approximation, Fourier methods) to efficiently solve Riccati-Volterra equations.

papers.title: Instance-Aware Parameter Configuration in Bilevel Late Acceptance Hill Climbing for the Electric Capacitated Vehicle Routing Problem
papers.summary: Algorithm performance in combinatorial optimization is highly sensitive to parameter settings, while a single globally tuned configuration often fails to exploit the heterogeneity of instances. This limitation is particularly evident in the Electric Capacitated Vehicle Routing Problem, where instances differ in structure, demand patterns, and energy constraints. This paper investigates instance-aware parameter configuration for Bilevel Late Acceptance Hill Climbing, a state-of-the-art metaheuristic for the Electric Capacitated Vehicle Routing Problem. An offline tuning procedure is used to obtain instance-specific parameter labels, which are then mapped from instance features via a regression model to enable parameter prediction for unseen instances prior to execution. Experimental results on the IEEE WCCI 2020 benchmark and its extensions show that the proposed approach achieves an average objective value reduction of $0.28\%$ across eight held-out test instances relative to a globally tuned configuration. This corresponds to a significant cost reduction in multimillion-dollar transportation operations.

ai.tldr: 针对电动容量车辆路径问题，提出实例感知的参数配置方法，通过离线调优和回归模型预测参数，平均目标值降低0.28%。
ai.motivation: 全局统一参数无法适应不同实例的结构和约束差异，导致算法性能受限。
ai.method: 离线调优获取实例特定参数标签，利用回归模型从实例特征映射参数，实现未见过实例的预执行参数预测。
ai.result: 在IEEE WCCI 2020基准及扩展测试集上，八个保留实例平均目标值降低0.28%，对应数百万美元运输成本节约。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种可迁移的参数配置框架，帮助用户针对不同实例自动调整算法参数，提升优化效果。

idea_spark.idea: 结合在线学习机制，在算法执行过程中动态调整参数，进一步提升适应性。
idea_spark.risk: 回归模型可能过拟合特定实例特征分布，泛化到全新场景时效果下降。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用实例特征预测参数的思想，可启发其他领域（如调度、物流）的自动化参数调优研究。

en.tldr: Proposes instance-aware parameter configuration for the Electric Capacitated Vehicle Routing Problem, using offline tuning and regression to predict parameters, achieving 0.28% average objective reduction.
en.motivation: Global parameter tuning fails to exploit instance heterogeneity, limiting algorithm performance.
en.method: Offline tuning obtains instance-specific parameter labels; a regression model maps instance features to parameters for unseen instances before execution.
en.result: On IEEE WCCI 2020 benchmark and extensions, eight held-out test instances show 0.28% average objective reduction, translating to significant cost savings in multimillion-dollar operations.
en.help_to_user: Provides a transferable framework for automatic parameter tuning tailored to individual instances, improving optimization outcomes.

idea_spark.idea: Incorporate online learning to dynamically adjust parameters during algorithm execution for better adaptability.
idea_spark.risk: The regression model may overfit to specific instance feature distributions, reducing generalization to novel scenarios.
idea_spark.inspiration: The idea of predicting parameters from instance features can inspire automated tuning research in other domains such as scheduling and logistics.

papers.title: Sequential Automorphism Ensemble Decoding with Early Stopping
papers.summary: In this paper, a low-complexity approach for the automorphism ensemble decoder (AED) using successive cancellation (SC) as constituent decoders is proposed. The approach sequentially activates sub-decoders and terminates the decoding process based on pre-optimized parameters, derived from the strong correlation observed between the decoding outcome and the SC path metric. An algorithm is proposed to find a list of early termination thresholds that minimize average decoding complexity subject to a block-error rate (BLER) constraint. For various code parameters and a BLER below $10^{-3}$, simulation results show that average decoding complexity is reduced by a factor of at least $6 \times$, and up to $22 \times$, compared to the original AED complexity, with a negligible degradation in BLER.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于连续消除的自动机集成译码器低复杂度方案，通过顺序激活子译码器和提前终止来降低平均译码复杂度。
ai.motivation: 自动机集成译码器复杂度高，需要降低其平均译码复杂度。
ai.method: 利用译码结果与SC路径度量之间的强相关性，预先优化提前终止阈值，顺序激活子译码器并在满足条件时终止。
ai.result: 在BLER低于10^{-3}时，平均译码复杂度降低6倍至22倍，BLER退化可忽略。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何在不显著损失性能的前提下大幅降低极化码译码复杂度。

idea_spark.idea: 利用路径度量作为置信度指标动态决定是否激活更多子译码器。
idea_spark.risk: 阈值优化依赖具体码参数和信道条件，泛化性需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将译码过程视为序列决策问题，用早期退出机制平衡复杂度和性能。

idea_spark.inspiration: 将译码过程视为序列决策问题，用早期退出机制平衡复杂度和性能。

en.tldr: A low-complexity automorphism ensemble decoder using successive cancellation as constituent decoders, with sequential activation and early stopping based on path metrics.
en.motivation: Reduce the average decoding complexity of automorphism ensemble decoders.
en.method: Exploit strong correlation between decoding outcome and SC path metric to pre-optimize early termination thresholds; activate sub-decoders sequentially and stop when threshold is met.
en.result: Average decoding complexity reduced by 6× to 22× at BLER below 10^{-3} with negligible BLER degradation.
en.help_to_user: Understand how to significantly reduce polar code decoding complexity with minimal performance loss.

idea_spark.idea: Use path metric as confidence indicator to dynamically decide whether to activate more sub-decoders.
idea_spark.risk: Threshold optimization depends on specific code parameters and channel conditions; generalization needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: View decoding as a sequential decision problem and use early exit to balance complexity and performance.

papers.title: Escaping Mode Collapse in LLM Generation via Geometric Regulation
papers.summary: Mode collapse is a persistent challenge in generative modeling and appears in autoregressive text generation as behaviors ranging from explicit looping to gradual loss of diversity and premature trajectory convergence. We take a dynamical-systems view and reinterpret mode collapse as reduced state-space accessibility caused by *geometric collapse*: during generation, the model's internal trajectory becomes confined to a low-dimensional region of its representation space. This implies mode collapse is not purely a token-level phenomenon and cannot be reliably solved by symbolic constraints or probability-only decoding heuristics. Guided by this perspective, we propose *Reinforced Mode Regulation* (RMR), a lightweight, online state-space intervention that regulates dominant self-reinforcing directions in the Transformer value cache (implemented as low-rank damping). Across multiple large language models, RMR substantially reduces mode collapse and enables stable, high-quality generation at extremely low entropy rates (down to 0.8 nats/step), whereas standard decoding typically collapses near 2.0 nats/step.

ai.tldr: 从动力系统视角将大语言模型生成中的模式崩溃重新解释为几何崩溃，并提出轻量级在线状态空间干预方法RMR，通过低秩阻尼调节Transformer值缓存中的主导自强化方向，显著降低模式崩溃并实现极低熵率下的稳定高质量生成。
ai.motivation: 模式崩溃在自回归文本生成中表现为显式循环、多样性逐渐丧失和轨迹过早收敛，现有符号约束或概率解码启发式方法无法可靠解决，因为模式崩溃本质上是表示空间中的几何现象而非纯词元级问题。
ai.method: 提出Reinforced Mode Regulation (RMR)，一种轻量级在线状态空间干预方法，通过低秩阻尼机制调节Transformer值缓存中主导的自强化方向，从而抑制几何崩溃。
ai.result: 在多个大语言模型上，RMR显著减少模式崩溃，在极低熵率（低至0.8 nats/step）下实现稳定高质量生成，而标准解码通常在2.0 nats/step附近崩溃。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解模式崩溃的几何本质，并提供一种无需修改模型架构或训练过程的轻量级解码干预方法，以提升生成文本的多样性和稳定性。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将RMR与对比解码、温度缩放等现有方法结合，或将其扩展为自适应调节机制以动态响应生成过程中的状态变化。
idea_spark.risk: 低秩阻尼可能过度抑制某些合理生成方向，导致内容偏差或语义连贯性下降；在线干预的实时性可能增加推理延迟。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受动力系统中状态空间可达性概念的启发，将生成过程视为高维轨迹演化，通过几何约束而非概率调整来维持多样性。

idea_spark.inspiration: 受动力系统中状态空间可达性概念的启发，将生成过程视为高维轨迹演化，通过几何约束而非概率调整来维持多样性。

en.tldr: Reinterprets mode collapse in LLM generation as geometric collapse from a dynamical systems perspective, and proposes Reinforced Mode Regulation (RMR), a lightweight online state-space intervention that uses low-rank damping to regulate dominant self-reinforcing directions in the Transformer value cache, substantially reducing mode collapse and enabling stable high-quality generation at extremely low entropy rates.
en.motivation: Mode collapse in autoregressive text generation manifests as explicit looping, gradual loss of diversity, and premature trajectory convergence. Existing symbolic constraints or probability-only decoding heuristics cannot reliably solve it because mode collapse is fundamentally a geometric phenomenon in representation space rather than a purely token-level issue.
en.method: Proposes Reinforced Mode Regulation (RMR), a lightweight online state-space intervention that uses low-rank damping to regulate dominant self-reinforcing directions in the Transformer value cache, thereby suppressing geometric collapse.
en.result: Across multiple large language models, RMR substantially reduces mode collapse and enables stable, high-quality generation at extremely low entropy rates (down to 0.8 nats/step), whereas standard decoding typically collapses near 2.0 nats/step.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand the geometric nature of mode collapse and provides a lightweight decoding intervention that improves diversity and stability of generated text without modifying model architecture or training.

idea_spark.idea: Explore combining RMR with existing methods like contrastive decoding or temperature scaling, or extending it to an adaptive regulation mechanism that dynamically responds to state changes during generation.
idea_spark.risk: Low-rank damping may overly suppress certain reasonable generation directions, leading to content bias or reduced semantic coherence; online intervention may increase inference latency.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the concept of state-space accessibility in dynamical systems, viewing generation as high-dimensional trajectory evolution and maintaining diversity through geometric constraints rather than probability adjustments.

papers.title: Unraveling the Bott spiral
papers.summary: We construct and compute a homotopy-theoretic model for the Bott spiral of symmetry-protected topological phases (SPTs) studied by Queiroz--Khalaf--Stern. We model free and interacting fermionic SPTs using K-theory and reflection-positive invertible field theories (IFTs), resp., and define a twisted generalization of the Atiyah--Bott--Shapiro orientation to produce a free-to-interacting map. We also define and compute spiral maps of IFTs to model dimensional reduction in this context, answering a question of Hason--Komargodski--Thorngren. Our analysis highlights two general aspects of homotopical free-to-interacting maps. First, IFTs are more sensitive than K-theory is to the input symmetry data; in particular, the specification of an Altland--Zirnbauer class is insufficient information to define symmetry type for an IFT. Second, the remnant of Bott periodicity on the interacting side relies on an isomorphism of two extraspecial groups of order 32. Our computations use a novel 4-periodic description of a sector of the twisted ko-homology of elementary abelian 2-groups.

ai.tldr: 本文构建并计算了Bott螺旋的同伦论模型，该螺旋描述对称保护拓扑相，并研究了自由到相互作用的映射。
ai.motivation: 理解对称保护拓扑相中Bott螺旋的结构，以及自由费米子理论与相互作用理论之间的关系。
ai.method: 使用K-理论建模自由费米子SPT，用反射正可逆场论建模相互作用SPT，定义Atiyah-Bott-Shapiro定向的扭曲推广，并构造螺旋映射。
ai.result: 发现可逆场论对对称数据比K-理论更敏感，Altland-Zirnbauer类不足以定义场论的对称类型；Bott周期性的残余依赖于两个32阶超特殊群的同构。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了同伦论视角下自由到相互作用映射的通用框架，有助于理解拓扑相的分类和降维。

idea_spark.idea: 利用超特殊群同构来刻画相互作用系统中的周期性结构。

idea_spark.inspiration: 将K-理论与场论结合，通过代数拓扑工具揭示拓扑相的深层结构。

en.tldr: We construct and compute a homotopy-theoretic model for the Bott spiral of symmetry-protected topological phases, and study free-to-interacting maps.
en.motivation: To understand the structure of the Bott spiral in SPTs and the relationship between free and interacting fermionic theories.
en.method: Model free fermionic SPTs via K-theory and interacting ones via reflection-positive invertible field theories; define a twisted generalization of the Atiyah-Bott-Shapiro orientation and construct spiral maps.
en.result: IFTs are more sensitive to symmetry data than K-theory; the Altland-Zirnbauer class is insufficient for IFT symmetry type; the remnant of Bott periodicity relies on an isomorphism of two extraspecial groups of order 32.
en.help_to_user: Provides a general homotopical framework for free-to-interacting maps, aiding classification and dimensional reduction of topological phases.

idea_spark.idea: Use extraspecial group isomorphisms to characterize periodic structures in interacting theories.
idea_spark.risk: High computational complexity and sensitivity to symmetry data may limit practical applicability.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combine K-theory and field theory via algebraic topology to reveal deep structures of topological phases.

papers.title: Bilinear formalism for Schwarzian KP and Harry Dym hierarchies
papers.summary: We consider the Schwarzian KP and Harry Dym hierarchies in the framework of the bilinear formalism which is well known for such integrable hierarchies as KP, modified KP, BKP, Toda lattice and other. We show that, similarly to the bilinear formulation of the modified KP hierarchy, the Schwarzian KP can be reformulated as an integral bilinear equation for a pair of KP tau-functions with the property that any linear combination of them is again a tau function of the KP hierarchy. The Harry Dym hierarchy is then obtained as the Lax-Sato formulation of the SchKP one. The close connection with Backlund-Darboux transformations for integrable hierarchies is also discussed. Besides, it is shown that the SchKP hierarchy has a natural embedding into the multi-component KP hierarchy.

ai.tldr: 在双线性形式框架下研究Schwarzian KP和Harry Dym层次结构，揭示它们与KP tau函数及多分量KP层次结构的联系。
ai.motivation: 将双线性形式方法推广到Schwarzian KP和Harry Dym层次结构，以统一理解这些可积系统。
ai.method: 利用KP tau函数的双线性积分方程，将Schwarzian KP重新表述，并通过Lax-Sato形式导出Harry Dym层次结构。
ai.result: Schwarzian KP可表示为KP tau函数的线性组合性质，Harry Dym是SchKP的Lax-Sato形式，且SchKP自然嵌入多分量KP层次结构。
ai.help_to_user: 提供双线性形式在可积系统研究中的新应用，有助于理解层次结构间的变换关系。

idea_spark.idea: 探索Schwarzian KP与多分量KP层次结构嵌入关系在孤子解构造中的应用。
idea_spark.risk: 双线性形式对非线性系统的适用性可能有限，需验证具体可积性条件。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受Backlund-Darboux变换与层次结构联系的启发，可研究类似变换在其他非线性方程中的角色。

zh.tldr: 在双线性形式框架下研究Schwarzian KP和Harry Dym层次结构，揭示它们与KP tau函数及多分量KP层次结构的联系。

en.tldr: The Schwarzian KP and Harry Dym hierarchies are studied within the bilinear formalism, revealing their connections to KP tau-functions and the multi-component KP hierarchy.
en.motivation: To extend the bilinear formalism to the Schwarzian KP and Harry Dym hierarchies for a unified understanding of these integrable systems.
en.method: Using bilinear integral equations for KP tau-functions, the Schwarzian KP is reformulated, and the Harry Dym hierarchy is derived via the Lax-Sato formulation.
en.result: The Schwarzian KP is expressed as a linear combination property of KP tau-functions; Harry Dym is the Lax-Sato form of SchKP; SchKP naturally embeds into the multi-component KP hierarchy.
en.help_to_user: Provides new applications of bilinear formalism in integrable systems, aiding understanding of transformations between hierarchies.

idea_spark.idea: Explore the embedding of Schwarzian KP into multi-component KP for constructing soliton solutions.
idea_spark.risk: The applicability of bilinear formalism to nonlinear systems may be limited; integrability conditions need verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the connection with Backlund-Darboux transformations, investigate similar transformations in other nonlinear equations.

papers.title: Convergence of the Condensing Symmetric Inclusion Process on the Torus in the Thermodynamical Limit to Coalescing Brownian Motions
papers.summary: We investigate the saturation regime of the condensing symmetric inclusion process on the discrete one-dimensional torus in the thermodynamical limit. In this regime, the total mass concentrates on a finite number of sites, forming condensates. Our main result establishes that, under appropriate scaling, the positions of the condensates converge to a system of coalescing Brownian motions on the continuum torus. In particular, condensates perform diffusive motion until they meet, at which point they merge and their masses coagulate. This provides a rigorous derivation of a macroscopic coalescing diffusion from an underlying interacting particle system with condensation. The main technical difficulty arises from the complicated coalescence mechanism of two condensates of particles, whose trajectories are very difficult to track completely. The key idea is to control the coalescing time instead and prove that it is negligible compared to the time-scale of condensate movement. By combining this with precise estimates of movements without coalescence, we can prove its convergence to coalescing Brownian motions.

ai.tldr: 研究了热力学极限下离散一维环面上凝聚对称包含过程的饱和状态，证明了在适当标度下凝聚体的位置收敛到连续环面上的并合布朗运动。
ai.motivation: 从微观相互作用粒子系统严格推导出宏观并合扩散过程，填补凝聚型粒子系统与连续扩散之间的理论空白。
ai.method: 通过控制凝聚体并合时间，证明其相对于运动时间尺度可忽略，并结合无并合时的精确运动估计，证明收敛到并合布朗运动。
ai.result: 凝聚体在相遇前做扩散运动，相遇后合并且质量凝聚，最终位置过程收敛到并合布朗运动。
ai.help_to_user: 为理解凝聚型粒子系统的宏观行为提供严格数学框架，可用于统计物理和概率论相关研究。

idea_spark.idea: 将复杂轨迹追踪转化为对并合时间的估计，简化收敛性证明。
idea_spark.risk: 该方法依赖于特定标度假设，可能不适用于非热力学极限或高维情形。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受布朗运动并合理论启发，将粒子系统的微观并合映射为宏观扩散过程。

en.tldr: Investigates the saturation regime of the condensing symmetric inclusion process on the discrete one-dimensional torus in the thermodynamical limit, proving that under appropriate scaling the positions of condensates converge to coalescing Brownian motions on the continuum torus.
en.motivation: To rigorously derive a macroscopic coalescing diffusion from an underlying interacting particle system with condensation, bridging the gap between microscopic particle systems and continuous diffusion.
en.method: Controls the coalescence time of condensates, showing it is negligible compared to the movement time scale, and combines precise estimates of motion without coalescence to prove convergence to coalescing Brownian motions.
en.result: Condensates perform diffusive motion until they meet, at which point they merge and their masses coagulate, converging to coalescing Brownian motions.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous mathematical framework for understanding the macroscopic behavior of condensing particle systems, useful for research in statistical physics and probability theory.

idea_spark.idea: Simplify convergence proofs by replacing complex trajectory tracking with estimates of coalescence time.
idea_spark.risk: The method relies on specific scaling assumptions and may not apply to non-thermodynamic limits or higher dimensions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the theory of coalescing Brownian motions, mapping microscopic coalescence of particles to macroscopic diffusion processes.

papers.title: Two-View Accumulation as the Primary Training Lever for Hybrid-Capture Gaussian Splatting: A Variance-Decomposition View of When Gradient Surgery Helps
papers.summary: Hybrid-capture novel view synthesis combines images at substantially different camera distances (e.g., aerial drone and ground-level views). Standard 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS), trained for 30K iterations with one rendered view per optimizer step, under-fits the minority regime by 1-3 dB on five hybrid-capture benchmarks. We isolate the lever that closes this gap.   Among compute-matched alternatives -- vanilla 60K iterations, magnitude corrections (GradNorm), direction-aware near/far gradient surgery, projective preconditioning, confidence-gated sample-level surgery, and a random two-view-per-step control -- the simplest structural change wins: rendering two views per optimizer step. The pairing rule (geometry-defined near/far, random, or active loss-disparity) does not change PSNR beyond seed variance on any of the five scenes; the structural change of having two views per step does.   We propose a variance-decomposition framework that predicts and explains this finding: under bimodal camera regimes, between-regime gradient variance turns out to be small relative to within-regime variance in 3DGS, so structured and random pairings are variance-equivalent in expectation, and the variance halving from two-view accumulation itself is the dominant effect. We verify the framework on five scenes whose camera-altitude bimodality coefficients span [0.55, 1.00], and we report the negative result that direction-aware projection, magnitude correction, confidence gating, and an active loss-disparity pairing all fall within seed variance of random two-view pairing. The two-view structural lever transfers cleanly to the Scaffold-GS and Pixel-GS backbones.   We position this work as an honest characterization of which training-side axes do and do not move PSNR for hybrid-capture 3DGS, together with the framework that explains why.

ai.tldr: 混合捕获新视角合成中，每步渲染两个视图是提升性能的关键，而梯度手术等方法效果有限。
ai.motivation: 混合捕获（如无人机与地面视角）下标准3DGS欠拟合少数视角，需找出有效训练杠杆。
ai.method: 通过方差分解框架，比较多种训练策略，发现每步双视图渲染（而非单视图）是主要改进因素。
ai.result: 双视图结构改变在五个基准上提升1-3 dB，且配对规则（近远、随机、主动）无显著差异；梯度手术等方法未超越随机配对。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解混合捕获3DGS训练中哪些操作有效，并提供方差分解理论解释。

idea_spark.idea: 利用方差分解指导训练策略设计，例如针对多模态相机分布优化视图采样。
idea_spark.risk: 双视图累积可能增加计算开销，且对非双峰相机分布效果未知。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从梯度方差角度重新审视训练策略，简单结构改变可能优于复杂梯度手术。
