en.tldr: For hybrid-capture novel view synthesis, rendering two views per optimizer step is the key training lever, outperforming gradient surgery methods.
en.motivation: Standard 3DGS underfits minority views in hybrid-capture settings (e.g., aerial and ground); we identify the effective training lever.
en.method: We compare compute-matched training strategies via a variance-decomposition framework, finding that two-view accumulation dominates.
en.result: Two-view-per-step improves PSNR by 1-3 dB on five benchmarks; pairing rules (near/far, random, active) show no significant difference; gradient surgery methods fall within seed variance.
en.help_to_user: Provides an honest characterization of effective training axes for hybrid-capture 3DGS, with a theoretical explanation.

idea_spark.idea: Use variance decomposition to guide view sampling strategies for multimodal camera distributions.
idea_spark.risk: Two-view accumulation may increase computational cost; effectiveness for non-bimodal distributions is unknown.
idea_spark.inspiration: Simple structural changes in training can outperform complex gradient surgery, viewed through gradient variance lens.

papers.title: Foundation AI Models for Aerosol Optical Depth Estimation from PACE Satellite Data
papers.summary: Aerosol Optical Depth (AOD) retrieval is essential for Earth observation, supporting applications from air quality monitoring to climate studies. Conventional physics-based AOD retrieval methods formulate the problem as a pixel-wise inversion, relying on radiative transfer modeling, memory-intensive look-up tables, and auxiliary meteorological data. While recent data-driven approaches have shown promise, many fail to exploit the spatial-spectral coherence of hyperspectral imagery, leading to spatially inconsistent and noise-sensitive retrievals. We present the first study exploring Foundation AI models for AOD retrieval and propose ViTCG, a Vision Transformer with Channel-wise Grouping-based spatial regression framework that reduces retrieval bias and error. ViTCG uses hyperspectral top-of-atmosphere radiance as input and jointly models spatial context and spectral information. Validation with PACE radiance observations demonstrates a 62% reduction in mean squared error compared to state-of-the-art foundation models, including Prithvi, and produces spatially coherent AOD fields.

ai.tldr: 首次探索基础AI模型用于气溶胶光学厚度（AOD）反演，提出ViTCG框架，利用PACE卫星高光谱数据实现空间一致的低误差AOD估计。
ai.motivation: 传统物理方法和现有数据驱动方法未能充分利用高光谱图像的空间-光谱一致性，导致反演结果空间不连续且对噪声敏感。
ai.method: 提出ViTCG，一种基于通道分组空间回归的视觉Transformer，以高光谱大气层顶辐亮度为输入，联合建模空间上下文和光谱信息。
ai.result: 在PACE卫星数据上，相比Prithvi等最先进基础模型，均方误差降低62%，并生成空间连贯的AOD场。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何利用基础AI模型从高光谱卫星数据中高效、准确地反演气溶胶光学厚度。

idea_spark.idea: 将基础模型与通道分组机制结合，可推广到多光谱或高光谱数据中任何需要空间-光谱联合建模的回归问题。
idea_spark.risk: 模型对训练数据分布敏感，若迁移到不同传感器或地理区域，可能需重新微调。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受视觉Transformer在图像分割中捕获长距离依赖的启发，将其用于遥感反演以改善空间一致性。

zh.tldr: 首次探索基础AI模型用于气溶胶光学厚度（AOD）反演，提出ViTCG框架，利用PACE卫星高光谱数据实现空间一致的低误差AOD估计。

idea_spark.risk: 模型对训练数据分布敏感，若迁移到不同传感器或地理区域，可能需重新微调。

en.tldr: First exploration of foundation AI models for Aerosol Optical Depth (AOD) retrieval, proposing ViTCG that leverages PACE satellite hyperspectral data for spatially coherent low-error AOD estimation.
en.motivation: Conventional physics-based and recent data-driven methods fail to exploit spatial-spectral coherence of hyperspectral imagery, leading to spatially inconsistent and noise-sensitive retrievals.
en.method: Proposes ViTCG, a Vision Transformer with Channel-wise Grouping-based spatial regression framework, using hyperspectral top-of-atmosphere radiance as input to jointly model spatial context and spectral information.
en.result: On PACE satellite data, achieves 62% reduction in mean squared error compared to state-of-the-art foundation models like Prithvi, and produces spatially coherent AOD fields.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to leverage foundation AI models for efficient and accurate aerosol optical depth retrieval from hyperspectral satellite data.

idea_spark.idea: Combining foundation models with channel grouping can be generalized to any regression problem requiring joint spatial-spectral modeling in multispectral or hyperspectral data.
idea_spark.risk: The model is sensitive to training data distribution; transfer to different sensors or geographic regions may require fine-tuning.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by Vision Transformers' ability to capture long-range dependencies in image segmentation, applied to remote sensing retrieval to improve spatial coherence.

papers.title: Putting HUMANS first: Efficient LAM Evaluation with Human Preference Alignment
papers.summary: The rapid proliferation of large audio models (LAMs) demands efficient approaches for model comparison, yet comprehensive benchmarks are costly. To fill this gap, we investigate whether minimal subsets can reliably evaluate LAMs while reducing costs and data redundancy. Analyzing 10 subset selection methods with 18 audio models across 40 tasks covering major LAM evaluation dimensions, we show that subsets of just 50 examples (0.3% of data) can achieve over 0.93 Pearson correlation with full benchmark scores. To understand how well these scores align with what practitioners ultimately care about, user satisfaction, we collect 776 human preference ratings from realistic voice assistant conversations, finding that both subsets and full benchmark achieve only 0.85 correlation with human. To better predict preferences, we trained regression models on these selected subsets, achieving 0.98 correlation -- outperforming regression models trained on both random subsets and the full benchmark. This demonstrates that in regression modeling, well-curated subsets outpredict the full benchmark, showing quality over quantity. We open-source these regression-weighted subsets as the HUMANS benchmark, an efficient proxy for LAM evaluation that captures both benchmark performance and user preferences.

ai.tldr: 提出HUMANS基准，通过少量子集（0.3%数据）高效评估大型音频模型，并利用人类偏好对齐提升预测准确性。
ai.motivation: 大型音频模型（LAM）快速增多，但全面基准测试成本高昂，需要更高效的评估方法。
ai.method: 分析10种子集选择方法，在18个音频模型和40个任务上测试，收集776个人类偏好评分，训练回归模型预测用户满意度。
ai.result: 仅50个样本（0.3%数据）的子集与完整基准的皮尔逊相关系数超过0.93；回归模型在精选子集上达到0.98相关性，优于完整基准。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种低成本、高可靠性的LAM评估代理，帮助研究人员快速比较模型性能并预测用户满意度。

idea_spark.idea: 利用人类偏好加权子集，替代完整基准进行模型比较，实现质量优于数量。
idea_spark.risk: 子集可能无法覆盖所有边缘场景，导致评估偏差；人类偏好数据收集成本仍较高。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从用户满意度出发，设计更贴近实际应用的模型评估指标，减少冗余数据依赖。

en.tldr: Proposes the HUMANS benchmark, efficiently evaluating large audio models using small subsets (0.3% data) and aligning with human preferences via regression.
en.motivation: The rapid growth of large audio models (LAMs) demands cost-effective evaluation methods, as comprehensive benchmarks are expensive.
en.method: Analyzed 10 subset selection methods across 18 audio models and 40 tasks, collected 776 human preference ratings, and trained regression models to predict user satisfaction.
en.result: Subsets of 50 examples (0.3% data) achieve over 0.93 Pearson correlation with full benchmarks; regression on curated subsets reaches 0.98 correlation, outperforming full benchmarks.
en.help_to_user: Provides a low-cost, reliable proxy for LAM evaluation, enabling quick model comparison and user satisfaction prediction.

idea_spark.idea: Use human-preference-weighted subsets to replace full benchmarks for model comparison, achieving quality over quantity.
idea_spark.risk: Subsets may miss edge cases, causing evaluation bias; collecting human preferences remains costly.
idea_spark.inspiration: Design evaluation metrics from user satisfaction to better reflect real-world performance and reduce data redundancy.

papers.title: Structure-Aware Chunking for Tabular Data in Retrieval-Augmented Generation
papers.summary: Tabular documents such as CSV and Excel files are widely used in enterprise data pipelines, yet existing chunking strategies for retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) are primarily designed for unstructured text and do not account for tabular structure. We propose a structure-aware tabular chunking (STC) framework that operates on row-level units by constructing a hierarchical Row Tree representation, where each row is encoded as a key-value block. STC performs token-constrained splitting aligned with structural boundaries and applies overlap-free greedy merging to produce dense, non-overlapping chunks. This design preserves semantic relationships between fields within a row while improving token utilization and reducing fragmentation. Across evaluations on the MAUD dataset, STC reduces chunk count by up to 40% and 56% compared to standard recursive and key-value based baselines, respectively, while improving token utilization and processing efficiency. In retrieval benchmarks, STC improves MRR from 0.3576 to 0.5945 in a hybrid setting and increases Recall@1 from 0.366 to 0.754 in BM25-only retrieval. These results demonstrate that preserving structure during chunking improves retrieval performance, highlighting the importance of structure-aware chunking for RAG over tabular data.

ai.tldr: 提出一种结构感知的表格分块框架（STC），通过行树表示和令牌约束分割，在RAG中显著提升表格数据的检索性能。
ai.motivation: 现有RAG分块策略主要针对非结构化文本，无法有效处理表格数据的结构特性，导致语义断裂和检索效率低下。
ai.method: 构建行树层次表示，将每行编码为键值块；执行令牌约束的结构边界分割；采用无重叠贪婪合并生成密集块。
ai.result: 在MAUD数据集上，块数量减少40%-56%，MRR从0.3576提升至0.5945，Recall@1从0.366提升至0.754。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户在处理表格文档（如CSV、Excel）的RAG应用中选择更优的分块策略，提升检索准确性和效率。

idea_spark.idea: 结合表格的列语义和行内关系，设计自适应分块粒度，或引入图神经网络增强行间上下文建模。
idea_spark.risk: 复杂表格（如合并单元格、嵌套表）可能破坏行树结构；大规模表格的构建开销需评估。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受文档结构分析启发，将表格视为层次化对象，而非扁平文本，从而保留字段间语义关联。

en.tldr: Proposes a structure-aware tabular chunking (STC) framework that uses a Row Tree representation and token-constrained splitting to significantly improve retrieval performance for tabular data in RAG.
en.motivation: Existing chunking strategies for RAG are designed for unstructured text and fail to preserve tabular structure, leading to semantic fragmentation and poor retrieval efficiency.
en.method: Constructs a hierarchical Row Tree representation encoding each row as a key-value block; performs token-constrained splitting aligned with structural boundaries; applies overlap-free greedy merging to produce dense chunks.
en.result: On the MAUD dataset, STC reduces chunk count by 40%-56%, improves MRR from 0.3576 to 0.5945, and increases Recall@1 from 0.366 to 0.754.
en.help_to_user: Helps users choose better chunking strategies for tabular documents (e.g., CSV, Excel) in RAG applications, improving retrieval accuracy and efficiency.

idea_spark.idea: Combine column semantics and intra-row relationships to design adaptive chunk granularity, or incorporate graph neural networks for enhanced inter-row context modeling.
idea_spark.risk: Complex tables (e.g., merged cells, nested tables) may break the Row Tree structure; construction overhead for large tables needs evaluation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by document structure analysis, treating tables as hierarchical objects rather than flat text to preserve semantic relationships between fields.

papers.title: GMGaze: MoE-Based Context-Aware Gaze Estimation with CLIP and Multiscale Transformer
papers.summary: Gaze estimation methods commonly use facial appearances to predict the direction of a person gaze. However, previous studies show three major challenges with convolutional neural network (CNN)-based, transformer-based, and contrastive language-image pre-training (CLIP)-based methods, including late fusion of image features, lack of factor-aware conditioning, and impractical capacity scaling. To address these challenges, we propose Globally-conditioned Multi-scale Gaze estimation (GMGaze), which leverages a multi-scale transformer architecture. Specifically, the model first introduces semantic prototype conditioning, which modulates the CLIP global image embedding using four learned prototype banks (i.e., illumination, background, head pose and appearance) to generate two complementary context-biased global tokens. These tokens, along with the CLIP patch and CNN tokens, are fused at the first layer. This early unified fusion prevents information loss common in late-stage merging. Finally, each token passes through sparse Mixture-of-Experts modules, providing conditional computational capacity without uniformly increasing dense parameters. For cross-domain adaptation, we incorporate an adversarial domain adaptation technique with a feature separation loss that encourages the two global tokens to remain de-correlated. Experiments using four public benchmarks (MPIIFaceGaze, EYEDIAP, Gaze360, and ETH-XGaze) show that GMGaze achieves mean angular errors of 2.49$^\circ$, 3.22$^\circ$, 10.16$^\circ$, and 1.44$^\circ$, respectively, outperforming previous baselines in all within-domain settings. In cross-domain evaluations, it provides state-of-the-art (SOTA) results on two standard transfer routes.

ai.tldr: 提出GMGaze，结合多尺度Transformer、CLIP和MoE，实现高精度注视估计。
ai.motivation: 现有CNN、Transformer和CLIP方法存在特征融合滞后、缺乏因子感知和容量扩展不实用等问题。
ai.method: 使用CLIP全局嵌入经四个原型库调制生成两个上下文偏置全局token，与CLIP patch和CNN token早期融合，再经稀疏MoE模块处理，并加入对抗域适应和特征分离损失。
ai.result: 在四个公开数据集上达到SOTA，跨域评估在两个标准迁移路径上取得最佳结果。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种高效、可扩展的注视估计方案，适用于人机交互和视觉注意力分析。

idea_spark.idea: 利用CLIP语义原型解耦光照、背景、头部姿态和外观因素，提升模型对复杂场景的鲁棒性。
idea_spark.risk: 原型库的构建和数量选择可能影响泛化能力，需针对新场景调整。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将多模态语义先验与稀疏专家网络结合，实现条件计算，避免全模型参数膨胀。

zh.tldr: 提出GMGaze，结合多尺度Transformer、CLIP和MoE，实现高精度注视估计。
zh.motivation: 现有CNN、Transformer和CLIP方法存在特征融合滞后、缺乏因子感知和容量扩展不实用等问题。

idea_spark.idea: 利用CLIP语义原型解耦光照、背景、头部姿态和外观因素，提升模型对复杂场景的鲁棒性。
idea_spark.risk: 原型库的构建和数量选择可能影响泛化能力，需针对新场景调整。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将多模态语义先验与稀疏专家网络结合，实现条件计算，避免全模型参数膨胀。

en.tldr: Proposes GMGaze, combining multi-scale Transformer, CLIP, and MoE for accurate gaze estimation.
en.motivation: Existing CNN, Transformer, and CLIP methods suffer from late feature fusion, lack of factor-aware conditioning, and impractical capacity scaling.
en.method: Modulates CLIP global embedding via four learned prototype banks to generate two context-biased global tokens, fuses them early with CLIP patch and CNN tokens, processes through sparse MoE modules, and incorporates adversarial domain adaptation with feature separation loss.
en.result: Achieves SOTA on four public benchmarks and cross-domain evaluations on two standard transfer routes.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient and scalable gaze estimation solution for human-computer interaction and visual attention analysis.

idea_spark.idea: Leveraging CLIP semantic prototypes to disentangle illumination, background, head pose, and appearance factors enhances robustness in complex scenes.
idea_spark.risk: Construction and number of prototype banks may affect generalization and require tuning for new domains.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining multimodal semantic priors with sparse expert networks enables conditional computation without full parameter expansion.

papers.title: Make Your LVLM KV Cache More Lightweight
papers.summary: Key-Value (KV) cache has become a de facto component of modern Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) for inference. While it enhances decoding efficiency in Large Language Models (LLMs), its direct adoption in LVLMs introduces substantial GPU memory overhead due to the large number of vision tokens processed during the prefill stage. To tackle this problem, we propose LightKV, a novel approach that reduces KV cache size by exploiting the redundancy among vision-token embeddings. Guided by text prompts, LightKV employs cross-modality message passing to aggregate informative messages across vision tokens and progressively compress them during prefill. This prompt-aware guidance distinguishes our method from prior vision-only compression strategies. We evaluate LightKV on eight open-source LVLMs across eight public benchmark datasets, e.g., MME and SeedBench. Experimental results demonstrate that with only 55% of the original vision tokens, LightKV (a) halves the vision-token KV cache size, (b) reduces computation by up to 40%, and (c) preserves general-purpose performance while significantly outperforming existing baselines.

ai.tldr: 提出LightKV方法，通过跨模态消息传递压缩视觉token的KV缓存，在保持性能的同时减少显存占用和计算量。
ai.motivation: LVLM中视觉token数量庞大，直接沿用LLM的KV缓存会导致显存开销剧增。
ai.method: 利用文本提示引导跨模态消息传递，在预填充阶段逐步压缩视觉token的冗余信息。
ai.result: 仅保留55%的视觉token，KV缓存减半，计算量降低40%，性能优于现有基线。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何在不牺牲模型能力的前提下减少LVLM推理时的显存和计算需求。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将文本提示的引导机制用于动态调整压缩率，实现自适应KV缓存管理。
idea_spark.risk: 过度依赖文本提示可能削弱模型对无提示场景的泛化能力。
idea_spark.inspiration: 跨模态冗余利用的思路可启发其他模态间信息压缩方法的设计。

zh.tldr: 提出LightKV方法，通过跨模态消息传递压缩视觉token的KV缓存，在保持性能的同时减少显存占用和计算量。
zh.motivation: LVLM中视觉token数量庞大，直接沿用LLM的KV缓存会导致显存开销剧增。
zh.method: 利用文本提示引导跨模态消息传递，在预填充阶段逐步压缩视觉token的冗余信息。
zh.result: 仅保留55%的视觉token，KV缓存减半，计算量降低40%，性能优于现有基线。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何在不牺牲模型能力的前提下减少LVLM推理时的显存和计算需求。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将文本提示的引导机制用于动态调整压缩率，实现自适应KV缓存管理。
idea_spark.risk: 过度依赖文本提示可能削弱模型对无提示场景的泛化能力。
idea_spark.inspiration: 跨模态冗余利用的思路可启发其他模态间信息压缩方法的设计。

en.tldr: Proposes LightKV, which compresses vision-token KV cache via cross-modality message passing, reducing memory and computation while preserving performance.
en.motivation: Directly adopting LLM KV cache in LVLMs causes huge GPU memory overhead due to numerous vision tokens.
en.method: Uses text-prompt-guided cross-modality message passing to progressively compress redundant vision-token information during prefill.
en.result: With only 55% of original vision tokens, halves KV cache size, reduces computation by up to 40%, and outperforms baselines.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to reduce memory and computation for LVLM inference without sacrificing model capability.

idea_spark.idea: Explore using text-prompt guidance to dynamically adjust compression ratio for adaptive KV cache management.
idea_spark.risk: Over-reliance on text prompts may weaken generalization in prompt-absent scenarios.
idea_spark.inspiration: The cross-modal redundancy exploitation can inspire other inter-modal information compression methods.

papers.title: A Unified Framework for Locally Stable Phases
papers.summary: We propose a unifying framework for characterizing pure and mixed state phases of matter across equilibrium, non equilibrium, and metastable regimes. We introduce the concept of locally stable states, defined by the operational property that any local operation (including post selection) can be reversed by a local channel. We prove that local stability is equivalent to a state being short range correlated, defined by the decay of both correlations and conditional mutual information. We demonstrate that these properties are invariant under locally reversible channels, thus defining locally stable phases. Furthermore, we prove that local stability implies both the decay of a family of nonlinear correlators, including the fidelity correlator, and the decay of correlations in the canonical purification, thus bridging the gap between mixed and pure states. Along the way, we establish two results which may be of independent interest: we show that post-selection on locally stable (short range correlated) states can be implemented via local channels and that quantum Markov chains can be characterized by the local computability of nonlinear observables.

ai.tldr: 提出一个统一框架，通过局部稳定性的操作性质来刻画平衡、非平衡和亚稳态下的纯态与混合态相。
ai.motivation: 现有相变理论对非平衡和亚稳态缺乏统一描述，需要一种基于操作性质的定义。
ai.method: 定义局部稳定态（任何局部操作可被局部信道逆转），证明其等价于短程关联（关联和条件互信息衰减），并证明这些性质在局部可逆信道下不变。
ai.result: 局部稳定性蕴含非线性关联子（包括保真度关联子）的衰减，以及规范纯化中的关联衰减，从而连接混合态与纯态。还证明了局部稳定态上的后选择可通过局部信道实现，以及量子马尔可夫链可由非线性可观测量的局部可计算性刻画。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解不同热力学条件下物质相的统一分类，特别是非平衡和亚稳态情形。

idea_spark.idea: 利用局部可逆信道定义相，可能为量子纠错或量子模拟提供新的稳定性判据。
idea_spark.risk: 局部稳定性的实验验证可能困难，因为需要证明所有局部操作的可逆性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 后选择可通过局部信道实现这一结果，启发设计基于局部操作的量子态制备方案。

zh.tldr: 提出一个统一框架，通过局部稳定性的操作性质来刻画平衡、非平衡和亚稳态下的纯态与混合态相。

zh.help_to_user: 帮助理解不同热力学条件下物质相的统一分类，特别是非平衡和亚稳态情形。

idea_spark.idea: 利用局部可逆信道定义相，可能为量子纠错或量子模拟提供新的稳定性判据。
idea_spark.risk: 局部稳定性的实验验证可能困难，因为需要证明所有局部操作的可逆性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 后选择可通过局部信道实现这一结果，启发设计基于局部操作的量子态制备方案。

en.tldr: Proposes a unified framework to characterize pure and mixed state phases across equilibrium, non-equilibrium, and metastable regimes via the operational property of local stability.
en.motivation: Existing phase transition theories lack a unified description for non-equilibrium and metastable regimes, requiring an operationally defined approach.
en.method: Define locally stable states (any local operation can be reversed by a local channel), prove equivalence to short-range correlation (decay of correlations and conditional mutual information), and show invariance under locally reversible channels.
en.result: Local stability implies decay of nonlinear correlators (including fidelity correlator) and decay of correlations in canonical purification, bridging mixed and pure states. Also shows post-selection on locally stable states can be implemented via local channels, and quantum Markov chains are characterized by local computability of nonlinear observables.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand unified classification of phases of matter under different thermodynamic conditions, especially non-equilibrium and metastable cases.

idea_spark.idea: Defining phases via locally reversible channels may provide new stability criteria for quantum error correction or quantum simulation.
idea_spark.risk: Experimental verification of local stability may be challenging, as it requires proving reversibility of all local operations.
idea_spark.inspiration: The result that post-selection can be implemented via local channels inspires the design of local-operation-based quantum state preparation schemes.

papers.title: Broadband Wide Field of View Imaging with Computational Mirrors
papers.summary: Traditional glass-based optics are typically optimized for narrow spectral bands, such as the visible (400-700nm) or shortwave infrared (1000-1800nm). While the emergence of VIS-SWIR sensors (400-1700nm) offers transformative potential, refractive optics struggle to focus this entire range simultaneously. Mirrors represent a promising achromatic alternative; however, they are often sidelined by field curvature, and off-axis aberrations. This paper introduces Computational Mirrors, a framework that enables high-resolution, wide-field-of-view imaging across the complete VIS-SWIR spectrum using a single sensor. Our method is built on the observation that distinct regions of the field of view reach focus at varying distances from the mirror. By capturing a minimal focal stack (2-4 images), we utilize a computational backend to recover a sharp, all-in-focus image. A key contribution of this work is SeidelConv, a novel, physics-inspired, spatially-varying point spread function (PSF) model designed to accurately characterize and correct the off-axis aberrations inherent in simple concave mirrors. We demonstrate the efficacy of our approach using a first-of-its-kind 50mm F/1 optical system equipped with a VIS-SWIR sensor. Our system produces sharp images across RGB, NIR, and SWIR wavelengths without requiring refocusing, revealing material details invisible within individual spectral bands. We further validate the scalability of our approach with a 100mm F/2 system optimized for long-range imaging.

ai.tldr: 提出计算镜面框架，利用简单凹面镜和少量焦堆栈图像，结合物理启发的空间变化点扩散函数模型SeidelConv，实现可见光到短波红外宽波段、宽视场的高分辨率成像。

ai.help_to_user: 提供一种低成本、宽波段、宽视场成像方案，适用于多光谱检测、远程监控等场景。

idea_spark.risk: Relies on accurate PSF calibration; environmental changes in deployment may degrade performance; focal stack acquisition adds temporal overhead.

papers.title: When Do Diffusion Models learn to Generate Multiple Objects?
papers.summary: Text-to-image diffusion models achieve impressive visual fidelity, yet they remain unreliable in multi-object generation. Despite extensive empirical evidence of these failures, the underlying causes remain unclear. We begin by asking how much of this limitation arises from the data itself. To disentangle data effects, we consider two regimes across different dataset sizes: (1) concept generalization, where each individual concept is observed during training under potentially imbalanced data distributions, and (2) compositional generalization, where specific combinations of concepts are systematically held out. To study these regimes, we introduce mosaic (Multi-Object Spatial relations, AttrIbution, Counting), a controlled framework for dataset generation. By training diffusion models on mosaic, we find that scene complexity plays a dominant role rather than concept imbalance, and that counting is uniquely difficult to learn in low-data regimes. Moreover, compositional generalization collapses as more concept combinations are held out during training. These findings highlight fundamental limitations of diffusion models and motivate stronger inductive biases and data design for robust multi-object compositional generation.

ai.tldr: 本文通过受控数据集Mosaic研究扩散模型在多目标生成中的失败原因，发现场景复杂度比概念不平衡影响更大，计数在低数据量下尤其困难，且组合泛化随概念组合缺失而崩溃。
ai.motivation: 文本到图像扩散模型在多目标生成中不可靠，但根本原因不明，需从数据角度分离概念泛化与组合泛化的影响。
ai.method: 设计Mosaic框架生成受控数据集，在两种数据规模下分别测试概念泛化（单个概念分布不均）和组合泛化（特定概念组合缺失），训练扩散模型并分析表现。
ai.result: 场景复杂度主导失败，而非概念不平衡；计数在低数据量下极难学习；组合泛化随训练中缺失的概念组合增多而崩溃。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解扩散模型在多目标生成中的根本限制，指导数据设计和模型改进方向。

idea_spark.idea: 引入显式的场景图或关系编码作为归纳偏置，以增强模型对多目标空间关系和计数的学习。
idea_spark.risk: 强归纳偏置可能降低模型对未见组合的泛化灵活性，需平衡偏置与数据多样性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从认知科学中场景理解的层次结构（如对象、关系、场景）启发模型架构设计。

en.tldr: This paper investigates why diffusion models fail in multi-object generation using a controlled dataset Mosaic, finding that scene complexity dominates over concept imbalance, counting is uniquely hard in low-data regimes, and compositional generalization collapses as more concept combinations are held out.
en.motivation: Text-to-image diffusion models are unreliable in multi-object generation, but the root causes are unclear; we need to disentangle concept generalization from compositional generalization from a data perspective.
en.method: We design the Mosaic framework to generate controlled datasets, testing concept generalization (imbalanced individual concepts) and compositional generalization (missing concept combinations) under two data scales, training diffusion models and analyzing performance.
en.result: Scene complexity dominates failures, not concept imbalance; counting is uniquely difficult in low-data regimes; compositional generalization collapses as more concept combinations are held out during training.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand fundamental limitations of diffusion models in multi-object generation, guiding data design and model improvements.

idea_spark.idea: Introduce explicit scene graphs or relation encodings as inductive biases to enhance learning of spatial relations and counting.
idea_spark.risk: Strong inductive biases may reduce generalization flexibility to unseen combinations; balance between bias and data diversity is needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: Draw inspiration from cognitive science's hierarchical scene understanding (objects, relations, scenes) for model architecture design.

papers.title: AIDA-ReID: Adaptive Intermediate Domain Adaptation for Generalizable and Source-Free Person Re-Identification
papers.summary: Person re-identification (Re-ID) aims to match images of the same individual across non-overlapping camera views and remains challenging due to domain shifts caused by variations in illumination, background, camera characteristics, and population distributions. Although supervised models perform well under matched training and testing conditions, their performance degrades significantly when deployed in unseen environments. Existing intermediate domain approaches such as IDM and IDM++ alleviate this gap by constructing bridge feature distributions between domains; however, they rely on fixed mixing strategies and joint source-target access, limiting their applicability to multi-source and source-free settings. To address these limitations, this paper proposes Adaptive Intermediate Domain Adaptation (AIDA), also referred to as Source-Free Multi-Source Intermediate Domain Adaptation (SF-MIDA). The proposed framework treats intermediate-domain learning as a dynamically regulated process, where feature mixing and regularization strength are adaptively controlled using feedback signals derived from model uncertainty and training stability. A multi-source intermediate domain generator synthesizes diverse intermediate representations, while a pseudo-mirror regularization strategy preserves identity consistency under domain perturbations. Extensive experiments across domain generalization and source-free settings demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed framework.

ai.tldr: 提出自适应中间域适应框架AIDA-ReID，解决多源无源场景下行人重识别的域偏移问题。
ai.motivation: 现有中间域方法依赖固定混合策略和联合源-目标访问，不适用于多源和无源设置。
ai.method: 动态调节特征混合与正则化强度，利用模型不确定性和训练稳定性反馈信号；多源中间域生成器合成多样中间表示；伪镜像正则化保持域扰动下的身份一致性。
ai.result: 在域泛化和无源设置下实验验证了框架的有效性。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种无需目标域数据即可适应新场景的行人重识别方法。

idea_spark.idea: 利用模型不确定性作为反馈信号动态调整域混合程度。

idea_spark.inspiration: 将中间域学习视为动态调控过程，而非固定插值。

en.tldr: Proposes AIDA-ReID, an adaptive intermediate domain adaptation framework for multi-source and source-free person re-identification.
en.motivation: Existing intermediate domain methods rely on fixed mixing and joint source-target access, limiting applicability to multi-source and source-free settings.
en.method: Dynamically regulates feature mixing and regularization strength using feedback from model uncertainty and training stability; multi-source intermediate domain generator synthesizes diverse representations; pseudo-mirror regularization preserves identity consistency under domain perturbations.
en.result: Experiments demonstrate effectiveness in domain generalization and source-free settings.
en.help_to_user: Provides a person re-identification method that adapts to unseen domains without requiring target domain data.

idea_spark.idea: Use model uncertainty as feedback signal to dynamically adjust domain mixing degree.
idea_spark.risk: Feedback signal design may be sensitive to noise and requires careful tuning.
idea_spark.inspiration: Treat intermediate domain learning as a dynamically regulated process rather than fixed interpolation.

papers.title: Learning from Compressed CT: Feature Attention Style Transfer and Structured Factorized Projections for Resource-Efficient Medical Image Analysis
papers.summary: The deployment of artificial intelligence in medical imaging is hindered by high computational complexity and resource-intensive processing of volumetric data. Although chest computed tomography (CT) volumes offer richer diagnostic information than projection radiography, their use in AI-based diagnosis remains limited due to the computational burden of processing uncompressed volumetric images (typically stored in NIfTI or DICOM format). Addressing the growing need for low-resource deployment and efficient electronic data transfer, we investigate the utilization of JPEG-compressed chest CT volumes for thoracic abnormality detection. We propose Feature Attention Style Transfer (FAST), a novel distillation framework that transfers both activation patterns and structural relationships from high-fidelity CT representations to a spatiotemporal visual encoder operating on compressed inputs. By combining Gram-matrix-based attention style preservation with dual-attention feature alignment, FAST enables robust feature extraction from degraded volumes. Furthermore, we introduce Structured Factorized Projection (SFP), leveraging Block Tensor Train decomposition as a parameter-efficient alternative to dense projection layers, reducing projection-head parameters by almost half. Our contrastive learning pipeline, CT-Lite, integrates these components with a SigLIP-based multimodal alignment objective. Experiments on CT-RATE, NIDCH, and Rad-ChestCT demonstrate that CT-Lite achieves AUROC within 5-7\% of the uncompressed-input baseline across all three datasets, despite operating on compressed inputs with significantly fewer parameters, paving the way for AI-based clinical evaluation under resource constraints.

ai.tldr: 提出CT-Lite框架，利用JPEG压缩的胸部CT体积进行胸腔异常检测，通过特征注意力风格迁移和结构化因子化投影实现资源高效分析。
ai.motivation: AI在医学影像中的部署受限于高计算复杂度和体积数据处理负担，压缩CT体积可降低资源需求，但现有方法在压缩输入上性能下降严重。
ai.method: 提出特征注意力风格迁移（FAST）蒸馏框架，结合Gram矩阵注意力风格保持和双注意力特征对齐；引入结构化因子化投影（SFP），使用块张量列车分解替代密集投影层，减少近一半参数；集成SigLIP多模态对齐目标的对比学习管道CT-Lite。
ai.result: 在CT-RATE、NIDCH和Rad-ChestCT三个数据集上，CT-Lite在压缩输入下AUROC仅比未压缩基线低5-7%，且参数显著减少。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户在资源受限环境下高效部署胸部CT异常检测AI模型，降低存储和传输成本。

idea_spark.risk: 压缩输入可能丢失细微病理特征，需验证在低比特率压缩下的诊断准确性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受JPEG压缩广泛用于图像存储启发，将压缩域学习引入医学体积分析，平衡效率与性能。

en.tldr: Proposes CT-Lite framework for thoracic abnormality detection using JPEG-compressed chest CT volumes, achieving resource-efficient analysis via feature attention style transfer and structured factorized projections.
en.motivation: AI deployment in medical imaging is hindered by high computational complexity and resource-intensive processing of volumetric data; compressed CT volumes reduce resource demands but existing methods suffer performance degradation on compressed inputs.
en.method: Proposes Feature Attention Style Transfer (FAST) distillation framework combining Gram-matrix-based attention style preservation and dual-attention feature alignment; introduces Structured Factorized Projection (SFP) using Block Tensor Train decomposition to replace dense projection layers, reducing parameters by nearly half; integrates SigLIP-based multimodal alignment objective in CT-Lite contrastive learning pipeline.
en.result: On CT-RATE, NIDCH, and Rad-ChestCT datasets, CT-Lite achieves AUROC within 5-7% of uncompressed-input baseline while operating on compressed inputs with significantly fewer parameters.
en.help_to_user: Helps users deploy AI models for chest CT abnormality detection in resource-constrained environments, reducing storage and transmission costs.

idea_spark.idea: Explore applying Block Tensor Train decomposition to projection layers of other deep learning models (e.g., Transformers) for further parameter compression.
idea_spark.risk: Compressed inputs may lose subtle pathological features; diagnostic accuracy under low bitrate compression needs validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by widespread use of JPEG compression for image storage, bringing compressed-domain learning to medical volumetric analysis to balance efficiency and performance.

papers.title: Riemannian Optimization over Symmetric Positive Definite Matrices with the Alpha-Procrustes Geometry
papers.summary: In Riemannian optimization, it is well known that the condition number of the Riemannian Hessian at an optimum strongly influences the asymptotic convergence behavior of optimization algorithms. On the manifold of symmetric positive definite (SPD) matrices, several commonly used metrics for optimization, such as the Affine-Invariant (AI) and Bures--Wasserstein (BW) metrics, tend to become ill-conditioned as the underlying SPD matrix becomes ill-conditioned. As a result, even when the Euclidean Hessian remains uniformly well-conditioned on the SPD manifold, optimization may still become difficult near an optimum associated with an ill-conditioned SPD matrix. In this paper, we address this issue through the Alpha-Procrustes (AP) geometry on the SPD manifold. This geometry generalizes several well-known metrics, including the Log-Euclidean (LE) metric for \(α=0\) and the BW metric for \(α=1/2\). We first show that, when \(α=1\), all eigenvalues of the Riemannian metric operator induced by the AP geometry are uniformly bounded independently of the underlying SPD matrix. Therefore, under the assumption that the Euclidean Hessian satisfies the uniform spectral bounds, all the eigenvalues of the corresponding Riemannian Hessian are uniformly bounded independently of the underlying SPD matrix. Consequently, the case \(α=1\) provides a robust geometric framework for several Riemannian optimization problems involving ill-conditioned SPD matrices. Finally, we validate our theoretical findings through extensive numerical experiments across a range of applications.

ai.tldr: 提出Alpha-Procrustes几何框架，使病态SPD矩阵上的黎曼优化问题中黎曼Hessian的条件数保持有界，从而改善优化性能。
ai.motivation: 现有仿射不变和Bures-Wasserstein度量在SPD矩阵病态时会导致黎曼Hessian条件数恶化，影响优化收敛。
ai.method: 引入Alpha-Procrustes几何，当α=1时证明黎曼度量算子的所有特征值一致有界，进而保证黎曼Hessian特征值有界。
ai.result: 理论证明α=1时黎曼Hessian特征值一致有界，数值实验验证了该方法在多种应用中的有效性。
ai.help_to_user: 为处理病态SPD矩阵的优化问题提供了一种鲁棒的几何框架，可提升算法收敛稳定性。

idea_spark.idea: 将Alpha-Procrustes几何与自适应α选择策略结合，动态调整几何以适应不同病态程度的矩阵。
idea_spark.risk: α=1时可能引入额外的计算开销，且理论保证依赖于欧几里得Hessian的一致有界性假设。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受Procrustes分析启发，通过参数化几何族统一多种已知度量，并找到最优参数以改善条件数。

zh.motivation: 现有仿射不变和Bures-Wasserstein度量在SPD矩阵病态时会导致黎曼Hessian条件数恶化，影响优化收敛。
zh.method: 引入Alpha-Procrustes几何，当α=1时证明黎曼度量算子的所有特征值一致有界，进而保证黎曼Hessian特征值有界。
zh.result: 理论证明α=1时黎曼Hessian特征值一致有界，数值实验验证了该方法在多种应用中的有效性。
zh.help_to_user: 为处理病态SPD矩阵的优化问题提供了一种鲁棒的几何框架，可提升算法收敛稳定性。

idea_spark.idea: 将Alpha-Procrustes几何与自适应α选择策略结合，动态调整几何以适应不同病态程度的矩阵。
idea_spark.risk: α=1时可能引入额外的计算开销，且理论保证依赖于欧几里得Hessian的一致有界性假设。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受Procrustes分析启发，通过参数化几何族统一多种已知度量，并找到最优参数以改善条件数。

en.tldr: Proposes the Alpha-Procrustes geometry to keep the condition number of the Riemannian Hessian bounded for ill-conditioned SPD matrices, improving optimization performance.
en.motivation: Existing affine-invariant and Bures-Wasserstein metrics cause ill-conditioned Riemannian Hessians when the SPD matrix is ill-conditioned, hindering convergence.
en.method: Introduces the Alpha-Procrustes geometry; for α=1, proves all eigenvalues of the Riemannian metric operator are uniformly bounded, ensuring bounded Riemannian Hessian eigenvalues.
en.result: Theoretical proof of uniformly bounded Riemannian Hessian eigenvalues for α=1, validated by extensive numerical experiments across applications.
en.help_to_user: Provides a robust geometric framework for optimization problems involving ill-conditioned SPD matrices, enhancing algorithm convergence stability.

idea_spark.idea: Combine Alpha-Procrustes geometry with an adaptive α selection strategy to dynamically adjust the geometry for varying degrees of ill-conditioning.
idea_spark.risk: α=1 may introduce additional computational cost, and the theoretical guarantee relies on the assumption of uniformly bounded Euclidean Hessian.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by Procrustes analysis, parameterizing a family of geometries unifies several known metrics and identifies the optimal parameter for improved conditioning.

papers.title: Thinking in Text and Images: Interleaved Vision--Language Reasoning Traces for Long-Horizon Robot Manipulation
papers.summary: Long-horizon robotic manipulation requires plans that are both logically coherent and geometrically grounded. Existing Vision-Language-Action policies usually hide planning in latent states or expose only one modality: text-only chain-of-thought encodes causal order but misses spatial constraints, while visual prediction provides geometric cues but often remains local and semantically underconstrained. We introduce Interleaved Vision--Language Reasoning (IVLR), a policy framework built around \trace{}, an explicit intermediate representation that alternates textual subgoals with visual keyframes over the full task horizon. At test time, a single native multimodal transformer self-generates this global semantic-geometric trace from the initial observation and instruction, caches it, and conditions a closed-loop action decoder on the trace, original instruction, and current observation. Because standard robot datasets lack such traces, we construct pseudo-supervision by temporally segmenting demonstrations and captioning each stage with a vision-language model. Across simulated benchmarks for long-horizon manipulation and visual distribution shift, \method{} reaches 95.5\% average success on LIBERO, including 92.4\% on LIBERO-Long, and 59.4\% overall success on SimplerEnv-WidowX. Ablations show that both modalities are necessary: without traces, LIBERO-Long success drops to 37.7\%; text-only and vision-only traces reach 62.0\% and 68.4\%, while the full interleaved trace reaches 92.4\%. Stress tests with execution perturbations and masked trace content show moderate degradation, suggesting that the trace can tolerate local corruption and moderate execution drift, but remains limited under stale or incorrect global plans.

ai.tldr: 提出交错视觉-语言推理（IVLR）框架，通过显式的文本子目标和视觉关键帧交替表示，实现长时域机器人操作的逻辑与几何约束统一。
ai.motivation: 现有视觉-语言-动作策略将规划隐藏于隐状态或仅暴露单一模态，无法同时保证因果顺序和空间约束。
ai.method: 利用原生多模态Transformer在测试时自生成全局语义-几何轨迹（trace），缓存后用于条件化闭环动作解码器；通过时间分割演示并用视觉语言模型标注构建伪监督。
ai.result: 在LIBERO上平均成功率95.5%，LIBERO-Long达92.4%；消融显示交错轨迹优于纯文本或纯视觉轨迹。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种可解释的、鲁棒的长时域机器人操作规划方法，便于调试和迁移。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将轨迹作为可编辑的中间表示，允许人类干预或自动修正错误子目标。
idea_spark.risk: 轨迹对全局计划错误敏感，且生成依赖高质量伪监督数据。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受人类在长任务中交替使用语言和视觉记忆的启发，将两种模态显式交替编码。

zh.help_to_user: 提供一种可解释的、鲁棒的长时域机器人操作规划方法，便于调试和迁移。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将轨迹作为可编辑的中间表示，允许人类干预或自动修正错误子目标。
idea_spark.risk: 轨迹对全局计划错误敏感，且生成依赖高质量伪监督数据。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受人类在长任务中交替使用语言和视觉记忆的启发，将两种模态显式交替编码。

en.tldr: Proposes Interleaved Vision-Language Reasoning (IVLR) framework that alternates textual subgoals with visual keyframes to unify logical and geometric constraints for long-horizon robot manipulation.
en.motivation: Existing VLA policies hide planning in latent states or expose only one modality, failing to simultaneously ensure causal order and spatial constraints.
en.method: A native multimodal transformer self-generates a global semantic-geometric trace at test time, caches it, and conditions a closed-loop action decoder; pseudo-supervision is constructed by temporally segmenting demonstrations and captioning each stage with a VLM.
en.result: Achieves 95.5% average success on LIBERO, 92.4% on LIBERO-Long; ablation shows interleaved trace outperforms text-only or vision-only traces.
en.help_to_user: Provides an interpretable and robust planning method for long-horizon robot manipulation, facilitating debugging and transfer.

idea_spark.idea: Explore the trace as an editable intermediate representation, allowing human intervention or automatic correction of erroneous subgoals.
idea_spark.risk: The trace is sensitive to global plan errors and relies on high-quality pseudo-supervision data.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by how humans alternate language and visual memory in long tasks, explicitly encoding both modalities in an interleaved manner.

papers.title: GOR-IS: 3D Gaussian Object Removal in the Intrinsic Space
papers.summary: Recent advances in Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) and 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) have made it standard practice to reconstruct 3D scenes from multi-view images. Removing objects from such 3D representations is a fundamental editing task that requires complete and seamless inpainting of occluded regions, ensuring consistency in geometry and appearance. Although existing methods have made notable progress in improving inpainting consistency, they often neglect global lighting effects, leading to physically implausible results. Moreover, these methods struggle with view-dependent non-Lambertian surfaces, where appearance varies across viewpoints, leading to unreliable inpainting. In this paper, we present 3D Gaussian Object Removal in the Intrinsic Space (GOR-IS), a novel framework for physically consistent and visually coherent 3D object removal. Our approach decomposes the scene into intrinsic components and explicitly models light transport to maintain global lighting effects consistency. Furthermore, we introduce an intrinsic-space inpainting module that operates directly in the material and lighting domains, effectively addressing the challenges posed by non-Lambertian surfaces. Extensive experiments on both synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate that our framework substantially improves the physical consistency and visual coherence of object removal, outperforming existing methods by 13% in perceptual similarity (LPIPS) and 2dB in peak signal-to-noise ratio (PSNR). Code is publicly available at https://applezyh.github.io/GOR-IS-project-page/

ai.tldr: 提出GOR-IS框架，通过内在空间分解和显式光传输建模，实现物理一致且视觉连贯的3D物体移除。
ai.motivation: 现有3D物体移除方法忽略全局光照效应，且难以处理非朗伯表面，导致结果物理不真实。
ai.method: 将场景分解为内在组件，显式建模光传输以保持全局光照一致性；在材质和光照域直接进行内在空间修补。
ai.result: 在合成和真实数据集上，LPIPS提升13%，PSNR提升2dB，优于现有方法。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种物理正确的3D场景编辑工具，适用于AR/VR、电影后期等需要移除物体并保持光照一致性的场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将场景分解为材质和光照，在内在空间进行修补，避免传统RGB空间修补带来的光照不一致。
idea_spark.risk: 对复杂光照环境（如焦散、半透明材质）的泛化能力可能受限，且计算开销较大。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴图形学中内在图像分解和光传输理论，将其引入神经渲染的编辑流程。

zh.tldr: 提出GOR-IS框架，通过内在空间分解和显式光传输建模，实现物理一致且视觉连贯的3D物体移除。

idea_spark.idea: 将场景分解为材质和光照，在内在空间进行修补，避免传统RGB空间修补带来的光照不一致。
idea_spark.risk: 对复杂光照环境（如焦散、半透明材质）的泛化能力可能受限，且计算开销较大。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴图形学中内在图像分解和光传输理论，将其引入神经渲染的编辑流程。

en.tldr: Proposes GOR-IS, a framework that decomposes scenes into intrinsic components and explicitly models light transport for physically consistent and visually coherent 3D object removal.
en.motivation: Existing 3D object removal methods neglect global lighting effects and struggle with non-Lambertian surfaces, leading to physically implausible results.
en.method: Decomposes the scene into intrinsic components, explicitly models light transport to maintain global lighting consistency, and performs inpainting directly in the material and lighting domains.
en.result: Outperforms existing methods by 13% in LPIPS and 2dB in PSNR on synthetic and real-world datasets.
en.help_to_user: Provides a physically correct 3D scene editing tool for applications like AR/VR and film post-production where object removal must preserve lighting consistency.

idea_spark.idea: Decompose the scene into material and lighting, perform inpainting in the intrinsic space to avoid lighting inconsistencies from RGB-space inpainting.
idea_spark.risk: Generalization to complex lighting (e.g., caustics, translucent materials) may be limited, and computational cost is high.
idea_spark.inspiration: Borrows intrinsic image decomposition and light transport theory from graphics and integrates them into the neural rendering editing pipeline.

papers.title: Exploring the Limits of End-to-End Feature-Affinity Propagation for Single-Point Supervised Infrared Small Target Detection
papers.summary: Single-point supervised infrared small target detection (IRSTD) drastically reduces dense annotation costs. Current state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods achieve high precision by recovering mask supervision through explicit, offline pseudo-label construction, such as multi-stage active learning and physics-driven mask generation. In this paper, we study a minimalist alternative: generating point-to-mask supervision online through in-batch, point-anchored feature-affinity propagation. We instantiate this paradigm as GSACP, an end-to-end testbed that directly supervises the detector using hard-margin feature affinity gated by local image priors, entirely eliminating external label-evolution loops.   This compact design, however, exposes an optimization bottleneck. Because the affinity target is generated from the same feature representation being optimized, training forms a self-referential loop. We theoretically formalize this as \emph{Self-Referential Propagation Drift}, a representation-supervision entanglement that can sharpen true boundaries or distort the feature space to satisfy its own targets. To systematically isolate these failure modes, we apply a protocolized single-variable ablation procedure spanning local EMA teacher decoupling, hard-background contrastive separation, and adaptive support geometry.   On the SIRST3 dataset, GSACP-Final establishes a new ultra-low false-alarm operating regime, achieving a highly competitive $0.6674$ mIoU while demonstrating a $38\% relative reduction in false-positive artifacts ($\mathrm{Fa}$) compared with PAL. By systematically deconstructing the end-to-end paradigm, we map its performance boundaries and show that in-batch feature propagation provides a compact alternative for deployment scenarios where false-alarm suppression is paramount.

ai.tldr: 提出一种端到端的单点监督红外小目标检测方法GSACP，通过在线特征亲和传播生成掩码监督，避免外部伪标签循环，并在SIRST3数据集上实现低虚警率。
ai.motivation: 现有单点监督方法依赖离线伪标签构建，流程复杂且成本高；探索更简洁的在线点对掩码监督方案。
ai.method: 设计GSACP框架，利用硬间隔特征亲和度与局部图像先验进行在线传播，直接监督检测器；理论分析自参考传播漂移问题，并通过消融实验隔离失败模式。
ai.result: 在SIRST3数据集上达到0.6674 mIoU，虚警伪影相对PAL降低38%，实现超低虚警运行。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种轻量级、低虚警的红外小目标检测方案，适合部署场景。

idea_spark.idea: 利用局部图像先验门控特征亲和度，在线生成伪标签，避免外部循环。
idea_spark.risk: 自参考传播漂移可能导致特征空间扭曲，需谨慎设计解耦策略。
idea_spark.inspiration: 在线传播与硬间隔约束结合，为简化弱监督流程提供新思路。

zh.tldr: 提出一种端到端的单点监督红外小目标检测方法GSACP，通过在线特征亲和传播生成掩码监督，避免外部伪标签循环，并在SIRST3数据集上实现低虚警率。

zh.help_to_user: 提供了一种轻量级、低虚警的红外小目标检测方案，适合部署场景。

idea_spark.inspiration: 在线传播与硬间隔约束结合，为简化弱监督流程提供新思路。

en.tldr: Proposes GSACP, an end-to-end single-point supervised infrared small target detection method that generates mask supervision online via feature-affinity propagation, eliminating external pseudo-label loops, and achieves low false-alarm rates on SIRST3.
en.motivation: Existing single-point methods rely on offline pseudo-label construction, which is complex and costly; explores a simpler online point-to-mask supervision alternative.
en.method: Designs GSACP using hard-margin feature affinity gated by local image priors for online propagation, directly supervising the detector; theoretically analyzes self-referential propagation drift and isolates failure modes via ablation.
en.result: Achieves 0.6674 mIoU on SIRST3 with a 38% relative reduction in false-positive artifacts compared to PAL, establishing an ultra-low false-alarm regime.
en.help_to_user: Provides a lightweight, low-false-alarm solution for infrared small target detection suitable for deployment.

idea_spark.idea: Use local image priors to gate feature affinity for online pseudo-label generation, avoiding external loops.
idea_spark.risk: Self-referential propagation drift may distort feature space; careful decoupling strategies are needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining online propagation with hard-margin constraints offers a new way to simplify weakly supervised pipelines.

papers.title: Surprisal Minimisation over Goal-directed Alternatives Predicts Production Choice in Dialogue
papers.summary: We model utterance production as probabilistic cost-sensitive choice over contextual alternatives, using information-theoretic notions of cost. We distinguish between goal-directed alternatives that realise a fixed communicative intent and goal-agnostic alternatives defined only by contextual plausibility, allowing us to derive speaker- and listener-oriented interpretations of different cost measures. We present a procedure to generate both types of alternative sets using language models. Analysing production choices in open-ended dialogue under both deterministic and probabilistic cost minimisation, we find that surprisal minimisation relative to goal-directed alternatives provides the strongest predictive account under both analyses. By contrast, uniform information density and length-based costs exhibit weaker and less consistent predictive power across conditions. More broadly, our study suggests that alternative-conditioned optimisation with LM-generated alternatives provides a principled framework for studying speaker and listener pressures in naturalistic language production.

ai.tldr: 本研究将话语生成建模为基于信息论成本的概率性代价敏感选择，区分了实现固定交际意图的目标导向替代和仅由语境合理性定义的目标无关替代，并利用语言模型生成两种替代集。分析表明，在开放对话中，相对于目标导向替代的惊奇最小化对生成选择具有最强的预测力。
ai.motivation: 现有对话生成模型缺乏对说话者与听者压力的统一解释框架，且未充分区分不同替代类型对生成选择的影响。
ai.method: 提出基于语言模型生成目标导向和目标无关替代集的程序，并在确定性和概率性代价最小化下分析对话中的生成选择。
ai.result: 惊奇最小化相对于目标导向替代在两种分析中均提供最强预测，而均匀信息密度和基于长度的代价预测力较弱且不一致。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解对话中说话者如何基于信息论代价选择表达，为构建更自然的对话系统提供理论依据。

idea_spark.idea: 利用语言模型生成替代集并结合惊奇最小化，可优化对话系统的表达选择。
idea_spark.risk: 替代集生成可能受语言模型偏差影响，且计算代价较高。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受信息论中惊奇最小化与均匀信息密度对比的启发，探索不同代价度量在自然语言生成中的作用。

zh.tldr: 本研究将话语生成建模为基于信息论成本的概率性代价敏感选择，区分了实现固定交际意图的目标导向替代和仅由语境合理性定义的目标无关替代，并利用语言模型生成两种替代集。分析表明，在开放对话中，相对于目标导向替代的惊奇最小化对生成选择具有最强的预测力。

idea_spark.idea: 利用语言模型生成替代集并结合惊奇最小化，可优化对话系统的表达选择。
idea_spark.risk: 替代集生成可能受语言模型偏差影响，且计算代价较高。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受信息论中惊奇最小化与均匀信息密度对比的启发，探索不同代价度量在自然语言生成中的作用。

en.tldr: This study models utterance production as probabilistic cost-sensitive choice over contextual alternatives using information-theoretic costs, distinguishing goal-directed and goal-agnostic alternatives. It finds that surprisal minimisation relative to goal-directed alternatives best predicts production choices in open-ended dialogue.
en.motivation: Existing dialogue generation models lack a unified framework for speaker and listener pressures and do not adequately differentiate alternative types affecting production choices.
en.method: A procedure using language models to generate goal-directed and goal-agnostic alternative sets, analysed under deterministic and probabilistic cost minimisation in dialogue.
en.result: Surprisal minimisation relative to goal-directed alternatives provides the strongest predictive power, while uniform information density and length-based costs are weaker and less consistent.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand how speakers choose expressions based on information-theoretic costs in dialogue, providing theoretical grounding for more natural dialogue systems.

idea_spark.idea: Using language models to generate alternative sets combined with surprisal minimisation can optimise expression choices in dialogue systems.
idea_spark.risk: Alternative set generation may be biased by language models and computationally expensive.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the contrast between surprisal minimisation and uniform information density, exploring the role of different cost measures in natural language generation.

papers.title: Physically Native World Models: A Hamiltonian Perspective on Generative World Modeling
papers.summary: World models have recently re-emerged as a central paradigm for embodied intelligence, robotics, autonomous driving, and model-based reinforcement learning. However, current world model research is often dominated by three partially separated routes: 2D video-generative models that emphasize visual future synthesis, 3D scene-centric models that emphasize spatial reconstruction, and JEPA-like latent models that emphasize abstract predictive representations. While each route has made important progress, they still struggle to provide physically reliable, action-controllable, and long-horizon stable predictions for embodied decision making. In this paper, we argue that the bottleneck of world models is no longer only whether they can generate realistic futures, but whether those futures are physically meaningful and useful for action. We propose \emph{Hamiltonian World Models} as a physically grounded perspective on world modeling. The key idea is to encode observations into a structured latent phase space, evolve the latent state through Hamiltonian-inspired dynamics with control, dissipation, and residual terms, decode the predicted trajectory into future observations, and use the resulting rollouts for planning. We discuss how Hamiltonian structure may improve interpretability, data efficiency, and long-horizon stability, while also noting practical challenges in real-world robotic scenes involving friction, contact, non-conservative forces, and deformable objects.

ai.tldr: 提出哈密顿世界模型，将观测编码到结构化潜相空间，通过哈密顿动力学演化潜状态，以生成物理可靠、可动作控制且长期稳定的未来预测。
ai.motivation: 当前世界模型在2D视频生成、3D场景重建和JEPA潜表示三条路线上各自发展，但缺乏物理可靠性、动作可控性和长期稳定性，难以支撑具身决策。

ai.result: 理论上可提升可解释性、数据效率和长期稳定性，但在真实机器人场景中面临摩擦、接触、非保守力和可变形物体等实际挑战。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种物理约束的世界模型框架，帮助用户构建更可靠、可解释的具身智能系统。

idea_spark.idea: 将非保守力（如摩擦、接触）显式建模为耗散项，并引入残差网络补偿未建模动力学。

idea_spark.inspiration: 结合哈密顿力学与深度学习，为世界模型提供物理先验，有望突破当前生成模型的物理一致性瓶颈。

en.tldr: Proposes Hamiltonian World Models, encoding observations into a structured latent phase space and evolving via Hamiltonian-inspired dynamics to generate physically reliable, action-controllable, and long-horizon stable futures.
en.motivation: Current world models along 2D video generation, 3D scene reconstruction, and JEPA latent routes lack physical reliability, action controllability, and long-horizon stability for embodied decision making.
en.method: Encode observations into a latent phase space, evolve the latent state using Hamiltonian dynamics with control, dissipation, and residual terms, and decode predicted trajectories for planning.
en.result: Theoretically improves interpretability, data efficiency, and long-horizon stability, but faces practical challenges in real-world robotics with friction, contact, non-conservative forces, and deformable objects.
en.help_to_user: Provides a physically grounded world model framework to help users build more reliable and interpretable embodied AI systems.

idea_spark.idea: Explicitly model non-conservative forces (e.g., friction, contact) as dissipation terms and introduce residual networks to compensate for unmodeled dynamics.
idea_spark.risk: Accurate Hamiltonian structure is hard to obtain in real-world scenarios; approximations may introduce model bias.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining Hamiltonian mechanics with deep learning provides physical priors for world models, potentially overcoming the physical consistency bottleneck of current generative models.

papers.title: MSACT: Multistage Spatial Alignment for Stable Low-Latency Fine Manipulation
papers.summary: Real-world fine manipulation, particularly in bimanual manipulation, typically requires low-latency control and stable visual localization, while collecting large-scale data is costly and limited demonstrations may lead to localization drift. Existing approaches make different trade-offs: action-chunking policies such as ACT enable low-latency execution and data efficiency but rely on dense visual features without explicit spatial consistency, generative methods such as Diffusion Policy improve expressiveness but can incur iterative sampling latency, vision-language-action and voxel-based methods enhance generalization and geometric grounding but require higher computational cost and system complexity. We introduce a multistage spatial attention module that extracts stable 2D attention points and jointly predicts future attention sequences with a temporal alignment loss. Built upon ACT with a pretrained ResNet visual prior, a multistage attention module extracts task-relevant 2D attention points as a local spatial modality for action prediction. To maintain consistent object tracking, we introduce a self-supervised objective that aligns predicted attention sequences with visual features from future frames, suppressing drift without keypoint annotations and improving stability of the vision-to-action mapping under limited data. Experiments on simulated and real-world fine manipulation tasks, conducted on the ALOHA bimanual platform, evaluate task success, attention drift, inference latency, and robustness to visual disturbances. Results indicate improvements in localization stability and task performance while maintaining low-latency inference under the tested conditions.

ai.tldr: 提出MSACT方法，通过多阶段空间注意力模块和时序对齐损失，在低延迟下实现稳定的精细操作。
ai.motivation: 真实世界精细操作需要低延迟控制和稳定视觉定位，但数据收集成本高且演示有限易导致定位漂移。
ai.method: 在ACT基础上引入多阶段空间注意力模块，提取稳定的2D注意力点并联合预测未来注意力序列，通过自监督时序对齐损失抑制漂移。
ai.result: 在ALOHA平台上的模拟和真实实验中，定位稳定性和任务性能提升，同时保持低延迟推理。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种在有限数据下实现稳定低延迟精细操作的视觉-动作映射方法。

idea_spark.idea: 利用注意力序列预测作为显式空间模态，结合时序对齐损失，无需关键点标注即可抑制漂移。
idea_spark.risk: 注意力点提取可能受视觉干扰影响，且对复杂场景泛化性需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将视觉注意力作为可预测的中间表示，为低延迟控制提供稳定空间线索。

en.tldr: MSACT introduces a multistage spatial attention module with temporal alignment loss for stable low-latency fine manipulation. It extracts 2D attention points and predicts future attention sequences to suppress drift without keypoint annotations.
en.motivation: Real-world fine manipulation requires low-latency control and stable visual localization, but data collection is costly and limited demonstrations cause localization drift.
en.method: Built upon ACT with a pretrained ResNet, a multistage attention module extracts task-relevant 2D attention points and jointly predicts future attention sequences with a self-supervised temporal alignment loss.
en.result: Experiments on ALOHA platform show improved localization stability and task performance while maintaining low-latency inference.
en.help_to_user: Provides a method for stable vision-to-action mapping under limited data for low-latency fine manipulation.

idea_spark.idea: Use attention sequence prediction as an explicit spatial modality with temporal alignment loss to suppress drift without keypoint annotations.
idea_spark.risk: Attention point extraction may be affected by visual disturbances, and generalization to complex scenes needs further validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Treat visual attention as a predictable intermediate representation to provide stable spatial cues for low-latency control.

papers.title: REALM: An RGB and Event Aligned Latent Manifold for Cross-Modal Perception
papers.summary: Event cameras provide several unique advantages over standard frame-based sensors, including high temporal resolution, low latency, and robustness to extreme lighting. However, existing learning-based approaches for event processing are typically confined to narrow, task-specific silos and lack the ability to generalize across modalities. We address this gap with REALM, a cross-modal framework that learns an RGB and Event Aligned Latent Manifold by projecting event representations into the pretrained latent space of RGB foundation models. Instead of task-specific training, we leverage low-rank adaptation (LoRA) to bridge the modality gap, effectively unlocking the geometric and semantic priors of frozen RGB backbones for asynchronous event streams. We demonstrate that REALM effectively maps events into the ViT-based foundation latent space. Our method allows us to perform downstream tasks like depth estimation and semantic segmentation by simply transferring linear heads trained on the RGB teacher. Most significantly, REALM enables the direct, zero-shot application of complex, frozen image-trained decoders, such as MASt3R, to raw event data. We demonstrate state-of-the-art performance in wide-baseline feature matching, significantly outperforming specialized architectures. Code and models are available upon acceptance.

ai.tldr: 提出REALM框架，通过低秩适配将事件数据映射到RGB基础模型的潜空间，实现跨模态感知，并在零样本条件下完成深度估计、语义分割和宽基线特征匹配等任务。
ai.motivation: 现有事件处理方法局限于特定任务，缺乏跨模态泛化能力。
ai.method: 利用低秩适配（LoRA）将事件表示投影到预训练RGB基础模型的潜空间，形成对齐的潜流形。
ai.result: 在宽基线特征匹配上达到最先进性能，零样本应用图像训练解码器（如MASt3R）到原始事件数据。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何利用预训练RGB模型处理事件相机数据，实现零样本跨模态任务。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将事件流的时间信息与RGB空间信息在潜空间更紧密融合，例如通过时序注意力机制。
idea_spark.risk: 零样本迁移可能在某些极端场景（如极低光照）下性能下降，需要领域微调。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受预训练视觉基础模型强大表征能力启发，思考如何让非RGB传感器也能受益于这些模型。

en.tldr: REALM learns an RGB and Event Aligned Latent Manifold via low-rank adaptation, enabling zero-shot cross-modal perception for tasks like depth estimation and feature matching.
en.motivation: Existing event processing methods are task-specific and lack cross-modal generalization.
en.method: Uses low-rank adaptation (LoRA) to project event representations into the pretrained latent space of RGB foundation models.
en.result: Achieves state-of-the-art performance in wide-baseline feature matching and zero-shot application of image-trained decoders to event data.
en.help_to_user: Helps users leverage pretrained RGB models for event camera data, enabling zero-shot cross-modal tasks.

idea_spark.idea: Explore tighter fusion of event temporal information with RGB spatial information in the latent space, e.g., via temporal attention.
idea_spark.risk: Zero-shot transfer may degrade in extreme conditions (e.g., very low light), requiring domain fine-tuning.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the powerful representations of pretrained visual foundation models, considering how non-RGB sensors can also benefit.

keywords_raw: rgb and event aligned latent manifold

papers.title: An End-to-End Decision-Aware Multi-Scale Attention-Based Model for Explainable Autonomous Driving
papers.summary: The application of computer vision is gradually increasing across various domains. They employ deep learning models with a black-box nature. Without the ability to explain the behavior of neural networks, especially their decision-making processes, it is not possible to recognize their efficiency, predict system failures, or effectively implement them in real-world applications. Due to the inevitable use of deep learning in fully automated driving systems, many methods have been proposed to explain their behavior; however, they suffer from flawed reasoning and unreliable metrics, which have prevented a comprehensive understanding of complex models in autonomous vehicles and hindered the development of truly reliable systems. In this study, we propose a multi-scale attention-based model in which driving decisions are fed into the reasoning component to provide case-specific explanations for each decision simultaneously. For quantitative evaluation of our model's performance, we employ the F1-score metric, and also proposed a new metric called the Joint F1 score to demonstrate the accurate and reliable performance of the model in terms of Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI). In addition to the BDD-OIA dataset, the nu-AR dataset is utilized to further validate the generalization capability and robustness of the proposed network. The results demonstrate the superiority of our reasoning network over the classic and state-of-the-art models.

ai.tldr: 提出一种端到端的多尺度注意力模型，将驾驶决策输入推理组件，同时为每个决策提供具体解释，并在BDD-OIA和nu-AR数据集上验证了其优越性。
ai.motivation: 现有自动驾驶深度学习模型缺乏可解释性，导致无法评估效率、预测故障或可靠部署。
ai.method: 构建多尺度注意力网络，将驾驶决策馈入推理模块，同步生成决策对应的案例级解释；采用F1分数和新提出的联合F1分数进行量化评估。
ai.result: 在BDD-OIA和nu-AR数据集上，所提推理网络在可解释AI性能上优于经典和最新模型。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解自动驾驶系统的决策依据，提升对模型可靠性的信任。

idea_spark.idea: 将决策作为解释的输入而非输出，实现解释与决策的同步生成。
idea_spark.risk: 联合F1分数可能对特定数据集过拟合，需在更多真实驾驶场景中验证泛化性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从“决策引导解释”的思路出发，可启发其他领域（如医疗诊断）构建可解释的端到端系统。

idea_spark.inspiration: 从“决策引导解释”的思路出发，可启发其他领域（如医疗诊断）构建可解释的端到端系统。

en.tldr: Proposes an end-to-end multi-scale attention model that feeds driving decisions into the reasoning component to provide case-specific explanations for each decision, validated on BDD-OIA and nu-AR datasets.
en.motivation: Existing deep learning models for autonomous driving lack interpretability, hindering efficiency assessment, failure prediction, and reliable deployment.
en.method: Builds a multi-scale attention network that feeds driving decisions into the reasoning module to simultaneously generate case-level explanations; uses F1-score and a novel Joint F1 score for quantitative evaluation.
en.result: The proposed reasoning network outperforms classic and state-of-the-art models on BDD-OIA and nu-AR datasets in terms of explainable AI performance.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand the decision-making basis of autonomous driving systems, enhancing trust in model reliability.

idea_spark.idea: Using decisions as input to explanations rather than output, enabling synchronized generation of explanations and decisions.
idea_spark.risk: The Joint F1 score may overfit to specific datasets; generalization needs further validation in more real-world driving scenarios.
idea_spark.inspiration: The 'decision-guided explanation' approach can inspire building explainable end-to-end systems in other domains (e.g., medical diagnosis).

papers.title: Rethinking Network Topologies for Cost-Effective Mixture-of-Experts LLM Serving
papers.summary: Mixture-of-experts (MoE) architectures have turned LLM serving into a cluster-scale workload in which communication consumes a considerable portion of LLM serving runtime. This has prompted industry to invest heavily in expensive high-bandwidth scale-up networks. We question whether such costly infrastructure is strictly necessary. We present the first systematic cross-layer analysis of network cost-effectiveness for MoE LLM serving, comparing four representative XPU (e.g., GPU/TPU) topologies (scale-up, scale-out, 3D torus, and 3D full-mesh). We find that lower-cost switchless topologies are more cost-effective than the scale-up topology across all serving scenarios explored, improving cost-effectiveness by 20.6-56.2%. In particular, the 3D full-mesh topology is Pareto-optimal in terms of the performance-cost tradeoff. We also find that current scale-up link bandwidths are over-provisioned: reducing the link bandwidth improves throughput per cost by up to 27%. A forward-looking analysis of upcoming GPU generations indicates that the cost-performance advantage of switchless networks will likely persist.

ai.tldr: 本文首次系统分析了混合专家（MoE）大语言模型服务中网络拓扑的成本效益，发现低成本无交换机拓扑（如3D全网格）比昂贵的scale-up拓扑更优，且当前scale-up链路带宽存在过度配置。
ai.motivation: MoE架构使LLM服务成为集群级工作负载，通信消耗大量运行时，促使行业投资昂贵的高带宽scale-up网络，但本文质疑这种高成本基础设施的必要性。
ai.method: 对四种代表性XPU拓扑（scale-up、scale-out、3D torus、3D full-mesh）进行跨层成本效益分析，并评估链路带宽缩减的影响。
ai.result: 无交换机拓扑在所有场景下成本效益提升20.6-56.2%，3D全网格在性能-成本权衡中帕累托最优；降低链路带宽可使每成本吞吐量提升高达27%。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解MoE LLM服务中网络拓扑的选择策略，避免过度投资高带宽网络，从而降低部署成本。

idea_spark.idea: 探索在MoE服务中动态调整链路带宽或使用混合拓扑（如部分无交换机）以进一步优化成本效益。
idea_spark.risk: 实际部署中可能面临网络拥塞、负载均衡挑战，以及未来GPU代际变化对结论的影响。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发研究者重新审视现有网络基础设施的过度配置，推动更经济高效的集群网络设计。

en.tldr: This paper presents the first systematic cross-layer analysis of network cost-effectiveness for MoE LLM serving, finding that low-cost switchless topologies (e.g., 3D full-mesh) outperform expensive scale-up topologies, and current scale-up link bandwidths are over-provisioned.
en.motivation: MoE architectures make LLM serving a cluster-scale workload with significant communication overhead, prompting heavy investment in costly high-bandwidth scale-up networks; this work questions the necessity of such expensive infrastructure.
en.method: Conducts a cross-layer cost-effectiveness analysis of four representative XPU topologies (scale-up, scale-out, 3D torus, 3D full-mesh) and evaluates the impact of reducing link bandwidth.
en.result: Switchless topologies improve cost-effectiveness by 20.6-56.2% across all scenarios; 3D full-mesh is Pareto-optimal; reducing link bandwidth improves throughput per cost by up to 27%.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand network topology selection strategies for MoE LLM serving, avoiding over-investment in high-bandwidth networks and reducing deployment costs.

idea_spark.idea: Explore dynamically adjusting link bandwidth or using hybrid topologies (e.g., partially switchless) to further optimize cost-effectiveness in MoE serving.
idea_spark.risk: Practical deployment may face challenges such as network congestion, load balancing, and the impact of future GPU generations on the conclusions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires researchers to re-examine over-provisioning in existing network infrastructure and promote more cost-efficient cluster network designs.

papers.title: PhysEdit: Physically-Consistent Region-Aware Image Editing via Adaptive Spatio-Temporal Reasoning
papers.summary: Image editing instructions are heterogeneous: a color swap, an object insertion, and a physical-action edit all demand different spatial coverage and different reasoning depth, yet existing reasoning-based editors apply a single fixed inference recipe to every instruction. We argue that adaptivity along both the spatial and temporal axes is the missing degree of freedom, and we present PhysEdit, an editing framework built around this principle. PhysEdit introduces two inference-time modules that compose without retraining the backbone. At its core, (1) Complexity-Adaptive Reasoning Depth (CARD) predicts edit complexity directly from the instruction and reference image and allocates the reasoning step count N_r and reasoning-token length r per sample -- turning a previously fixed inference schedule into a conditional-computation problem. CARD is supported by (2) a Spatial Reasoning Mask (SRM) that extracts an instruction-conditioned spatial prior from cross-attention to confine reasoning to regions that semantically require it. On the full 737-case ImgEdit Basic-Edit Suite, PhysEdit delivers a 1.18x wall-clock speedup (64.3s vs. 76.1s per sample) over a strong reasoning baseline while slightly improving instruction adherence (CLIP-T 0.2283 vs. 0.2266, +0.7%) and matching identity preservation within noise (CLIP-I 0.8246 vs. 0.8280). The speedup is category-dependent and reaches 1.52x on appearance-level edits, validating CARD's adaptive allocation as the principal source of efficiency gain. A 30-sample pilot with full ablations isolates the contribution of each module.

ai.tldr: 提出PhysEdit框架，通过自适应时空推理实现物理一致的区域感知图像编辑，在保持编辑质量的同时加速推理。
ai.motivation: 现有推理型编辑器对所有指令采用固定推理策略，忽略了不同编辑指令在空间覆盖和推理深度上的异构需求。
ai.method: 引入两个无需重训练骨干的推理时模块：复杂度自适应推理深度（CARD）根据指令和参考图像预测编辑复杂度并动态分配推理步数和推理令牌长度；空间推理掩码（SRM）从交叉注意力中提取指令条件空间先验，将推理限制在语义相关区域。
ai.result: 在ImgEdit Basic-Edit Suite上，PhysEdit相比强推理基线实现1.18倍加速（每样本64.3秒 vs 76.1秒），指令遵循度提升0.7%（CLIP-T 0.2283 vs 0.2266），身份保持基本持平（CLIP-I 0.8246 vs 0.8280），外观级编辑加速达1.52倍。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户更高效地执行物理一致的图像编辑，特别是需要不同推理深度的复杂编辑任务。

idea_spark.idea: 将CARD和SRM扩展到视频编辑，实现帧间自适应推理以保持时间一致性。
idea_spark.risk: 自适应推理可能引入额外计算开销，需平衡加速与质量；空间掩码可能过度限制推理区域导致遗漏全局上下文。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从指令异构性出发，将固定推理调度转化为条件计算问题，启发其他领域（如自然语言处理）的自适应推理设计。
