zh.motivation: 解耦的规范-旋转范式存在空间错位和变换歧义，难以生成姿态对齐的3D物体。
zh.method: 将单目深度反投影为部分点云作为3D几何锚点，注入扩散模型，在观测空间直接生成3D几何，放弃规范假设。
zh.result: 在几何对齐和图像到3D对应上优于现有方法，并自然扩展到组合场景重建。
zh.help_to_user: 提供一种无需规范空间假设、直接生成姿态对齐3D物体的新方法，简化流程并提升对齐精度。

idea_spark.idea: 结合多视角深度信息或时序深度，进一步提升复杂场景下的姿态对齐鲁棒性。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖单目深度估计质量，深度误差可能影响生成几何的准确性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 放弃规范空间、直接在观测空间生成的思想，可启发其他领域（如人体姿态生成）的端到端方法设计。

en.tldr: Proposes PAD, an end-to-end diffusion framework that generates 3D geometry directly in observation space by unprojecting monocular depth into a point cloud anchor, eliminating pose ambiguity for high-fidelity pose alignment.
en.motivation: Decoupled canonical-then-rotate paradigms suffer from spatial mismatches and transformation ambiguities, making pose-aligned 3D generation challenging.
en.method: Unprojects monocular depth into a partial point cloud as a 3D geometric anchor, injects it into the diffusion model, and generates 3D geometry directly in observation space without canonical assumptions.
en.result: Achieves superior geometric alignment and image-to-3D correspondence over state-of-the-art methods, and naturally extends to compositional scene reconstruction.
en.help_to_user: Provides a new method for generating pose-aligned 3D objects without canonical space assumptions, simplifying the pipeline and improving alignment accuracy.

idea_spark.idea: Incorporate multi-view depth or temporal depth to further improve pose alignment robustness in complex scenes.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on monocular depth estimation quality; depth errors may affect the accuracy of generated geometry.
idea_spark.inspiration: The idea of abandoning canonical space and generating directly in observation space can inspire end-to-end method design in other domains, such as human pose generation.

papers.title: Budget-Aware Routing for Long Clinical Text
papers.summary: A key challenge for large language models is token cost per query and overall deployment cost. Clinical inputs are long, heterogeneous, and often redundant, while downstream tasks are short and high stakes. We study budgeted context selection, where a subset of document units is chosen under a strict token budget so an off-the-shelf generator can meet fixed cost and latency constraints. We cast this as a knapsack-constrained subset selection problem with two design choices, unitization that defines document segmentation and selection that determines which units are kept.   We propose \textbf{RCD}, a monotone submodular objective that balances relevance, coverage, and diversity. We compare sentence, section, window, and cluster-based unitization, and introduce a routing heuristic that adapts to the budget regime. Experiments on MIMIC discharge notes, Cochrane abstracts, and L-Eval show that optimal strategies depend on the evaluation setting. Positional heuristics perform best at low budgets in extractive tasks, while diversity-aware methods such as MMR improve LLM generation. Selector choice matters more than unitization, with cluster-based grouping reducing performance and other schemes behaving similarly. ROUGE saturates for LLM summaries, while BERTScore better reflects quality differences. We release our code at https://github.com/stone-technologies/ACL_budget_paper.

ai.tldr: 提出预算感知的临床长文本路由方法，通过子模函数平衡相关性、覆盖度和多样性，在严格token预算下选择文档子集，降低LLM部署成本。
ai.motivation: LLM的token成本和部署成本高，临床文本冗长冗余，而下游任务简短关键，需在固定预算下高效选择上下文。
ai.method: 将问题建模为背包约束的子集选择，设计单调子模目标RCD，比较句子、段落、窗口和聚类四种单元化策略，并引入自适应预算路由启发式。
ai.result: 低预算抽取任务中位置启发式最优，多样性方法（如MMR）提升生成质量；选择器比单元化更重要，聚类分组降低性能；ROUGE饱和而BERTScore更好反映质量差异。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何在预算约束下为LLM选择临床文本子集，降低推理成本而不牺牲生成质量。

idea_spark.idea: 结合强化学习动态调整预算分配，或引入多任务学习同时优化选择与生成。
idea_spark.risk: 子模假设可能不适用于所有临床任务，多样性指标需针对具体下游任务校准。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受背包问题启发，将LLM成本优化转化为组合优化问题，为资源受限场景提供新思路。

zh.tldr: 提出预算感知的临床长文本路由方法，通过子模函数平衡相关性、覆盖度和多样性，在严格token预算下选择文档子集，降低LLM部署成本。
zh.motivation: LLM的token成本和部署成本高，临床文本冗长冗余，而下游任务简短关键，需在固定预算下高效选择上下文。

zh.result: 低预算抽取任务中位置启发式最优，多样性方法（如MMR）提升生成质量；选择器比单元化更重要，聚类分组降低性能；ROUGE饱和而BERTScore更好反映质量差异。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何在预算约束下为LLM选择临床文本子集，降低推理成本而不牺牲生成质量。

idea_spark.idea: 结合强化学习动态调整预算分配，或引入多任务学习同时优化选择与生成。
idea_spark.risk: 子模假设可能不适用于所有临床任务，多样性指标需针对具体下游任务校准。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受背包问题启发，将LLM成本优化转化为组合优化问题，为资源受限场景提供新思路。

en.tldr: Proposes budget-aware routing for long clinical text, using a monotone submodular objective to balance relevance, coverage, and diversity, selecting document subsets under strict token budgets to reduce LLM deployment costs.
en.motivation: LLMs incur high token and deployment costs; clinical inputs are long and redundant while downstream tasks are short and critical, requiring efficient context selection under fixed budgets.
en.method: Formulates as knapsack-constrained subset selection, designs monotone submodular objective RCD, compares sentence, section, window, and cluster unitization, and introduces a budget-adaptive routing heuristic.
en.result: Positional heuristics excel at low budgets in extractive tasks; diversity-aware methods (e.g., MMR) improve generation quality; selector choice matters more than unitization; clustering reduces performance; ROUGE saturates while BERTScore better captures quality differences.
en.help_to_user: Helps users select clinical text subsets for LLMs under budget constraints, reducing inference costs without sacrificing generation quality.

idea_spark.idea: Combine reinforcement learning for dynamic budget allocation, or multi-task learning to jointly optimize selection and generation.
idea_spark.risk: Submodularity assumption may not hold for all clinical tasks; diversity metrics need calibration for specific downstream tasks.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the knapsack problem, reframes LLM cost optimization as combinatorial optimization, offering new insights for resource-constrained scenarios.

papers.title: Efficient Spatio-Temporal Vegetation Pixel Classification with Vision Transformers
papers.summary: Plant phenology-the study of recurrent life cycle events-is essential for understanding ecosystem dynamics and their responses to climate change impacts. While Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) and near-surface cameras enable high-resolution monitoring, identifying plant species across time remains computationally challenging. State-of-the-art approaches, specifically Multi-Temporal Convolutional Networks (CNNs), rely on rigid multi-branch architectures that scale poorly with longer time series and require large spatial context windows. In this paper, we present an extensive study on optimizing Vision Transformers (ViTs) for efficient spatio-temporal vegetation pixel classification. We conducted a comprehensive ablation study analyzing seven key design dimensions, including: (i) data normalization; (ii) spectral arrangement; (iii) boundary handling; (iv) spatial context window shape and size; (v) tokenization strategies; (vi) positional encoding; and (vii) feature aggregation strategies. Our method was evaluated on two datasets from the Brazilian Cerrado biome, Serra do Cipó (aerial imagery) and Itirapina (near-surface imagery). Experimental results demonstrate that our ViT approach offers a substantial improvement in computational efficiency while maintaining competitive classification performance. Notably, our ViT reduces Floating Point Operations (FLOPs) by an order of magnitude and maintains constant parameter complexity regardless of the time series length, whereas the CNN baseline scales linearly. Our findings confirm that ViTs are a robust, scalable solution for resource-constrained phenological monitoring systems.

ai.tldr: 提出使用Vision Transformer进行高效时空植被像素分类，在巴西塞拉多数据集上实现计算量降低一个数量级且性能相当。
ai.motivation: 现有基于多时相CNN的方法扩展性差、计算成本高，难以处理长时间序列和大空间上下文。
ai.method: 系统消融研究优化ViT的七个关键设计维度，包括数据归一化、光谱排列、边界处理、空间上下文窗口形状与大小、令牌化策略、位置编码和特征聚合策略。
ai.result: ViT在保持竞争性分类性能的同时，FLOPs降低一个数量级，参数复杂度不随时间序列长度增加。
ai.help_to_user: 为资源受限的物候监测系统提供了一种鲁棒、可扩展的深度学习解决方案。

idea_spark.idea: 探索自监督预训练或知识蒸馏进一步降低对标注数据的依赖。
idea_spark.risk: ViT在小样本或极端天气条件下可能泛化不足。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合多模态数据（如气象、土壤）增强物候事件预测能力。

zh.motivation: 现有基于多时相CNN的方法扩展性差、计算成本高，难以处理长时间序列和大空间上下文。

zh.result: ViT在保持竞争性分类性能的同时，FLOPs降低一个数量级，参数复杂度不随时间序列长度增加。
zh.help_to_user: 为资源受限的物候监测系统提供了一种鲁棒、可扩展的深度学习解决方案。

idea_spark.idea: 探索自监督预训练或知识蒸馏进一步降低对标注数据的依赖。
idea_spark.risk: ViT在小样本或极端天气条件下可能泛化不足。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合多模态数据（如气象、土壤）增强物候事件预测能力。

en.tldr: Proposes efficient spatio-temporal vegetation pixel classification using Vision Transformers, achieving an order-of-magnitude reduction in FLOPs with competitive performance on Brazilian Cerrado datasets.
en.motivation: Existing multi-temporal CNNs scale poorly with longer time series and require large spatial context windows, leading to high computational cost.
en.method: Conducts a comprehensive ablation study optimizing seven key design dimensions of ViTs: data normalization, spectral arrangement, boundary handling, spatial context window shape/size, tokenization, positional encoding, and feature aggregation.
en.result: ViT reduces FLOPs by an order of magnitude and maintains constant parameter complexity regardless of time series length, while achieving competitive classification accuracy.
en.help_to_user: Provides a robust and scalable deep learning solution for resource-constrained phenological monitoring systems.

idea_spark.idea: Explore self-supervised pre-training or knowledge distillation to further reduce reliance on labeled data.
idea_spark.risk: ViT may underperform with small sample sizes or under extreme weather conditions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Integrate multimodal data (e.g., meteorological, soil) to enhance phenological event prediction.

papers.title: Robust Fusion of Object-Level V2X for Learned 3D Object Detection
papers.summary: Perception for automated driving is largely based on onboard environmental sensors, such as cameras and radar, which are cost-effective but limited by line-of-sight and field-of-view constraints. These inherent limitations may cause onboard perception to fail under occlusions or poor visibility conditions. In parallel, cooperative awareness via vehicle-to-everything (V2X) communication is becoming increasingly available, enabling vehicles and infrastructure to share their own state as object-level information that complements onboard perception. In this work, we study how such V2X information can be integrated into 3D object detection and how robust the resulting system is to realistic V2X imperfections. Using the nuScenes dataset, we emulate object-level cooperative awareness messages from ground truth, injecting controlled noise and object dropout to mimic real-world conditions such as latency, localization errors, and low V2X penetration rates. We convert these messages into a dedicated bird's-eye view (BEV) input and fuse them into a BEVFusion-style detector. Our results demonstrate that while object-level cooperative information can substantially improve detection performance, achieving an NDS of 0.80 under favorable conditions, models trained on idealized data become fragile and over-reliant on V2X. Conversely, our proposed noise-aware training strategy, coupled with explicit confidence encoding, enhances robustness, maintaining performance gains even under severe noise and reduced V2X penetration.

ai.tldr: 研究如何将车联网（V2X）物体级信息融合到3D目标检测中，并提升系统对V2X不完美性的鲁棒性。
ai.motivation: 车载感知受视线和视野限制，在遮挡或能见度差时易失效；V2X通信可提供互补的物体级信息，但实际中存在延迟、定位误差和低渗透率等不完美因素。
ai.method: 基于nuScenes数据集，从真值生成带噪声和物体丢失的V2X消息，转换为专用BEV输入，融合到BEVFusion风格检测器中；提出噪声感知训练策略和显式置信度编码。
ai.result: 理想条件下NDS达0.80；噪声感知训练显著提升鲁棒性，在严重噪声和低V2X渗透率下仍保持性能增益。
ai.help_to_user: 为自动驾驶感知系统设计者提供融合V2X信息并应对实际不完美性的实用方法。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将V2X消息的不确定性（如延迟、定位误差）作为额外输入特征，让模型自适应调整融合权重。
idea_spark.risk: 过度依赖V2X可能导致在无V2X场景下性能骤降；需平衡V2X与车载感知的贡献。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴通信领域的信道编码思想，对V2X消息进行鲁棒编码，使检测器能容忍部分信息丢失。

zh.tldr: 研究如何将车联网（V2X）物体级信息融合到3D目标检测中，并提升系统对V2X不完美性的鲁棒性。

zh.help_to_user: 为自动驾驶感知系统设计者提供融合V2X信息并应对实际不完美性的实用方法。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将V2X消息的不确定性（如延迟、定位误差）作为额外输入特征，让模型自适应调整融合权重。
idea_spark.risk: 过度依赖V2X可能导致在无V2X场景下性能骤降；需平衡V2X与车载感知的贡献。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴通信领域的信道编码思想，对V2X消息进行鲁棒编码，使检测器能容忍部分信息丢失。

en.tldr: Studies how to fuse object-level V2X information into 3D object detection and improve robustness against realistic V2X imperfections.
en.motivation: Onboard perception fails under occlusions or poor visibility; V2X communication provides complementary object-level information but suffers from latency, localization errors, and low penetration rates.
en.method: Using nuScenes dataset, generate noisy V2X messages with object dropout from ground truth, convert to dedicated BEV input, and fuse into a BEVFusion-style detector; propose noise-aware training with explicit confidence encoding.
en.result: Achieves NDS of 0.80 under favorable conditions; noise-aware training significantly improves robustness, maintaining gains under severe noise and low V2X penetration.
en.help_to_user: Provides a practical approach for autonomous driving perception designers to integrate V2X information while handling real-world imperfections.

idea_spark.idea: Explore using V2X message uncertainty (e.g., latency, localization errors) as additional input features to let the model adaptively adjust fusion weights.
idea_spark.risk: Over-reliance on V2X may cause performance drop in V2X-absent scenarios; balance between V2X and onboard perception is needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: Borrow channel coding ideas from communications to robustly encode V2X messages, allowing the detector to tolerate partial information loss.

papers.title: CURE-OOD: Benchmarking Out-of-Distribution Detection for Survival Prediction
papers.summary: ``How long can I live and remain free of cancer?'' is often the first question a patient asks after receiving a cancer diagnosis and treatment. Accurate survival prediction helps alleviate psychological distress and supports risk stratification and personalized treatment planning. Recent survival prediction frameworks have shown strong performance using computed tomography (CT) images. However, variations in imaging acquisition introduce out-of-distribution (OOD) samples caused by covariate shifts that undermine model reliability. Despite this challenge, to our knowledge, no existing benchmark systematically studies OOD detection in cancer survival prediction. To address this gap, we introduce the Cancer sURvival bEnchmark for OOD Detection (CURE-OOD), the first benchmark for systematically evaluating OOD detection in survival prediction under controlled acquisition-induced distribution shifts. CURE-OOD defines scanner-parameter-based training, in-distribution (ID), and OOD test splits across four survival prediction tasks. Our experiments show that covariate shifts notably reduce survival prediction performance. It also shows that mainstream classification-oriented OOD detectors can fail in survival prediction. Finally, we include HazardDev as a simple survival-aware reference baseline for OOD detection. CURE-OOD enables systematic analysis of how distribution shifts affect both downstream survival performance and OOD detectability.

ai.tldr: 提出首个系统评估癌症生存预测中分布外检测的基准CURE-OOD。
ai.motivation: 现有生存预测模型在CT图像上表现良好，但成像采集变化导致的协变量偏移会降低模型可靠性，而缺乏针对癌症生存预测的OOD检测基准。
ai.method: 定义基于扫描仪参数的训练集、分布内和分布外测试划分，涵盖四个生存预测任务，并引入HazardDev作为生存感知的参考基线。
ai.result: 协变量偏移显著降低生存预测性能，主流分类导向的OOD检测器在生存预测中可能失效。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助研究人员系统分析分布偏移对生存预测性能和OOD可检测性的影响。

idea_spark.idea: 开发专门针对生存预测的OOD检测方法，利用生存时间信息增强检测能力。
idea_spark.risk: 基准依赖特定扫描仪参数，可能无法覆盖所有临床场景。
idea_spark.inspiration: 协变量偏移对生存预测的影响提示需要更鲁棒的模型训练策略。

zh.tldr: 提出首个系统评估癌症生存预测中分布外检测的基准CURE-OOD。
zh.motivation: 现有生存预测模型在CT图像上表现良好，但成像采集变化导致的协变量偏移会降低模型可靠性，而缺乏针对癌症生存预测的OOD检测基准。
zh.method: 定义基于扫描仪参数的训练集、分布内和分布外测试划分，涵盖四个生存预测任务，并引入HazardDev作为生存感知的参考基线。
zh.result: 协变量偏移显著降低生存预测性能，主流分类导向的OOD检测器在生存预测中可能失效。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助研究人员系统分析分布偏移对生存预测性能和OOD可检测性的影响。

idea_spark.idea: 开发专门针对生存预测的OOD检测方法，利用生存时间信息增强检测能力。
idea_spark.risk: 基准依赖特定扫描仪参数，可能无法覆盖所有临床场景。
idea_spark.inspiration: 协变量偏移对生存预测的影响提示需要更鲁棒的模型训练策略。

en.tldr: Proposes CURE-OOD, the first benchmark for systematically evaluating out-of-distribution detection in cancer survival prediction.
en.motivation: Existing survival prediction models perform well on CT images, but covariate shifts from imaging acquisition variations undermine reliability, and no benchmark exists for OOD detection in this domain.
en.method: Defines scanner-parameter-based splits for training, in-distribution, and out-of-distribution across four survival tasks, and introduces HazardDev as a survival-aware baseline.
en.result: Covariate shifts notably reduce survival prediction performance, and mainstream classification-oriented OOD detectors can fail in this context.
en.help_to_user: Enables systematic analysis of how distribution shifts affect both downstream survival performance and OOD detectability.

idea_spark.idea: Develop OOD detection methods tailored for survival prediction by leveraging survival time information.
idea_spark.risk: The benchmark relies on specific scanner parameters, which may not cover all clinical scenarios.
idea_spark.inspiration: The impact of covariate shifts on survival prediction suggests the need for more robust training strategies.

papers.title: MemRouter: Memory-as-Embedding Routing for Long-Term Conversational Agents
papers.summary: Long-term conversational agents must decide which turns to store in external memory, yet recent systems rely on autoregressive LLM generation at every turn to make that decision. We present MemRouter, a write-side memory router that decouples memory admission from the downstream answer backbone and replaces per-turn memory-management decoding with an embedding-based routing policy. MemRouter encodes each turn together with recent context, projects the resulting embeddings through a frozen LLM backbone, and predicts whether the turn should be stored using lightweight classification heads while training only 12M parameters. Under a controlled matched-harness comparison on LoCoMo, where the retrieval pipeline, answer prompts, and QA backbone (Qwen2.5-7B) are held identical, MemRouter outperforms an LLM-based memory manager on every question category (overall F1 52.0 vs 45.6, non-overlapping 95% CIs) while reducing memory-management p50 latency from 970ms to 58ms. Descriptive factorial averaging further shows that learned admission improves mean F1 by +10.3 over random storage, category-specific prompting adds +5.2 over a generic prompt, and retrieval contributes +0.7. These results suggest that write-side memory admission can be learned by a small supervised router, while answer generation remains a separate downstream component in long-horizon conversational QA.

ai.tldr: 提出MemRouter，用嵌入路由替代自回归解码进行记忆写入决策，在LoCoMo上F1达52.0，延迟降至58ms。
ai.motivation: 现有长期对话代理每轮使用自回归LLM决定是否存储记忆，计算开销大且与答案生成耦合。
ai.method: 将每轮对话与上下文编码，通过冻结LLM骨干投影嵌入，用轻量分类头预测是否存储，仅训练12M参数。
ai.result: 在LoCoMo上整体F1 52.0 vs 45.6，延迟从970ms降至58ms，学习式准入比随机存储提升F1 +10.3。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户构建高效、低延迟的长期对话记忆管理系统。

idea_spark.idea: 将记忆准入与答案生成解耦，用小型监督路由器替代LLM解码。
idea_spark.risk: 路由器可能无法泛化到未见过的对话模式或长尾场景。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受检索增强生成中路由思想启发，将类似思路应用于记忆写入侧。

en.tldr: MemRouter replaces autoregressive decoding with embedding-based routing for memory admission, achieving F1 52.0 vs 45.6 on LoCoMo and reducing latency to 58ms.
en.motivation: Existing long-term conversational agents use autoregressive LLM generation at every turn to decide memory storage, incurring high computational cost and coupling with answer generation.
en.method: Encodes each turn with context, projects embeddings through a frozen LLM backbone, and uses lightweight classification heads to predict storage, training only 12M parameters.
en.result: On LoCoMo, overall F1 52.0 vs 45.6, latency reduced from 970ms to 58ms, learned admission improves F1 by +10.3 over random storage.
en.help_to_user: Helps users build efficient, low-latency long-term memory management for conversational agents.

idea_spark.idea: Decouple memory admission from answer generation, using a small supervised router instead of LLM decoding.
idea_spark.risk: The router may not generalize to unseen conversation patterns or long-tail scenarios.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by routing ideas in retrieval-augmented generation, applying similar thinking to the memory write side.

papers.title: A11y-Compressor: A Framework for Enhancing the Efficiency of GUI Agent Observations through Visual Context Reconstruction and Redundancy Reduction
papers.summary: AI agents that interact with graphical user interfaces (GUIs) require effective observation representations for reliable grounding. The accessibility tree is a commonly used text-based format that encodes UI element attributes, but it suffers from redundancy and lacks structural information such as spatial relationships among elements. We propose A11y-Compressor, a framework that transforms linearized accessibility trees into compact and structured representations. Our implementation, Compressed-a11y, applies a lightweight and structured transformation pipeline with modal detection, redundancy reduction, and semantic structuring. Experiments on the OSWorld benchmark show that Compressed-a11y reduces input tokens to 22% of the original while improving task success rates by 5.1 percentage points on average.

ai.tldr: 提出A11y-Compressor框架，通过模态检测、冗余消除和语义结构化将线性化无障碍树转换为紧凑结构化表示，在OSWorld基准上减少78%输入token并提升5.1%任务成功率。
ai.motivation: 现有GUI智能体依赖的无障碍树存在冗余且缺乏空间关系等结构信息，影响观察表示的效率和可靠性。
ai.method: 设计轻量级结构化转换流水线，包含模态检测、冗余消除和语义结构化三个步骤，将线性化无障碍树压缩为紧凑表示。
ai.result: 在OSWorld基准上，输入token降至原来的22%，任务成功率平均提升5.1个百分点。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助开发者构建更高效的GUI智能体，减少计算开销同时提升任务完成能力。

idea_spark.idea: 结合视觉特征（如截图）与压缩后的无障碍树，构建多模态观察表示以进一步提升接地准确性。
idea_spark.risk: 过度压缩可能丢失关键UI元素信息，需在压缩率与任务性能间谨慎平衡。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受人类视觉注意力机制启发，智能体应优先关注界面中高信息密度区域，而非全量处理所有元素。

en.tldr: Proposes A11y-Compressor, a framework that transforms linearized accessibility trees into compact structured representations via modal detection, redundancy reduction, and semantic structuring, achieving 78% token reduction and 5.1% average task success improvement on OSWorld.
en.motivation: Existing GUI agents rely on accessibility trees that are redundant and lack structural information like spatial relationships, hindering observation efficiency and reliability.
en.method: A lightweight structured transformation pipeline with three steps: modal detection, redundancy reduction, and semantic structuring, compressing linearized accessibility trees.
en.result: On OSWorld benchmark, input tokens reduced to 22% of original, with average task success rate improved by 5.1 percentage points.
en.help_to_user: Helps developers build more efficient GUI agents by reducing computational overhead while improving task completion.

idea_spark.idea: Combine visual features (e.g., screenshots) with compressed accessibility trees to build multimodal observation representations for better grounding accuracy.
idea_spark.risk: Over-compression may lose critical UI element information; careful balance between compression ratio and task performance is needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by human visual attention, agents should prioritize high-information-density regions of the interface rather than processing all elements exhaustively.

papers.title: Entanglement Enabled Data Transmission over an Arbitrarily Varying Channel
papers.summary: Shared randomness is the central ingredient for stabilizing symmetrizable communication systems against arbitrarily varying jammers. Given the presence of the jammer, however, the question arises how this precious resource could have been distributed. Several works discuss the use of external sources for this task. In this work, we show, based on the most standard optical communication model, how the sender and receiver can employ entangled two-mode squeezed states to counter the jamming attack of an energy-limited jammer during the distribution phase when both the sender and jammer are allowed to use binary phase shift keying and two-mode squeezed vacuum states.

ai.tldr: 利用纠缠双模压缩态在能量受限的干扰下实现任意变化信道上的数据传输。
ai.motivation: 共享随机性是稳定对称化通信系统对抗任意变化干扰的关键，但干扰存在时如何分配这一资源成为问题。
ai.method: 基于标准光通信模型，发送方和接收方使用纠缠双模压缩态，在双方均允许使用二进制相移键控和双模压缩真空态的条件下，对抗能量受限干扰者的干扰。
ai.result: 证明了纠缠态可以在干扰分配阶段有效对抗干扰攻击。
ai.help_to_user: 展示了量子纠缠在对抗通信干扰中的实际应用，为设计抗干扰通信系统提供新思路。

idea_spark.idea: 利用纠缠态在干扰分配阶段建立共享随机性，从而稳定后续通信。
idea_spark.risk: 实际实现中纠缠态的制备和保持可能面临技术挑战。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发研究者探索其他量子资源（如量子密钥分发）在抗干扰通信中的潜力。

idea_spark.inspiration: 启发研究者探索其他量子资源（如量子密钥分发）在抗干扰通信中的潜力。

en.tldr: Using entangled two-mode squeezed states to enable data transmission over an arbitrarily varying channel under energy-limited jamming.
en.motivation: Shared randomness is essential for stabilizing symmetrizable communication systems against arbitrarily varying jammers, but distributing it in the presence of a jammer is challenging.
en.method: Based on a standard optical communication model, the sender and receiver employ entangled two-mode squeezed states, with both sender and jammer allowed to use binary phase shift keying and two-mode squeezed vacuum states, to counter the jamming attack during the distribution phase.
en.result: Demonstrated that entangled states can effectively counter jamming attacks during the distribution phase.
en.help_to_user: Shows a practical application of quantum entanglement in combating communication jamming, offering new ideas for designing anti-jamming communication systems.

idea_spark.idea: Use entangled states to establish shared randomness during the jamming distribution phase, thereby stabilizing subsequent communication.
idea_spark.risk: Practical implementation may face challenges in generating and maintaining entangled states.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires exploration of other quantum resources, such as quantum key distribution, in anti-jamming communications.

papers.title: Quantitative symmetry-breaking and nonlinear harmonic generation in plasmonics
papers.summary: We develop a quantitative mathematical theory that offers new perspectives on nonlinear harmonic generation in plasmonic structures arising from symmetry breaking. Focusing on second harmonic generation--the most fundamental process and the most extensively studied owing to its practical significance--we establish a theoretical framework that can be readily extended to higher-order harmonics. We investigate the plasmonic system in the static regime using a columnar nanowire with \(n\)-fold rotational symmetry (\(n \in \mathbb{N}\)) and construct a phenomenological model in which the second harmonic response originates from nonlinear sources confined to a selvedge region near the surface. By introducing a notion of symmetry degree grounded in group theory, we precisely quantify the second harmonic generation in terms of multipolar contributions. Our theory complements existing physical descriptions of this practically important phenomenon and provides a rigorous account of how nonlinear optical efficiency depends on shape, size, symmetry, and defects in plasmonic structures.

ai.tldr: 本文建立了一个定量数学理论，从对称性破缺角度解释等离激元结构中的非线性谐波产生，重点研究了二次谐波产生。
ai.motivation: 现有理论对等离激元结构中对称性破缺如何影响非线性谐波产生的定量描述不足，需要更精确的数学框架。
ai.method: 利用柱状纳米线的n重旋转对称性，构建基于表面近层非线性源的现象学模型，引入群论中的对称度概念量化多极贡献。
ai.result: 精确量化了二次谐波产生与形状、尺寸、对称性和缺陷的依赖关系，补充了现有物理描述。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解等离激元结构中对称性破缺对非线性光学效率的定量影响，为设计高效非线性纳米光子器件提供理论指导。

idea_spark.idea: 利用对称性破缺设计等离激元纳米结构，实现特定谐波信号的增强或抑制。
idea_spark.risk: 理论模型基于静态近似，可能忽略动态效应或量子效应，需实验验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将群论对称度概念引入其他非线性光学系统，如超表面或光子晶体，可能发现新的调控机制。

idea_spark.risk: 理论模型基于静态近似，可能忽略动态效应或量子效应，需实验验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将群论对称度概念引入其他非线性光学系统，如超表面或光子晶体，可能发现新的调控机制。

en.tldr: This paper develops a quantitative mathematical theory explaining nonlinear harmonic generation in plasmonic structures from symmetry breaking, focusing on second harmonic generation.
en.motivation: Existing theories lack a precise quantitative description of how symmetry breaking affects nonlinear harmonic generation in plasmonic structures.
en.method: Using columnar nanowires with n-fold rotational symmetry, a phenomenological model with nonlinear sources in a selvedge region is constructed, and a group-theoretic symmetry degree quantifies multipolar contributions.
en.result: The theory precisely quantifies the dependence of second harmonic generation on shape, size, symmetry, and defects, complementing existing physical descriptions.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand the quantitative impact of symmetry breaking on nonlinear optical efficiency in plasmonics, guiding the design of efficient nonlinear nanophotonic devices.

idea_spark.idea: Exploit symmetry breaking in plasmonic nanostructures to enhance or suppress specific harmonic signals.
idea_spark.risk: The model relies on static approximation, potentially neglecting dynamic or quantum effects; experimental validation is needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: Introducing group-theoretic symmetry degree into other nonlinear optical systems, such as metasurfaces or photonic crystals, may reveal new control mechanisms.

papers.title: Estimating LLM Grading Ability and Response Difficulty in Automatic Short Answer Grading via Item Response Theory
papers.summary: Automated short answer grading (ASAG) with large language models (LLMs) is commonly evaluated with aggregate metrics such as macro-F1 and Cohen's kappa. However, these metrics provide limited insight into how grading performance varies across student responses of differing grading difficulty. We introduce an evaluation framework for LLM-based ASAG based on item response theory (IRT), which models grading correctness as a function of latent grader ability and response grading difficulty. This formulation enables response-level analysis of where LLM graders succeed or fail and reveals robustness differences that are not visible from aggregate scores alone. We apply the framework to 17 open-weight LLMs on the SciEntsBank and Beetle benchmarks. The results show that even models with similar overall performance differ substantially in how sharply their grading accuracy declines as response difficulty increases. In addition, confusion patterns show that errors on difficult responses concentrate disproportionately on the \texttt{partially\_correct\_incomplete} label, indicating a tendency toward intermediate-label collapse under ambiguity. To characterize difficult responses, we further analyze semantic and linguistic correlates of estimated difficulty. Across both datasets, higher difficulty is associated with weaker semantic alignment to the reference answer, stronger contradiction signals, and greater semantic isolation in embedding space. Overall, these results show that item response theory offers a useful framework for evaluating LLM-based ASAG beyond aggregate performance measures.

ai.tldr: 提出基于项目反应理论（IRT）的评估框架，用于分析大语言模型在自动简答题评分中的表现差异，发现不同模型在应对不同难度题目时的鲁棒性差异，并揭示困难回答的特征。
ai.motivation: 现有聚合指标（如宏F1、Cohen's kappa）无法揭示评分性能在不同难度回答上的变化，需要更细粒度的评估方法。
ai.method: 将IRT应用于LLM评分，建模评分正确性为潜在评分者能力和回答难度的函数，并在SciEntsBank和Beetle基准上测试17个开源LLM。
ai.result: 即使总体性能相似的模型，其评分准确率随难度下降的幅度差异显著；困难回答的错误集中在部分正确/不完整标签，呈现中间标签崩溃；困难回答与参考答案语义对齐弱、矛盾信号强、嵌入空间孤立相关。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解LLM评分在哪些回答上容易失败，以及如何通过IRT框架进行更深入的评估。

idea_spark.idea: 结合IRT和主动学习，自动选择最具信息量的回答进行人工标注，以提升LLM评分模型的训练效率。
idea_spark.risk: IRT假设可能不完全适用于LLM的非线性行为，且难度估计可能受基准数据分布影响。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从心理测量学引入IRT，为LLM评估提供了超越聚合指标的视角，启发在其他NLP任务中应用类似潜变量模型。

zh.tldr: 提出基于项目反应理论（IRT）的评估框架，用于分析大语言模型在自动简答题评分中的表现差异，发现不同模型在应对不同难度题目时的鲁棒性差异，并揭示困难回答的特征。
zh.motivation: 现有聚合指标（如宏F1、Cohen's kappa）无法揭示评分性能在不同难度回答上的变化，需要更细粒度的评估方法。
zh.method: 将IRT应用于LLM评分，建模评分正确性为潜在评分者能力和回答难度的函数，并在SciEntsBank和Beetle基准上测试17个开源LLM。
zh.result: 即使总体性能相似的模型，其评分准确率随难度下降的幅度差异显著；困难回答的错误集中在部分正确/不完整标签，呈现中间标签崩溃；困难回答与参考答案语义对齐弱、矛盾信号强、嵌入空间孤立相关。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解LLM评分在哪些回答上容易失败，以及如何通过IRT框架进行更深入的评估。

idea_spark.idea: 结合IRT和主动学习，自动选择最具信息量的回答进行人工标注，以提升LLM评分模型的训练效率。
idea_spark.risk: IRT假设可能不完全适用于LLM的非线性行为，且难度估计可能受基准数据分布影响。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从心理测量学引入IRT，为LLM评估提供了超越聚合指标的视角，启发在其他NLP任务中应用类似潜变量模型。

en.tldr: Proposes an item response theory (IRT) framework to evaluate LLM-based automatic short answer grading, revealing robustness differences across models and characterizing difficult responses.
en.motivation: Aggregate metrics like macro-F1 and Cohen's kappa provide limited insight into how grading performance varies with response difficulty.
en.method: Models grading correctness as a function of latent grader ability and response difficulty using IRT, applied to 17 open-weight LLMs on SciEntsBank and Beetle benchmarks.
en.result: Models with similar overall performance differ in accuracy decline as difficulty increases; errors on difficult responses concentrate on the partially_correct_incomplete label; difficulty correlates with weaker semantic alignment, stronger contradiction, and greater embedding isolation.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand where LLM graders fail and how to evaluate them beyond aggregate metrics.

idea_spark.idea: Combine IRT with active learning to select the most informative responses for human annotation, improving LLM grading model training efficiency.
idea_spark.risk: IRT assumptions may not fully capture LLM nonlinear behavior, and difficulty estimates may depend on benchmark data distribution.
idea_spark.inspiration: Introducing IRT from psychometrics offers a perspective beyond aggregate metrics for LLM evaluation, inspiring similar latent variable models in other NLP tasks.

papers.title: On the Role of Artificial Intelligence in Human-Machine Symbiosis
papers.summary: The evolution of artificial intelligence (AI) has rendered the boundary between humanity and computational machinery increasingly ambiguous. In the presence of more interwoven relationships within human-machine symbiosis, the very notion of AI-generated information becomes difficult to define, as such information arises not from either humans or machines in isolation, but from their mutual shaping. Therefore, a more pertinent question lies not merely in whether AI has participated, but in how it has participated. In general, the role assumed by AI is often specified, either implicitly or explicitly, in the input prompt, yet becomes less apparent or altogether unobservable when the generated content alone is available. Once detached from the dialogue context, the functional role may no longer be traceable. This study considers the problem of tracing the functional role played by AI in natural language generation. A methodology is proposed to infer the latent role specified by the prompt, embed this role into the content during the probabilistic generation process and subsequently recover the nature of AI participation from the resulting text. Experimentation is conducted under a representative scenario in which AI acts either as an assistive agent that edits human-written content or as a creative agent that generates new content from a brief concept. The experimental results support the validity of the proposed methodology in terms of discrimination between roles, robustness against perturbations and preservation of linguistic quality. We envision that this study may contribute to future research on the ethics of AI with regard to whether AI has been used fairly, transparently and appropriately.

ai.tldr: 研究在人类-机器共生中追踪AI在自然语言生成中的功能角色，提出一种从文本中推断并恢复AI参与角色的方法。
ai.motivation: 随着AI与人类关系日益交织，AI生成的信息难以界定，需要明确AI在生成过程中的具体角色。
ai.method: 通过提示词推断AI的潜在角色，在概率生成过程中嵌入该角色，随后从生成的文本中恢复AI的参与性质。
ai.result: 在辅助编辑与创意生成两种场景下，方法能有效区分角色、抵抗扰动并保持语言质量。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解AI在文本生成中的实际作用，促进AI使用的公平、透明和适当性。

idea_spark.idea: 开发一个通用框架，自动标注AI在生成过程中的参与程度和类型，用于内容审核和伦理评估。
idea_spark.risk: 角色推断可能被对抗性攻击误导，导致误判；过度依赖自动追踪可能忽视人类意图的复杂性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴数字水印或隐写术思想，在生成内容中嵌入不可见的角色标记，实现事后可验证的AI参与记录。

zh.motivation: 随着AI与人类关系日益交织，AI生成的信息难以界定，需要明确AI在生成过程中的具体角色。
zh.method: 通过提示词推断AI的潜在角色，在概率生成过程中嵌入该角色，随后从生成的文本中恢复AI的参与性质。
zh.result: 在辅助编辑与创意生成两种场景下，方法能有效区分角色、抵抗扰动并保持语言质量。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解AI在文本生成中的实际作用，促进AI使用的公平、透明和适当性。

idea_spark.idea: 开发一个通用框架，自动标注AI在生成过程中的参与程度和类型，用于内容审核和伦理评估。
idea_spark.risk: 角色推断可能被对抗性攻击误导，导致误判；过度依赖自动追踪可能忽视人类意图的复杂性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴数字水印或隐写术思想，在生成内容中嵌入不可见的角色标记，实现事后可验证的AI参与记录。

en.tldr: This study addresses tracing the functional role of AI in natural language generation within human-machine symbiosis, proposing a method to infer and recover the role from generated text.
en.motivation: As AI and humans become more intertwined, the boundary of AI-generated information blurs, necessitating a clear understanding of AI's specific role in the generation process.
en.method: The latent role specified by the prompt is inferred, embedded into the content during probabilistic generation, and subsequently recovered from the resulting text.
en.result: In scenarios of assistive editing and creative generation, the method effectively discriminates roles, resists perturbations, and preserves linguistic quality.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand the actual role of AI in text generation, promoting fair, transparent, and appropriate use of AI.

idea_spark.idea: Develop a general framework to automatically annotate the degree and type of AI involvement in generated content for content review and ethical assessment.
idea_spark.risk: Role inference may be misled by adversarial attacks, causing misjudgment; over-reliance on automatic tracing may overlook the complexity of human intent.
idea_spark.inspiration: Borrow ideas from digital watermarking or steganography to embed invisible role markers in generated content for verifiable records of AI participation.

papers.title: Beyond Heuristics: Learnable Density Control for 3D Gaussian Splatting
papers.summary: While 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has demonstrated impressive real-time rendering performance, its efficacy remains constrained by a reliance on heuristic density control. Despite numerous refinements to these handcrafted rules, such methods inherently lack the flexibility to adapt to diverse scenes with complex geometries.   In this paper, we propose a paradigm shift for density control from rigid heuristics to fully learnable policies. Specifically, we introduce \textbf{LeGS}, a framework that reformulates density control as a parameterized policy network optimized via Reinforcement Learning (RL). Central to our approach is the tailored effective reward function grounded in sensitivity analysis, which precisely quantifies the marginal contribution of individual Gaussians to reconstruction quality. To maintain computational tractability, we derive a closed-form solution that reduces the complexity of reward calculation from $O(N^2)$ to $O(N)$. Extensive experiments on the Mip-NeRF 360, Tanks \& Temples, and Deep Blending datasets demonstrate that \textbf{LeGS} significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods, striking a superior balance between reconstruction quality and efficiency. The code will be released at https://github.com/AaronNZH/LeGS

ai.tldr: 提出LeGS框架，将3D高斯溅射中的密度控制从启发式规则转变为基于强化学习的可学习策略，显著提升重建质量与效率。
ai.motivation: 现有3DGS依赖手工设计的启发式密度控制规则，难以适应复杂场景，缺乏灵活性。
ai.method: 将密度控制建模为参数化策略网络，通过强化学习优化；设计基于敏感性分析的奖励函数，并推导闭式解将计算复杂度从O(N²)降至O(N)。
ai.result: 在Mip-NeRF 360、Tanks & Temples和Deep Blending数据集上，LeGS在重建质量和效率上均优于现有方法。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何用强化学习替代启发式规则，提升3D高斯溅射的适应性和性能。

idea_spark.idea: 将密度控制策略与场景内容（如纹理复杂度）动态关联，实现更细粒度的自适应。
idea_spark.risk: 强化学习训练可能不稳定，奖励函数设计不当会导致收敛困难或过拟合。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从敏感性分析获得奖励函数灵感，可启发其他基于梯度或贡献度的优化方法。

zh.tldr: 提出LeGS框架，将3D高斯溅射中的密度控制从启发式规则转变为基于强化学习的可学习策略，显著提升重建质量与效率。
zh.motivation: 现有3DGS依赖手工设计的启发式密度控制规则，难以适应复杂场景，缺乏灵活性。
zh.method: 将密度控制建模为参数化策略网络，通过强化学习优化；设计基于敏感性分析的奖励函数，并推导闭式解将计算复杂度从O(N²)降至O(N)。
zh.result: 在Mip-NeRF 360、Tanks & Temples和Deep Blending数据集上，LeGS在重建质量和效率上均优于现有方法。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何用强化学习替代启发式规则，提升3D高斯溅射的适应性和性能。

idea_spark.idea: 将密度控制策略与场景内容（如纹理复杂度）动态关联，实现更细粒度的自适应。
idea_spark.risk: 强化学习训练可能不稳定，奖励函数设计不当会导致收敛困难或过拟合。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从敏感性分析获得奖励函数灵感，可启发其他基于梯度或贡献度的优化方法。

en.tldr: Proposes LeGS, a framework that transforms density control in 3D Gaussian Splatting from heuristic rules to a learnable policy via reinforcement learning, significantly improving reconstruction quality and efficiency.
en.motivation: Existing 3DGS relies on handcrafted heuristic density control rules that lack flexibility for diverse scenes with complex geometries.
en.method: Formulates density control as a parameterized policy network optimized with reinforcement learning; designs a reward function based on sensitivity analysis and derives a closed-form solution reducing complexity from O(N²) to O(N).
en.result: LeGS outperforms state-of-the-art methods on Mip-NeRF 360, Tanks & Temples, and Deep Blending datasets, achieving a superior balance between reconstruction quality and efficiency.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to replace heuristic rules with reinforcement learning for adaptive density control in 3D Gaussian Splatting.

idea_spark.idea: Dynamically link density control policy with scene content (e.g., texture complexity) for finer-grained adaptation.
idea_spark.risk: RL training may be unstable; improper reward design can lead to convergence issues or overfitting.
idea_spark.inspiration: The sensitivity-based reward function inspires other gradient- or contribution-driven optimization methods.

papers.title: Reflection Symmetry, APS Boundary Conditions, and Equivariant Spectral Flow on a Warped Cylinder
papers.summary: We study reflection symmetry and Atiyah-Patodi-Singer (APS) boundary conditions for twisted Dirac operators on a finite warped cylinder. For a complex line twist with holonomy parameter $A$, we show that the reflection lifts to a unitary symmetry of the twisted Dirac setting if and only if $2A\in\mathbb Z$. In the resulting reflection-compatible fixed-holonomy case, reflection pairs opposite shifted angular modes, and the paired APS blocks are unitarily equivalent. The reflection trace on the APS harmonic space localizes to the unique self-paired zero-mode sector. We then turn to parameter-dependent versions of the model. For fixed gauge-trivial holonomy, the family remains pointwise \(O(2)\)-equivariant, and its spectral flow admits an \(RO(O(2))\)-valued decomposition. For genuinely varying holonomy, pointwise \(O(2)\)-equivariance is lost along the path. The representation-ring-valued invariant is then replaced by a residual sign-level invariant: the mod-two parity of the APS crossing events.

ai.tldr: 研究扭曲狄拉克算子在有限翘曲圆柱上的反射对称性与APS边界条件，发现反射提升为酉对称的条件，并分析了谱流的O(2)等变分解与模二奇偶性。
ai.motivation: 探索反射对称性与APS边界条件在几何拓扑中的相互作用，以及参数变化下谱流的等变不变量。
ai.method: 通过分析扭曲狄拉克算子的模式分解和APS边界条件，利用反射对称性导出酉等价性，并计算谱流的表示环值分解和模二奇偶性。
ai.result: 反射对称性在特定全纯参数下成立，谱流在固定全纯时具有O(2)等变分解，变化全纯时退化为模二奇偶性。
ai.help_to_user: 提供理解反射对称性在边界条件中作用的数学框架，以及谱流等变不变量在参数变化下的行为。

idea_spark.idea: 利用反射对称性简化谱流计算，并引入模二奇偶性作为退化情况下的不变量。
idea_spark.risk: 对称性破缺可能导致不变量信息丢失，需验证模二奇偶性的鲁棒性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将等变谱流分解为表示环值，启发在物理系统中利用对称性分类拓扑相变。

zh.tldr: 研究扭曲狄拉克算子在有限翘曲圆柱上的反射对称性与APS边界条件，发现反射提升为酉对称的条件，并分析了谱流的O(2)等变分解与模二奇偶性。
zh.motivation: 探索反射对称性与APS边界条件在几何拓扑中的相互作用，以及参数变化下谱流的等变不变量。
zh.method: 通过分析扭曲狄拉克算子的模式分解和APS边界条件，利用反射对称性导出酉等价性，并计算谱流的表示环值分解和模二奇偶性。

zh.help_to_user: 提供理解反射对称性在边界条件中作用的数学框架，以及谱流等变不变量在参数变化下的行为。

idea_spark.risk: 对称性破缺可能导致不变量信息丢失，需验证模二奇偶性的鲁棒性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将等变谱流分解为表示环值，启发在物理系统中利用对称性分类拓扑相变。

en.tldr: We study reflection symmetry and APS boundary conditions for twisted Dirac operators on a warped cylinder, showing that reflection lifts to a unitary symmetry under specific holonomy, and the spectral flow admits an O(2)-equivariant decomposition or reduces to mod-two parity.
en.motivation: To understand the interplay between reflection symmetry and APS boundary conditions in geometric topology, and the equivariant invariants of spectral flow under parameter variation.
en.method: By analyzing mode decomposition and APS boundary conditions for twisted Dirac operators, we derive unitary equivalence via reflection symmetry and compute representation-ring-valued spectral flow and mod-two parity.
en.result: Reflection symmetry holds for specific holonomy; spectral flow is O(2)-equivariant for fixed holonomy and reduces to mod-two parity for varying holonomy.
en.help_to_user: Provides a mathematical framework for reflection symmetry in boundary conditions and the behavior of equivariant spectral flow under parameter changes.

idea_spark.idea: Use reflection symmetry to simplify spectral flow calculations and introduce mod-two parity as an invariant in symmetry-broken cases.
idea_spark.risk: Symmetry breaking may cause loss of invariant information; robustness of mod-two parity needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Decomposing equivariant spectral flow into representation-ring values inspires classifying topological phase transitions in physical systems using symmetry.

papers.title: CMTA: Leveraging Cross-Modal Temporal Artifacts for Generalizable AI-Generated Video Detection
papers.summary: The proliferation of advanced AI video synthesis techniques poses an unprecedented challenge to digital video authenticity. Existing AI-generated video (AIGV) detection methods primarily focus on uni-modal or spatiotemporal artifacts, but they overlook the rich cues within the visual-textual cross-modal space, especially the temporal stability of semantic alignment. In this work, we identify a distinctive fingerprint in AIGVs, termed cross-modal temporal artifact (CMTA). Unlike real videos that exhibit natural temporal fluctuations in cross-modal alignment due to semantic variations, AIGVs display unnaturally stable semantic trajectories governed by given input prompts. To bridge this gap, we propose the CMTA framework, a cross-modal detection approach that captures these unique temporal artifacts through joint cross-modal embedding and multi-grained temporal modeling. Specifically, CMTA leverages BLIP to generate frame-level image captions and utilizes CLIP to extract corresponding visual-textual representations. A coarse-grained temporal modeling branch is then designed to characterize temporal fluctuations in cross-modal alignment with a GRU. In parallel, a fine-grained branch is constructed to capture intricate inter-frame variations from integrated visual-textual features with a Transformer encoder. Extensive experiments on 40 subsets across four large-scale datasets, including GenVideo, EvalCrafter, VideoPhy, and VidProM, validate that our approach sets a new state-of-the-art while exhibiting superior cross-generator generalization. Code and models of CMTA will be released at https://github.com/hwang-cs-ime/CMTA

ai.tldr: 提出跨模态时间伪影（CMTA）框架，利用视觉-文本跨模态对齐的时间稳定性差异检测AI生成视频。
ai.motivation: 现有方法忽略跨模态空间中的丰富线索，尤其是语义对齐的时间稳定性。
ai.method: 使用BLIP生成帧级字幕，CLIP提取视觉-文本表示，通过GRU粗粒度分支和Transformer细粒度分支建模跨模态对齐的时间波动。
ai.result: 在四个数据集40个子集上达到新最优，并展现跨生成器泛化能力。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户识别AI生成的虚假视频，提升数字内容真实性验证能力。

idea_spark.idea: 探索利用多模态大模型（如GPT-4V）直接分析视频与字幕的语义一致性随时间的变化。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖预训练模型（BLIP/CLIP）可能引入领域偏差，且对未见过的生成器泛化性需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将时间稳定性作为通用伪造指纹，启发其他模态（如音频）的时序伪造检测。

zh.tldr: 提出跨模态时间伪影（CMTA）框架，利用视觉-文本跨模态对齐的时间稳定性差异检测AI生成视频。
zh.motivation: 现有方法忽略跨模态空间中的丰富线索，尤其是语义对齐的时间稳定性。
zh.method: 使用BLIP生成帧级字幕，CLIP提取视觉-文本表示，通过GRU粗粒度分支和Transformer细粒度分支建模跨模态对齐的时间波动。
zh.result: 在四个数据集40个子集上达到新最优，并展现跨生成器泛化能力。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户识别AI生成的虚假视频，提升数字内容真实性验证能力。

idea_spark.idea: 探索利用多模态大模型（如GPT-4V）直接分析视频与字幕的语义一致性随时间的变化。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖预训练模型（BLIP/CLIP）可能引入领域偏差，且对未见过的生成器泛化性需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将时间稳定性作为通用伪造指纹，启发其他模态（如音频）的时序伪造检测。

en.tldr: Proposes CMTA framework that leverages temporal stability differences in visual-textual cross-modal alignment to detect AI-generated videos.
en.motivation: Existing methods overlook rich cues in cross-modal space, especially temporal stability of semantic alignment.
en.method: Uses BLIP for frame-level captions, CLIP for visual-textual representations, and models cross-modal alignment fluctuations via GRU coarse-grained and Transformer fine-grained branches.
en.result: Achieves new state-of-the-art on 40 subsets across four datasets with superior cross-generator generalization.
en.help_to_user: Helps users identify AI-generated fake videos, enhancing digital content authenticity verification.

idea_spark.idea: Explore using multimodal LLMs (e.g., GPT-4V) to directly analyze semantic consistency between video and captions over time.
idea_spark.risk: Dependence on pretrained models (BLIP/CLIP) may introduce domain bias; generalization to unseen generators needs further validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Treating temporal stability as a universal forgery fingerprint inspires temporal forgery detection in other modalities like audio.

papers.title: SIMON: Saliency-aware Integrative Multi-view Object-centric Neural Decoding
papers.summary: Recent EEG-to-image retrieval methods leverage pretrained vision encoders and foveation-inspired priors, but typically assume a fixed, center-focused view. This center bias conflicts with content-driven human attention, creating a geometric-semantic dissociation between visual features and EEG responses. We propose SIMON, a saliency-aware multi-view framework for zero-shot EEG-to-image retrieval. SIMON combines foreground segmentation and saliency prediction to select fixation centers via Saliency-Aware Sampling (SAS), then generates foveated views that emphasize informative object regions while suppressing background clutter. On THINGS-EEG, SIMON achieves state-of-the-art performance in both intra-subject and inter-subject settings, reaching an average Top-1 accuracy of 69.7% and 19.6%, respectively, consistently outperforming recent competitive baselines. Analyses across sampling granularity, EEG channel topology, and visual/brain encoder backbones further support the robustness of saliency-aware multi-view integration. Our code and models are publicly available at https://github.com/simonlink666/SIMON.

ai.tldr: 提出SIMON框架，利用显著性感知的多视图方法实现零样本EEG到图像检索，在THINGS-EEG上达到SOTA。
ai.motivation: 现有EEG到图像检索方法假设固定中心视图，与人类注意力机制不符，导致视觉特征与EEG响应之间的几何-语义分离。
ai.method: 结合前景分割和显著性预测，通过显著性感知采样选择注视中心，生成强调目标区域并抑制背景的凹形视图。
ai.result: 在THINGS-EEG上，受试者内Top-1准确率69.7%，受试者间19.6%，均优于现有基线。
ai.help_to_user: 为脑机接口和神经解码领域提供一种更符合人类注意机制的图像检索方法。

idea_spark.idea: 将显著性预测与多视图集成结合，用于提升基于脑信号的视觉内容检索。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖显著性预测模型的准确性，可能在不同数据集上泛化不足。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从人类视觉注意机制出发，设计更自然的神经解码框架。

zh.tldr: 提出SIMON框架，利用显著性感知的多视图方法实现零样本EEG到图像检索，在THINGS-EEG上达到SOTA。
zh.motivation: 现有EEG到图像检索方法假设固定中心视图，与人类注意力机制不符，导致视觉特征与EEG响应之间的几何-语义分离。
zh.method: 结合前景分割和显著性预测，通过显著性感知采样选择注视中心，生成强调目标区域并抑制背景的凹形视图。
zh.result: 在THINGS-EEG上，受试者内Top-1准确率69.7%，受试者间19.6%，均优于现有基线。
zh.help_to_user: 为脑机接口和神经解码领域提供一种更符合人类注意机制的图像检索方法。

idea_spark.idea: 将显著性预测与多视图集成结合，用于提升基于脑信号的视觉内容检索。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖显著性预测模型的准确性，可能在不同数据集上泛化不足。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从人类视觉注意机制出发，设计更自然的神经解码框架。

en.tldr: Proposes SIMON, a saliency-aware multi-view framework for zero-shot EEG-to-image retrieval, achieving SOTA on THINGS-EEG.
en.motivation: Existing EEG-to-image retrieval methods assume a fixed center view, conflicting with content-driven human attention and causing geometric-semantic dissociation.
en.method: Combines foreground segmentation and saliency prediction to select fixation centers via Saliency-Aware Sampling, then generates foveated views emphasizing informative object regions.
en.result: On THINGS-EEG, achieves 69.7% Top-1 accuracy intra-subject and 19.6% inter-subject, outperforming recent baselines.
en.help_to_user: Provides a more attention-aligned method for EEG-based image retrieval in brain-computer interfaces and neural decoding.

idea_spark.idea: Combine saliency prediction with multi-view integration to enhance brain-signal-based visual content retrieval.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on accuracy of saliency prediction models, which may generalize poorly across datasets.
idea_spark.inspiration: Draws inspiration from human visual attention mechanisms to design more natural neural decoding frameworks.

papers.title: Joint Accuracy and Confidentiality in Semantic-Aware Secure Remote Reconstruction
papers.summary: In this paper, we consider remote reconstruction over wireless networks when simultaneous accuracy at the legitimate receiver and confidentiality against eavesdropping are required. These two objectives are often treated separately, even though they arise from the same update process and are marginals of a joint reconstruction event. This paper introduces confidential reconstruction accuracy (CRA), a metric to capture the joint event in which the legitimate receiver reconstructs correctly while the eavesdropper fails. Under randomized stationary policies, we develop a three-dimensional stationary analysis and derive closed-form expressions for the long-term average CRA and the optimal transmission probability. The results show that conventional marginal analysis can misidentify the optimal policy and misestimate the achievable simultaneous accuracy-confidentiality performance. They also reveal nontrivial behaviors: more frequent transmissions or better legitimate channels do not necessarily improve joint accurate and confidential reconstruction, and when the eavesdropping channel is strong, improving the legitimate channel alone may be insufficient. Finally, the framework induces the spatial safety boundary in a geofencing setting for secure remote reconstruction.

ai.tldr: 提出联合准确性与保密性的语义感知安全远程重建框架，引入新指标CRA，揭示传统边际分析的不足。
ai.motivation: 现有研究将远程重建的准确性和保密性分开处理，忽略了二者源于同一更新过程且是联合重建事件的边缘分布。
ai.method: 定义保密重建准确率（CRA）作为联合事件度量，采用三维平稳分析推导长期平均CRA和最优传输概率的闭式表达式。
ai.result: 传统边际分析可能误判最优策略和联合性能；更频繁传输或更好合法信道不一定提升联合性能；强窃听信道下仅改善合法信道可能不足。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解无线远程重建中准确性与保密性的权衡，指导安全传输策略设计。

idea_spark.idea: 将CRA框架扩展到动态信道或移动节点场景，或结合强化学习优化传输策略。
idea_spark.risk: 三维平稳分析假设可能不适用于快速变化信道；实际部署需考虑计算复杂度。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从联合事件视角重新审视传统分离优化问题，可能发现新的性能边界和设计空间。

idea_spark.risk: 三维平稳分析假设可能不适用于快速变化信道；实际部署需考虑计算复杂度。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从联合事件视角重新审视传统分离优化问题，可能发现新的性能边界和设计空间。

en.tldr: Proposes a semantic-aware secure remote reconstruction framework that jointly considers accuracy and confidentiality, introducing the CRA metric and revealing limitations of conventional marginal analysis.
en.motivation: Existing work treats accuracy and confidentiality separately, ignoring that they arise from the same update process and are marginals of a joint reconstruction event.
en.method: Defines Confidential Reconstruction Accuracy (CRA) as a joint event metric, develops a three-dimensional stationary analysis, and derives closed-form expressions for long-term average CRA and optimal transmission probability.
en.result: Conventional marginal analysis can misidentify the optimal policy and joint performance; more frequent transmissions or better legitimate channels do not necessarily improve joint performance; improving the legitimate channel alone may be insufficient under strong eavesdropping channels.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the trade-off between accuracy and confidentiality in wireless remote reconstruction and guides secure transmission strategy design.

idea_spark.idea: Extend the CRA framework to dynamic channels or mobile nodes, or combine with reinforcement learning for transmission strategy optimization.
idea_spark.risk: The stationary analysis assumption may not hold for rapidly varying channels; computational complexity may hinder practical deployment.
idea_spark.inspiration: Revisiting traditional separated optimization problems from a joint event perspective may reveal new performance boundaries and design spaces.

papers.title: Topological Charge of Causality at a PT-Symmetric Exceptional Point
papers.summary: Causality in linear response is conventionally treated as a binary property: a response function is either analytic in the upper half-plane or it is not. We show that in a PT-symmetric open dimer it instead carries a topological charge. As the gain-loss parameter crosses the exceptional point, a single pole of the reflection coefficient migrates into the upper half-plane, the Blaschke winding number jumps from 0 to 1, and standard Kramers-Kronig (KK) reconstruction acquires a Lorentzian residual fixed by the pole residue. The transition is sharp, protected by the codimension-one structure of the exceptional point, and directly measurable in a one-port reflection experiment. Most strikingly, the violation magnitude scales as Delta_KK ~ |gamma - gamma_c|^nu with nu ~ -1.08 in the single-port geometry: the breakdown of standard KK is strongest at threshold and weakens deeper in the broken phase. We derive the exact reflection coefficient, verify the residue-corrected dispersion relation, and propose a THz time-domain spectroscopy protocol that detects the topological charge through the residual itself.

ai.tldr: 在PT对称开放二聚体中，因果性在异常点处携带拓扑荷，导致Kramers-Kronig关系出现可测量的洛伦兹残差。
ai.motivation: 传统上因果性被视为二元属性，但PT对称系统在异常点附近可能表现出非平凡的拓扑行为。
ai.method: 解析推导反射系数，计算Blaschke绕数，验证残差修正的色散关系，并设计太赫兹时域光谱协议。
ai.result: 异常点处单个极点进入上半平面，Blaschke绕数从0跳变到1，KK重构偏差标度律指数约为-1.08。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解PT对称系统中因果性的拓扑起源，并提供实验检测拓扑荷的方法。

idea_spark.idea: 利用残差修正的KK关系作为探针，在实验上直接测量异常点附近的拓扑荷。
idea_spark.risk: 实验实现可能受限于太赫兹频段的测量精度和系统参数控制。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将拓扑不变量与因果性约束结合，为设计新型非厄米传感器或量子器件提供思路。

zh.tldr: 在PT对称开放二聚体中，因果性在异常点处携带拓扑荷，导致Kramers-Kronig关系出现可测量的洛伦兹残差。

idea_spark.inspiration: 将拓扑不变量与因果性约束结合，为设计新型非厄米传感器或量子器件提供思路。

en.tldr: In a PT-symmetric open dimer, causality carries a topological charge at the exceptional point, leading to a measurable Lorentzian residual in Kramers-Kronig reconstruction.
en.motivation: Causality is traditionally binary, but PT-symmetric systems may exhibit nontrivial topological behavior near exceptional points.
en.method: Analytical derivation of the reflection coefficient, calculation of the Blaschke winding number, verification of residue-corrected dispersion relations, and proposal of a THz time-domain spectroscopy protocol.
en.result: A single pole migrates into the upper half-plane at the exceptional point, the Blaschke winding number jumps from 0 to 1, and the KK violation scales with exponent approximately -1.08.
en.help_to_user: Provides insight into the topological origin of causality in PT-symmetric systems and an experimental method to detect the topological charge.

idea_spark.idea: Use residue-corrected KK relations as a probe to directly measure topological charge near exceptional points in experiments.
idea_spark.risk: Experimental realization may be limited by measurement precision in the THz range and control over system parameters.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining topological invariants with causality constraints offers a pathway to design novel non-Hermitian sensors or quantum devices.

papers.title: Map2World: Segment Map Conditioned Text to 3D World Generation
papers.summary: 3D world generation is essential for applications such as immersive content creation or autonomous driving simulation. Recent advances in 3D world generation have shown promising results; however, these methods are constrained by grid layouts and suffer from inconsistencies in object scale throughout the entire world. In this work, we introduce a novel framework, Map2World, that first enables 3D world generation conditioned on user-defined segment maps of arbitrary shapes and scales, ensuring global-scale consistency and flexibility across expansive environments. To further enhance the quality, we propose a detail enhancer network that generates fine details of the world. The detail enhancer enables the addition of fine-grained details without compromising overall scene coherence by incorporating global structure information. We design the entire pipeline to leverage strong priors from asset generators, achieving robust generalization across diverse domains, even under limited training data for scene generation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms existing approaches in user-controllability, scale consistency, and content coherence, enabling users to generate 3D worlds under more complex conditions.

ai.tldr: 提出Map2World框架，首次实现基于用户定义任意形状和尺度分割地图的3D世界生成，保证全局尺度一致性与灵活性。
ai.motivation: 现有3D世界生成方法受限于网格布局，且物体尺度在全场景中不一致，缺乏用户可控性。
ai.method: 以用户定义的分割地图为条件，通过细节增强网络融合全局结构信息生成精细细节，并利用资产生成器的强先验实现跨域泛化。
ai.result: 在用户可控性、尺度一致性和内容连贯性上显著优于现有方法，支持更复杂条件下的3D世界生成。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户通过简单的分割地图快速生成尺度一致、细节丰富的3D场景，适用于沉浸式内容创作和自动驾驶仿真。

idea_spark.idea: 将细节增强网络与资产生成器先验结合，在保持全局一致性的同时注入局部细节，可启发其他多尺度生成任务。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖资产生成器的先验质量，若先验域与目标域差异大可能导致生成失真；用户定义分割图的复杂度可能限制实际使用。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用分割图作为中间表示，将用户意图转化为结构化条件，为交互式3D内容创作提供新范式。

idea_spark.risk: 依赖资产生成器的先验质量，若先验域与目标域差异大可能导致生成失真；用户定义分割图的复杂度可能限制实际使用。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用分割图作为中间表示，将用户意图转化为结构化条件，为交互式3D内容创作提供新范式。

en.tldr: Proposes Map2World, the first framework for 3D world generation conditioned on user-defined segment maps of arbitrary shapes and scales, ensuring global-scale consistency and flexibility.
en.motivation: Existing 3D world generation methods are constrained by grid layouts and suffer from object scale inconsistencies across the entire scene, lacking user controllability.
en.method: Conditions on user-defined segment maps, uses a detail enhancer network that incorporates global structure information to generate fine details, and leverages strong priors from asset generators for robust cross-domain generalization.
en.result: Significantly outperforms existing approaches in user-controllability, scale consistency, and content coherence, enabling 3D world generation under more complex conditions.
en.help_to_user: Helps users quickly generate scale-consistent and detail-rich 3D scenes from simple segment maps, useful for immersive content creation and autonomous driving simulation.

idea_spark.idea: Combining a detail enhancer network with asset generator priors to inject local details while maintaining global consistency can inspire other multi-scale generation tasks.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on the quality of asset generator priors; significant domain mismatch may cause generation artifacts; complexity of user-defined segment maps may limit practical usage.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using segment maps as an intermediate representation to translate user intent into structured conditions provides a new paradigm for interactive 3D content creation.

papers.title: LLM-Oriented Information Retrieval: A Denoising-First Perspective
papers.summary: Modern information retrieval (IR) is no longer consumed primarily by humans but increasingly by large language models (LLMs) via retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) and agentic search. Unlike human users, LLMs are constrained by limited attention budgets and are uniquely vulnerable to noise; misleading or irrelevant information is no longer just a nuisance, but a direct cause of hallucinations and reasoning failures. In this perspective paper, we argue that denoising-maximizing usable evidence density and verifiability within a context window-is becoming the primary bottleneck across the full information access pipeline. We conceptualize this paradigm shift through a four-stage framework of IR challenges: from inaccessible to undiscoverable, to misaligned, and finally to unverifiable. Furthermore, we provide a pipeline-organized taxonomy of signal-to-noise optimization techniques, spanning indexing, retrieval, context engineering, verification, and agentic workflow. We also present research works on information denoising in domains that rely heavily on retrieval such as lifelong assistant, coding agent, deep research, and multimodal understanding.

ai.tldr: 本文提出以去噪为核心的信息检索新视角，认为LLM对噪声敏感，去噪是RAG和智能搜索的主要瓶颈。
ai.motivation: 现代信息检索主要服务于LLM而非人类，LLM注意力有限且易受噪声干扰，导致幻觉和推理失败。
ai.method: 构建四阶段框架（不可访问→不可发现→不对齐→不可验证），并给出全流水线的信噪比优化技术分类。
ai.result: 提出去噪优先的范式，涵盖索引、检索、上下文工程、验证和智能体工作流。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解LLM时代信息检索的核心挑战和去噪策略。

idea_spark.idea: 设计自适应上下文窗口，根据任务动态调整证据密度和可验证性。
idea_spark.risk: 过度去噪可能丢失重要长尾信息，需平衡精度与召回。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴通信领域的信噪比优化理论，为IR设计量化噪声指标。

idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴通信领域的信噪比优化理论，为IR设计量化噪声指标。

en.tldr: This paper proposes a denoising-first perspective for LLM-oriented IR, arguing that noise is the primary bottleneck in RAG and agentic search.
en.motivation: Modern IR serves LLMs rather than humans; LLMs have limited attention and are vulnerable to noise, causing hallucinations and reasoning failures.
en.method: A four-stage framework (inaccessible → undiscoverable → misaligned → unverifiable) and a pipeline-organized taxonomy of signal-to-noise optimization techniques.
en.result: Proposes a denoising-first paradigm covering indexing, retrieval, context engineering, verification, and agentic workflows.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand core challenges and denoising strategies in LLM-era information retrieval.

idea_spark.idea: Design adaptive context windows that dynamically adjust evidence density and verifiability based on task.
idea_spark.risk: Over-denoising may discard valuable long-tail information; balance precision and recall is needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: Draw from signal-to-noise ratio optimization in communications to quantify noise metrics for IR.

papers.title: When LLMs Stop Following Steps: A Diagnostic Study of Procedural Execution in Language Models
papers.summary: Large language models (LLMs) often achieve strong performance on reasoning benchmarks, but final-answer accuracy alone does not show whether they faithfully execute the procedure specified in a prompt. We study this question through a controlled diagnostic benchmark for procedural execution, where models are given a step-wise arithmetic algorithm and two numeric inputs, and must return the final computed value. The benchmark uses simple arithmetic operations but increases complexity through algorithm length and look-back dependencies over intermediate variables. Across 14 models and 55 datasets, average first-answer accuracy drops from 61% on 5-step procedures to 20% on 95-step procedures. Generation-level analysis shows that failures often involve missing answers, premature answers, self-correction after an initial error, under-executed traces, and hallucinated extra steps. These findings suggest that apparent reasoning ability can mask substantial weaknesses in faithful instruction execution.

ai.tldr: 大型语言模型在推理基准上表现良好，但最终答案准确率无法反映其是否忠实执行提示中的步骤。通过一个受控的诊断基准测试，发现模型在长步骤程序上准确率大幅下降，并存在多种执行失败模式。
ai.motivation: 现有评估仅关注最终答案正确性，忽略了模型是否真正遵循了提示中指定的程序步骤。
ai.method: 构建了一个受控的诊断基准，包含逐步算术算法和两个数值输入，通过算法长度和中间变量回溯依赖增加复杂度，测试14个模型和55个数据集。
ai.result: 平均首次答案准确率从5步程序的61%下降到95步程序的20%；失败模式包括缺失答案、过早答案、初始错误后自我修正、执行不完整和幻觉额外步骤。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解LLM在忠实执行指令方面的局限性，避免过度依赖表面推理能力。

idea_spark.idea: 设计一个交互式系统，在模型执行长程序时实时监控其步骤，并在检测到偏离时进行干预或提示。
idea_spark.risk: 干预可能引入新的偏差，且实时监控会增加计算开销。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从软件工程中的断点调试和断言检查获得灵感，将类似机制应用于LLM的执行过程。

zh.motivation: 现有评估仅关注最终答案正确性，忽略了模型是否真正遵循了提示中指定的程序步骤。
zh.method: 构建了一个受控的诊断基准，包含逐步算术算法和两个数值输入，通过算法长度和中间变量回溯依赖增加复杂度，测试14个模型和55个数据集。
zh.result: 平均首次答案准确率从5步程序的61%下降到95步程序的20%；失败模式包括缺失答案、过早答案、初始错误后自我修正、执行不完整和幻觉额外步骤。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解LLM在忠实执行指令方面的局限性，避免过度依赖表面推理能力。

idea_spark.idea: 设计一个交互式系统，在模型执行长程序时实时监控其步骤，并在检测到偏离时进行干预或提示。
idea_spark.risk: 干预可能引入新的偏差，且实时监控会增加计算开销。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从软件工程中的断点调试和断言检查获得灵感，将类似机制应用于LLM的执行过程。

en.tldr: Large language models perform well on reasoning benchmarks, but final-answer accuracy does not reveal whether they faithfully execute the steps specified in a prompt. A controlled diagnostic benchmark shows that accuracy drops sharply on longer procedures, with multiple failure modes.
en.motivation: Existing evaluations focus only on final answer correctness, ignoring whether models actually follow the procedural steps specified in the prompt.
en.method: A controlled diagnostic benchmark was built with step-wise arithmetic algorithms and two numeric inputs, increasing complexity via algorithm length and look-back dependencies over intermediate variables, testing 14 models and 55 datasets.
en.result: Average first-answer accuracy drops from 61% on 5-step procedures to 20% on 95-step procedures; failure modes include missing answers, premature answers, self-correction after initial error, under-executed traces, and hallucinated extra steps.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand the limitations of LLMs in faithfully executing instructions, cautioning against over-reliance on apparent reasoning ability.

idea_spark.idea: Design an interactive system that monitors model steps in real time during long procedures and intervenes or prompts when deviations are detected.
idea_spark.risk: Intervention may introduce new biases, and real-time monitoring adds computational overhead.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by breakpoint debugging and assertion checking in software engineering, applying similar mechanisms to LLM execution processes.

papers.title: Evaluating the Architectural Reasoning Capabilities of LLM Provers via the Obfuscated Natural Number Game
papers.summary: While Large Language Models have achieved notable success on formal mathematics benchmarks such as MiniF2F, it remains unclear whether these results stem from genuine logical reasoning or semantic pattern matching against pre-training data. This paper identifies Architectural Reasoning: the ability to synthesize formal proofs using exclusively local axioms and definitions within an alien math domain, as the necessary ability for future automated theorem discovery AI. We use the Obfuscated Natural Number Game, a benchmark to evaluate Architectural Reasoning. By renaming identifiers in the Natural Number Game in Lean 4, we created a zero-knowledge, closed environment. We evaluate state-of-the-art models, finding a universal latency tax where obfuscation increases inference time. The results also reveal a divergence in robustness: while general models (Claude-Sonnet-4.5, GPT-4o) suffer performance degradation, reasoning models (DeepSeek-R1, GPT-5, DeepSeek-Prover-V2) maintain the same accuracy despite the absence of semantic cues. These findings provide a quantitative metric for assessing the true capacity for mathematical reasoning.

ai.tldr: 通过混淆自然数游戏评估大语言模型在形式数学中的架构推理能力，发现推理模型在无语义线索时仍保持准确率，而通用模型性能下降。
ai.motivation: 现有基准无法区分大语言模型在形式数学上的成功是源于逻辑推理还是语义模式匹配，需要一种能排除语义干扰的评估方法。
ai.method: 在Lean 4中重命名自然数游戏的所有标识符，创建零知识封闭环境，测试模型在仅依赖局部公理和定义下合成证明的能力。
ai.result: 混淆导致所有模型推理时间增加（延迟税）；通用模型（如Claude-Sonnet-4.5、GPT-4o）准确率下降，而推理模型（如DeepSeek-R1、GPT-5、DeepSeek-Prover-V2）准确率保持不变。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种量化评估大语言模型真实数学推理能力的方法，帮助用户区分模型是真正推理还是记忆模式。

idea_spark.idea: 设计动态混淆机制，在推理过程中逐步揭示标识符含义，观察模型何时能恢复语义理解。
idea_spark.risk: 混淆可能引入额外噪声，导致模型因语法错误而非推理失败而表现不佳。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受认知科学中概念混淆实验启发，将语义剥离作为测试推理深度的工具。

zh.tldr: 通过混淆自然数游戏评估大语言模型在形式数学中的架构推理能力，发现推理模型在无语义线索时仍保持准确率，而通用模型性能下降。
zh.motivation: 现有基准无法区分大语言模型在形式数学上的成功是源于逻辑推理还是语义模式匹配，需要一种能排除语义干扰的评估方法。

zh.result: 混淆导致所有模型推理时间增加（延迟税）；通用模型（如Claude-Sonnet-4.5、GPT-4o）准确率下降，而推理模型（如DeepSeek-R1、GPT-5、DeepSeek-Prover-V2）准确率保持不变。
zh.help_to_user: 提供了一种量化评估大语言模型真实数学推理能力的方法，帮助用户区分模型是真正推理还是记忆模式。

idea_spark.idea: 设计动态混淆机制，在推理过程中逐步揭示标识符含义，观察模型何时能恢复语义理解。
idea_spark.risk: 混淆可能引入额外噪声，导致模型因语法错误而非推理失败而表现不佳。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受认知科学中概念混淆实验启发，将语义剥离作为测试推理深度的工具。

en.tldr: Evaluates LLMs' architectural reasoning via the Obfuscated Natural Number Game, finding reasoning models maintain accuracy without semantic cues while general models degrade.
en.motivation: Existing benchmarks cannot distinguish whether LLMs' success in formal mathematics stems from logical reasoning or semantic pattern matching, necessitating a method that eliminates semantic interference.
en.method: Renamed all identifiers in the Natural Number Game in Lean 4 to create a zero-knowledge closed environment, testing models' ability to synthesize proofs using only local axioms and definitions.
en.result: Obfuscation caused a universal latency tax; general models (e.g., Claude-Sonnet-4.5, GPT-4o) suffered accuracy drops, while reasoning models (e.g., DeepSeek-R1, GPT-5, DeepSeek-Prover-V2) maintained accuracy.
en.help_to_user: Provides a quantitative metric to assess LLMs' genuine mathematical reasoning ability, helping users distinguish true reasoning from memorized patterns.

idea_spark.idea: Design a dynamic obfuscation mechanism that gradually reveals identifier meanings during inference to observe when models recover semantic understanding.
idea_spark.risk: Obfuscation may introduce extra noise, causing models to fail due to syntax errors rather than reasoning failures.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by concept obfuscation experiments in cognitive science, using semantic stripping as a tool to probe reasoning depth.

papers.title: SC-Taxo: Hierarchical Taxonomy Generation under Semantic Consistency Constraints using Large Language Models
papers.summary: Scientific literature is expanding at an unprecedented pace, making it increasingly challenging to efficiently organize and access domain knowledge. A high-quality scientific taxonomy offers a structured and hierarchical representation of a research field, facilitating literature exploration and topic navigation, as well as enabling downstream applications such as trend analysis, idea generation, and information retrieval. However, existing taxonomy generation approaches often suffer from structural inconsistencies and semantic misalignment across hierarchical levels. Through empirical analysis, we find that these issues largely stem from inadequate modeling of hierarchical semantic consistency. To address this limitation, we propose a semantic-consistent taxonomy generation (SC-Taxo) framework that leverages large language models (LLMs) with hierarchy-aware refinement stages to ensure semantic consistency. Specifically, SC-Taxo introduces a bidirectional heading generation mechanism that jointly performs bottom-up abstraction and top-down semantic constraint, while further capturing peer-level semantic dependencies to enhance horizontal consistency. Experiments on multiple benchmark datasets demonstrate consistent improvements in hierarchy alignment and heading quality, and additional evaluation on Chinese scientific literature validates its robust cross-lingual generalization.

ai.tldr: 提出SC-Taxo框架，利用大语言模型和层级感知精炼策略，在生成科学文献层级分类体系时保持语义一致性。
ai.motivation: 现有分类体系生成方法存在层级间结构不一致和语义错位问题，源于对层级语义一致性的建模不足。
ai.method: 引入双向标题生成机制，联合自底向上抽象与自顶向下语义约束，并捕获同级语义依赖以增强横向一致性。
ai.result: 在多个基准数据集上，层级对齐和标题质量持续提升；中文科学文献评估验证了跨语言泛化能力。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户自动构建高质量的科学文献层级分类体系，便于文献探索、主题导航及趋势分析。

idea_spark.idea: 利用大语言模型同时进行自底向上抽象和自顶向下约束，确保层级语义一致性。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖大语言模型可能引入生成偏差，且对长尾或新兴领域术语的泛化能力需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 同级语义依赖的建模思路可启发多模态层级结构生成中的横向关系处理。

zh.tldr: 提出SC-Taxo框架，利用大语言模型和层级感知精炼策略，在生成科学文献层级分类体系时保持语义一致性。
zh.motivation: 现有分类体系生成方法存在层级间结构不一致和语义错位问题，源于对层级语义一致性的建模不足。
zh.method: 引入双向标题生成机制，联合自底向上抽象与自顶向下语义约束，并捕获同级语义依赖以增强横向一致性。
zh.result: 在多个基准数据集上，层级对齐和标题质量持续提升；中文科学文献评估验证了跨语言泛化能力。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户自动构建高质量的科学文献层级分类体系，便于文献探索、主题导航及趋势分析。

idea_spark.idea: 利用大语言模型同时进行自底向上抽象和自顶向下约束，确保层级语义一致性。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖大语言模型可能引入生成偏差，且对长尾或新兴领域术语的泛化能力需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 同级语义依赖的建模思路可启发多模态层级结构生成中的横向关系处理。

en.tldr: Proposes SC-Taxo, a framework leveraging LLMs with hierarchy-aware refinement to ensure semantic consistency in hierarchical taxonomy generation for scientific literature.
en.motivation: Existing taxonomy generation approaches suffer from structural inconsistencies and semantic misalignment across hierarchical levels due to inadequate modeling of hierarchical semantic consistency.
en.method: Introduces a bidirectional heading generation mechanism that jointly performs bottom-up abstraction and top-down semantic constraint, while capturing peer-level semantic dependencies for horizontal consistency.
en.result: Consistent improvements in hierarchy alignment and heading quality on multiple benchmarks; cross-lingual generalization validated on Chinese scientific literature.
en.help_to_user: Helps users automatically construct high-quality hierarchical taxonomies for scientific literature, facilitating literature exploration, topic navigation, and trend analysis.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage LLMs to simultaneously perform bottom-up abstraction and top-down constraint, ensuring hierarchical semantic consistency.
idea_spark.risk: Dependence on LLMs may introduce generation biases, and generalization to long-tail or emerging domain terms requires further validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Modeling peer-level semantic dependencies can inspire handling of horizontal relationships in multimodal hierarchical structure generation.

papers.title: Negative Data Mining for Contrastive Learning in Dense Retrieval at IKEA.com
papers.summary: Contrastive learning is a core component of modern retrieval systems, but its effectiveness heavily relies on the quality of negative examples used during training. In this work, we present a systematic approach to improving dense retrieval for IKEA product search through structured negative sampling strategies and scalable LLM-as-a-judge relevance evaluation.   Building on IKEA Search Engine's late-interaction retrieval architectures, we introduce two key contributions: (1) structured negative sampling strategies that leverage product hierarchical taxonomy and product attributes to generate semantically challenging negatives, and (2) a comprehensive LLM-based evaluation methodology for generating training data. Rather than relying on sparse human annotations or random sampling, our LLM-based evaluation system allocates a score for all candidate products against each query.   Our methodology achieves +2.6\% average category accuracy on offline real user query experiments on the Canada market. However, our A/B test on long-tail queries showed no statistically significant differences in user engagement metrics between the improved and baseline models ($p > 0.05$). We trace this gap to user search behavior: 67\% of popular searches exhibit zero-click rates above 50\%, indicating that a substantial proportion of search sessions result in no product engagement regardless of result ranking. These findings underscore the importance of hard negative mining but also the need for grounding training data and offline evals in real user search behavior -- including query intent distribution and zero-click patterns -- to bridge the gap between offline retrieval quality and online user engagement.

ai.tldr: 提出结构化负采样和LLM评估方法，提升宜家产品搜索的稠密检索效果，但线上长尾查询无显著改善，归因于零点击行为。
ai.motivation: 对比学习依赖高质量负例，现有随机采样或人工标注成本高且效果有限。
ai.method: 利用产品层次分类和属性生成语义难负例，并采用LLM为所有候选产品打分生成训练数据。
ai.result: 离线加拿大市场用户查询平均类别准确率提升2.6%，但长尾查询A/B测试无统计显著差异。
ai.help_to_user: 了解如何结合产品结构和LLM评估改进稠密检索，以及离线指标与线上效果之间的差距。

idea_spark.idea: 利用用户零点击行为数据调整训练负例权重，或设计针对零点击查询的评估指标。
idea_spark.risk: 零点击行为可能由多种原因导致，直接建模可能引入偏差。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将用户行为模式（如零点击率）纳入训练数据生成和离线评估，以弥合离线与线上效果差距。
