zh.help_to_user: 了解如何结合产品结构和LLM评估改进稠密检索，以及离线指标与线上效果之间的差距。

idea_spark.idea: 利用用户零点击行为数据调整训练负例权重，或设计针对零点击查询的评估指标。
idea_spark.risk: 零点击行为可能由多种原因导致，直接建模可能引入偏差。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将用户行为模式（如零点击率）纳入训练数据生成和离线评估，以弥合离线与线上效果差距。

en.tldr: Proposes structured negative sampling and LLM-based evaluation to improve dense retrieval for IKEA product search, but online long-tail queries show no significant improvement, attributed to zero-click behavior.
en.motivation: Contrastive learning relies on high-quality negatives; random sampling or human annotation is costly and limited.
en.method: Generates semantically hard negatives using product taxonomy and attributes, and uses LLM to score all candidate products for training data.
en.result: Offline average category accuracy improves by 2.6% on Canada market queries, but A/B test on long-tail queries shows no statistically significant difference.
en.help_to_user: Learn how to combine product structure and LLM evaluation to improve dense retrieval, and understand the gap between offline metrics and online engagement.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage zero-click behavior data to adjust negative example weights or design evaluation metrics for zero-click queries.
idea_spark.risk: Zero-click behavior may have multiple causes; direct modeling could introduce bias.
idea_spark.inspiration: Incorporate user behavior patterns (e.g., zero-click rates) into training data generation and offline evaluation to bridge offline-online gaps.

papers.title: From Local to Global to Mechanistic: An iERF-Centered Unified Framework for Interpreting Vision Models
papers.summary: Modern vision models achieve remarkable accuracy, but explaining where evidence arises, what the model encodes, and how internal computations assemble that evidence remains fragmented. We introduce an iERF-centric framework that unifies local, global, and mechanistic interpretability around a single analysis unit: the pointwise feature vector (PFV) paired with its instance-specific Effective Receptive Field (iERF). On the local side, Sharing Ratio Decomposition (SRD) expresses each PFV as a mixture of upstream PFVs via sharing ratios and propagates iERFs to construct class-discriminative saliency maps. SRD yields high-resolution, activation-faithful explanations, is robust to targeted manipulation and noise, and remains activation-agnostic across common nonlinearities. For the global view, we introduce Concept-Anchored Feature Explanation (CAFE), which utilizes the iERF as a semantic label, grounding abstract latent vectors in verifiable pixel-level evidence. With CAFE, we address the challenge of non-localized sparse autoencoder latents--especially in Transformers, where early self-attention mixes distant context. To answer how representations are composed through depth, we propose the Interlayer Concept Graph with Interlayer Concept Attribution (ICAT), which quantifies concept-to-concept influence while isolating layer pairs; an interlayer insertion, deletion protocol identifies Integrated Gradients as the most faithful instantiation. Empirically, across ResNet50, VGG16, and ViTs, our framework outperforms baselines in both fidelity and robustness, successfully interprets dispersed SAE features, and exposes dominant concept routes in correct, misclassified, and adversarial cases. Grounded in iERFs, our approach provides a coherent, evidence-backed map from pixels to concepts to decisions.

ai.tldr: 提出一个以iERF为中心的统一框架，从局部、全局和机制三个层面解释视觉模型。
ai.motivation: 现有解释方法在局部、全局和机制层面相互割裂，缺乏统一的分析单元。
ai.method: 以点状特征向量及其实例特定有效感受野(iERF)为核心，通过共享比率分解(SRD)构建局部显著性图，利用概念锚定特征解释(CAFE)实现全局语义标注，并借助层间概念图与归因(ICAT)量化概念间影响。
ai.result: 在ResNet50、VGG16和ViT上，该框架在保真度和鲁棒性上优于基线，成功解释分散的SAE特征，并揭示正确、错误和对抗样本中的主导概念路径。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解视觉模型从像素到概念再到决策的完整证据链。

idea_spark.idea: 将iERF与稀疏自编码器结合，用于发现模型内部非局部化的概念表示。
idea_spark.risk: iERF的计算可能对高分辨率输入或深层网络带来较大开销。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从局部感受野到全局概念图的层次化解释思路，可启发设计更透明的模型架构。

zh.tldr: 提出一个以iERF为中心的统一框架，从局部、全局和机制三个层面解释视觉模型。
zh.motivation: 现有解释方法在局部、全局和机制层面相互割裂，缺乏统一的分析单元。
zh.method: 以点状特征向量及其实例特定有效感受野(iERF)为核心，通过共享比率分解(SRD)构建局部显著性图，利用概念锚定特征解释(CAFE)实现全局语义标注，并借助层间概念图与归因(ICAT)量化概念间影响。
zh.result: 在ResNet50、VGG16和ViT上，该框架在保真度和鲁棒性上优于基线，成功解释分散的SAE特征，并揭示正确、错误和对抗样本中的主导概念路径。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解视觉模型从像素到概念再到决策的完整证据链。

idea_spark.idea: 将iERF与稀疏自编码器结合，用于发现模型内部非局部化的概念表示。
idea_spark.risk: iERF的计算可能对高分辨率输入或深层网络带来较大开销。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从局部感受野到全局概念图的层次化解释思路，可启发设计更透明的模型架构。

en.tldr: Proposes an iERF-centered unified framework that interprets vision models from local, global, and mechanistic perspectives.
en.motivation: Existing interpretability methods are fragmented across local, global, and mechanistic levels, lacking a unified analysis unit.
en.method: Centered on pointwise feature vectors and their instance-specific Effective Receptive Fields (iERF), uses Sharing Ratio Decomposition (SRD) for local saliency maps, Concept-Anchored Feature Explanation (CAFE) for global semantic grounding, and Interlayer Concept Graph with Interlayer Concept Attribution (ICAT) to quantify concept-to-concept influence.
en.result: On ResNet50, VGG16, and ViTs, the framework outperforms baselines in fidelity and robustness, successfully interprets dispersed SAE features, and reveals dominant concept routes in correct, misclassified, and adversarial cases.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand the complete evidence chain from pixels to concepts to decisions in vision models.

idea_spark.idea: Combine iERF with sparse autoencoders to discover non-localized concept representations inside models.
idea_spark.risk: Computing iERF may incur high overhead for high-resolution inputs or deep networks.
idea_spark.inspiration: The hierarchical interpretation from local receptive fields to global concept graphs can inspire more transparent model architectures.

papers.title: A Replicability Study of XTR
papers.summary: The XTR (conteXtual Token Retrieval) algorithm is a modification to ColBERT retrieval that avoids the costly step of fully gathering and reranking the candidates' embeddings by imputing their missing similarity scores from the initial token retrieval step. The original work proposes a modified training objective as necessary for effective XTR retrieval, arguing that standard ColBERT token scoring is unsuitable for imputation. In this paper, we replicate both the XTR retrieval algorithm and its modified training objective, and extend the evaluation to knowledge-distillation (KD) training and efficient retrieval engines (PLAID and WARP). We confirm the token-level matching characteristics claimed in the original work, but fail to replicate XTR's overall effectiveness advantage over ColBERT under a controlled comparison. We further show that XTR's training modification has a concrete mechanistic consequence for modern retrieval engines: by flattening ColBERT's characteristically peaked token score distribution, XTR training yields more discriminative centroid scores and thus more efficient IVF-based retrieval under PLAID and WARP. The utility of XTR training is therefore not limited to the low-$k'$ regime originally studied, but extends to any deployment setting where IVF-based engines are used. These findings offer practitioners concrete guidance on how and when to use XTR as their multi-vector retriever.

ai.tldr: 本文复现了XTR检索算法及其训练目标，发现其整体效果优势在受控比较下不成立，但XTR训练能改善IVF引擎的检索效率。
ai.motivation: 验证XTR算法及其训练目标的可复现性，并扩展评估至知识蒸馏训练和高效检索引擎。
ai.method: 复现XTR检索算法和修改后的训练目标，在PLAID和WARP引擎上测试，并与ColBERT进行受控比较。
ai.result: 确认了XTR的token级匹配特性，但未能复现其整体效果优势；XTR训练使token分数分布更平坦，从而提升IVF检索效率。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解XTR的实际效用：其训练改进对IVF引擎有益，但整体检索效果未必优于ColBERT。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将XTR的分数平坦化策略应用于其他密集检索模型，以提升索引效率。
idea_spark.risk: XTR训练可能牺牲部分检索精度，需在效率与效果间权衡。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受控比较揭示算法优势的边界条件，启发更严谨的评估设计。

zh.tldr: 本文复现了XTR检索算法及其训练目标，发现其整体效果优势在受控比较下不成立，但XTR训练能改善IVF引擎的检索效率。
zh.motivation: 验证XTR算法及其训练目标的可复现性，并扩展评估至知识蒸馏训练和高效检索引擎。

zh.result: 确认了XTR的token级匹配特性，但未能复现其整体效果优势；XTR训练使token分数分布更平坦，从而提升IVF检索效率。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将XTR的分数平坦化策略应用于其他密集检索模型，以提升索引效率。
idea_spark.risk: XTR训练可能牺牲部分检索精度，需在效率与效果间权衡。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受控比较揭示算法优势的边界条件，启发更严谨的评估设计。

en.tldr: This paper replicates XTR and its training objective, finding no overall effectiveness advantage over ColBERT under controlled comparison, but XTR training improves IVF-based retrieval efficiency.
en.motivation: To verify the replicability of XTR and extend evaluation to knowledge distillation and efficient retrieval engines.
en.method: Replicated XTR retrieval and its modified training objective, tested on PLAID and WARP engines, and compared with ColBERT under controlled conditions.
en.result: Confirmed token-level matching characteristics but failed to replicate overall effectiveness advantage; XTR training flattens token score distribution, enhancing IVF retrieval efficiency.
en.help_to_user: Provides guidance on when XTR is beneficial: its training modification aids IVF engines, but overall retrieval may not surpass ColBERT.

idea_spark.idea: Apply XTR's training to other dense retrievers to improve indexing efficiency.
idea_spark.risk: Potential trade-off between efficiency and retrieval accuracy.
idea_spark.inspiration: Controlled comparisons reveal boundary conditions of algorithmic advantages, inspiring rigorous evaluation designs.

papers.title: Federated Distillation for Whole Slide Image via Gaussian-Mixture Feature Alignment and Curriculum Integration
papers.summary: Federated learning (FL) offers a promising framework for collaborative digital pathology by enabling model training across institutions. However, real-world deployments face heterogeneity arising from diverse multiple instance learning (MIL) architectures and heterogeneous feature extractors across institutions. We propose FedHD, a novel FL framework that performs local Gaussian-mixture feature alignment tailored for WSI analysis. Instead of exchanging model parameters, each client independently distills semantically rich synthetic feature representations aligned with the distribution of real WSIs. To preserve diagnostic diversity, FedHD adopts a one-to-one distillation strategy, generating a synthetic counterpart for each real slide to avoid over-compression. During federation, a curriculum-based integration strategy progressively incorporates cross-site synthetic features into local training once performance plateaus. Furthermore, an optional interpretation module reconstructs pseudo-patches from synthetic embeddings, enhancing transparency. FedHD is architecture-agnostic, privacy-preserving, and supports personalized yet collaborative training across diverse institutions. Experiments on TCGA-IDH, CAMELYON16, and CAMELYON17 show that FedHD consistently outperforms state-of-the-art federated and distillation baselines.

ai.tldr: 提出FedHD框架，通过高斯混合特征对齐和课程式集成策略，实现全切片图像在异构机构间的联邦蒸馏，无需交换模型参数。
ai.motivation: 联邦学习在数字病理中面临多实例学习架构和特征提取器异构的挑战，现有方法难以兼顾隐私、异构性和诊断多样性。
ai.method: 每个客户端独立生成与真实WSI分布对齐的合成特征，采用一对一蒸馏避免过度压缩；联邦时通过课程式集成逐步引入跨站点合成特征。
ai.result: 在TCGA-IDH、CAMELYON16和CAMELYON17上，FedHD一致优于现有联邦和蒸馏基线。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种隐私保护、架构无关的联邦蒸馏方案，适用于多机构协作的病理图像分析。

idea_spark.idea: 利用合成特征表示替代真实数据交换，结合渐进式集成，平衡隐私与性能。
idea_spark.risk: 合成特征可能丢失细粒度诊断信息，课程式集成需要合理设定性能阈值。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从多实例学习的特征分布对齐和课程学习思想出发，设计联邦蒸馏新范式。

idea_spark.risk: 合成特征可能丢失细粒度诊断信息，课程式集成需要合理设定性能阈值。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从多实例学习的特征分布对齐和课程学习思想出发，设计联邦蒸馏新范式。

en.tldr: Proposes FedHD, a federated distillation framework for whole slide images using Gaussian-mixture feature alignment and curriculum integration, without exchanging model parameters.
en.motivation: Federated learning in digital pathology faces heterogeneity in MIL architectures and feature extractors; existing methods struggle with privacy, heterogeneity, and diagnostic diversity.
en.method: Each client independently generates synthetic features aligned with real WSI distributions, uses one-to-one distillation to avoid over-compression, and progressively integrates cross-site synthetic features via curriculum-based strategy.
en.result: FedHD consistently outperforms state-of-the-art federated and distillation baselines on TCGA-IDH, CAMELYON16, and CAMELYON17.
en.help_to_user: Provides a privacy-preserving, architecture-agnostic federated distillation solution for multi-institutional pathology image analysis.

idea_spark.idea: Use synthetic feature representations to replace real data exchange, combined with progressive integration to balance privacy and performance.
idea_spark.risk: Synthetic features may lose fine-grained diagnostic information; curriculum integration requires appropriate performance thresholds.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by feature distribution alignment in MIL and curriculum learning to design a new federated distillation paradigm.

papers.title: Alethia: A Foundational Encoder for Voice Deepfakes
papers.summary: Existing voice deepfake detection and localization models rely heavily on representations extracted from speech foundation models (SFMs). However, downstream finetuning has now reached a state of diminishing returns. In this paper, we shift the focus to pretraining and propose a novel recipe that combines bottleneck masked embedding prediction with flow-matching based spectrogram reconstruction. The outcome, Alethia, is the first foundational audio encoder for various voice deepfake detection and localization tasks. We evaluate on $5$ different tasks with $56$ benchmark datasets, and note Alethia significantly outperforms state-of-the-art SFMs with superior robustness to real-world perturbations and zero-shot generalization to unseen domains (e.g., singing deepfakes). We also demonstrate the limitation of discrete targets in masked token prediction, and show the importance of continuous embedding prediction and generative pretraining for capturing deepfake artifacts.

ai.tldr: 提出首个面向语音深度伪造检测与定位的基础音频编码器Alethia，采用瓶颈掩码嵌入预测与流匹配频谱图重建的预训练方法，在56个基准数据集上显著优于现有模型。
ai.motivation: 现有语音深度伪造检测模型依赖语音基础模型表示，但下游微调收益递减，需改进预训练阶段。
ai.method: 结合瓶颈掩码嵌入预测（连续嵌入预测）和基于流匹配的频谱图重建进行生成式预训练。
ai.result: 在5类任务56个数据集上超越现有模型，对真实世界扰动鲁棒，零样本泛化至未见领域（如歌唱深度伪造）。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种更鲁棒、泛化性更强的语音深度伪造检测预训练方法，可直接用于构建检测系统。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将瓶颈掩码嵌入预测与扩散模型结合，进一步提升伪造伪影的捕获能力。
idea_spark.risk: 生成式预训练可能引入额外计算开销，且对伪造类型覆盖的全面性需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从连续目标预测优于离散目标预测的发现，启发在其他模态（如图像、视频）伪造检测中采用类似策略。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将瓶颈掩码嵌入预测与扩散模型结合，进一步提升伪造伪影的捕获能力。
idea_spark.risk: 生成式预训练可能引入额外计算开销，且对伪造类型覆盖的全面性需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从连续目标预测优于离散目标预测的发现，启发在其他模态（如图像、视频）伪造检测中采用类似策略。

en.tldr: Proposes Alethia, the first foundational audio encoder for voice deepfake detection and localization, using bottleneck masked embedding prediction and flow-matching spectrogram reconstruction, outperforming state-of-the-art on 56 benchmarks.
en.motivation: Existing models rely on speech foundation models with diminishing returns from downstream finetuning, necessitating improved pretraining.
en.method: Combines bottleneck masked embedding prediction (continuous embedding prediction) with flow-matching based spectrogram reconstruction for generative pretraining.
en.result: Outperforms existing models across 5 tasks and 56 datasets, with superior robustness to real-world perturbations and zero-shot generalization to unseen domains like singing deepfakes.
en.help_to_user: Provides a more robust and generalizable pretraining method for voice deepfake detection, directly applicable to building detection systems.

idea_spark.idea: Explore combining bottleneck masked embedding prediction with diffusion models to further enhance capture of deepfake artifacts.
idea_spark.risk: Generative pretraining may introduce additional computational cost, and coverage of deepfake types needs validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: The finding that continuous target prediction outperforms discrete targets inspires similar strategies in other modalities (e.g., image, video) for deepfake detection.

papers.title: MAEPose: Self-Supervised Spatiotemporal Learning for Human Pose Estimation on mmWave Video
papers.summary: Millimetre-wave (mmWave) radar offers a more privacy-preserving alternative to RGB-based human pose estimation. However, existing methods typically rely on pre-extracted intermediate representations such as sparse point clouds or spectrogram images, where the rich spatiotemporal information naturally present in radar video streams is discarded for model learning, while such signal processing adds system complexity. In addition, existing solutions are mainly conducted in an end-to-end supervised manner without leveraging unlabelled raw video streams to learn generalized representations. In this study, we present MAEPose, a masked autoencoding-based human pose estimation approach that operates directly on mmWave spectrogram videos. MAEPose learns spatiotemporal motion-aware generalized representations from unlabelled radar video, and leverages its heatmap decoder for multi-frame pose estimation predictions. We evaluate it across three datasets based on leave-one-person-out cross-validation with rigorous statistical testing. MAEPose consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines by up to 22.1% in MPJPE p<0.05, and maintains robust accuracy under zero-shot bystander interference with only a 6.5% error increase. Ablation studies confirm that both the pre-training and the heatmap decoder contribute substantially, while modality analysis indicates that leveraging Range-Doppler video as input achieves better pose estimation performance than Range-Azimuth or their fusion, with lower computational cost.

ai.tldr: 提出MAEPose，一种基于掩码自编码的毫米波雷达人体姿态估计方法，直接在频谱视频上学习时空运动感知表示，无需中间信号处理。
ai.motivation: 现有毫米波雷达姿态估计方法依赖预提取的中间表示（如稀疏点云或频谱图），丢弃了雷达视频流中丰富的时空信息，且需要端到端监督训练，无法利用未标注数据。
ai.method: 采用掩码自编码框架，直接在毫米波频谱视频上预训练，学习时空运动感知的通用表示，并通过热图解码器进行多帧姿态估计。
ai.result: 在三个数据集上，MAEPose在MPJPE指标上比最先进基线提升最多22.1%（p<0.05），零样本旁观者干扰下误差仅增加6.5%。消融实验证实预训练和热图解码器均贡献显著，且Range-Doppler视频输入优于Range-Azimuth或其融合。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种隐私保护、无需复杂信号处理的毫米波雷达人体姿态估计方案，适合在隐私敏感场景（如医疗、安防）中部署。

idea_spark.idea: 将MAEPose的预训练策略与多模态融合结合，例如同时利用Range-Doppler和Range-Azimuth视频，通过对比学习增强表示。
idea_spark.risk: 毫米波雷达在复杂环境（如多径反射、低信噪比）下性能可能下降，且需要大量未标注雷达视频进行预训练。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受掩码图像建模启发，将自监督学习应用于雷达视频，证明了无需中间表示即可有效学习时空特征，为传感器数据直接学习提供了新思路。

zh.motivation: 现有毫米波雷达姿态估计方法依赖预提取的中间表示（如稀疏点云或频谱图），丢弃了雷达视频流中丰富的时空信息，且需要端到端监督训练，无法利用未标注数据。

zh.result: 在三个数据集上，MAEPose在MPJPE指标上比最先进基线提升最多22.1%（p<0.05），零样本旁观者干扰下误差仅增加6.5%。消融实验证实预训练和热图解码器均贡献显著，且Range-Doppler视频输入优于Range-Azimuth或其融合。

idea_spark.inspiration: 受掩码图像建模启发，将自监督学习应用于雷达视频，证明了无需中间表示即可有效学习时空特征，为传感器数据直接学习提供了新思路。

en.tldr: Proposes MAEPose, a masked autoencoding-based mmWave radar human pose estimation method that directly learns spatiotemporal motion-aware representations from spectrogram videos without intermediate signal processing.
en.motivation: Existing mmWave radar pose estimation methods rely on pre-extracted intermediate representations (e.g., sparse point clouds or spectrograms), discarding rich spatiotemporal information in radar video streams, and require end-to-end supervised training without leveraging unlabeled data.
en.method: Uses a masked autoencoding framework to pre-train directly on mmWave spectrogram videos, learning spatiotemporal motion-aware generalized representations, and employs a heatmap decoder for multi-frame pose estimation.
en.result: On three datasets, MAEPose outperforms state-of-the-art baselines by up to 22.1% in MPJPE (p<0.05), with only a 6.5% error increase under zero-shot bystander interference. Ablation studies confirm the contributions of both pre-training and heatmap decoder, and Range-Doppler video input achieves better performance than Range-Azimuth or their fusion with lower computational cost.
en.help_to_user: Provides a privacy-preserving mmWave radar human pose estimation solution without complex signal processing, suitable for deployment in privacy-sensitive scenarios such as healthcare and security.

idea_spark.idea: Combine MAEPose's pre-training strategy with multimodal fusion, e.g., simultaneously using Range-Doppler and Range-Azimuth videos with contrastive learning to enhance representations.
idea_spark.risk: Performance may degrade in complex environments (e.g., multipath reflections, low SNR), and large amounts of unlabeled radar video are required for pre-training.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by masked image modeling, applying self-supervised learning to radar video demonstrates effective spatiotemporal feature learning without intermediate representations, offering a new direction for direct sensor data learning.

papers.title: Paired-CSLiDAR: Height-Stratified Registration for Cross-Source Aerial-Ground LiDAR Pose Refinement
papers.summary: We introduce Paired-CSLiDAR (CSLiDAR), a cross-source aerial-ground LiDAR benchmark for single-scan pose refinement: refining a ground-scan pose within a 50 m-radius aerial crop. The benchmark contains 12,683 ground-aerial pairs across 6 evaluation sites and per-scan reference 6-DoF alignments for sub-meter root-mean-square error (RMSE) evaluation. Because aerial scans capture rooftops and canopy while ground scans capture facades and under-canopy, the two modalities share only a fraction of their geometry, primarily the terrain surface, causing standard registration methods and learned correspondence models to converge to metrically incorrect local minima. We propose Residual-Guided Stratified Registration (RGSR), a training-free, geometry-only refinement pipeline that exploits the shared ground plane through height-stratified ICP, reversed registration directions, and confidence-gated accept-if-better selection. RGSR achieves 86.0% S@0.75 m and 99.8% S@1.0 m on the primary benchmark of 9,012 scans, outperforming both the confidence-gated cascade at 83.7% and GeoTransformer at 76.3%. We validate RMSE-based pose selection with independent survey control and trajectory consistency, and show that added Fourier-Mellin BEV proposals can reduce RMSE while increasing actual pose error under extreme partial overlap. The dataset and code are being prepared for public release.

ai.tldr: 提出Paired-CSLiDAR基准和RGSR方法，用于跨源空地LiDAR单扫描位姿精化，在高度分层ICP和置信门控策略下实现高精度配准。
ai.motivation: 空地LiDAR扫描几何重叠少（仅地面），标准配准方法易陷入错误局部极小值，需要专门针对部分重叠的位姿精化方法。
ai.method: 提出无训练、仅几何的残差引导分层配准（RGSR），包括高度分层ICP、反向配准方向和置信门控接受-若-更好选择。
ai.result: 在主基准上达到86.0% S@0.75m和99.8% S@1.0m，优于置信门控级联（83.7%）和GeoTransformer（76.3%）。
ai.help_to_user: 提供跨源空地LiDAR配准的基准和高效无训练精化方法，适用于机器人、自动驾驶等需要空地融合定位的场景。

idea_spark.idea: 利用地面作为共享几何先验，通过高度分层ICP和反向配准方向增强鲁棒性。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖地面平面假设，在无平坦地面的场景（如森林、山地）可能失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从标准ICP的局部极小值问题出发，通过几何先验和方向反转设计简单有效的精化流程。

zh.tldr: 提出Paired-CSLiDAR基准和RGSR方法，用于跨源空地LiDAR单扫描位姿精化，在高度分层ICP和置信门控策略下实现高精度配准。
zh.motivation: 空地LiDAR扫描几何重叠少（仅地面），标准配准方法易陷入错误局部极小值，需要专门针对部分重叠的位姿精化方法。

zh.help_to_user: 提供跨源空地LiDAR配准的基准和高效无训练精化方法，适用于机器人、自动驾驶等需要空地融合定位的场景。

idea_spark.idea: 利用地面作为共享几何先验，通过高度分层ICP和反向配准方向增强鲁棒性。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖地面平面假设，在无平坦地面的场景（如森林、山地）可能失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从标准ICP的局部极小值问题出发，通过几何先验和方向反转设计简单有效的精化流程。

en.tldr: Introduces Paired-CSLiDAR benchmark and RGSR method for cross-source aerial-ground LiDAR single-scan pose refinement, achieving high accuracy via height-stratified ICP and confidence-gated selection.
en.motivation: Aerial and ground LiDAR scans share limited geometry (mainly terrain), causing standard registration methods to converge to incorrect local minima; a specialized refinement pipeline is needed.
en.method: Proposes training-free, geometry-only Residual-Guided Stratified Registration (RGSR) with height-stratified ICP, reversed registration directions, and confidence-gated accept-if-better selection.
en.result: Achieves 86.0% S@0.75m and 99.8% S@1.0m on the primary benchmark, outperforming confidence-gated cascade (83.7%) and GeoTransformer (76.3%).
en.help_to_user: Provides a benchmark and efficient training-free refinement method for cross-source aerial-ground LiDAR registration, useful for robotics and autonomous driving.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage the ground plane as shared geometric prior via height-stratified ICP and reversed registration directions for robust refinement.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on ground plane assumption; may fail in non-flat terrains like forests or mountains.
idea_spark.inspiration: Addresses local minima in standard ICP by exploiting geometric priors and direction reversal to design a simple yet effective refinement pipeline.

papers.title: Combined Dictionary Unfolding Network with Gradient-Adaptive Fidelity for Transferable Multi-Source Fusion
papers.summary: Deep Unfolding Network-based methods have emerged as effective solutions for multi-source image fusion by combining model-driven iterative optimization with data-driven deep learning. However, most existing deep unfolding image fusion methods are derived from alternating minimization, which updates the features of different modalities separately. This design introduces considerable computational and memory overhead, limiting deployment on resource-constrained edge devices. To address this issue, we propose CDNet, a lightweight Combined Dictionary Unfolding Network for multi-source image fusion. Rather than introducing a new sparse coding prior or empirically compressing an existing fusion network, CDNet translates the unique-common decomposition prior of coupled dictionary learning into a structurally constrained joint unfolding architecture. The resulting CDBlock follows a block-sparse interaction topology and performs a model-derived joint update of common and modality-specific representations, thereby streamlining feature learning and improving efficiency.In addition, we design a compact High- and Low-frequency Image Fidelity loss for unsupervised training without ground-truth images. We evaluate CDNet on four tasks, including multi-exposure image fusion, infrared and visible image fusion, medical image fusion, and infrared and visible image fusion for semantic segmentation. Experimental results show that CDNet achieves competitive or superior fusion performance with high efficiency. For infrared and visible image fusion, CDNet outperforms competing methods on four of six metrics on the TNO dataset and five of six metrics on the RoadScene dataset. In particular, it surpasses the second-best method by 1.23 dB and 1.59 dB in PSNR on TNO and RoadScene, respectively.

ai.tldr: 提出CDNet，一种轻量级组合字典展开网络，通过结构约束联合展开架构实现多源图像融合，在多个任务上达到高效且竞争性的性能。
ai.motivation: 现有深度展开融合方法基于交替最小化，分别更新不同模态特征，导致计算和内存开销大，难以部署在资源受限的边缘设备。
ai.method: 将耦合字典学习的独特-公共分解先验转化为结构约束的联合展开架构，设计CDBlock采用块稀疏交互拓扑，联合更新公共和模态特定表示；并设计紧凑的高低频图像保真损失进行无监督训练。
ai.result: 在TNO和RoadScene数据集上，红外与可见光融合的PSNR分别超过第二名1.23 dB和1.59 dB，在四个融合任务上均取得竞争性或更优性能。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种高效、轻量的多源图像融合方案，适合边缘设备部署，无需真实图像即可训练。

idea_spark.idea: 将耦合字典学习的分解先验直接编码为网络结构，替代传统交替最小化，减少冗余计算。
idea_spark.risk: 联合更新可能限制模态特异性特征的表达能力，需验证在更多模态组合上的泛化性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从模型驱动的先验结构约束出发设计网络拓扑，而非单纯压缩现有网络，为轻量化提供新思路。

zh.help_to_user: 提供一种高效、轻量的多源图像融合方案，适合边缘设备部署，无需真实图像即可训练。

idea_spark.risk: 联合更新可能限制模态特异性特征的表达能力，需验证在更多模态组合上的泛化性。

en.tldr: Proposes CDNet, a lightweight combined dictionary unfolding network for multi-source image fusion, achieving competitive performance with high efficiency via a structurally constrained joint unfolding architecture.
en.motivation: Existing deep unfolding fusion methods update features of different modalities separately via alternating minimization, causing high computational and memory overhead that limits deployment on resource-constrained edge devices.
en.method: Translates the unique-common decomposition prior of coupled dictionary learning into a structurally constrained joint unfolding architecture; designs CDBlock with block-sparse interaction topology for joint update of common and modality-specific representations, and a compact high- and low-frequency image fidelity loss for unsupervised training.
en.result: Outperforms second-best method by 1.23 dB and 1.59 dB in PSNR on TNO and RoadScene datasets for infrared-visible fusion; achieves competitive or superior performance across four fusion tasks.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient, lightweight multi-source image fusion solution suitable for edge devices, trainable without ground-truth images.

idea_spark.idea: Directly encode the decomposition prior of coupled dictionary learning into network structure, replacing traditional alternating minimization to reduce redundant computation.
idea_spark.risk: Joint update may limit the expressiveness of modality-specific features; generalization to more modality combinations needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Designing network topology from model-driven prior structural constraints, rather than simply compressing existing networks, offers a new path to lightweight models.

papers.title: World Model for Robot Learning: A Comprehensive Survey
papers.summary: World models, which are predictive representations of how environments evolve under actions, have become a central component of robot learning. They support policy learning, planning, simulation, evaluation, data generation, and have advanced rapidly with the rise of foundation models and large-scale video generation. However, the literature remains fragmented across architectures, functional roles, and embodied application domains. To address this gap, we present a comprehensive review of world models from a robot-learning perspective. We examine how world models are coupled with robot policies, how they serve as learned simulators for reinforcement learning and evaluation, and how robotic video world models have progressed from imagination-based generation to controllable, structured, and foundation-scale formulations. We further connect these ideas to navigation and autonomous driving, and summarize representative datasets, benchmarks, and evaluation protocols. Overall, this survey systematically reviews the rapidly growing literature on world models for robot learning, clarifies key paradigms and applications, and highlights major challenges and future directions for predictive modeling in embodied agents. To facilitate continued access to newly emerging works, benchmarks, and resources, we will maintain and regularly update the accompanying GitHub repository alongside this survey.

ai.tldr: 本文从机器人学习的角度全面综述了世界模型，涵盖其与策略的耦合、作为模拟器的作用、视频世界模型的进展，以及在导航和自动驾驶中的应用。
ai.motivation: 世界模型在机器人学习中日益重要，但相关文献分散于不同架构、功能和领域，缺乏系统性梳理。
ai.method: 通过分类讨论世界模型与策略的耦合方式、作为强化学习模拟器的角色、视频世界模型从想象生成到可控基础模型的发展，并连接导航与自动驾驶领域。
ai.result: 系统总结了世界模型的关键范式、应用、数据集、基准和评估协议，并指出了主要挑战和未来方向。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助研究者快速了解世界模型在机器人学习中的全貌，包括核心概念、主流方法和未解决问题。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将大规模视频生成模型与强化学习策略直接结合，实现零样本策略迁移。
idea_spark.risk: 视频生成模型的计算成本高，且生成质量与真实环境存在差距，可能导致策略泛化失败。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受导航和自动驾驶中世界模型应用的启发，可尝试将结构化场景表示引入通用机器人操作任务。

idea_spark.risk: 视频生成模型的计算成本高，且生成质量与真实环境存在差距，可能导致策略泛化失败。

en.tldr: This paper provides a comprehensive survey of world models from a robot learning perspective, covering their coupling with policies, role as simulators, progress in video world models, and applications in navigation and autonomous driving.
en.motivation: World models are increasingly important in robot learning, but the literature is fragmented across architectures, functions, and domains, lacking a systematic review.
en.method: Categorically discusses how world models couple with robot policies, serve as learned simulators for reinforcement learning, evolve from imagination-based to controllable foundation-scale video generation, and connect to navigation and autonomous driving.
en.result: Systematically summarizes key paradigms, applications, datasets, benchmarks, and evaluation protocols, and highlights major challenges and future directions.
en.help_to_user: Helps researchers quickly grasp the landscape of world models in robot learning, including core concepts, mainstream methods, and open problems.

idea_spark.idea: Explore directly combining large-scale video generation models with reinforcement learning policies for zero-shot policy transfer.
idea_spark.risk: High computational cost of video generation and the gap between generated and real environments may lead to policy generalization failure.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by world model applications in navigation and autonomous driving, structured scene representations could be introduced into general robotic manipulation tasks.

papers.title: High-Speed Vision Improves Zero-Shot Semantic Understanding of Human Actions
papers.summary: Understanding human actions from visual observations is essential for human--robot interaction, particularly when semantic interpretation of unfamiliar or hard-to-annotate actions is required. In scenarios such as rapid and less common activities, collecting sufficient labeled data for supervised learning is challenging, making zero-shot approaches a practical alternative for semantic understanding without task-specific training. While recent advances in large-scale pretrained models enable such zero-shot reasoning, the impact of temporal resolution, especially for rapid and fine-grained motions, remains underexplored.   In this study, we investigate how temporal resolution affects zero-shot semantic understanding of high-speed human actions. Using kendo as a representative case of rapid and subtle motion patterns, we propose a training-free pipeline that combines a pre-trained video-language model for semantic representation with large language model-based reasoning for pairwise action comparison. Through controlled experiments across multiple frame rates (120 Hz, 60 Hz, and 30 Hz), we show that higher temporal resolution significantly improves semantic separability in zero-shot settings. We further analyze the role of tracking-based human joint information under both full and partial observation scenarios. Quantitative evaluation using a nearest-class prototype strategy demonstrates that high-speed video provides more stable and interpretable semantic representations for fast actions. These findings highlight the importance of temporal resolution in training-free action recognition and suggest that high-speed perception can enhance semantic understanding capabilities.

ai.tldr: 研究高速视觉在零样本语义理解中的作用，通过剑道动作实验发现高帧率（120Hz）显著提升语义可分性。
ai.motivation: 现有零样本动作理解方法忽略时间分辨率对快速动作的影响，而高速视觉可能提供更丰富的运动信息。
ai.method: 提出无需训练的流水线：预训练视频-语言模型提取语义特征，结合大语言模型进行成对动作比较，并在不同帧率（120/60/30Hz）下控制实验。
ai.result: 高时间分辨率（120Hz）显著提高零样本语义可分性，基于跟踪的人体关节信息在部分观测下仍有效。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解高速视觉如何提升机器人对快速、细微动作的语义理解能力。

idea_spark.idea: 结合高速相机与预训练模型，实现无需标注的实时动作语义理解。
idea_spark.risk: 高速视频数据获取成本高，且模型对帧率变化的鲁棒性需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 时间分辨率可作为零样本动作识别中的关键超参数，启发动态帧率选择策略。

zh.tldr: 研究高速视觉在零样本语义理解中的作用，通过剑道动作实验发现高帧率（120Hz）显著提升语义可分性。

zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解高速视觉如何提升机器人对快速、细微动作的语义理解能力。

idea_spark.inspiration: 时间分辨率可作为零样本动作识别中的关键超参数，启发动态帧率选择策略。

en.tldr: High-speed vision improves zero-shot semantic understanding of human actions; experiments on kendo show higher frame rates (120Hz) significantly enhance semantic separability.
en.motivation: Existing zero-shot action understanding overlooks temporal resolution's impact on rapid motions; high-speed vision may provide richer motion cues.
en.method: A training-free pipeline combining a pre-trained video-language model for semantic representation with LLM-based pairwise action comparison, tested across multiple frame rates (120/60/30 Hz).
en.result: Higher temporal resolution (120Hz) significantly boosts zero-shot semantic separability; tracking-based joint information remains effective under partial observation.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how high-speed vision can enhance robots' semantic understanding of rapid, subtle actions.

idea_spark.idea: Combine high-speed cameras with pretrained models for real-time, annotation-free action semantic understanding.
idea_spark.risk: High-speed video acquisition is costly, and model robustness to frame rate variations needs further validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Temporal resolution can serve as a key hyperparameter in zero-shot action recognition, inspiring dynamic frame rate selection strategies.

papers.title: Directed Social Regard: Surfacing Targeted Advocacy, Opposition, Aid, Harms, and Victimization in Online Media
papers.summary: The language in online platforms, influence operations, and political rhetoric frequently directs a mix of pro-social sentiment (e.g., advocacy, helpfulness, compassion) and anti-social sentiment (e.g., threats, opposition, blame) at different topics, all in the same message. While many natural language processing (NLP) tools classify or score a text's overall sentiment as positive, neutral, or negative, these tools cannot report that positive and negative sentiments coexist, and they cannot report the target of those sentiments. This paper presents the Directed Social Regard (DSR) approach to multi-dimensional, multi-valence sentiment analysis, comprised of a pair of transformer-based models that (1) detects span-level targets of sentiment in a message and then (2) scores all spans within the message context along three (-1, 1) axes of regard that are motivated by social science theories of moral disengagement and moral framing. We present a data collection and annotation strategy for DSR dataset construction, a transformer-based architecture for span-level scoring, and a validation study with promising results. We apply the validated DSR model on six third-party datasets of online media and report meaningful correlations between DSR outputs and the labels and topics in these pre-existing social science datasets.

ai.tldr: 提出定向社会关注（DSR）方法，通过一对Transformer模型检测消息中情感的目标跨度，并沿三个道德维度评分，实现多维度、多极性的情感分析。
ai.motivation: 现有NLP工具只能对文本整体情感进行正/负/中性分类，无法处理同一消息中同时存在的正负情感，也无法报告情感的具体目标。
ai.method: 构建DSR数据集并设计标注策略；采用基于Transformer的架构，先检测消息中情感的目标跨度，再在消息上下文中沿三个（-1,1）道德维度对所有跨度进行评分。
ai.result: 在六个第三方在线媒体数据集上验证，DSR输出与预存标签和主题之间存在有意义的关联。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户识别在线媒体中针对不同目标的倡导、反对、援助、伤害和受害化等复杂情感表达。

idea_spark.idea: 将DSR框架扩展到多语言场景，或结合知识图谱增强对隐含情感目标的识别。
idea_spark.risk: 道德维度定义可能带有文化偏见，跨文化应用时需重新校准。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴社会心理学中的道德脱离理论，为情感分析提供理论驱动的维度设计。

zh.tldr: 提出定向社会关注（DSR）方法，通过一对Transformer模型检测消息中情感的目标跨度，并沿三个道德维度评分，实现多维度、多极性的情感分析。

idea_spark.idea: 将DSR框架扩展到多语言场景，或结合知识图谱增强对隐含情感目标的识别。
idea_spark.risk: 道德维度定义可能带有文化偏见，跨文化应用时需重新校准。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴社会心理学中的道德脱离理论，为情感分析提供理论驱动的维度设计。

en.tldr: Proposes Directed Social Regard (DSR), a pair of transformer-based models that detect span-level targets of sentiment and score them along three moral dimensions, enabling multi-dimensional, multi-valence sentiment analysis.
en.motivation: Existing NLP tools classify overall sentiment as positive/neutral/negative but cannot capture coexisting positive and negative sentiments nor identify their targets.
en.method: Constructs DSR dataset with annotation strategy; uses transformer architecture to first detect span-level sentiment targets, then score all spans within message context along three (-1,1) axes of regard grounded in moral disengagement and moral framing theories.
en.result: Validation on six third-party online media datasets shows meaningful correlations between DSR outputs and pre-existing labels and topics.
en.help_to_user: Helps users identify complex sentiment expressions such as advocacy, opposition, aid, harms, and victimization directed at different targets in online media.

idea_spark.idea: Extend DSR framework to multilingual settings or integrate with knowledge graphs to improve recognition of implicit sentiment targets.
idea_spark.risk: Moral dimension definitions may carry cultural bias; recalibration needed for cross-cultural applications.
idea_spark.inspiration: Draws on moral disengagement theory from social psychology to provide theory-driven dimensions for sentiment analysis.

papers.title: Modeling Subjective Urban Perception with Human Gaze
papers.summary: Urban perception describes how people subjectively evaluate urban environments, shaping how cities are experienced and understood. Existing computational approaches primarily model urban perception directly from street view images, but largely ignore the human perceptual process through which such judgments are formed. In this paper, we introduce Place Pulse-Gaze, an urban perception dataset that augments street view images with synchronized eye-tracking recordings and individual perception labels. Based on this dataset, we propose a Gaze-Guided Urban Perception Framework to study how gaze behavior contributes to the modeling of subjective urban perception. The framework systematically investigates three complementary settings: gaze-only modeling, gaze fusion with explicit semantic scene representations, and gaze fusion with implicit richer visual representations. Experiments show that gaze alone already carries useful predictive signals for subjective urban perception, and that integrating gaze with scene representations further improves prediction under both semantic and richer visual representations. Overall, our findings highlight the importance of incorporating human perceptual processes into urban scene understanding and open a direction for gaze-guided multimodal urban computing.

ai.tldr: 提出一个包含眼动追踪的城市感知数据集和基于注视引导的框架，证明注视行为能有效建模主观城市感知。
ai.motivation: 现有方法直接从街景图像建模城市感知，忽略了人类形成这些判断的感知过程。
ai.method: 构建Place Pulse-Gaze数据集，包含街景图像、同步眼动记录和个体感知标签；提出注视引导框架，探索仅注视、注视融合语义场景表示、注视融合隐式视觉表示三种设置。
ai.result: 注视本身携带有效预测信号，融合场景表示进一步提升预测性能。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何将人类注视信息融入城市场景理解，提升主观感知建模的准确性。

idea_spark.idea: 结合注视热力图与语义分割，构建可解释的城市感知模型，揭示哪些视觉元素最影响主观评价。
idea_spark.risk: 眼动数据采集成本高，可能限制大规模应用；注视行为存在个体差异，需考虑泛化性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将人类注意力机制引入其他视觉理解任务，如自动驾驶中的行人意图预测。

zh.tldr: 提出一个包含眼动追踪的城市感知数据集和基于注视引导的框架，证明注视行为能有效建模主观城市感知。
zh.motivation: 现有方法直接从街景图像建模城市感知，忽略了人类形成这些判断的感知过程。
zh.method: 构建Place Pulse-Gaze数据集，包含街景图像、同步眼动记录和个体感知标签；提出注视引导框架，探索仅注视、注视融合语义场景表示、注视融合隐式视觉表示三种设置。
zh.result: 注视本身携带有效预测信号，融合场景表示进一步提升预测性能。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何将人类注视信息融入城市场景理解，提升主观感知建模的准确性。

idea_spark.idea: 结合注视热力图与语义分割，构建可解释的城市感知模型，揭示哪些视觉元素最影响主观评价。
idea_spark.risk: 眼动数据采集成本高，可能限制大规模应用；注视行为存在个体差异，需考虑泛化性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将人类注意力机制引入其他视觉理解任务，如自动驾驶中的行人意图预测。

en.tldr: Introduces an urban perception dataset with eye-tracking and a gaze-guided framework, showing that gaze behavior effectively models subjective urban perception.
en.motivation: Existing methods model urban perception directly from street view images, ignoring the human perceptual process behind such judgments.
en.method: Constructs Place Pulse-Gaze dataset with street view images, synchronized eye-tracking recordings, and individual perception labels; proposes a gaze-guided framework exploring three settings: gaze-only, gaze fusion with semantic scene representations, and gaze fusion with implicit richer visual representations.
en.result: Gaze alone carries useful predictive signals, and integrating gaze with scene representations further improves prediction.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand how to incorporate human gaze into urban scene understanding for better subjective perception modeling.

idea_spark.idea: Combine gaze heatmaps with semantic segmentation to build interpretable urban perception models, revealing which visual elements most influence subjective evaluations.
idea_spark.risk: Eye-tracking data collection is costly, potentially limiting large-scale application; gaze behavior varies across individuals, raising generalization concerns.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires incorporating human attention mechanisms into other visual understanding tasks, such as pedestrian intention prediction in autonomous driving.

papers.title: The $\textit{Silicon Society}$ Cookbook: Design Space of LLM-based Social Simulations
papers.summary: Studies attempting to simulate human behavior with $\textit{Silicon Societies}$ grow in numbers while LLM-only social networks have started appearing outside of controlled settings. However, the design space of these networks remains under-studied, which contributes to a gap in validating model realism. To enable future works to make more informed design decisions, we perform a systematic analysis of the consequences and interactions of key design choices in simulated social networks, including the choice of base model used to model individual agents, and how they are connected to each other. Using surveys as a proxy for agent opinions, our findings suggest that the geometry of the design space is non-trivial, with some parameters behaving in additive ways while others display more complex interactions. In particular, the choice of the base LLM is the most important variable impacting the simulation outcomes.

ai.tldr: 系统分析了基于大语言模型的社交网络模拟中关键设计选择的影响与交互，发现基础模型选择是最重要的变量。
ai.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对硅基社会网络设计空间的系统理解，导致模型真实性验证存在缺口。
ai.method: 通过调查问卷作为代理意见，系统分析基础模型选择、代理连接方式等设计参数对模拟结果的影响。
ai.result: 设计空间几何结构非平凡，部分参数呈加性作用，另一些则显示复杂交互；基础LLM选择是影响模拟结果的最重要变量。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助研究者理解LLM社交模拟中设计选择的后果，从而做出更明智的决策。

idea_spark.idea: 探索不同基础模型（如GPT-4、Llama）在模拟中表现出的社会行为差异，并构建可解释的映射关系。
idea_spark.risk: 过度简化真实社会复杂性可能导致模拟结果偏差，需谨慎验证外部有效性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受参数交互复杂性启发，可开发自适应设计空间探索工具，自动推荐最优参数组合。

zh.tldr: 系统分析了基于大语言模型的社交网络模拟中关键设计选择的影响与交互，发现基础模型选择是最重要的变量。
zh.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对硅基社会网络设计空间的系统理解，导致模型真实性验证存在缺口。

idea_spark.risk: 过度简化真实社会复杂性可能导致模拟结果偏差，需谨慎验证外部有效性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受参数交互复杂性启发，可开发自适应设计空间探索工具，自动推荐最优参数组合。

en.tldr: A systematic analysis of key design choices in LLM-based social network simulations, revealing that base model selection is the most influential variable.
en.motivation: The design space of Silicon Societies remains under-studied, hindering validation of model realism.
en.method: Using surveys as a proxy for agent opinions, we systematically analyze the effects and interactions of design parameters such as base model and agent connectivity.
en.result: The design space geometry is non-trivial; some parameters are additive while others exhibit complex interactions, with base LLM choice being the most important factor.
en.help_to_user: Enables researchers to make more informed design decisions in LLM-based social simulations.

idea_spark.idea: Explore and map the behavioral differences across base models (e.g., GPT-4, Llama) in simulations to build interpretable relationships.
idea_spark.risk: Oversimplifying real social complexity may lead to biased simulations; external validity must be carefully assessed.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by parameter interaction complexity, develop an adaptive design space exploration tool to automatically recommend optimal parameter combinations.

papers.title: Prompt-Induced Score Variance in Zero-Shot Binary Vision-Language Safety Classification
papers.summary: Single-prompt first-token probabilities from zero-shot vision-language model (VLM) safety classifiers are treated as decision scores, but we show they are unreliable under semantically equivalent prompt reformulation: even when the binary label is constrained to a fixed output position, equivalent prompts can induce materially different unsafe probabilities for the same sample. Across multimodal safety benchmarks and multiple VLM families, cross-prompt variance is strongly associated with prompt-level disagreement and higher error, making it a useful fragility diagnostic. A training-free mean ensemble improves NLL on all 14 dataset-model evaluation pairs and ECE on 12/14 relative to a train-selected single-prompt baseline, and wins more head-to-head NLL comparisons than labeled temperature scaling, Platt scaling, and isotonic regression applied to the same prompt. Ranking gains are consistent against the train-selected baseline on both AUROC and AUPRC, and against the full 15-prompt distribution remain consistent on AUPRC while softening on AUROC. Labeled calibration on top of the mean provides further gains when labels are available, identifying prompt averaging as a strong label-free first stage rather than a replacement for calibration. We frame this as a reliability stress test for zero-shot VLM first-token safety scores and recommend prompt-family evaluation with mean aggregation as a standard label-free reliability baseline.

ai.tldr: 零样本视觉语言模型安全分类器在语义等价提示下得分不稳定，提示平均可提升可靠性。
ai.motivation: 零样本VLM安全分类器常用单提示首词概率作为决策分数，但该分数在语义等价提示下不可靠，需诊断和缓解。
ai.method: 分析跨提示方差与错误关联，提出无训练均值集成，并与温度缩放、Platt缩放等校准方法对比。
ai.result: 均值集成在14个数据集-模型对上改善NLL，12/14改善ECE，AUROC和AUPRC排名优于单提示基线。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种无标签的提示族评估与均值聚合基线，提升零样本安全分类的可靠性。

idea_spark.idea: 将提示方差作为模型脆弱性诊断指标，并开发自适应提示选择或加权集成方法。
idea_spark.risk: 均值集成可能掩盖极端错误，需结合校准；提示族构建需覆盖语义等价变体。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从提示工程转向提示族可靠性评估，类似集成学习中的方差-偏差权衡。

idea_spark.inspiration: 从提示工程转向提示族可靠性评估，类似集成学习中的方差-偏差权衡。

en.tldr: Zero-shot VLM safety classifiers yield unreliable scores under semantically equivalent prompts; prompt averaging improves reliability.
en.motivation: Single-prompt first-token probabilities from zero-shot VLM safety classifiers are treated as decision scores but are unreliable under semantically equivalent prompt reformulation, requiring diagnosis and mitigation.
en.method: Analyze cross-prompt variance association with errors, propose training-free mean ensemble, and compare with calibration methods like temperature scaling, Platt scaling, and isotonic regression.
en.result: Mean ensemble improves NLL on all 14 dataset-model pairs, ECE on 12/14, and ranking gains on AUROC and AUPRC over train-selected single-prompt baseline.
en.help_to_user: Provides a label-free prompt-family evaluation and mean aggregation baseline to enhance reliability of zero-shot safety classification.

idea_spark.idea: Use prompt variance as a fragility diagnostic and develop adaptive prompt selection or weighted ensemble methods.
idea_spark.risk: Mean ensemble may mask extreme errors, requiring calibration; prompt family construction must cover semantically equivalent variants.
idea_spark.inspiration: Shift from prompt engineering to prompt-family reliability assessment, akin to variance-bias trade-off in ensemble learning.

papers.title: A Survey of Reasoning-Intensive Retrieval: Progress and Challenges
papers.summary: Reasoning-Intensive Retrieval (RIR) targets retrieval settings where relevance is mediated by latent inferential links between a query and supporting evidence, rather than semantic similarity. Motivated by the emergent reasoning abilities of Large Language Models (LLMs), recent work integrates these capabilities into the IR field, spanning the entire pipeline from benchmarks to retrievers and rerankers. Despite this progress, the field lacks a systematic framework to organize current efforts and articulate a clear path forward. To provide a clear roadmap for this rapidly growing yet fragmented area, this survey (1) systematizes existing RIR benchmarks by knowledge domains and modalities, providing a detailed analysis of the current landscape; (2) introduces a structured taxonomy that categorizes methods based on where and how reasoning is integrated into the retrieval pipeline, alongside an analysis of their trade-offs and practical applications; and (3) summarizes challenges and future directions to guide research in this evolving field.

ai.tldr: 本文综述了推理密集型检索（RIR）领域，系统化了现有基准、方法分类及未来挑战。
ai.motivation: 现有RIR研究缺乏系统框架，难以组织当前工作和明确发展方向。
ai.method: 通过分析基准（按知识领域和模态）、提出结构化分类法（按推理集成位置和方式）以及总结挑战与未来方向。
ai.result: 提供了RIR领域的清晰路线图，包括基准分析、方法分类和未来研究指南。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户快速理解推理密集型检索的现状、方法分类和未来研究方向。

idea_spark.idea: 设计一个统一基准，覆盖多模态和跨知识领域的推理密集型检索任务。
idea_spark.risk: 基准设计可能过于复杂，难以覆盖所有推理类型。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴LLM推理能力，开发端到端推理检索模型。

en.tldr: This survey systematizes Reasoning-Intensive Retrieval (RIR), covering benchmarks, a taxonomy of methods, and future challenges.
en.motivation: The field lacks a systematic framework to organize current RIR efforts and articulate a clear path forward.
en.method: By analyzing benchmarks (by knowledge domain and modality), introducing a structured taxonomy (by where and how reasoning is integrated), and summarizing challenges and future directions.
en.result: Provides a clear roadmap for RIR, including benchmark analysis, method categorization, and research guidance.
en.help_to_user: Helps users quickly understand the state, method taxonomy, and future directions of reasoning-intensive retrieval.

idea_spark.idea: Design a unified benchmark covering multimodal and cross-domain reasoning-intensive retrieval tasks.
idea_spark.risk: The benchmark may be too complex to cover all reasoning types.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leverage LLM reasoning abilities to develop end-to-end reasoning retrieval models.

papers.title: Adaptive Geodesic Conformal Prediction for Egocentric Camera Pose Estimation
papers.summary: Egocentric pose estimation for Augmented Reality (AR) and assistive devices requires not just accurate predictions but guaranteed uncertainty regions. Conformal prediction (CP) provides such guarantees without retraining, but we show that standard CP with a single fixed threshold achieves nominal 90% overall coverage while covering only ~60% of the hardest 25% of frames (Q4) -- a ~30 percentage-point conditional coverage gap consistent across 12 participants, 3 predictors, and 3 horizons (108 evaluations) on EPIC-Fields. We further show that a geodesic SE(3) nonconformity score identifies physically harder frames than Euclidean scoring, with only 15-26% Q4 overlap and 2-3x higher ground-truth camera displacement for geodesic Q4 frames. To close the coverage gap, we propose DINOv2-Bridge adaptive CP: a two-stage difficulty estimator trained on a single source participant that transfers cross-participant without any images at test time, improving Q4 coverage from ~0.75 to ~0.93 while maintaining overall coverage at the 90% target.

ai.tldr: 提出自适应测地线共形预测方法，缩小自我中心相机姿态估计中的条件覆盖差距。
ai.motivation: 标准共形预测在自我中心姿态估计中对困难帧覆盖不足，存在约30个百分点的条件覆盖差距。
ai.method: 使用测地线SE(3)非一致性分数识别困难帧，并设计DINOv2-Bridge两阶段难度估计器，无需测试图像即可跨参与者迁移。
ai.result: Q4覆盖从约0.75提升至0.93，整体覆盖保持90%目标。
ai.help_to_user: 为AR和辅助设备提供有保证的不确定性区域，提升困难场景下的可靠性。

idea_spark.idea: 利用预训练视觉特征（DINOv2）进行无图像跨参与者难度估计。
idea_spark.risk: 跨参与者迁移可能受数据分布差异影响，需更多验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 测地线距离比欧氏距离更能反映物理难度，可启发其他几何感知的不确定性方法。

en.tldr: Proposes adaptive geodesic conformal prediction to close the conditional coverage gap in egocentric camera pose estimation.
en.motivation: Standard conformal prediction undercovers hard frames in egocentric pose estimation, with a ~30 percentage-point conditional coverage gap.
en.method: Uses geodesic SE(3) nonconformity score to identify hard frames and designs DINOv2-Bridge two-stage difficulty estimator that transfers cross-participant without test images.
en.result: Q4 coverage improves from ~0.75 to 0.93 while maintaining 90% overall coverage.
en.help_to_user: Provides guaranteed uncertainty regions for AR and assistive devices, improving reliability in challenging scenarios.

idea_spark.idea: Leverages pretrained visual features (DINOv2) for image-free cross-participant difficulty estimation.
idea_spark.risk: Cross-participant transfer may be affected by data distribution shifts and needs further validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Geodesic distance better captures physical difficulty than Euclidean distance, inspiring other geometry-aware uncertainty methods.

papers.title: LIMSSR: LLM-Driven Sequence-to-Score Reasoning under Training-Time Incomplete Multimodal Observations
papers.summary: Real-world multimodal learning is often hindered by missing modalities. While Incomplete Multimodal Learning (IML) has gained traction, existing methods typically rely on the unrealistic assumption of full-modal availability during training to provide reconstruction supervision or cross-modal priors. This paper tackles the more challenging setting of IML under training-time incomplete observations, which precludes reliance on a ``God's eye view'' of complete data. We propose LIMSSR (LLM-Driven Incomplete Multimodal Sequence-to-Score Reasoning), a framework that reformulates this challenge as a conditional sequence reasoning task. LIMSSR leverages the semantic reasoning capabilities of Large Language Models via Prompt-Guided Context-Aware Modality Imputation and Multidimensional Representation Fusion to infer latent semantics from available contexts without direct reconstruction. To mitigate hallucinations, we introduce a Mask-Aware Dual-Path Aggregation to dynamically calibrate inference uncertainty. Extensive experiments on three Action Quality Assessment datasets demonstrate that LIMSSR significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines without relying on complete training data, establishing a new paradigm for data-efficient multimodal learning. Code is available at https://github.com/XuHuangbiao/LIMSSR.

ai.tldr: 提出LIMSSR框架，利用大语言模型在训练时缺失模态的情况下进行序列到分数的推理，无需完整数据。
ai.motivation: 现实多模态学习中常缺失模态，现有方法假设训练时模态完整，不切实际。
ai.method: 将问题转化为条件序列推理，通过提示引导上下文感知模态填补和多维表示融合推断语义，并用掩码感知双路径聚合校准不确定性。
ai.result: 在三个动作质量评估数据集上显著优于现有方法，无需完整训练数据。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种在训练数据不完整时仍能有效进行多模态学习的新范式。

idea_spark.idea: 利用LLM的语义推理能力替代显式重构，结合动态校准减少幻觉。
idea_spark.risk: LLM可能引入额外计算开销，且对提示设计敏感。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将缺失模态视为条件推理问题，而非重构问题，启发更鲁棒的多模态学习策略。

en.tldr: Proposes LIMSSR, an LLM-driven framework for sequence-to-score reasoning under training-time missing modalities without requiring complete data.
en.motivation: Real-world multimodal learning suffers from missing modalities; existing methods unrealistically assume full-modal availability during training.
en.method: Reformulates the problem as conditional sequence reasoning, using prompt-guided context-aware modality imputation and multidimensional representation fusion to infer semantics, with mask-aware dual-path aggregation to calibrate uncertainty.
en.result: Outperforms state-of-the-art baselines on three action quality assessment datasets without relying on complete training data.
en.help_to_user: Provides a new paradigm for effective multimodal learning when training data is incomplete.

idea_spark.idea: Leverages LLM semantic reasoning to replace explicit reconstruction, with dynamic calibration to reduce hallucinations.
idea_spark.risk: LLM may introduce extra computational cost and is sensitive to prompt design.
idea_spark.inspiration: Treating missing modalities as a conditional reasoning problem rather than a reconstruction problem inspires more robust multimodal learning strategies.

papers.title: Lucid-XR: An Extended-Reality Data Engine for Robotic Manipulation
papers.summary: We introduce Lucid-XR, a generative data engine for creating diverse and realistic-looking multi-modal data to train real-world robotic systems. At the core of Lucid-XR is vuer, a web-based physics simulation environment that runs directly on the XR headset, enabling internet-scale access to immersive, latency-free virtual interactions without requiring specialized equipment. The complete system integrates on-device physics simulation with human-to-robot pose retargeting. Data collected is further amplified by a physics-guided video generation pipeline steerable via natural language specifications. We demonstrate zero-shot transfer of robot visual policies to unseen, cluttered, and badly lit evaluation environments, after training entirely on Lucid-XR's synthetic data. We include examples across dexterous manipulation tasks that involve soft materials, loosely bound particles, and rigid body contact. Project website: https://lucidxr.github.io

ai.tldr: 提出Lucid-XR，一个生成式数据引擎，用于创建多样逼真的多模态数据以训练真实机器人系统。
ai.motivation: 现有机器人训练数据获取成本高、场景单一，难以泛化到真实环境。
ai.method: 基于vuer的Web物理仿真环境，集成设备端仿真、人体到机器人姿态重定向，以及自然语言引导的物理感知视频生成。
ai.result: 仅使用合成数据训练的视觉策略可在未见过的杂乱、光照差的环境中零样本迁移，涵盖软材料、松散颗粒和刚体接触任务。
ai.help_to_user: 提供低成本、可扩展的机器人训练数据生成方案，降低真实数据采集依赖。

idea_spark.idea: 利用XR头显实现沉浸式、低延迟的人机交互数据采集，并通过自然语言控制数据增强。
idea_spark.risk: 合成数据与真实数据之间的域差异可能影响迁移效果，需进一步验证鲁棒性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合Web技术和XR设备，实现大规模分布式数据生成，启发其他领域（如自动驾驶）的合成数据引擎设计。

en.tldr: Lucid-XR is a generative data engine for creating diverse, realistic multi-modal data to train real-world robotic systems.
en.motivation: Existing robotic training data is costly and lacks diversity, hindering generalization to real environments.
en.method: Uses vuer, a web-based physics simulation on XR headsets, integrating on-device simulation, human-to-robot pose retargeting, and physics-guided video generation steered by natural language.

en.help_to_user: Provides a low-cost, scalable solution for generating robotic training data, reducing reliance on real-world data collection.

idea_spark.risk: Domain gap between synthetic and real data may affect transfer performance; robustness needs further validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining web technology and XR devices for large-scale distributed data generation inspires synthetic data engines in other fields like autonomous driving.

papers.title: Dynamic-TD3: A Novel Algorithm for UAV Path Planning with Dynamic Obstacle Trajectory Prediction
papers.summary: Deep reinforcement learning (DRL) finds extensive application in autonomous drone navigation within complex, high-risk environments. However, its practical deployment faces a safety-exploration dilemma: soft penalty mechanisms encourage risky trial-and-error, while most constraint-based methods suffer degraded performance under sensor noise and intent uncertainty. We propose Dynamic-TD3, a physically enhanced framework that enforces strict safety constraints while maintaining maneuverability by modeling navigation as a Constrained Markov Decision Process (CMDP). This framework integrates an Adaptive Trajectory Relational Evolution Mechanism (ATREM) to capture long-range intentions and employs a Physically Aware Gated Kalman Filter (PAG-KF) to mitigate non-stationary observation noise. The resulting state representation drives a dual-criterion policy that balances mission efficiency against hard safety constraints via Lagrangian relaxation. In experiments with aggressive dynamic threats, this approach demonstrates superior collision avoidance performance, reduced energy consumption, and smoother flight trajectories.

ai.tldr: 提出Dynamic-TD3算法，通过物理增强框架解决无人机路径规划中的安全-探索困境，在动态威胁下实现高效避障与平滑飞行。
ai.motivation: 现有深度强化学习方法在无人机导航中面临安全-探索困境：软惩罚机制鼓励冒险，约束方法在传感器噪声和意图不确定下性能下降。
ai.method: 将导航建模为约束马尔可夫决策过程，集成自适应轨迹关系演化机制捕获长程意图，采用物理感知门控卡尔曼滤波器抑制非平稳观测噪声，通过拉格朗日松弛平衡任务效率与硬安全约束。
ai.result: 在激进动态威胁实验中，该方法展现出更优的避碰性能、更低的能耗和更平滑的飞行轨迹。
ai.help_to_user: 为无人机在复杂动态环境中的安全自主导航提供了一种兼顾效率与硬约束的强化学习框架。

idea_spark.idea: 将轨迹预测与状态估计深度融合，通过门控机制自适应融合物理模型与数据驱动，提升对非平稳噪声的鲁棒性。
idea_spark.risk: 物理模型假设可能与实际环境偏差较大，门控机制参数调优复杂，且拉格朗日松弛可能引入额外超参数敏感度。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受卡尔曼滤波与强化学习结合的启发，可进一步探索将物理先验（如动力学模型）嵌入策略网络或值函数的设计。

en.tldr: Proposes Dynamic-TD3, a physically enhanced framework that addresses the safety-exploration dilemma in UAV path planning, achieving superior collision avoidance, lower energy consumption, and smoother trajectories under aggressive dynamic threats.
en.motivation: Existing deep reinforcement learning methods for UAV navigation face a safety-exploration dilemma: soft penalties encourage risky trial-and-error, while constraint-based methods degrade under sensor noise and intent uncertainty.
en.method: Models navigation as a Constrained Markov Decision Process, integrates an Adaptive Trajectory Relational Evolution Mechanism to capture long-range intentions, employs a Physically Aware Gated Kalman Filter to mitigate non-stationary observation noise, and balances mission efficiency against hard safety constraints via Lagrangian relaxation.
en.result: In experiments with aggressive dynamic threats, the approach demonstrates superior collision avoidance, reduced energy consumption, and smoother flight trajectories.
en.help_to_user: Provides a reinforcement learning framework that balances efficiency and hard safety constraints for safe autonomous UAV navigation in complex dynamic environments.

idea_spark.idea: Deeply integrate trajectory prediction and state estimation, using a gating mechanism to adaptively fuse physical models and data-driven components for robustness against non-stationary noise.
idea_spark.risk: Physical model assumptions may deviate from real environments; gating mechanism tuning is complex; Lagrangian relaxation may introduce extra hyperparameter sensitivity.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the combination of Kalman filtering and reinforcement learning, further explore embedding physical priors (e.g., dynamics models) into policy networks or value functions.

papers.title: Leveraging Vision-Language Models as Weak Annotators in Active Learning
papers.summary: Active learning aims to reduce annotation cost by selectively querying informative samples for supervision under a limited labeling budget. In this work, we investigate how vision-language models (VLMs) can be leveraged to further reduce the reliance on costly human annotation within the active learning paradigm. To this end, we find that the reliability of VLMs varies significantly with label granularity in fine-grained recognition tasks: they perform poorly on fine-grained labels but can provide accurate coarse-grained labels. Leveraging this property, we propose an active learning framework that combines fine-grained human annotations with coarse-grained VLM-generated weak labels through instance-wise label assignment. We further model the systematic noise in VLM-generated labels using a small set of trusted full labels. Experiments on CUB200 and FGVC-Aircraft show that the proposed framework consistently outperforms existing active learning methods under the same annotation budget.

ai.tldr: 提出利用视觉语言模型生成粗粒度弱标签，结合少量细粒度人工标注，在主动学习框架下降低标注成本。
ai.motivation: 主动学习依赖人工标注，成本高；视觉语言模型在细粒度任务上不可靠，但能提供准确的粗粒度标签，可辅助减少人工标注量。
ai.method: 设计主动学习框架，通过实例级标签分配结合人工细粒度标注和VLM粗粒度弱标签，并用少量可信标签建模VLM的系统噪声。
ai.result: 在CUB200和FGVC-Aircraft数据集上，相同标注预算下优于现有主动学习方法。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何利用预训练视觉语言模型作为弱标注器，降低主动学习中的人工标注成本。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将VLM生成的弱标签与主动学习结合，通过噪声建模提升标签质量。
idea_spark.risk: VLM在极端细粒度或领域差异大的任务上可能仍不可靠，噪声建模需要足够可信标签。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用多粒度标签互补性，启发设计更高效的半监督或弱监督主动学习策略。

en.tldr: Proposes an active learning framework that combines fine-grained human annotations with coarse-grained weak labels from vision-language models, reducing annotation cost.
en.motivation: Active learning relies on costly human annotation; VLMs provide accurate coarse-grained labels despite poor fine-grained performance, offering a way to reduce human effort.
en.method: Instance-wise label assignment merges human fine-grained labels and VLM coarse-grained weak labels; systematic noise in VLM labels is modeled using a small set of trusted full labels.
en.result: Outperforms existing active learning methods on CUB200 and FGVC-Aircraft under the same annotation budget.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to leverage pre-trained VLMs as weak annotators to reduce human annotation cost in active learning.

idea_spark.idea: Explore combining VLM-generated weak labels with active learning, using noise modeling to improve label quality.
idea_spark.risk: VLMs may still be unreliable on extremely fine-grained or domain-distant tasks; noise modeling requires sufficient trusted labels.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leveraging multi-granularity label complementarity inspires more efficient semi-supervised or weakly-supervised active learning strategies.

papers.title: UniVidX: A Unified Multimodal Framework for Versatile Video Generation via Diffusion Priors
papers.summary: Recent progress has shown that video diffusion models (VDMs) can be repurposed for diverse multimodal graphics tasks. However, existing methods often train separate models for each problem setting, which fixes the input-output mapping and limits the modeling of correlations across modalities. We present UniVidX, a unified multimodal framework that leverages VDM priors for versatile video generation. UniVidX formulates pixel-aligned tasks as conditional generation in a shared multimodal space, adapts to modality-specific distributions while preserving the backbone's native priors, and promotes cross-modal consistency during synthesis. It is built on three key designs. Stochastic Condition Masking (SCM) randomly partitions modalities into clean conditions and noisy targets during training, enabling omni-directional conditional generation instead of fixed mappings. Decoupled Gated LoRA (DGL) introduces per-modality LoRAs that are activated when a modality serves as the generation target, preserving the strong priors of the VDM. Cross-Modal Self-Attention (CMSA) shares keys and values across modalities while keeping modality-specific queries, facilitating information exchange and inter-modal alignment. We instantiate UniVidX in two domains: UniVid-Intrinsic, for RGB videos and intrinsic maps including albedo, irradiance, and normal; and UniVid-Alpha, for blended RGB videos and their constituent RGBA layers. Experiments show that both models achieve performance competitive with state-of-the-art methods across distinct tasks and generalize robustly to in-the-wild scenarios, even when trained on fewer than 1,000 videos. Project page: https://houyuanchen111.github.io/UniVidX.github.io/

ai.tldr: 提出UniVidX统一框架，利用视频扩散先验实现多种视频生成任务，包括RGB视频、本征图及RGBA层生成。
ai.motivation: 现有方法为不同任务训练独立模型，固定输入输出映射，限制了跨模态关联建模。
ai.method: 设计随机条件掩码（SCM）实现全向条件生成，解耦门控LoRA（DGL）保留各模态先验，跨模态自注意力（CMSA）促进信息交换。
ai.result: 在少于1000个视频训练下，UniVidX在多个任务上达到与最先进方法竞争的性能，并鲁棒泛化到真实场景。
ai.help_to_user: 提供统一的视频生成框架，可同时处理RGB、本征图和RGBA层任务，降低多任务开发成本。

idea_spark.idea: 将随机条件掩码与解耦LoRA结合，实现灵活的条件生成。
idea_spark.risk: 跨模态自注意力可能增加计算开销，需平衡效率与性能。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用扩散先验统一多模态生成，启发其他领域（如3D、音频）的联合建模。

en.tldr: Proposes UniVidX, a unified framework leveraging video diffusion priors for versatile video generation, including RGB videos, intrinsic maps, and RGBA layers.
en.motivation: Existing methods train separate models for each task, fixing input-output mappings and limiting cross-modal correlation modeling.
en.method: Designs Stochastic Condition Masking (SCM) for omni-directional conditional generation, Decoupled Gated LoRA (DGL) to preserve per-modality priors, and Cross-Modal Self-Attention (CMSA) for information exchange.
en.result: Trained on fewer than 1,000 videos, UniVidX achieves competitive performance with state-of-the-art methods across tasks and generalizes robustly to in-the-wild scenarios.
en.help_to_user: Provides a unified video generation framework handling RGB, intrinsic maps, and RGBA layers, reducing development cost for multi-task applications.

idea_spark.idea: Combining stochastic condition masking with decoupled LoRA enables flexible conditional generation.
idea_spark.risk: Cross-modal self-attention may increase computational overhead; efficiency-performance trade-off needs consideration.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leveraging diffusion priors to unify multimodal generation inspires joint modeling in other domains like 3D and audio.

papers.title: Decoding Algorithms for Symbol-Error Correction in MDS Array Codes via Superregular Matrices
papers.summary: Maximum distance separable (MDS) array codes constitute an important class of error-correcting codes due to their optimal distance properties and their relevance in distributed storage systems. In this paper, we investigate the construction and decoding of MDS array codes over $\mathbb{F}_q^b$ based on superregular matrices, with emphasis on superregular Vandermonde and Cauchy matrices. We propose decoding algorithms for [n,k,d] MDS array codes, where n=m+k and d=m+1, capable of correcting symbol errors without prior knowledge of their locations. Unlike existing approaches restricted to specific parameter settings, the proposed algorithms apply to general configurations and rely on algebraic relations that do not follow from straightforward extensions of previous methods. Specifically, these algorithms correct one symbol error for $m \geq 2$ and two symbol errors for $m \geq 4$. For the two-error case, the decoding procedure admits a simplified form when Vandermonde superregular matrices are employed, reducing computational complexity. We analyze the algebraic structure of the three-symbol-error case, focusing on the most involved configuration in which all errors occur in information symbols, and we discuss how the method may be extended to the general case. These algorithms are computationally efficient for moderate parameter sizes, as they rely on structured algebraic operations over $\mathbb{F}_q^b$ and the solution of small linear systems, making them suitable for distributed storage applications. From an application perspective, the proposed approach provides a flexible alternative to RAID~6 schemes. Unlike RAID~6, which is limited to two parity disks and often requires prior knowledge of error locations, our construction supports general configurations and enables the correction of multiple symbol errors without location information, at the cost of increased algebraic complexity

ai.tldr: 提出基于超正则矩阵的MDS阵列码符号纠错译码算法，适用于分布式存储系统。
ai.motivation: 现有MDS阵列码译码方法受限于特定参数设置，且常需错误位置先验信息，缺乏通用性。
ai.method: 利用超正则Vandermonde和Cauchy矩阵构造MDS阵列码，设计代数译码算法，通过解小规模线性系统纠正符号错误。
ai.result: 算法可纠正m≥2时的1个符号错误和m≥4时的2个符号错误；Vandermonde矩阵下两错误情形可简化；分析了三错误情形。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种无需错误位置信息的通用MDS阵列码译码方案，可作为RAID 6的灵活替代。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将超正则矩阵与网络编码或量子纠错结合，利用其代数性质简化译码复杂度。
idea_spark.risk: 算法复杂度随参数增大而增加，可能限制在超大规模存储系统中的应用。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从代数编码理论出发，利用矩阵结构设计高效译码，启发其他领域（如通信、数据恢复）的容错方案。

en.tldr: Proposes decoding algorithms for symbol-error correction in MDS array codes based on superregular matrices, targeting distributed storage systems.
en.motivation: Existing decoding methods for MDS array codes are restricted to specific parameter settings and often require prior knowledge of error locations, lacking generality.
en.method: Constructs MDS array codes using superregular Vandermonde and Cauchy matrices, and designs algebraic decoding algorithms that solve small linear systems to correct symbol errors.
en.result: The algorithms correct one symbol error for m≥2 and two symbol errors for m≥4; the two-error case simplifies with Vandermonde matrices; the three-error case is analyzed.
en.help_to_user: Provides a general decoding scheme for MDS array codes without requiring error location information, offering a flexible alternative to RAID 6.

idea_spark.idea: Explore combining superregular matrices with network coding or quantum error correction to leverage algebraic properties for simplified decoding.
idea_spark.risk: Algorithm complexity increases with parameter size, potentially limiting applicability in very large storage systems.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leveraging matrix structure from algebraic coding theory for efficient decoding inspires fault-tolerance solutions in other domains like communications and data recovery.

papers.title: Agent Capsules: Quality-Gated Granularity Control for Multi-Agent LLM Pipelines
papers.summary: A multi-agent pipeline with N agents typically issues N LLM calls per run. Merging agents into fewer calls (compound execution) promises token savings, but naively merged calls silently degrade quality through tool loss and prompt compression. We present Agent Capsules, an adaptive execution runtime that treats multi-agent pipeline execution as an optimization problem with empirical quality constraints. The runtime instruments coordination overhead per group, scores composition opportunity, selects among three compound execution strategies, and gates every mode switch on rolling-mean output quality. A controlled negative result confirms that injecting more context into a merged call worsens compression rather than relieving it, so the framework's escalation ladder (standard, then two-phase, then sequential) recovers quality by moving toward per-agent dispatch rather than by rewriting merged prompts. On LLM-judged quality, the controller matches a hand-tuned oracle on every measured (model, group, mode) cell: routing compound whenever the oracle would, and reverting to fine whenever quality would fail the floor, without per-model configuration. Against a hand-crafted LangGraph implementation of a 14-agent competitive intelligence pipeline, Agent Capsules uses 51% fewer fine-mode input tokens and 42% fewer compound-mode input tokens, at +0.020 and +0.017 quality respectively. Against a DSPy implementation of a 5-agent due diligence pipeline, the framework uses 19% fewer tokens than uncompiled DSPy at quality parity, and 68% fewer tokens than MIPROv2 at +0.052 quality. Even before compound mode fires, the runtime delivers efficiency through automatic policy resolution, cache-aligned prompts, and topology-aware context injection, matching both hand-tuned and compile-time baselines without training data or per-pipeline engineering.

ai.tldr: 提出Agent Capsules，一种自适应执行运行时，通过质量门控的粒度控制优化多智能体LLM管道的令牌消耗与输出质量。
ai.motivation: 多智能体管道中合并智能体调用可节省令牌，但简单合并会因工具丢失和提示压缩而降低质量。
ai.method: 将管道执行视为带经验质量约束的优化问题，通过协调开销测量、组合机会评分、三种复合执行策略选择及滚动平均质量门控实现自适应切换。
ai.result: 在14智能体管道中减少51%细粒度输入令牌和42%复合输入令牌，质量分别提升+0.020和+0.017；在5智能体管道中比未编译DSPy少19%令牌且质量持平，比MIPROv2少68%令牌且质量提升+0.052。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户在不牺牲质量的前提下大幅降低多智能体LLM管道的令牌成本，无需手动调参或训练数据。

idea_spark.idea: 将复合执行策略的切换建模为强化学习问题，通过在线学习进一步优化门控阈值。
idea_spark.risk: 质量门控依赖LLM评判，可能引入评判偏差；复合执行在极端场景下仍可能丢失关键工具信息。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受软件工程中自适应编译优化启发，将运行时质量监控与执行策略选择结合。
